CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[AddEditSerialNumber]

	@SerialNumbers NTEXT

AS
begin

	
    -- Insert statements for procedure here

INSERT INTO [dbo].[PurchaseSaleSerialNumber]

CREATE Proc [dbo].[AllowedModule_Get]
as
begin
select * from (
select s.Id SystemPageId,s.ArName SystemPageName, s.PageCode ,a.IsSelected from AllowedModule a inner join SystemPage s
on a.SystemPageId=s.Id 
where s.IsModule=1 and s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1 and s.ParentId IS NULL
union
select  s.Id SystemPageId,s.ArName SystemPageName,s.PageCode,null IsSelected from SystemPage s
where s.Id not in (select SystemPageId from AllowedModule)
and s.IsModule=1 and s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1 and s.ParentId IS NULL
union
select  s.Id SystemPageId,s.ArName SystemPageName,s.PageCode,null IsSelected from SystemPage s
where s.Id not in (select SystemPageId from AllowedModule)
and  s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1 and s.ParentId = 2116
union
select  s.Id SystemPageId,s.ArName SystemPageName,s.PageCode,(select IsSelected from AllowedModule 
where s.Id =AllowedModule.SystemPageId) IsSelected from SystemPage s
where s.Id  in (select SystemPageId from AllowedModule)
and  s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1 and s.ParentId = 2116
) as x 
order by PageCode
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Area_Get]
	
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT Area.Id, [Area].[Code],Country.ArName as Country, City.ArName as City,[Area].[ArName] as Area ,[Area].[EnName],[Area].[Notes],ERPUser.Name as [User],[Area].[IsDeleted],[Area].[IsActive],[Area].[Image] from Area left join Country
	on Country.Id=Area.CountryId
	left join City
	on City.Id=Area.CityId
	left join ERPUser
	on ERPUser.Id=Area.UserId
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[AssemblyVoucher_Delete]
	@Id int,
	@userId int
AS
BEGIN
declare @AlLChars nvarchar(100) = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'

	-------- Remove From AssemblyVoucher ---------
	update AssemblyVoucher set IsDeleted=1, UserId=@userId ,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7)) where Id=@Id
	update AssemblyVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@Id
	DECLARE @SystemPageId int=(select Id from SystemPage where ControllerName='AssemblyVoucher')
	-------- Remove From StockReceiptVoucher ---------
	DECLARE @StockReceiptVoucherId int =(select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where SystemPageId=@SystemPageId and SelectedId=@Id)
	update StockReceiptVoucher set IsDeleted=1 ,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7)) where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId
	update StockReceiptVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId = @StockReceiptVoucherId
	-------- Remove StockReceiptVoucher From JournalEntry ---------
	DECLARE @StockReceiptSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockReceiptVoucher')
	update JournalEntry set IsDeleted=1 ,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7)) where SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId and SourceId in (select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId)
	update JournalEntryDetail set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@StockReceiptVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId
    -------- Remove From StockIssueVoucher ---------
	DECLARE @StockIssueVoucherId int =(select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SystemPageId and SelectedId=@Id)
	update StockIssueVoucher set IsDeleted=1 ,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7)) where Id=@StockIssueVoucherId
	update StockIssueVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@StockIssueVoucherId
	-------- Remove StockIssueVoucher From JournalEntry ---------
	DECLARE @StockIssueSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockIssueVoucher')
	update JournalEntry set IsDeleted=1 ,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7)) where SourceId=@StockIssueVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId
	update JournalEntryDetail set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@StockIssueVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[AssemblyVoucher_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@VoucherDate datetime ,
	@DepartmentId int ,
	@WarehouseId int,
	@ItemId int,
	@ItemUnitId int,
	@ItemQty float,
	@UserId int ,
	@IsActive bit ,
	@IsDeleted bit ,
	@Notes nvarchar(max) ,
	@Image nvarchar(max) ,
	@CurrencyId int,
	@CurrencyEquivalent float,
	@SystemPageId int,
	@SelectedId int,
	@IsDelivered bit,
	@IsAccepted bit,
	@IsLinked bit,
	@IsCompleted bit,
	@IsPosted bit,
	@AutoCreated bit,
	@UpdatedId int,
	@IsClosed bit,
	@Details NTEXT,
	@ObjectAsDetails ntext
	
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction AssemblyVoucher_Insert;

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [AssemblyVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [AssemblyVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [AssemblyVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [AssemblyVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int, @PaymentMethodsOut int 
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from AssemblyVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'AssemblyVoucher')

CREATE procedure [dbo].[AttendAndLeaveApproval_Ignore]
    @AttendAndLeaveApprovalId int
AS
begin
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction AttendAndLeaveApproval_Ignore;

-- Insert statements for procedure here
DECLARE  @ALDetailsIgnored TABLE (Id int, MainDocId int, IsDeleted bit, EmployeeAttendAndLeaveId int, EmployeeAttendAndLeaveDate datetime, EmployeeAttendTime time(7), EmployeeLeaveTime time(7), ShiftId int, ShiftStartTime time(7), ShiftEndTime	time(7), EmployeeLatenessId	int, EmployeeLatenessMinutes float, EmployeeEarlyLeaveMinutes float, EmployeeAbsenceId int, OvertimeIssueId int, OvertimeIssueMinutes float, IsApproved	bit, IsIgnored	bit, ShiftArName nvarchar(MAX), IsAbsence bit, OvertimeIssueDetailsId int,RewardIssueId	int	,PenaltyIssueId	int	,PenaltyIssueDetialsId int	,RewardIssueDetialsId int )

declare  @EmployeeLtnssId int, @EmployeeAbsnceId int, @OvertimeIssueDetailsId int, @IsIgnored bit, @EmpAttendAndLeaveDate datetime, @PenaltyIssueId int, @EmployeeId int
--, @IsAbsence bit, @EmployeeALId int, @ShiftId int,

INSERT INTO  @ALDetailsIgnored	 
SELECT * FROM AttendAndLeaveApprovalDetail 
WHERE MainDocId = @AttendAndLeaveApprovalId  AND IsDeleted = 0
--AND IsIgnored= 1

DECLARE AttendAndLeaveApprovalIgnoreCursor CURSOR FOR
select EmployeeLatenessId, EmployeeAbsenceId,OvertimeIssueDetailsId,IsIgnored,EmployeeAttendAndLeaveDate from @ALDetailsIgnored

OPEN AttendAndLeaveApprovalIgnoreCursor
 
FETCH NEXT FROM AttendAndLeaveApprovalIgnoreCursor INTO  @EmployeeLtnssId, @EmployeeAbsnceId, @OvertimeIssueDetailsId, @IsIgnored,@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate
WHILE(@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
BEGIN

IF(@EmployeeLtnssId IS NOT NULL)
BEGIN
UPDATE EmployeeLateness
SET IsDeleted = @IsIgnored
WHERE Id = @EmployeeLtnssId;

-- Delete Lateness penalty
set @EmployeeId = (select EmployeeId from EmployeeLateness where Id = @EmployeeLtnssId)
set @PenaltyIssueId = (select Id from PenaltyIssue where EmployeeId = @EmployeeId 
AND [Month] = CAST(MONTH(@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate) as int) AND [Year] = CAST(YEAR(@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate) as int) AND IsDeleted = 0)
DELETE PenaltyIssueDetails
WHERE MainDocId = @PenaltyIssueId AND Date = @EmpAttendAndLeaveDate AND Cause='حضور متأخر';
END

IF(@EmployeeAbsnceId IS NOT NULL)
BEGIN
UPDATE EmployeeAbsence
SET IsDeleted = @IsIgnored
WHERE Id = @EmployeeAbsnceId;
END

IF(@OvertimeIssueDetailsId IS NOT NULL)
BEGIN
UPDATE OvertimeIssueDetials
SET  IsDeleted = @IsIgnored
WHERE Id = @OvertimeIssueDetailsId;
END

FETCH NEXT FROM AttendAndLeaveApprovalIgnoreCursor INTO  @EmployeeLtnssId, @EmployeeAbsnceId, @OvertimeIssueDetailsId,@IsIgnored,@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate
END

CLOSE AttendAndLeaveApprovalIgnoreCursor
DEALLOCATE AttendAndLeaveApprovalIgnoreCursor


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction AttendAndLeaveApproval_Ignore;

        raiserror ('AttendAndLeaveApproval_Ignore: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[BalanceStatement_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@fromDate datetime, @toDate datetime, @departmentId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
truncate table BalanceStatement

declare @accountId int, @code nvarchar(max), @arName nvarchar(max), @classificationId int, @obDebit money, @obCredit money, @debit money, @credit money, @totalDebit money, @totalCredit money, @balanceDebit money, @balanceCredit money, @parentId int

declare cur cursor for select [Id],[Code],[ArName],[ObDebit],[ObCredit],[ParentId],[ClassificationId] from [dbo].[ChartOfAccount] where [IsDeleted]=0 
	
open cur
fetch next from cur into @accountId, @code, @arName, @obDebit, @obCredit, @parentId, @classificationId
while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
begin
	if @departmentId>0
	begin
		set @debit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Debit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (@fromDate is null or JE.[Date] >=@fromDate ) and (@toDate is null or JE.[Date] <= @toDate) AND JE.DepartmentId=@departmentId AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
		set @credit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Credit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (@fromDate is null or JE.[Date] >=@fromDate ) and (@toDate is null or JE.[Date] <= @toDate) AND JE.DepartmentId=@departmentId AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
	end
	else
	begin
		set @debit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Debit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (@fromDate is null or JE.[Date] >=@fromDate ) and (@toDate is null or JE.[Date] <= @toDate) AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
		set @credit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Credit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (@fromDate is null or JE.[Date] >=@fromDate ) and (@toDate is null or JE.[Date] <= @toDate) AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
	end
	
	if @debit>@credit
	begin
		set @debit=@debit-@credit
		set @credit=0
	end
	else
	begin
		set @credit=@credit-@debit
		set @debit=0
	end

	set @totalDebit=@obDebit+@debit
	set @totalCredit=@obCredit+@credit

	if	@totalDebit>@totalCredit
	begin
		set @balanceDebit=@totalDebit-@totalCredit
		set @balanceCredit=0
	end
	else
	begin
		set @balanceCredit=@totalCredit-@totalDebit
		set @balanceDebit=0
	end
	Insert into BalanceStatement (
	[Id] ,
	[Code] ,
	[ArName] ,
	[ParentId],
	[ObDebit],
	[ObCredit] ,
	[Debit],
	[Credit],
	[TotalDebit] ,
	[TotalCredit] ,
	[BalanceDebit],
	[BalanceCredit],
	[ClassificationId])
	 VALUES
	(@accountId,
	@code,
	@arName,
	@parentId,
	@obDebit,
	@obCredit,
	@debit,
	@credit,
	@obDebit+@debit,
	@obCredit+@credit,
	@balanceDebit,
	@balanceCredit,
	@classificationId)
	fetch next from cur into @accountId, @code, @arName, @obDebit, @obCredit, @parentId, @classificationId
end

close cur
deallocate cur

declare SubCur cursor for select distinct( [ParentId]) from BalanceStatement where [ClassificationId]=3
open SubCur
fetch next from SubCur into @accountId
while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
begin
	update BalanceStatement
	set [ObDebit] = (select sum([ObDebit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId ),
	[ObCredit] = (select sum([ObCredit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId),
	[Debit] = (select sum([Debit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId),
	[Credit] = (select sum([Credit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId),
	[TotalDebit] = (select sum([TotalDebit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId ),
	[TotalCredit] = (select sum([TotalCredit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId ),
	[BalanceDebit] = (select sum([BalanceDebit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId),
	[BalanceCredit] = (select sum([BalanceCredit]) from BalanceStatement where [ParentId]=@accountId)
	where [Id]=@accountId
	set @balanceDebit= isnull((select BalanceDebit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),0)
	set @balanceCredit=isnull((select BalanceCredit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),0)
	if @balanceDebit>@balanceCredit
	begin
		update BalanceStatement
		set BalanceDebit= ISNULL(BalanceDebit,0)-ISNULL(BalanceCredit,0),
		BalanceCredit=0
		where Id=@accountId
	end
	else
	begin
		update BalanceStatement
		set BalanceCredit=ISNULL(BalanceCredit,0)-ISNULL(BalanceDebit,0),
		BalanceDebit=0
		where Id=@accountId
	end

	set @parentId=(select ParentId from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId) 

	while @parentId is not null
	begin
	update BalanceStatement
	set [ObDebit] = [ObDebit]+(select ObDebit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),
	[ObCredit] = ObCredit+(select ObCredit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),
	[Debit] = Debit+(select Debit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),
	[Credit] = Credit+(select Credit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),
	[TotalDebit] = TotalDebit+(select TotalDebit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),
	[TotalCredit] = TotalCredit+(select TotalCredit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),
	[BalanceDebit] = BalanceDebit+(select BalanceDebit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId),
	[BalanceCredit] = BalanceCredit+(select BalanceCredit from BalanceStatement where Id=@accountId)
	where [Id]=@parentId
	set @balanceDebit=isnull((select BalanceDebit from BalanceStatement where Id=@parentId),0)
	set @balanceCredit=isnull((select BalanceCredit from BalanceStatement where Id=@parentId),0)
	if @balanceDebit>@balanceCredit
	begin
		update BalanceStatement
		set BalanceDebit= ISNULL(BalanceDebit,0)-ISNULL(BalanceCredit,0),
		BalanceCredit=0
		where Id=@parentId
	end
	else
	begin
		update BalanceStatement
		set BalanceCredit= ISNULL(BalanceDebit,0)-ISNULL(BalanceCredit,0),
		BalanceDebit=0
		where Id=@parentId
	end
	set @parentId=(select ParentId from BalanceStatement where Id=@parentId)
	end

	fetch next from SubCur into @accountId
end
close SubCur
deallocate SubCur
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[BorrowRequest_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@VoucherDate datetime ,
	@DepartmentId int ,
	@EmployeeId int ,
	@BorrowRequestDate date ,
	@BorrowValue money,
	@InstallmentFirstDate date,
	@InstallmentValue money,
	@UserId int,
	@IsDeleted bit ,
	@Notes nvarchar(max) ,
	@Image nvarchar(max) ,
	@Details NTEXT,
	@SystemPageId	int ,
    @SelectedId	int ,
    @IsDelivered	bit ,
    @IsAccepted	bit ,
    @IsLinked	bit ,
    @IsCompleted	bit ,
    @IsPosted	bit ,
    @AutoCreated	bit ,
	@InstallmentNo int,
	@BorrowStatusId int,
	@RefuseReason nvarchar(max),
	@IsIssued bit
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @tran int;
    set @tran = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @tran = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction BorrowRequest_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from BorrowRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from BorrowRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from BorrowRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from BorrowRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from BorrowRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId  and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

INSERT INTO BorrowRequest
           (DocumentNumber
           ,VoucherDate
		   ,DepartmentId
           ,EmployeeId  ,
	        BorrowRequestDate  ,
	        BorrowValue ,
	        InstallmentFirstDate ,

	)

set @Id =(select MAX([Id]) from BorrowRequest)

---------------------- Details -------------------------
EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @DetailsOut OUT, @Details
INSERT INTO BorrowRequestDetail
           (MainDocId
           ,InstallmentDate
           ,InstallmentValue
		   ,IsInstallmentPaid
           ,IsDeleted

SELECT @Id

FROM OPENXML (@DetailsOut, '/DocumentElement/Details', 2)
with([MainDocId] [int]

           ,InstallmentValue money
		   ,IsInstallmentPaid bit

	)
	 EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @DetailsOut

	
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
lbexit:
        if @tran = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @tran = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @tran> 0
            rollback transaction BorrowRequest_Insert;

        raiserror ('BorrowRequest_Insert: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE   PROCEDURE dbo.CarCurrentStock_Get
    @FromDate DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate DATETIME = NULL,
    @WarehouseId INT = NULL,
    @CarTypeId INT = NULL,
    @CarModelId INT = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    SELECT
        pid.ChassisNo,
        ISNULL(ct.ArName, '') AS CarType,
        ISNULL(cm.ArName, '') AS CarModel,
        ISNULL(cc.ArName, '') AS CarColor,
        pid.ManufacturingYear,
        pid.EngineNo,
        pid.PlateNo,
        v.ArName AS VendorName,
        pi.DocumentNumber AS PurchaseInvoiceNumber,
        pi.VoucherDate AS PurchaseDate,
        ISNULL(pid.CostPrice, pid.Price) AS PurchaseCost,
        w.ArName AS WarehouseName,
        pid.VehicleNotes
    FROM PurchaseInvoiceDetails pid
    INNER JOIN PurchaseInvoice pi ON pi.Id = pid.MainDocId AND pi.IsDeleted = 0
    LEFT JOIN SalesInvoiceDetails sid ON sid.ChassisNo = pid.ChassisNo AND sid.IsDeleted = 0
    LEFT JOIN CarType ct ON ct.Id = pid.CarTypeId
    LEFT JOIN CarModel cm ON cm.Id = pid.CarModelId
    LEFT JOIN CarColor cc ON cc.Id = pid.CarColorId
    LEFT JOIN Vendor v ON v.Id = pi.VendorOrCustomerId
    LEFT JOIN Warehouse w ON w.Id = pi.WarehouseId
    WHERE pid.IsDeleted = 0
      AND ISNULL(pid.ChassisNo, '') <> ''
      AND sid.Id IS NULL
      AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR pi.VoucherDate >= @FromDate)
      AND (@ToDate IS NULL OR pi.VoucherDate < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @ToDate))
      AND (@WarehouseId IS NULL OR pi.WarehouseId = @WarehouseId)
      AND (@CarTypeId IS NULL OR pid.CarTypeId = @CarTypeId)
      AND (@CarModelId IS NULL OR pid.CarModelId = @CarModelId)
    ORDER BY pi.VoucherDate DESC, pid.Id DESC;
END

CREATE   PROCEDURE dbo.CarQuotationReport_Get
    @FromDate DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate DATETIME = NULL,
    @CustomerId INT = NULL,
    @CarTypeId INT = NULL,
    @CarModelId INT = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    SELECT
        sq.DocumentNumber AS QuotationNumber,
        sq.VoucherDate AS QuotationDate,
        c.ArName AS CustomerName,
        sqd.ChassisNo,
        ISNULL(ct.ArName, '') AS CarType,
        ISNULL(cm.ArName, '') AS CarModel,
        ISNULL(cc.ArName, '') AS CarColor,
        sqd.ManufacturingYear,
        sqd.EngineNo,
        sqd.PlateNo,
        sqd.Price,
        sqd.VehicleNotes
    FROM SalesQuotationDetails sqd
    INNER JOIN SalesQuotation sq ON sq.Id = sqd.MainDocId AND sq.IsDeleted = 0
    LEFT JOIN Customer c ON c.Id = sq.VendorOrCustomerId
    LEFT JOIN CarType ct ON ct.Id = sqd.CarTypeId
    LEFT JOIN CarModel cm ON cm.Id = sqd.CarModelId
    LEFT JOIN CarColor cc ON cc.Id = sqd.CarColorId
    WHERE sqd.IsDeleted = 0
      AND ISNULL(sqd.ChassisNo, '') <> ''
      AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR sq.VoucherDate >= @FromDate)
      AND (@ToDate IS NULL OR sq.VoucherDate < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @ToDate))
      AND (@CustomerId IS NULL OR sq.VendorOrCustomerId = @CustomerId)
      AND (@CarTypeId IS NULL OR sqd.CarTypeId = @CarTypeId)
      AND (@CarModelId IS NULL OR sqd.CarModelId = @CarModelId)
    ORDER BY sq.VoucherDate DESC, sqd.Id DESC;
END

CREATE   PROCEDURE dbo.CarSalesHistory_Get
    @FromDate DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate DATETIME = NULL,
    @CarTypeId INT = NULL,
    @CarModelId INT = NULL,
    @CustomerId INT = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    ;WITH Purch AS (
        SELECT pid.*, pi.DocumentNumber AS PurchaseInvoiceNumber, pi.VoucherDate AS PurchaseDate,
               ISNULL(pid.CostPrice, pid.Price) AS PurchaseCost
        FROM PurchaseInvoiceDetails pid
        INNER JOIN PurchaseInvoice pi ON pi.Id = pid.MainDocId AND pi.IsDeleted = 0
        WHERE pid.IsDeleted = 0 AND ISNULL(pid.ChassisNo, '') <> ''
    )
    SELECT
        sid.ChassisNo,
        ISNULL(ct.ArName, '') AS CarType,
        ISNULL(cm.ArName, '') AS CarModel,
        ISNULL(cc.ArName, '') AS CarColor,
        sid.ManufacturingYear,
        p.PurchaseInvoiceNumber,
        p.PurchaseDate,
        p.PurchaseCost,
        si.DocumentNumber AS SalesInvoiceNumber,
        si.VoucherDate AS SalesDate,
        sid.Price AS SalePrice,
        (sid.Price - ISNULL(p.PurchaseCost, 0)) AS GrossMargin,
        c.ArName AS CustomerName,
        sid.VehicleNotes
    FROM SalesInvoiceDetails sid
    INNER JOIN SalesInvoice si ON si.Id = sid.MainDocId AND si.IsDeleted = 0
    LEFT JOIN Purch p ON p.ChassisNo = sid.ChassisNo
    LEFT JOIN CarType ct ON ct.Id = sid.CarTypeId
    LEFT JOIN CarModel cm ON cm.Id = sid.CarModelId
    LEFT JOIN CarColor cc ON cc.Id = sid.CarColorId
    LEFT JOIN Customer c ON c.Id = si.VendorOrCustomerId
    WHERE sid.IsDeleted = 0
      AND ISNULL(sid.ChassisNo, '') <> ''
      AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR si.VoucherDate >= @FromDate)
      AND (@ToDate IS NULL OR si.VoucherDate < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @ToDate))
      AND (@CarTypeId IS NULL OR sid.CarTypeId = @CarTypeId)
      AND (@CarModelId IS NULL OR sid.CarModelId = @CarModelId)
      AND (@CustomerId IS NULL OR si.VendorOrCustomerId = @CustomerId)
    ORDER BY si.VoucherDate DESC, sid.Id DESC;
END

	@Id int output,

	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@CarPlateNumber [nvarchar](100),
	@CarSerialNumber [nvarchar](100),

	@CarOutOdometer [nvarchar](100),
	@Details NTEXT
	
	
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction CarSalesInvoice_Insert;
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from CarSalesInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
	
	----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from CarSalesInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from CarSalesInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from CarSalesInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from CarSalesInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CashBox_BalanceSheet] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@CashBoxId int ,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @CashBoxBalanceSheet table(Debit money null, Credit money null, ArName nvarchar(100) null, [JournalDocNum] nvarchar(100) null, [Date] datetime null, 
[DocumentNumber] nvarchar(100) null, [CashBoxArName] nvarchar(100) null, [DebitBalance] money null, [CreditBalance] money null,[SourceName] nvarchar(max) null,[Notes] nvarchar(max) null)
declare @CashBoxArName nvarchar(100)=(select ArName from CashBox where Id=@CashBoxId)
declare @CashBoxAccountId int=(select AccountId from CashBox where Id=@CashBoxId)
declare @periodStart datetime=(select top 1 PeriodStart from FinancialPeriods where IsActive=1 and Opened=1 and (Closed !=0 or Closed IS NULL));

with CashBoxBalanceSheet  as  (
select ISNULL(OpeningBalance,0) Debit, 0 Credit ,N'رصيد افتتاحي' ArName,''[JournalDocNum], @periodStart [Date],'' [DocumentNumber] ,'' SourceName ,Notes from [dbo].CashBox
where Id=@CashBoxId
union
------------------CashIssueVoucher----------------------
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], CashIssueVoucher.DocumentNumber,[dbo].[CashIssueVoucher_GetSourceName]([CashIssueVoucher].Id,SourceTypeId) SourceName ,CashIssueVoucher.Notes from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join CashIssueVoucher on CashIssueVoucher.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=21
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select Id from CashIssueVoucher where IsDeleted=0 and IsActive=1 and CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------CashReceiptVoucher----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], CashReceiptVoucher.DocumentNumber,[dbo].[CashReceiptVoucher_GetSourceName]([CashReceiptVoucher].Id,SourceTypeId) SourceName ,CashReceiptVoucher.Notes from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join CashReceiptVoucher on CashReceiptVoucher.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=22
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select Id from CashReceiptVoucher where IsDeleted=0  and IsActive=1 and CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------CashTransferFrom----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName +N'-منه ' ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], CashTransfer.DocumentNumber,
(Select ArName from CashBox where id=CashTransfer.CashBoxIdTo) SourceName
 ,CashTransfer.Notes from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join CashTransfer on CashTransfer.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=20
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select Id from CashTransfer where IsDeleted=0 and CashBoxIdFrom=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
and Debit=0
------------------CashTransferTo----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName+N'- له' ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], CashTransfer.DocumentNumber,(Select ArName from CashBox where id=CashTransfer.CashBoxIdFrom) SourceName 
,CashTransfer.Notes from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join CashTransfer on CashTransfer.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=20
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select Id from CashTransfer where IsDeleted=0 and CashBoxIdTo=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
and Credit=0
------------------SalesOrder----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], SalesOrder.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Customer where Id=SalesOrder.VendorOrCustomerId) SourceName
 ,SalesOrder.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join SalesOrder on SalesOrder.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=5194
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select SalesOrderId from SalesOrderPaymentMethod inner join SalesOrder on SalesOrder.Id=SalesOrderPaymentMethod.SalesOrderId where CashBoxId=@CashBoxId and Amount>0 and SalesOrder.IsDeleted=0) and AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId

------------------SalesInvoice----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], SalesInvoice.DocumentNumber ,(select ArName from Customer where Id=SalesInvoice.VendorOrCustomerId) SourceName 
,SalesInvoice.Notes from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join SalesInvoice on SalesInvoice.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=58
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select SalesInvoiceId from SalesInvoicePaymentMethods inner join SalesInvoice on SalesInvoice.Id=SalesInvoicePaymentMethods.SalesInvoiceId where CashBoxId=@CashBoxId and Amount>0 and SalesInvoice.IsDeleted=0) and AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------SalesReturns----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], SalesReturns.DocumentNumber ,(select ArName from Customer where Id=SalesReturns.VendorOrCustomerId) SourceName 
,SalesReturns.Notes from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join SalesReturns on SalesReturns.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=3131
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select SalesReturnsId from SalesReturnPaymentMethod inner join SalesReturns on SalesReturns.Id=SalesReturnPaymentMethod.SalesReturnsId where CashBoxId=@CashBoxId and Amount>0 and SalesReturns.IsDeleted=0) and AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------PurchaseInvoice----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], PurchaseInvoice.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Vendor where Id=PurchaseInvoice.VendorOrCustomerId) SourceName 
,PurchaseInvoice.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join PurchaseInvoice on PurchaseInvoice.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=57
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select PurchaseInvoiceId from PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods inner join PurchaseInvoice on PurchaseInvoice.Id=PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods.PurchaseInvoiceId where CashBoxId=@CashBoxId and Amount>0 and PurchaseInvoice.IsDeleted=0) and AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------PurchaseReturns----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date], PurchaseReturns.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Vendor where Id=PurchaseReturns.VendorOrCustomerId) SourceName 
,PurchaseReturns.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join PurchaseReturns on PurchaseReturns.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=3141
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in (select PurchaseReturnId from PurchaseReturnPaymentMethod inner join PurchaseReturns on PurchaseReturns.Id=PurchaseReturnPaymentMethod.PurchaseReturnId where CashBoxId=@CashBoxId and Amount>0 and PurchaseReturns.IsDeleted=0) and AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------RoomBooking----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date],
RoomBooking.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Customer where Id=RoomBooking.CustomerId) SourceName 
,RoomBooking.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join RoomBooking on RoomBooking.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=10385
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in(select Id from RoomBooking where IsDeleted=0 and RoomBooking.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------MealReservation----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date],
MealReservation.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Customer where Id=MealReservation.CustomerId) SourceName 
,MealReservation.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join MealReservation on MealReservation.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=10386

------------------DayUseReservation----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date],
DayUseReservation.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Customer where Id=DayUseReservation.CustomerId) SourceName 
,DayUseReservation.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join DayUseReservation on DayUseReservation.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=10388
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in(select Id from DayUseReservation where IsDeleted=0 and DayUseReservation.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------HotelManagementCarEntry----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date],
HotelManagementCarEntry.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Customer where Id=HotelManagementCarEntry.CustomerId) SourceName 
,HotelManagementCarEntry.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join HotelManagementCarEntry on HotelManagementCarEntry.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=10389
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in(select Id from HotelManagementCarEntry where IsDeleted=0 and HotelManagementCarEntry.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId
------------------RoomLeavePermission----------------------
union
select Debit, Credit, SystemPage.ArName, JournalEntry.DocumentNumber [JournalDocNum], JournalEntry.[Date],
RoomLeavePermission.DocumentNumber,(select ArName from Customer where Id=RoomLeavePermission.CustomerId) SourceName 
,RoomLeavePermission.Notes  from JournalEntryDetail 
right join JournalEntry on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
right join RoomLeavePermission on RoomLeavePermission.Id=JournalEntry.SourceId and JournalEntry.SourcePageId=10390
where 
JournalEntry.SourceId in(select Id from RoomLeavePermission where IsDeleted=0 and RoomLeavePermission.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) and JournalEntryDetail. AccountId=@CashBoxAccountId

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
) 

insert into @CashBoxBalanceSheet (Debit  , Credit , ArName , [JournalDocNum]  , [Date]  , [DocumentNumber], CashBoxArName,SourceName,Notes)
select Debit  , Credit , ArName , [JournalDocNum]  , [Date]  , [DocumentNumber], @CashBoxArName,SourceName,Notes from CashBoxBalanceSheet where Debit>0 or Credit>0 order by [Date]

declare @date datetime, @debitBalance money, @creditBalance money
declare OBCur cursor for select [date] from @CashBoxBalanceSheet
open OBCur
fetch next from OBCur into @date
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	set @debitBalance=(select SUM(Debit) from @CashBoxBalanceSheet where [Date]<=@date or [Date] is null)
	set @creditBalance=(select SUM(Credit) from @CashBoxBalanceSheet where [Date]<=@date or [Date] is null)
	if @debitBalance>@creditBalance
	begin
		set @debitBalance=ISNULL(@debitBalance,0)- ISNULL(@creditBalance,0)
		set @creditBalance=0
	end
	else
	begin
		set @creditBalance=ISNULL(@creditBalance,0)- ISNULL(@debitBalance,0)
		set @debitBalance=0
	end
	update @CashBoxBalanceSheet 
	set DebitBalance=@debitBalance, CreditBalance=@creditBalance
	where [Date]=@date
	fetch next from OBCur into @date
end

select * from @CashBoxBalanceSheet t where (@DateFrom is null or [Date]>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [Date]<=@DateTo) order by [Date] 
END

 set @SourceName=(select  "Customer"."ArName" as "Customer" from "dbo"."CashIssueVoucher" "CashIssueVoucher"  left join "dbo"."Customer" "Customer"

begin

       on (Employee."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."EmployeeId"))
end
else if((select Id from [dbo].[CashIssueSourceType] where Id=@SourceId)=4)
begin
set @SourceName=(select  DirectExpenses."ArName" as "Customer" from "dbo"."CashIssueVoucher" "CashIssueVoucher"  left join "dbo".DirectExpenses DirectExpenses
       on (DirectExpenses."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher".DirectExpensesId))
end
else if((select Id from [dbo].[CashIssueSourceType] where Id=@SourceId)=6)
begin

select "CashIssueVoucher"."DocumentNumber",

       "DirectExpenses"."ArName" as "DirectExpenses",

       "Currency"."ArName" as "Currency",
       "ChartOfAccount"."ArName" as "Account",
       "Customer"."ArName" as "Customer",
       "Vendor"."ArName" as "Vendor",
       "Employee"."ArName" as "Employee",
       "CashIssueVoucher"."CurrencyEquivalent",
       "Department"."ArName" as "Department",

	    @SourceName as SourceName
  from "dbo"."CashIssueVoucher"
       "CashIssueVoucher"
  left join "dbo"."Branch" "Branch"
       on ("Branch"."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."BranchId")
  left join "dbo"."CashIssueSourceType"
       "CashIssueSourceType"
       on ("CashIssueSourceType"."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."SourceTypeId")
  left join "dbo"."DirectExpenses"
       "DirectExpenses"
       on ("DirectExpenses"."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."DirectExpensesId")
  left join "dbo"."Currency" "Currency"
       on ("Currency"."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."CurrencyId")
  left join "dbo"."ChartOfAccount"
       "ChartOfAccount"
       on ("ChartOfAccount"."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."AccountId")
  left join "dbo"."ERPUser" "ERPUser"
       on ("ERPUser"."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."UserId")
  left join "dbo"."Employee" "Emp"
       on ("ERPUser"."EmployeeId" = "Emp"."Id")
  left join "dbo"."Customer" "Customer"

   left join "dbo"."Vendor" "Vendor"

  left join "dbo"."Department" "Department"
       on ("Department"."Id" = "CashIssueVoucher"."DepartmentId")
  left join "dbo"."CashBox" "CashBox"

 where (@DocNum is null or("CashIssueVoucher"."DocumentNumber" =
       @DocNum)

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CashIssueAndReceipt_Get]
    @DepartmentId     INT,
    @DateFrom         DATETIME,
    @DateTo           DATETIME,
    @CashBoxId        INT,
    @ActivityId       INT,
    @CompanyId        INT,
    @PropertyId       INT = NULL,       -- عقار
    @PropertyUnitId   INT = NULL        -- وحدة (PropertyDetail.Id)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    /* طبّع البارامترات: 0 => NULL */
    DECLARE
        @DepartmentId_   INT       = NULLIF(@DepartmentId, 0),
        @CashBoxId_      INT       = NULLIF(@CashBoxId, 0),
        @ActivityId_     INT       = NULLIF(@ActivityId, 0),
        @CompanyId_      INT       = NULLIF(@CompanyId, 0),
        @PropertyId_     INT       = NULLIF(@PropertyId, 0),
        @PropertyUnitId_ INT       = NULLIF(@PropertyUnitId, 0),
        @DateFrom_       DATETIME  = @DateFrom,
        @DateTo_         DATETIME  = @DateTo;

    /* (اختياري) اجعل الفترة تاريخية شاملة نهاية اليوم: [DateFrom_, DateTo_+1) */
    IF @DateFrom_ IS NOT NULL SET @DateFrom_ = DATEADD(DAY, DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, @DateFrom_), 0);
    IF @DateTo_   IS NOT NULL SET @DateTo_   = DATEADD(DAY, DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, @DateTo_) + 1, 0);

    SELECT *
    FROM (
        /* ===== سندات الدفع (Issue) ===== */
        SELECT 
            CIV.Id,
            CIV.DocumentNumber,
            B.ArName AS Branch,
            CASE WHEN IAD.Id IS NOT NULL THEN IAD.Price ELSE CIV.MoneyAmount END AS MoneyAmount,
            CIST.ArName AS SourceType,
            dbo.CashIssueVoucher_GetSourceName(CIV.Id, CIV.SourceTypeId) AS SourceName,
            CIV.[Date],
            C.ArName AS Currency,
            EU.[Name] AS [User],
            CASE WHEN IA.Notes IS NOT NULL THEN IA.Notes ELSE CIV.Notes END AS Notes,
            CIV.Image,
            CIV.CurrencyEquivalent,
            D.ArName AS Department,
            COALESCE(CB.ArName, BK.ArName) AS CashBox,
            N'IssueVoucher' AS VoucherType,
            N'سند دفع'     AS VoucherType2,
            CRPM.ArName AS CashReceiptPaymentMethodName,
            CRPM.Id     AS CashReceiptPaymentMethodId,

            -- العقار/الوحدة (قد تكون NULL لو مفيش توزيع)
            P.Id            AS PropertyID,
            P.ArName        AS PropertyName,
            PD.PropertyUnitNo AS PropertyUnitName
        FROM dbo.CashIssueVoucher CIV
        LEFT JOIN Branch B                      ON B.Id  = CIV.BranchId
        LEFT JOIN CashIssueSourceType CIST      ON CIST.Id = CIV.SourceTypeId
        LEFT JOIN Currency C                    ON C.Id = CIV.CurrencyId
        LEFT JOIN ERPUser EU                    ON EU.Id = CIV.UserId
        LEFT JOIN Department D                  ON D.Id = CIV.DepartmentId
        LEFT JOIN CashBox CB                    ON CB.Id = CIV.CashBoxId
        LEFT JOIN BankAccount BA                ON BA.Id = CIV.BankAccountId
        LEFT JOIN Bank BK                       ON BK.Id = BA.BankId
        LEFT JOIN CashReceiptPaymentMethod CRPM ON CRPM.Id = CIV.CashIssuePaymentMethodId

        LEFT JOIN IssueAnalysis IA              ON IA.CashIssueVoucherId = CIV.Id
        LEFT JOIN IssueAnalysisDetail IAD       ON IAD.IssueAnalysisId   = IA.Id
        LEFT JOIN PropertyDetail PD             ON PD.Id                 = IAD.PropertyDetailId
        LEFT JOIN Property P                    ON P.Id                  = PD.MainDocId

        WHERE 
            (@DepartmentId_ IS NULL OR CIV.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId_)
        AND (@ActivityId_   IS NULL OR D.ActivityId      = @ActivityId_)
        AND (@CompanyId_    IS NULL OR D.CompanyId       = @CompanyId_)
        AND (@DateFrom_     IS NULL OR CIV.[Date]        >= @DateFrom_)
        AND (@DateTo_       IS NULL OR CIV.[Date]        <  @DateTo_)
        AND CIV.IsDeleted = 0
        AND CIV.IsActive  = 1
        AND (@CashBoxId_   IS NULL OR CIV.CashBoxId      = @CashBoxId_)
        AND (@PropertyId_    IS NULL OR P.Id             = @PropertyId_)
        AND (@PropertyUnitId_ IS NULL OR PD.Id           = @PropertyUnitId_)

        UNION ALL

        /* ===== سندات القبض (Receipt) ===== */
        SELECT 
            CRV.Id,
            CRV.DocumentNumber,
            B.ArName AS Branch,
            CRV.MoneyAmount,
            CRST.ArName AS SourceType,
            dbo.CashReceiptVoucher_GetSourceName(CRV.Id, CRV.SourceTypeId) AS SourceName,
            CRV.[Date],
            C.ArName AS Currency,
            EU.[Name] AS [User],
            CRV.Notes,
            CRV.Image,
            CRV.CurrencyEquivalent,
            D.ArName AS Department,
            COALESCE(CB.ArName, BK.ArName) AS CashBox,
            N'Receipt' AS VoucherType,
            N'سند قبض' AS VoucherType2,
            CRPM.ArName AS CashReceiptPaymentMethodName,
            CRV.CashReceiptPaymentMethodId,
            P.Id             AS PropertyID,
            P.ArName         AS PropertyName,
            PU.PropertyUnitNo AS PropertyUnitName
        FROM dbo.CashReceiptVoucher CRV
        LEFT JOIN Branch B                       ON B.Id = CRV.BranchId
        LEFT JOIN CashReceiptSourceType CRST     ON CRST.Id = CRV.SourceTypeId
        LEFT JOIN Currency C                     ON C.Id = CRV.CurrencyId
        LEFT JOIN ERPUser EU                     ON EU.Id = CRV.UserId
        LEFT JOIN Department D                   ON D.Id = CRV.DepartmentId
        LEFT JOIN CashBox CB                     ON CB.Id = CRV.CashBoxId
        LEFT JOIN BankAccount BA                 ON BA.Id = CRV.BankAccountId
        LEFT JOIN Bank BK                        ON BK.Id = BA.BankId
        LEFT JOIN PropertyContract PC            ON PC.Id = CRV.PropertyContractId
        LEFT JOIN Property P                     ON P.Id  = PC.PropertyId
        LEFT JOIN PropertyDetail PU              ON PU.Id = PC.PropertyUnitId
        LEFT JOIN CashReceiptPaymentMethod CRPM  ON CRPM.Id = CRV.CashReceiptPaymentMethodId
        WHERE 
            (@DepartmentId_ IS NULL OR CRV.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId_)
        AND (@ActivityId_   IS NULL OR D.ActivityId      = @ActivityId_)
        AND (@CompanyId_    IS NULL OR D.CompanyId       = @CompanyId_)  -- تم تصحيحها
        AND (@DateFrom_     IS NULL OR CRV.[Date]        >= @DateFrom_)
        AND (@DateTo_       IS NULL OR CRV.[Date]        <  @DateTo_)
        AND CRV.IsActive  = 1
        AND CRV.IsDeleted = 0
        AND (@CashBoxId_   IS NULL OR CRV.CashBoxId      = @CashBoxId_)
        AND (@PropertyId_    IS NULL OR P.Id             = @PropertyId_)
        AND (@PropertyUnitId_ IS NULL OR PU.Id           = @PropertyUnitId_)
    ) AS x
    ORDER BY [Date];
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[CashIssueVoucher_Delete]
@Id int,@UserId int
as

declare @AlLChars nvarchar(100) = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'
declare @SourcePageId int=(select Id from SystemPage where TableName = 'CashIssueVoucher')
update JournalEntry set IsDeleted = 1, UserId=@UserId
,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
where SourcePageId =  @SourcePageId and SourceId = @Id

 update JournalEntryDetail set IsDeleted = 1 where JournalEntryId = (select Id from JournalEntry where SourcePageId = @SourcePageId and SourceId = @Id)


 update CashIssueVoucher
	set IsDeleted=1 
	,UserId=@UserId
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where Id=@Id

	update IssueAnalysis
	set IsDeleted=1 
	where CashIssueVoucherId=@Id

--/*-- Cursor to delete effects of cash receipt on  Paid Amount in PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods --*/-- 
  DECLARE @PurchaseInvoiceId as int ,@newPaid money
DECLARE _cursor CURSOR  
    FOR SELECT PurchaseInvoiceId ,Amount  FROM PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment where  CashIssueVoucherId=@Id
OPEN _cursor  
FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor INTO @PurchaseInvoiceId,@newPaid
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
  BEGIN
      UPDATE PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods
      SET    PaidAmount = PaidAmount-@newPaid
	  where PaymentMethodId=2 and PurchaseInvoiceId=@PurchaseInvoiceId
      FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor INTO @PurchaseInvoiceId,@newPaid
  END;
CLOSE _cursor;
DEALLOCATE _cursor;      
--//-------------------------------------//----------------------------------------//--


DELETE FROM PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment WHERE [CashIssueVoucherId]=@Id
