CREATE PROC [dbo].[CashIssueVoucher_Update]
    @Id INT,
    @DocumentNumber NVARCHAR(MAX),
    @BranchId INT,
    @MoneyAmount MONEY,
    @SourceTypeId INT,
    @DirectExpensesId INT,
    @Date DATETIME,
    @CurrencyId INT,
    @AccountId INT,
    @IsLinked BIT,
    @IsPosted BIT,
    @IsActive BIT,
    @IsDeleted BIT,
    @UserId INT,
    @Notes NVARCHAR(MAX),
    @Image NVARCHAR(MAX),
    @CustomerId INT,
    @VendorId INT,
    @TechnicianId INT,
    @EmployeeId INT,
    @CurrencyEquivalent FLOAT,
    @DepartmentId INT,
    @CashBoxId INT,
    @ShareholderId INT,
    @CostCenterId INT,
    @PosId INT,
    @CashierUserId INT,
    @ShiftId INT,
    @IsCollected BIT,
    @IsClosed BIT,
    @IsInvoiceSelected BIT,
    @PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment NTEXT,
    @BankAccountId INT,
    @TransactionNo NVARCHAR(500),
    @TransactionDate DATETIME,
    @ChartOfAccountId INT,
    @CashIssuePaymentMethodId INT,
    @FeesAmount MONEY,
    @ValueAddedTaxesAmount MONEY,
    @IsSynced BIT,
    @IsUpdateSynced BIT,
    @BorrowReceipt BIT,
    @BorrowRequestId INT,
    @Month INT,
    @Year INT,
    @CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssue NTEXT,
    @IssueAnalysis NTEXT,
    @IssueAnalysisDetail NTEXT,
    @DoctorId INT,
    @PrepaidExpenseDetailId INT, 
    @PropertyOwnerId INT,
    @PropertyId INT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @trancount INT;
    SET @trancount = @@TRANCOUNT;

    BEGIN TRY
        IF @trancount = 0
            BEGIN TRANSACTION;
        ELSE
            SAVE TRANSACTION CashIssueVoucher_Update;

        DECLARE @PurchaseInvoiceActualPaymentOut INT
              , @IssueAnalysisOut INT
              , @IssueAnalysisDetailOut INT;

        -- Update Header
        UPDATE [dbo].[CashIssueVoucher]
           SET [DocumentNumber] = @DocumentNumber
             , [BranchId] = @BranchId
             , [MoneyAmount] = @MoneyAmount
             , [SourceTypeId] = @SourceTypeId
             , [DirectExpensesId] = @DirectExpensesId
             , [Date] = @Date
             , [CurrencyId] = @CurrencyId
             , [AccountId] = @AccountId
             , [IsLinked] = @IsLinked
             , [IsPosted] = @IsPosted
             , [IsActive] = @IsActive
             , [IsDeleted] = @IsDeleted
             , [UserId] = @UserId
             , [Notes] = @Notes
             , [Image] = @Image
             , [CustomerId] = @CustomerId
             , [VendorId] = @VendorId
             , TechnicianId = @TechnicianId
             , [EmployeeId] = @EmployeeId
             , [CurrencyEquivalent] = @CurrencyEquivalent
             , [DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId
             , [CashBoxId] = @CashBoxId
             , [ShareholderId] = @ShareholderId
             , [CostCenterId] = @CostCenterId
             , [PosId] = @PosId
             , [CashierUserId] = @CashierUserId
             , [ShiftId] = @ShiftId
             , [IsCollected] = @IsCollected
             , [IsClosed] = @IsClosed
             , IsInvoiceSelected = @IsInvoiceSelected
             , BankAccountId = @BankAccountId 
             , TransactionNo = @TransactionNo 
             , TransactionDate = @TransactionDate 
             , ChartOfAccountId = @ChartOfAccountId
             , CashIssuePaymentMethodId = @CashIssuePaymentMethodId
             , FeesAmount = @FeesAmount
             , ValueAddedTaxesAmount = @ValueAddedTaxesAmount
             , IsSynced = @IsSynced
             , IsUpdateSynced = @IsUpdateSynced
             , BorrowReceipt = @BorrowReceipt
             , BorrowRequestId = @BorrowRequestId
             , [Month] = @Month 
             , [Year] = @Year
             , [DoctorId] = @DoctorId
             , PrepaidExpenseDetailId = @PrepaidExpenseDetailId
             , PropertyOwnerId = @PropertyOwnerId
             , PropertyId = @PropertyId
         WHERE [Id] = @Id;

        -------------------- Update PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment -------------------------------
        -- Reverse previous effects on PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods
        DECLARE @PurchaseInvoiceId INT, @newPaid MONEY;

        DECLARE _cursor CURSOR FOR
            SELECT PurchaseInvoiceId, Amount 
            FROM PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment 
            WHERE CashIssueVoucherId = @Id;

        OPEN _cursor;
        FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor INTO @PurchaseInvoiceId, @newPaid;

        WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
        BEGIN
            UPDATE PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods
               SET PaidAmount = ISNULL(PaidAmount,0) - @newPaid
             WHERE PaymentMethodId = 2
               AND PurchaseInvoiceId = @PurchaseInvoiceId;

            FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor INTO @PurchaseInvoiceId, @newPaid;
        END

        CLOSE _cursor;
        DEALLOCATE _cursor;

        DELETE FROM PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment WHERE [CashIssueVoucherId] = @Id;

        EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @PurchaseInvoiceActualPaymentOut OUT, @PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment;

        INSERT INTO [dbo].[PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment]
           ( [CashIssueVoucherId]
           , [PurchaseInvoiceId]
           , [PurchaseInvoiceDate]
           , [PurchaseInvoiceDocNumber]
           , [ChequeIssueId]
           , [Amount]
           , [PaymentDate]
           , [UserId]
           , [IsActive]
           , [IsDeleted]
           , [Notes]
           , [NetAmountRemain])
        SELECT  @Id
             ,  [PurchaseInvoiceId]
             ,  [PurchaseInvoiceDate]
             ,  [PurchaseInvoiceDocNumber]
             ,  [ChequeIssueId]
             ,  [Amount]
             ,  [PaymentDate]
             ,  [UserId]
             ,  [IsActive]
             ,  [IsDeleted]
             ,  [Notes]
             ,  [NetAmountRemain]
        FROM OPENXML (@PurchaseInvoiceActualPaymentOut, '/DocumentElement/PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment', 2)
        WITH ( [CashIssueVoucherId] INT
             , [PurchaseInvoiceId] INT
             , [PurchaseInvoiceDate] DATETIME
             , [PurchaseInvoiceDocNumber] NVARCHAR(500)
             , [ChequeIssueId] INT
             , [Amount] MONEY
             , [PaymentDate] DATETIME
             , [UserId] INT
             , [IsActive] BIT
             , [IsDeleted] BIT
             , [Notes] NVARCHAR(MAX)
             , [NetAmountRemain] MONEY )
        WHERE [Amount] > 0;

        EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @PurchaseInvoiceActualPaymentOut;

        -- Apply new effects on PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods
        DECLARE _cursor CURSOR FOR
            SELECT PurchaseInvoiceId, Amount 
            FROM PurchaseInvoiceActualPayment 
            WHERE CashIssueVoucherId = @Id;

        OPEN _cursor;
        FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor INTO @PurchaseInvoiceId, @newPaid;

        WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
        BEGIN
            UPDATE PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods
               SET PaidAmount = ISNULL(PaidAmount,0) + @newPaid
             WHERE PaymentMethodId = 2
               AND PurchaseInvoiceId = @PurchaseInvoiceId;

            FETCH NEXT FROM _cursor INTO @PurchaseInvoiceId, @newPaid;
        END

        CLOSE _cursor;
        DEALLOCATE _cursor;

        -- ------------ IssueAnalysis ------------------------
        DECLARE @IssueAnalysisTemp TABLE ( Id INT, NewId INT );

        EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @IssueAnalysisOut OUTPUT, @IssueAnalysis;

        -- Update existing rows (Id <> -1)
        MERGE INTO [dbo].[IssueAnalysis] AS target
        USING (
            SELECT 
                [Id],
                @Id AS [CashIssueVoucherId],
                [Value],
                [Reason],
                [AccountId],
                [IsDeleted],
                [Notes],
                [Total],
                [Taxes],
                [TaxesPrecentage],
                [NetTotal],
                [VendorId],
                [VendorArName],
                [TaxNumber],
                [VATNumber],
                [InvoiceNo]
            FROM OPENXML(@IssueAnalysisOut, '/DocumentElement/IssueAnalysis', 2)
            WITH (
                [Id] INT,
                [CashIssueVoucherId] INT,
                [Value] MONEY,
                [Reason] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [AccountId] INT,
                [IsDeleted] BIT,
                [Notes] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [Total] MONEY,
                [Taxes] MONEY,
                [TaxesPrecentage] FLOAT,
                [NetTotal] MONEY,
                [VendorId] INT,
                [VendorArName] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [TaxNumber] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [VATNumber] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [InvoiceNo] NVARCHAR(MAX)
            )
        ) AS source
        ON target.[Id] = source.[Id] AND target.[Id] <> -1
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET
                [CashIssueVoucherId] = source.[CashIssueVoucherId],
                [Value] = source.[Value],
                [Reason] = source.[Reason],
                [AccountId] = source.[AccountId],
                [IsDeleted] = source.[IsDeleted],
                [Notes] = source.[Notes],
                [Total] = source.[Total],
                [Taxes] = source.[Taxes],
                [TaxesPrecentage] = source.[TaxesPrecentage],
                [NetTotal] = source.[NetTotal],
                [VendorId] = source.[VendorId],
                [VendorArName] = source.[VendorArName],
                [TaxNumber] = source.[TaxNumber],
                [VATNumber] = source.[VATNumber],
                [InvoiceNo] = source.[InvoiceNo];

        -- Insert new rows (Id = -1) and capture mapping old->new
        ;MERGE INTO [dbo].[IssueAnalysis] AS target
        USING (
            SELECT 
                [Id],
                @Id AS [CashIssueVoucherId],
                [Value],
                [Reason],
                [AccountId],
                [IsDeleted],
                [Notes],
                [Total],
                [Taxes],
                [TaxesPrecentage],
                [NetTotal],
                [VendorId],
                [VendorArName],
                [TaxNumber],
                [VATNumber],
                [InvoiceNo]
            FROM OPENXML(@IssueAnalysisOut, '/DocumentElement/IssueAnalysis', 2)
            WITH (
                [Id] INT,
                [CashIssueVoucherId] INT,
                [Value] MONEY,
                [Reason] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [AccountId] INT,
                [IsDeleted] BIT,
                [Notes] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [Total] MONEY,
                [Taxes] MONEY,
                [TaxesPrecentage] FLOAT,
                [NetTotal] MONEY,
                [VendorId] INT,
                [VendorArName] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [TaxNumber] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [VATNumber] NVARCHAR(MAX),
                [InvoiceNo] NVARCHAR(MAX)
            )
            WHERE [Id] = -1
        ) AS src
        ON 1 = 0
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
            INSERT (
                [CashIssueVoucherId], [Value], [Reason], [AccountId], [IsDeleted], [Notes],
                [Total], [Taxes], [TaxesPrecentage], [NetTotal], [VendorId], [VendorArName],
                [TaxNumber], [VATNumber], [InvoiceNo]
            )
            VALUES (
                src.[CashIssueVoucherId], src.[Value], src.[Reason], src.[AccountId], src.[IsDeleted], src.[Notes],
                src.[Total], src.[Taxes], src.[TaxesPrecentage], src.[NetTotal], src.[VendorId], src.[VendorArName],
                src.[TaxNumber], src.[VATNumber], src.[InvoiceNo]
            )
        OUTPUT src.[Id], inserted.[Id]
        INTO @IssueAnalysisTemp (Id, NewId);

        -- Delete rows not present in XML (keep existing from XML and newly inserted)
        DELETE IA
        FROM [dbo].[IssueAnalysis] AS IA
        WHERE IA.[CashIssueVoucherId] = @Id
          AND IA.[Id] NOT IN (
                SELECT X.[Id]
                FROM OPENXML(@IssueAnalysisOut, '/DocumentElement/IssueAnalysis', 2)
                WITH ([Id] INT) AS X
                WHERE X.[Id] <> -1
                UNION ALL
                SELECT T.NewId FROM @IssueAnalysisTemp AS T
          );

        EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @IssueAnalysisOut;

        -- ------------ IssueAnalysisDetail ------------------------
        -- Delete existing details of this voucher
        DELETE IAD
        FROM IssueAnalysisDetail AS IAD
        INNER JOIN IssueAnalysis AS IA ON IAD.IssueAnalysisId = IA.Id
        WHERE IA.CashIssueVoucherId = @Id;

        -- Insert details with mapping (-1 -> NewId)
        EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @IssueAnalysisDetailOut OUTPUT, @IssueAnalysisDetail;

        INSERT INTO [dbo].[IssueAnalysisDetail] ([PropertyDetailId], [Price], [IssueAnalysisId])
        SELECT
            src.[PropertyDetailId],
            src.[Price],
            COALESCE(map.NewId, src.[IssueAnalysisId])
        FROM OPENXML(@IssueAnalysisDetailOut, '/DocumentElement/IssueAnalysisDetails', 2)
        WITH (
            [PropertyDetailId] INT,
            [Price] MONEY,
            [IssueAnalysisId] INT
        ) AS src
        LEFT JOIN @IssueAnalysisTemp AS map
               ON src.[IssueAnalysisId] = map.Id;

        EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @IssueAnalysisDetailOut;

        -- ------------ CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssue ------------------------
        DELETE FROM CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssue WHERE [CashIssueVoucherId] = @Id;

        DECLARE @CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssueOut INT;
        EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssueOut OUT, @CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssue;

        INSERT INTO CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssue
               ([CashIssueVoucherId],[EmployeeId],[NetSalary],[Month],[Year])
        SELECT @Id, [EmployeeId], [NetSalary], [Month], [Year]
        FROM OPENXML (@CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssueOut, '/DocumentElement/CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssue', 2)
        WITH ( [CashIssueVoucherId] INT
             , [EmployeeId] INT
             , [NetSalary] MONEY
             , [Month] INT
             , [Year] INT );

        EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssueOut;

        --------------------------- Accounts resolution ---------------------------
        DECLARE @SourcePageId INT = (SELECT [Id] FROM [SystemPage] WHERE [TableName] = 'CashIssueVoucher');
        DECLARE @AccountIdTo INT, @AccountIdFrom INT;
        DECLARE @Name NVARCHAR(MAX);

        IF @SourceTypeId = 1
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM [dbo].[Department] WHERE [Id] = @DepartmentId);
            SET @Name = (SELECT ArName FROM Customer WHERE Id = @CustomerId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 2
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM [dbo].[Department] WHERE [Id] = @DepartmentId);
            SET @Name = (SELECT ArName FROM Vendor WHERE Id = @VendorId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 3
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT [AccountId] FROM [dbo].[Employee] WHERE [Id] = @EmployeeId);
            SET @Name = (SELECT ArName FROM Employee WHERE Id = @EmployeeId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 4
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT DirectExpensesAccountId FROM [dbo].[Department] WHERE [Id] = @DepartmentId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 5
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT DebitValueAddedTaxesAccountId FROM [dbo].[Department] WHERE [Id] = @DepartmentId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 6
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = @AccountId;
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 7
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT [AccountId] FROM [dbo].[ShareHolder] WHERE [Id] = @ShareholderId);
            SET @Name = (SELECT ArName FROM ShareHolder WHERE Id = @ShareholderId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 8
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT [AccountId] FROM [dbo].[DirectExpenses] WHERE [Id] = @DirectExpensesId);
            SET @Name = (SELECT ArName FROM DirectExpenses WHERE Id = @DirectExpensesId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 9
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT [DueSalariesAccountId] FROM [dbo].[Department] WHERE [Id] = @DepartmentId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 10
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT DebitValueAddedTaxesAccountId FROM [dbo].[Department] WHERE [Id] = @DepartmentId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 12
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdFrom = (SELECT PrePaymentAccountId FROM PrepaidExpenseDetail WHERE [Id] = @PrepaidExpenseDetailId);
            SET @Name = (SELECT ArName FROM PrepaidExpenseDetail WHERE [Id] = @PrepaidExpenseDetailId);
        END
        IF @SourceTypeId = 13
        BEGIN
            SET @Name = (SELECT ArName FROM PropertyOwner WHERE [Id] = @PropertyOwnerId);
        END

        UPDATE CashIssueVoucher SET ReceivedPerson = @Name WHERE Id = @Id;

        -- Payment method target account
        IF @CashIssuePaymentMethodId = 1
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdTo = (SELECT [AccountId] FROM [dbo].[CashBox] WHERE [Id] = @CashBoxId);
            SET @Name = NULL;
        END

        DECLARE @CommissionAccountId INT, @VatAccountId INT;

        IF @CashIssuePaymentMethodId IN (2,3)
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdTo = (SELECT [AccountId] FROM [dbo].[BankAccount] WHERE [Id] = @BankAccountId);
            SET @CommissionAccountId = (SELECT VisaCommissionAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId);
            SET @VatAccountId = (SELECT DebitValueAddedTaxesAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId);
        END

        IF @CashIssuePaymentMethodId = 4
        BEGIN
            SET @AccountIdTo = @ChartOfAccountId;
            SET @Name = NULL;
        END

        -- Update Journal Entry header
        UPDATE [dbo].[JournalEntry]
           SET [BranchId] = @BranchId
             , [Date] = @Date
             , [Notes] = @Notes
             , [IsActive] = @IsActive
             , [IsPosted] = @IsPosted
             , [IsDeleted] = @IsDeleted
             , [Image] = @Image
             , [UserId] = @UserId
             , [DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId
             , [CurrencyId] = @CurrencyId
             , [Equivalent] = @CurrencyEquivalent
         WHERE [SourcePageId] = @SourcePageId
           AND [SourceId] = @Id;

        DECLARE @JournalEntryId INT = (
            SELECT TOP (1) [Id]
            FROM [dbo].[JournalEntry]
            WHERE [SourcePageId] = @SourcePageId AND [SourceId] = @Id
        );

        DELETE FROM [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] WHERE [JournalEntryId] = @JournalEntryId;

        DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail TABLE(
            [JournalEntryId] INT NULL,
            [Debit] MONEY NULL,
            [Credit] MONEY NULL,
            [CurrencyId] INT NULL,
            [Equivalent] FLOAT NULL,
            [AccountId] INT NULL,
            [SourcePageId] INT NULL,
            [SourceId] INT NULL,
            [IsPosted] BIT NULL,
            [IsDeleted] BIT NULL,
            [IsActive] BIT NULL,
            CostCenterId INT NULL,
            Notes NVARCHAR(MAX)
        );

        IF @SourceTypeId <> 10
        BEGIN
            INSERT INTO @JournalEntryDetail (
                [JournalEntryId],[Debit],[Credit],[CurrencyId],[Equivalent],[AccountId],
                [SourcePageId],[SourceId],[IsPosted],[IsDeleted],[IsActive],CostCenterId,Notes)
            VALUES
            (@JournalEntryId,
             @MoneyAmount - ISNULL(@ValueAddedTaxesAmount,0) - ISNULL(@FeesAmount,0),
             0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @AccountIdFrom,
             @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, @CostCenterId, @Name),

            (@JournalEntryId,
             ISNULL(@FeesAmount,0),
             0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @CommissionAccountId,
             @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, @CostCenterId, NULL),

            (@JournalEntryId,
             ISNULL(@ValueAddedTaxesAmount,0),
             0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @VatAccountId,
             @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, @CostCenterId, NULL),

            (@JournalEntryId,
             0, @MoneyAmount,
             @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @AccountIdTo,
             @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, NULL, NULL);
        END
        ELSE IF @SourceTypeId = 10
        BEGIN
            -- Journal from IssueAnalysis rows
            DECLARE @analysisAmount MONEY,
                    @analysisAccountId INT,
                    @analysisTaxes MONEY,
                    @analysisNotes NVARCHAR(MAX);

            DECLARE analysisCursor CURSOR FOR
                SELECT Value, AccountId, Taxes, Notes
                FROM IssueAnalysis
                WHERE CashIssueVoucherId = @Id;

            OPEN analysisCursor;
            FETCH NEXT FROM analysisCursor INTO @analysisAmount, @analysisAccountId, @analysisTaxes, @analysisNotes;

            WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
            BEGIN
                INSERT INTO @JournalEntryDetail (
                    [JournalEntryId],[Debit],[Credit],[CurrencyId],[Equivalent],[AccountId],
                    [SourcePageId],[SourceId],[IsPosted],[IsDeleted],[IsActive],CostCenterId,Notes)
                VALUES
                -- سطر القيد التابع للبند (ياخد Notes بتاعة البند)
                (@JournalEntryId, @analysisAmount, 0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent,
                 @analysisAccountId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, NULL, @analysisNotes),

                -- سطر الضرائب (بدون ملاحظات؛ غيّرها لـ @analysisNotes لو حابب)
                (@JournalEntryId, @analysisTaxes, 0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent,
                 @AccountIdFrom, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, NULL, NULL);

                FETCH NEXT FROM analysisCursor INTO @analysisAmount, @analysisAccountId, @analysisTaxes, @analysisNotes;
            END

            CLOSE analysisCursor;
            DEALLOCATE analysisCursor;

            INSERT INTO @JournalEntryDetail (
                [JournalEntryId],[Debit],[Credit],[CurrencyId],[Equivalent],[AccountId],
                [SourcePageId],[SourceId],[IsPosted],[IsDeleted],[IsActive],CostCenterId,Notes)
            VALUES
            (@JournalEntryId, 0, @MoneyAmount, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent,
             @AccountIdTo, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, NULL, NULL);
        END

        INSERT INTO [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] (
            [JournalEntryId],[Debit],[Credit],[CurrencyId],[Equivalent],[AccountId],
            [SourcePageId],[SourceId],[IsPosted],[IsDeleted],[IsActive],CostCenterId,Notes)
        SELECT 
            [JournalEntryId],[Debit],[Credit],[CurrencyId],[Equivalent],[AccountId],
            [SourcePageId],[SourceId],[IsPosted],[IsDeleted],[IsActive],CostCenterId,Notes
        FROM @JournalEntryDetail
        WHERE (Debit > 0 OR Credit > 0);

        --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
lbexit:
        IF @trancount = 0
            COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        DECLARE @error INT, @message VARCHAR(4000), @xstate INT;
        SELECT @error = ERROR_NUMBER(),
               @message = ERROR_MESSAGE() + ' at ' + CAST(ERROR_LINE() AS VARCHAR(50)),
               @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        IF @xstate = -1
            ROLLBACK;
        IF @xstate = 1 AND @trancount = 0
            ROLLBACK;
        IF @xstate = 1 AND @trancount > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION CashIssueVoucher_Update;

        RAISERROR ('CashIssueVoucher_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message);
    END CATCH
    SET NOCOUNT OFF;
END

where SourcePageId =  @SourcePageId and SourceId = @Id

end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CashReceiptVoucher_Get]
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	
	SELECT CashReceiptVoucher.[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[MoneyAmount]
      ,CashReceiptSourceType.ArName as [SourceType]
	  , [dbo].[CashReceiptVoucher_GetSourceName](CashReceiptVoucher.[Id],SourceTypeId) SourceName
      ,[Date]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,ERPUser.Name as [User]
      ,CashReceiptVoucher.[Notes]
      ,CashReceiptVoucher.[Image]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,[CashBox].ArName as [CashBox]
  FROM [dbo].[CashReceiptVoucher] left join CashReceiptSourceType
  on CashReceiptVoucher.SourceTypeId=CashReceiptSourceType.Id
  left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=CashReceiptVoucher.BranchId
  left join Currency
  on Currency.Id=CashReceiptVoucher.CurrencyId
  left join ERPUser
  on ERPUser.Id=CashReceiptVoucher.UserId
  left join Department
  on Department.Id=CashReceiptVoucher.DepartmentId
  left join CashBox
  on CashBox.Id=CashReceiptVoucher.CashBoxId
  where (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR CashReceiptVoucher.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and (@DateFrom is null or [Date]>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [Date]<=@DateTo) and CashReceiptVoucher.IsActive=1 and CashReceiptVoucher.IsDeleted=0
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CashTransfer_Get]
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	
	SELECT [CashTransfer].[Id]
      ,[CashTransfer].[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[BankFrom].ArName as [BankFrom]
      ,[BankAccountFrom].AccountNumber as [BankAccountFrom]
      ,[BankBranchFrom]
      ,[BankTo].ArName as [BankTo]
      ,[BankAccountTo].AccountNumber as [BankAccountTo]
      ,[BankBranchTo]
      ,[CashBoxFrom].ArName as [CashBoxFrom]
      ,[CashBoxTo].ArName as [CashBoxTo]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[TotalMoneyAmount]
      ,[Date]
	  ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,ERPUser.Name as [User]
      ,[CashTransfer].[IsActive]
      ,[CashTransfer].[IsDeleted]
      ,[CashTransfer].[IsLinked]
      ,[CashTransfer].[IsPosted]
      ,[CashTransfer].[Notes]
      ,[CashTransfer].[Image]
      ,CashTransferTypes.ArName as [TransferType]
  FROM [dbo].[CashTransfer]
  left join Bank [BankTo]
  on [BankTo].Id=CashTransfer.BankIdTo
  left join Bank [BankFrom]
  on [BankFrom].Id=CashTransfer.BankIdFrom
  left join BankAccount [BankAccountFrom]
  on [BankAccountFrom].Id=CashTransfer.BankAccountIdFrom 
  left join BankAccount [BankAccountTo]
  on [BankAccountTo].Id=CashTransfer.BankAccountIdTo
  left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=CashTransfer.BranchId
  left join Currency
  on Currency.Id=CashTransfer.CurrencyId
  left join CashTransferTypes
  on CashTransfer.TransferTypeId=CashTransferTypes.Id
  left join ERPUser
  on ERPUser.Id=CashTransfer.UserId
  left join Department
  on Department.Id=CashTransfer.DepartmentId
  left join CashBox [CashBoxFrom]
  on [CashBoxFrom].Id=CashTransfer.CashBoxIdFrom 
  left join CashBox [CashBoxTo]
  on [CashBoxTo].Id=CashTransfer.CashBoxIdTo
  where (@DepartmentId is null or CashTransfer.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and (@DateFrom is null or [Date]>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [Date]<=@DateTo)
  and CashTransfer.IsActive=1 and CashTransfer.IsDeleted=0
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ChartOfAccount_Get]
	@TypeId int,
	@ClassificationId int,
	@CategoryId int,
	@ParrentAccountId int
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT [ChartOfAccount].[Id]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[Code]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[ArName]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[EnName]
      ,CoA.[ArName] as [ParentAccount]
      ,[ChartOfAccountsType].ArType as [Type]
      ,ChartOfAccountsClassification.ArClassification as [Classification]
      ,[ChartOfAccountsCategory].ArCategory as [Category]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[HasCostCenter]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[ObDebit]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[ObCredit]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[IsSystem]
      ,[ERPUser].Name as [User]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[IsActive]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[UpdatedId]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[IsDeleted]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[Notes]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[Image]
      ,[ChartOfAccount].[IncomeOrFinancial]
  FROM [dbo].[ChartOfAccount] left join ChartOfAccount CoA
  on CoA.Id=ChartOfAccount.ParentId
  left join ChartOfAccountsClassification
  on ChartOfAccount.ClassificationId=ChartOfAccountsClassification.Id
  left join ChartOfAccountsCategory
  on ChartOfAccount.CategoryId=ChartOfAccountsCategory.Id
  left join ERPUser
  on ERPUser.Id=ChartOfAccount.UserId
  left join ChartOfAccountsType
  on ChartOfAccount.TypeId=ChartOfAccountsType.Id
  where ((@TypeId is null or ChartOfAccount.TypeId=@TypeId) 
  and (@ClassificationId is null or ChartOfAccount.ClassificationId=@ClassificationId) 
  and (@CategoryId is null or ChartOfAccount.CategoryId=@CategoryId) 
  and (@ParrentAccountId is null or ChartOfAccount.ParentId=@ParrentAccountId)
  and ChartOfAccount.IsActive=1
  and ChartOfAccount.IsDeleted=0)
  order by [ChartOfAccount].[Code]
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[ChartOfAccount_SaveOpeningBalanceBulk]
            @AccBalXML nvarchar(max),
			@UserId int
as
begin tran 

declare @ChartOfAccount table(
	[Id] int,
    [ObDebit] money,
    [ObCredit] money
)
DECLARE @intDocHandle int
EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @intDocHandle OUTPUT, @AccBalXML
insert @ChartOfAccount([Id],[ObDebit],[ObCredit])
select * from OPENXML(@intDocHandle,'/DocumentElement/accountBals', 2)
with(
	[Id] int,
    [ObDebit] money,
    [ObCredit] money
)
EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @intDocHandle

declare @AccId int,@ObDebit money,@ObCredit money
declare ACCBCursor cursor for select [Id],[ObDebit],[ObCredit] from @ChartOfAccount 
open ACCBCursor
fetch next from ACCBCursor into @AccId,@ObDebit,@ObCredit
while @@FETCH_STATUS = 0 
begin

update [dbo].[ChartOfAccount]
set [ObDebit] = @ObDebit,
    [ObCredit] = @ObCredit,
	[UserId] = @UserId
where [Id] = @AccId

fetch next from ACCBCursor into @AccId,@ObDebit,@ObCredit
end
close ACCBCursor
deallocate ACCBCursor


if @@error <>0
begin
rollback tran 
return
end
else

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ChequeIssue_Get]
	@DepId int,
	@DateFrom datetime,
    @DateTo datetime,
	@ChequeStatusId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [ChequeIssue].[Id]
      ,[ChequeIssue].[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Bank].ArName as [Bank]
      ,[BankBranch]
      ,[Date]
      ,ChequeSourceType.ArName as [IssueType]
      ,[ChequeNumber]
      ,[ChequeValue]
      ,[DueDate]
      ,ChequeStatus.ArName as [ChequeStatus]
      ,[ChequeIssue].[IsActive]
      ,[ChequeIssue].[IsDeleted]
      ,[ChequeIssue].[IsLinked]
      ,[ChequeIssue].[IsPosted]
      ,ERPUser.Name as [User]
      ,[ChequeIssue].[Notes]
      ,[ChequeIssue].[Image]
      ,[Customer].ArName as [Customer]
      ,[Vendor].ArName as [Vendor]
      ,[Employee].ArName as [Employee]
      ,[BankAccount].AccountNumber as [BankAccount]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
  FROM [dbo].[ChequeIssue]
  left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=[ChequeIssue].BranchId
  left join ChequeSourceType
  on ChequeSourceType.Id=[ChequeIssue].IssueTypeId
  left join Bank
  on Bank.Id=[ChequeIssue].BankId 
  left join BankAccount
  on BankAccount.Id=[ChequeIssue].BankAccountId
  left join Currency
  on Currency.Id=[ChequeIssue].CurrencyId
  left join ERPUser
  on ERPUser.Id=[ChequeIssue].UserId
  left join Customer
  on Customer.Id=[ChequeIssue].CustomerId
  left join Vendor
  on Vendor.Id=[ChequeIssue].VendorId
  left join Employee
  on Employee.Id=[ChequeIssue].EmployeeId
  left join Department
  on Department.Id=[ChequeIssue].DepartmentId
  left join ChequeStatus
  on ChequeStatus.Id=[ChequeIssue].ChequeStatusId
   where  (
  (@DepId is null or ChequeIssue.DepartmentId= @DepId)
  and( @DateFrom is null or  ChequeIssue.[Date]>=@DateFrom)
  and( @DateTo is null or  ChequeIssue.[Date]<=@DateTo)
  and (@ChequeStatusId is null or ChequeIssue.ChequeStatusId=@ChequeStatusId)
  and ChequeIssue.IsActive=1
  and ChequeIssue.IsDeleted=0)
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ChequeReceipt_Get]
	@DepId int,
	@DateFrom datetime,
    @DateTo datetime,
	@ChequeStatusId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [ChequeReceipt].[Id]
      ,[ChequeReceipt].[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Bank].ArName as [Bank]
      ,[BankBranch]
      ,[Date]
      ,ChequeSourceType.ArName as [SourceType]
      ,[ChequeNumber]
      ,[ChequeValue]
      ,ChequeReceiptStatus.ArName as [ChequeStatus]
      ,[DueDate]
      ,[ChequeReceipt].[IsActive]
      ,[ChequeReceipt].[IsDeleted]
      ,[ChequeReceipt].[IsLinked]
      ,[ChequeReceipt].[IsPosted]
      ,ERPUser.Name as [User]
      ,[ChequeReceipt].[Notes]
      ,[ChequeReceipt].[Image]
      ,[Customer].ArName as [Customer]
      ,[Vendor].ArName as [Vendor]
      ,[Employee].ArName as [Employee]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,ChartOfAccount.ArName as [ReceiptAccount]
      ,DebitBank.ArName as [DebitBank]
      ,BankAccount.AccountNumber as [DebitBankAccount]
  FROM [dbo].[ChequeReceipt] left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=[ChequeReceipt].BranchId
  left join ChequeSourceType
  on ChequeSourceType.Id=ChequeReceipt.SourceTypeId
  left join Bank
  on Bank.Id=[ChequeReceipt].BankId 
  left join Bank as DebitBank
  on DebitBank.Id=[ChequeReceipt].DebitBankId
  left join BankAccount
  on BankAccount.Id=[ChequeReceipt].DebitBankAccountId
  left join ChartOfAccount
  on ChartOfAccount.Id=ChequeReceipt.ReceiptAccountId
  left join Currency
  on Currency.Id=[ChequeReceipt].CurrencyId
  left join ERPUser
  on ERPUser.Id=[ChequeReceipt].UserId
  left join Customer
  on Customer.Id=[ChequeReceipt].CustomerId
  left join Vendor
  on Vendor.Id=[ChequeReceipt].VendorId
  left join Employee
  on Employee.Id=[ChequeReceipt].EmployeeId
  left join Department
  on Department.Id=[ChequeReceipt].DepartmentId
  left join ChequeReceiptStatus
  on ChequeReceiptStatus.Id=ChequeReceipt.ChequeStatusId
     where  (
  (@DepId is null or ChequeReceipt.DepartmentId= @DepId)
  and( @DateFrom is null or  ChequeReceipt.[Date]>=@DateFrom)
  and( @DateTo is null or  ChequeReceipt.[Date]<=@DateTo)
  and (@ChequeStatusId is null or ChequeReceipt.ChequeStatusId=@ChequeStatusId)
  and ChequeReceipt.IsDeleted=0
  and ChequeReceipt.IsActive=1)
END

set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))

	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

      ,[CurrencyEquivalent] = @CurrencyEquivalent
      ,[BankId] = @BankId
      ,[BankBranch] = @BankBranch
      ,[Date] = @Date
      ,[SourceTypeId] = @SourceTypeId
      ,[ChequeNumber] = @ChequeNumber
      ,[ChequeValue] = @ChequeValue
      ,[DueDate] = @DueDate
      ,[ChequeStatusId] = @ChequeStatusId
      ,[IsActive] = @IsActive
      ,[IsDeleted] = @IsDeleted
      ,[IsLinked] = @IsLinked
      ,[IsPosted] = @IsPosted

      ,[Notes] = @Notes
      ,[Image] = @Image
      ,[CustomerId] = @CustomerId
      ,[VendorId] = @VendorId
	  ,[DirectExpensesId]=@DirectExpensesId
      ,[EmployeeId] = @EmployeeId
      ,[DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId
      ,[ReceiptAccountId] = @ReceiptAccountId
      ,[DebitBankId] = @DebitBankId
      ,[DebitBankAccountId] = @DebitBankAccountId
	  ,[DirectRevenueId]=@DirectRevenueId
	  ,[ShareholderId]=@ShareholderId
	  ,CostCenterId=@CostCenterId
	   WHERE [Id]=@Id

DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'ChequeReceipt')
DECLARE @AccountIdTo int, @AccountIdFrom int

if @SourceTypeId =1
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdFrom=(select CustomersAccountId from [dbo].Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId)
	END
if @SourceTypeId =2
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdFrom=(select VendorsAccountId from [dbo].Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId)
	END
if @SourceTypeId =3
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdFrom=(select [AccountId] from [dbo].[Employee] where [Id]=@EmployeeId)
	END
if @SourceTypeId =4
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdFrom=(select [AccountId] from [dbo].Directrevenue where [Id]=@DirectRevenueId)
	END
if @ChequeStatusId=1
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdTo = (select [BankAccountReceiptId] from [dbo].[BankAccount] where [Id]=@DebitBankAccountId)
	END
if @ChequeStatusId=2
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdTo=(select [AccountId] from [dbo].[BankAccount] where [Id]=@DebitBankAccountId)
	END
		-------------------shareHolder-------------------
	if @SourceTypeId =5
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdTo=(select [AccountId] from [dbo].ShareHolder where [Id]=@ShareholderId)
	END
	if @SourceTypeId =6
	BEGIN
		set @AccountIdTo=(select DirectExpensesAccountId from [dbo].Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId)
	END
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
declare @JournalEntryId int = (select top (1)[Id] from [dbo].[JournalEntry] WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@Id)

UPDATE [dbo].[JournalEntry]
   SET [BranchId] = @BranchId
      ,[Date] = @Date
      ,[Notes] = @Notes
      ,[IsActive] = @IsActive
      ,[IsPosted] = @IsPosted
      ,[IsDeleted] = @IsDeleted
      ,[Image] = @Image
      ,[UserId] = @UserId
      ,[DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId
      ,[CurrencyId] = @CurrencyId
      ,[Equivalent] = @CurrencyEquivalent 
WHERE [Id]=@JournalEntryId

DELETE FROM [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail]
      WHERE [JournalEntryId]=@JournalEntryId

if @ChequeStatusId<>3
begin
DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail table(
	[JournalEntryId] [int] NULL,
	[Debit] [money] NULL,
	[Credit] [money] NULL,
	[CurrencyId] [int] NULL,
	[Equivalent] [float] NULL,
	[AccountId] [int] NULL,
	[SourcePageId] [int] NULL,
	[SourceId] [int] NULL,
	[IsPosted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsDeleted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsActive] [bit] NULL,
	CostCenterId int null)

Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId)
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId,
	@ChequeValue,
	0,
	@CurrencyId,
	@CurrencyEquivalent,
	@AccountIdTo,
	@SourcePageId,
	@Id,
	1,
	0,
	1,
	null),
	(@JournalEntryId,
	0,
	@ChequeValue,
	@CurrencyId,
	@CurrencyEquivalent,
	@AccountIdFrom,
	@SourcePageId,
	@Id,
	1,
	0,
	1,
	@CostCenterId)

Insert into [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId)
	select 
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId from @JournalEntryDetail
end

lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction ChequeReceipt_Update;

        raiserror ('ChequeReceipt_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CostCenter_TrialBalance] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@fromDate datetime, @toDate datetime, @departmentId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @costCenterId int, @code nvarchar(max), @arName nvarchar(max),  @obDebit money, @obCredit money, @debit money, @credit money, @totalDebit money, @totalCredit money, @balanceDebit money, @balanceCredit money, @parentId int
declare @BalanceReview table(
	[Id] [int] NOT NULL,
	[Code] [nvarchar](450) NULL,
	[ArName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[ParentId] [int] null,
	[ObDebit] [money] NULL,
	[ObCredit] [money] NULL,
	[Debit] [money] NULL,
	[Credit] [money] NULL,
	[TotalDebit] [money] NULL,
	[TotalCredit] [money] NULL,
	[BalanceDebit] [money] NULL,
	[BalanceCredit] [money] NULL)


declare cur cursor for select [Id],[Code],[ArName],[ObDebit],[ObCredit],[ParentId] from [dbo].CostCenter where [IsDeleted]=0 and IsActive=1
	
open cur
fetch next from cur into @costCenterId, @code, @arName, @obDebit, @obCredit, @parentId
while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
begin
	if @departmentId>0
	begin
		set @debit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Debit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JE.DepartmentId=@departmentId 
		and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@departmentId))
        and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@departmentId))
		AND JD.CostCenterId=@costCenterId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
		set @credit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Credit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JE.DepartmentId=@departmentId 
		and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@departmentId))
        and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@departmentId))
		AND JD.CostCenterId=@costCenterId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
	end
	else
	begin
		set @debit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Debit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JD.CostCenterId=@costCenterId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
		set @credit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Credit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JD.CostCenterId=@costCenterId and JE.IsDeleted=0 AND  JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
	end
	
	if @debit>@credit
	begin
		set @debit=@debit-@credit
		set @credit=0
	end
	else
	begin
		set @credit=@credit-@debit
		set @debit=0
	end

	set @totalDebit=@obDebit+@debit
	set @totalCredit=@obCredit+@credit

	if	@totalDebit>@totalCredit
	begin
		set @balanceDebit=@totalDebit-@totalCredit
		set @balanceCredit=0
	end
	else
	begin
		set @balanceCredit=@totalCredit-@totalDebit
		set @balanceDebit=0
	end
	Insert into @BalanceReview (
	[Id] ,
	[Code] ,
	[ArName] ,
	[ParentId],
	[ObDebit],
	[ObCredit] ,
	[Debit],
	[Credit],
	[TotalDebit] ,
	[TotalCredit] ,
	[BalanceDebit],
	[BalanceCredit])
	 VALUES
	(@costCenterId,
	@code,
	@arName,
	@parentId,
	@obDebit,
	@obCredit,
	@debit,
	@credit,
	@obDebit+@debit,
	@obCredit+@credit,
	@balanceDebit,
	@balanceCredit)
	fetch next from cur into @costCenterId, @code, @arName, @obDebit, @obCredit, @parentId
end

close cur
deallocate cur

declare SubCur cursor for select distinct( [ParentId]) from @BalanceReview 
open SubCur
fetch next from SubCur into @costCenterId
while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
begin
	update @BalanceReview
	set [ObDebit] = (select sum([ObDebit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId ),
	[ObCredit] = (select sum([ObCredit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId),
	[Debit] = (select sum([Debit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId),
	[Credit] = (select sum([Credit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId),
	[TotalDebit] = (select sum([TotalDebit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId ),
	[TotalCredit] = (select sum([TotalCredit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId ),
	[BalanceDebit] = (select sum([BalanceDebit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId),
	[BalanceCredit] = (select sum([BalanceCredit]) from @BalanceReview where [ParentId]=@costCenterId)
	where [Id]=@costCenterId

	set @balanceDebit=(select BalanceDebit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId)
	set @balanceCredit=(select BalanceCredit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId)
	if @balanceDebit>@balanceCredit
	begin
		update @BalanceReview
		set BalanceDebit=BalanceDebit-BalanceCredit,
		BalanceCredit=0
		where Id=@costCenterId
	end
	else
	begin
		update @BalanceReview
		set BalanceCredit=BalanceCredit-BalanceDebit,
		BalanceDebit=0
		where Id=@costCenterId
	end

	set @parentId=(select ParentId from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId) 

	while @parentId is not null
	begin
	update @BalanceReview
	set [ObDebit] = [ObDebit]+(select ObDebit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId),
	[ObCredit] = ObCredit+(select ObCredit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId),
	[Debit] = Debit+(select Debit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId),
	[Credit] = Credit+(select Credit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId),
	[TotalDebit] = TotalDebit+(select TotalDebit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId),
	[TotalCredit] = TotalCredit+(select TotalCredit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId),
	[BalanceDebit] = BalanceDebit+(select BalanceDebit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId),
	[BalanceCredit] = BalanceCredit+(select BalanceCredit from @BalanceReview where Id=@costCenterId)
	where [Id]=@parentId
	set @balanceDebit=(select BalanceDebit from @BalanceReview where Id=@parentId)
	set @balanceCredit=(select BalanceCredit from @BalanceReview where Id=@parentId)
	if @balanceDebit>@balanceCredit
	begin
		update @BalanceReview
		set BalanceDebit=BalanceDebit-BalanceCredit,
		BalanceCredit=0
		where Id=@parentId
	end
	else
	begin
		update @BalanceReview
		set BalanceCredit=BalanceCredit-BalanceDebit,
		BalanceDebit=0
		where Id=@parentId
	end

	set @parentId=(select ParentId from @BalanceReview where Id=@parentId)
	end

	fetch next from SubCur into @costCenterId
end
close SubCur
deallocate SubCur


select * from @BalanceReview
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[Customer_SaveOpeningBalanceBulk]
            @CBalXML nvarchar(max),
			@UserId int
as
begin tran 

declare @Customer table(
	[Id] int,
    [ObDebit] money,
    [ObCredit] money
)
DECLARE @intDocHandle int
EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @intDocHandle OUTPUT, @CBalXML
insert @Customer([Id],[ObDebit],[ObCredit])
select * from OPENXML(@intDocHandle,'/DocumentElement/cBals', 2)
with(
	[Id] int,
    [ObDebit] money,
    [ObCredit] money
)
EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @intDocHandle

declare @CCId int,@ObDebit money,@ObCredit money
declare ACCBCursor cursor for select [Id],[ObDebit],[ObCredit] from @Customer 
open ACCBCursor
fetch next from ACCBCursor into @CCId,@ObDebit,@ObCredit
while @@FETCH_STATUS = 0 
begin

declare @CustomerAccId int, @OldObDebit money, @OldObCredit money

select @CustomerAccId = [AccountId],
       @OldObDebit = [ObDebit],
	   @OldObCredit = [ObCredit]
from [dbo].[Customer] where [Id] = @CCId

update [dbo].[Customer]
set [ObDebit] = @ObDebit,
    [ObCredit] = @ObCredit,
    [UserId] = @UserId
where [Id] = @CCId

exec [dbo].[ChartOfAccount_UpdateAccountOpeningBalance] @CustomerAccId,@OldObDebit,@OldObCredit,@ObDebit,@ObCredit,@UserId

fetch next from ACCBCursor into @CCId,@ObDebit,@ObCredit
end
close ACCBCursor
deallocate ACCBCursor


if @@error <>0
begin
rollback tran 
return
end
else
begin
commit tran
end

-- Minimal fix:
-- - Preserve existing CustomerOB_Get source-specific business logic.
-- - Add customer-party journal detail rows that are not already covered by
--   the legacy source unions.
-- - Customer party rows are JournalEntryDetail.PartyType = 1 and
--   JournalEntryDetail.PartyId = @CustomerId.
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CustomerOB_Get]
    @CustomerId int,
    @DepartmentId int,
    @ActivityId int,
    @CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @CustomerOB TABLE
    (
        VendorReceiptNumber nvarchar(max) NULL,
        Debit money NULL,
        Credit money NULL,
        ArName nvarchar(100) NULL,
        [JournalDocNum] nvarchar(100) NULL,
        [Date] datetime NULL,
        [DocumentNumber] nvarchar(100) NULL,
        [CustomerArName] nvarchar(100) NULL,
        [DebitBalance] money NULL,
        [CreditBalance] money NULL
    );

    DECLARE @CustomerArName nvarchar(100) = (SELECT ArName FROM Customer WHERE Id = @CustomerId);
    DECLARE @periodStart datetime = (SELECT TOP 1 PeriodStart FROM FinancialPeriods WHERE IsActive = 1 AND Opened = 1 AND [Status] = 'Active');

    INSERT INTO @CustomerOB
        (VendorReceiptNumber, Debit, Credit, ArName, [JournalDocNum], [Date], [DocumentNumber], [CustomerArName])
    SELECT *, @CustomerArName AS [CustomerArName]
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            NULL AS VendorReceiptNumber,
            ISNULL(SUM([OBDebit]), 0) AS Debit,
            ISNULL(SUM([OBCredit]), 0) AS Credit,
            N'رصيد افتتاحي' AS ArName,
            '' AS [JournalDocNum],
            @periodStart AS [Date],
            '' AS [DocumentNumber]
        FROM [dbo].[CustomerOpenningBalance]
        WHERE CustomerId = @CustomerId
          AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
          AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
          AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

        UNION

        SELECT *
        FROM
        (
            SELECT
                NULL AS VendorReceiptNumber,
                Debit,
                Credit,
                SystemPage.ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber AS [JournalDocNum],
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                SalesInvoice.DocumentNumber
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            RIGHT JOIN SalesInvoice ON SalesInvoice.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId AND JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 58
            WHERE JournalEntry.SourceId IN
            (
                SELECT Id
                FROM SalesInvoice
                WHERE IsDeleted = 0
                  AND VendorOrCustomerId = @CustomerId
                  AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR SalesInvoice.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            )
              AND AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = SalesInvoice.DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

            UNION

            SELECT
                NULL,
                Debit,
                Credit,
                SystemPage.ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber AS [JournalDocNum],
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                SalesReturns.DocumentNumber
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            RIGHT JOIN SalesReturns ON SalesReturns.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId AND JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 3131
            WHERE JournalEntry.SourceId IN
            (
                SELECT Id
                FROM SalesReturns
                WHERE IsDeleted = 0
                  AND VendorOrCustomerId = @CustomerId
                  AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR SalesReturns.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            )
              AND AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = SalesReturns.DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

            UNION

            SELECT
                NULL,
                Debit,
                Credit,
                SystemPage.ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber AS [JournalDocNum],
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                CashIssueVoucher.DocumentNumber
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            RIGHT JOIN CashIssueVoucher ON CashIssueVoucher.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId AND JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 21
            WHERE JournalEntry.SourceId IN
            (
                SELECT Id
                FROM CashIssueVoucher
                WHERE IsDeleted = 0
                  AND IsActive = 1
                  AND CustomerId = @CustomerId
                  AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR CashIssueVoucher.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            )
              AND JournalEntryDetail.AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = CashIssueVoucher.DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

            UNION

            SELECT
                CashReceiptVoucher.VendorReceiptNumber,
                Debit,
                Credit,
                SystemPage.ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber AS [JournalDocNum],
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                CashReceiptVoucher.DocumentNumber
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            RIGHT JOIN CashReceiptVoucher ON CashReceiptVoucher.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId AND JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 22
            WHERE JournalEntry.SourceId IN
            (
                SELECT Id
                FROM CashReceiptVoucher
                WHERE IsDeleted = 0
                  AND IsActive = 1
                  AND CustomerId = @CustomerId
                  AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR CashReceiptVoucher.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            )
              AND JournalEntryDetail.AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = CashReceiptVoucher.DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

            UNION

            SELECT
                NULL,
                Debit,
                Credit,
                SystemPage.ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber,
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                ChequeIssue.DocumentNumber
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            RIGHT JOIN ChequeIssue ON ChequeIssue.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId AND JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 23
            WHERE JournalEntry.SourceId IN
            (
                SELECT Id
                FROM ChequeIssue
                WHERE IsDeleted = 0
                  AND CustomerId = @CustomerId
                  AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR ChequeIssue.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            )
              AND JournalEntryDetail.AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = ChequeIssue.DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

            UNION

            SELECT
                NULL,
                Debit,
                Credit,
                SystemPage.ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber,
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                ChequeReceipt.DocumentNumber
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            RIGHT JOIN ChequeReceipt ON ChequeReceipt.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId AND JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 24
            WHERE JournalEntry.SourceId IN
            (
                SELECT Id
                FROM ChequeReceipt
                WHERE IsDeleted = 0
                  AND CustomerId = @CustomerId
                  AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR ChequeReceipt.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            )
              AND JournalEntryDetail.AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = ChequeReceipt.DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

            UNION

            SELECT
                NULL,
                Debit,
                Credit,
                SystemPage.ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber AS [JournalDocNum],
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                CarSalesInvoice.DocumentNumber
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            RIGHT JOIN CarSalesInvoice ON CarSalesInvoice.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId AND JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 10281
            WHERE JournalEntry.SourceId IN
            (
                SELECT Id
                FROM CarSalesInvoice
                WHERE IsDeleted = 0
                  AND CustomerId = @CustomerId
                  AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR CarSalesInvoice.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            )
              AND JournalEntryDetail.AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = CarSalesInvoice.DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))

            UNION

            SELECT
                NULL AS VendorReceiptNumber,
                JournalEntryDetail.Debit,
                JournalEntryDetail.Credit,
                ISNULL(SystemPage.ArName, N'قيد يومية') AS ArName,
                JournalEntry.DocumentNumber AS [JournalDocNum],
                JournalEntry.[Date],
                ISNULL(
                    CASE
                        WHEN JournalEntry.SourcePageId = 10366
                            THEN (SELECT TOP 1 ServiceInvoice.DocumentNumber FROM dbo.ServiceInvoice WHERE ServiceInvoice.Id = JournalEntry.SourceId)
                        ELSE dbo.GetDocumentNumberBySystemPageId(JournalEntry.SourcePageId, JournalEntry.SourceId)
                    END,
                    ''
                ) AS [DocumentNumber]
            FROM JournalEntryDetail
            INNER JOIN JournalEntry ON JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId = JournalEntry.Id
            LEFT JOIN SystemPage ON SystemPage.Id = JournalEntry.SourcePageId
            WHERE JournalEntryDetail.PartyType = 1
              AND JournalEntryDetail.PartyId = @CustomerId
              AND JournalEntryDetail.AccountId = (SELECT CustomersAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = JournalEntry.DepartmentId)
              AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR JournalEntry.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
              AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = (SELECT ActivityId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR @CompanyId = (SELECT CompanyId FROM Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId))
              AND (JournalEntry.SourcePageId IS NULL OR JournalEntry.SourcePageId NOT IN (21, 22, 23, 24, 58, 3131, 10281))
        ) AS CustomerOBInner
    ) AS CustomerOBouter
    WHERE (Debit > 0 OR Credit > 0)
    ORDER BY CustomerOBouter.[Date];

    DECLARE @date datetime, @debitBalance money, @creditBalance money;

    DECLARE OBCur CURSOR FOR
        SELECT [Date] FROM @CustomerOB;

    OPEN OBCur;
    FETCH NEXT FROM OBCur INTO @date;

    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        SET @debitBalance = (SELECT SUM(Debit) FROM @CustomerOB WHERE [Date] <= @date OR [Date] IS NULL);
        SET @creditBalance = (SELECT SUM(Credit) FROM @CustomerOB WHERE [Date] <= @date OR [Date] IS NULL);

        IF @debitBalance > @creditBalance
        BEGIN
            SET @debitBalance = ISNULL(@debitBalance, 0) - ISNULL(@creditBalance, 0);
            SET @creditBalance = 0;
        END
        ELSE
        BEGIN
            SET @creditBalance = ISNULL(@creditBalance, 0) - ISNULL(@debitBalance, 0);
            SET @debitBalance = 0;
        END

        UPDATE @CustomerOB
        SET DebitBalance = @debitBalance,
            CreditBalance = @creditBalance
        WHERE [Date] = @date;

        FETCH NEXT FROM OBCur INTO @date;
    END

    CLOSE OBCur;
    DEALLOCATE OBCur;

    SELECT *
    FROM @CustomerOB
    ORDER BY [Date];
END

where

and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
) x )

select Customer.Id,Customer.ArName Customer,LastTranPerCustomer.ArName, JournalDocNum, DocumentNumber, [Date], isnull(Amount,0)Amount

CREATE proc [dbo].[DailySalesDetails]
@DepartmentId int,@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime ,@UserId int ,@RepId int
as 
begin

select * from(
select  s.Id ,s.DocumentNumber,c.ArName as CustomerName, s.VoucherDate,N'بيع' as VoucherType,s.TotalAfterTaxes as Total, s.TotalAfterTaxes-(isnull(m.Amount,0)-ISNULL( m.PaidAmount,0)) as Paid ,isnull(m.Amount,0) as Remain
from salesinvoice s
inner join Customer c on c.Id=s.VendorOrCustomerId
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m on m.SalesInvoiceId=s.Id
where s.IsActive=1 and s.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or s.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and m.PaymentMethodId=2
and (@UserId is null or s.UserId=@UserId)
and (@RepId is null or s.CustomerRepId=@RepId)
group by s.Id,s.DocumentNumber,c.ArName,s.TotalAfterTaxes ,m.Amount,m.PaidAmount,s.VoucherDate

union all 

select  r.Id ,r.DocumentNumber,c.ArName as CustomerName, r.VoucherDate,N'مرتجع' as VoucherType,r.TotalAfterTaxes as Total, r.TotalAfterTaxes-isnull(m.Amount,0) as Paid ,isnull(m.Amount,0) as Remain
from SalesReturns r
inner join Customer c on c.Id=r.VendorOrCustomerId
inner join SalesReturnPaymentMethod m on m.SalesReturnsId=r.Id
where r.IsActive=1 and r.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or r.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@DateFrom is null or r.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or r.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and m.PaymentMethodId=2
and (@UserId is null or r.UserId=@UserId)
and (@RepId is null or r.CustomerRepId=@RepId)
group by r.Id,r.DocumentNumber,c.ArName,r.TotalAfterTaxes ,m.Amount,r.VoucherDate
) as result 
order by VoucherDate
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[DamagedItemsDepartmentQty]

 @DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime ,@GroupId int
 as

begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)

set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))

            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى

			end

			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [DayUseReservation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [DayUseReservation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [DayUseReservation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

DECLARE @HotelRevenueAccountId int=(select HotelRevenueAccountId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId)
DECLARE @DiscountAllowedAccountId int=(select DiscountAllowedAccountId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId)
DECLARE @CustomerAccountId int=(select CustomersAccountId from Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId)
DECLARE @CashBoxAccountId int= (select [AccountId] from [dbo].[CashBox] where [Id]=@CashBoxId)


UPDATE [dbo].[JournalEntry]
   SET [BranchId] = null
      ,[Date] = @VoucherDate
      ,[Notes] = @Notes
      ,[IsActive] = 1
      ,[IsPosted] = 0
      ,[IsDeleted] = @IsDeleted
      ,[Image] = @Image
      ,[UserId] = @UserId
      ,[DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId
      ,[CurrencyId] = null
      ,[Equivalent] = null
 WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@Id

 declare @JournalEntryId int = (select top (1)[Id] from [dbo].[JournalEntry] WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@Id)
 DELETE FROM [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail]
      WHERE [JournalEntryId]=@JournalEntryId


DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail table(
	[JournalEntryId] [int] NULL,
	[Debit] [money] NULL,
	[Credit] [money] NULL,
	[CurrencyId] [int] NULL,
	[Equivalent] [float] NULL,
	[AccountId] [int] NULL,
	[SourcePageId] [int] NULL,
	[SourceId] [int] NULL,
	[IsPosted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsDeleted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsActive] [bit] NULL,
	CostCenterId int null)

Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId)
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@Paid,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@CashBoxAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,null),
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@Remain,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@CustomerAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,null),
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@Discount,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@DiscountAllowedAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,null),
   
   (@JournalEntryId, 0 , ISNULL(@Total,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @HotelRevenueAccountId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,null)

Insert into [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId)
	select 
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId from @JournalEntryDetail where Debit>0 or Credit>0

CREATE proc [dbo].[DebitAgesDetails_Get] --null,null,null --28,1,4
@DepartmentId int,@CustomerId int ,@RepId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
as 
begin
select c.ArName as CustomerName ,e.ArName as RepName,s.DocumentNumber as SalesInvoiceNo
,s.VoucherDate,s.DueDate, s.TotalAfterTaxes 
,(m.Amount-ISNULL( m.PaidAmount,0)) as Remain ,s.TotalAfterTaxes-(m.Amount-ISNULL( m.PaidAmount,0)) as Paid,
isnull(DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate ),0) as NoOfDays ,isnull(c.CreditLimitAmount,0) as CreditLimitAmount , isnull(c.CreditLimitPeriod,0) as CreditLimitPeriod
,(select ArName  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate ) ) as DebitType
,(select [From]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate ) )  as 'From'
,(select [To]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate ) ) as 'To'

from SalesInvoice s 
inner join Customer c on s.VendorOrCustomerId=c.Id
inner join Employee e on s.CustomerRepId=e.Id
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m on s.Id=m.SalesInvoiceId
where s.IsActive=1 and s.IsDeleted=0 and m.PaymentMethodId=2
and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@CustomerId is null or s.VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)
and (@RepId is null or s.CustomerRepId=@RepId)
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
group by  s.DocumentNumber,e.ArName,c.ArName,s.VoucherDate,s.DueDate ,s.TotalAfterTaxes,m.Amount,m.PaidAmount,c.CreditLimitAmount,c.CreditLimitPeriod
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[DebitAgesTotal_Get] --null,null ,null,null
@DepartmentId int ,@CustomerId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
as 
begin
select sum( m.Amount-m.PaidAmount) as Total,(DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate )) as NoOfDays 
,(select ArName  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate ) ) as DebitType
,(select [From]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate ) )  as 'From'
,(select [To]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate ) ) as 'To'
from SalesInvoice s 
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m on m.SalesInvoiceId=s.Id
where m.PaymentMethodId=2 and m.Amount > m.PaidAmount 
and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@CustomerId is null or s.VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
group by s.VoucherDate, s.DueDate
order by [From]
end

@Id int output,
@Date	datetime	,
@DepartmentId	int	,
@DebitAndCreditNotificationTypeId	int	,
@SourceTypeId	int	,
@RepId	int	,
@TotalMoneyAmount	money	,

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction DebitAndCreditNotifi_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@Date))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@Date))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [DebitAndCreditNotification] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [DebitAndCreditNotification] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [DebitAndCreditNotification] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [DebitAndCreditNotification] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

create proc [dbo].[DeleteCustomerAddress]
@id int,@customerId int
as 

update CustomerAddress set IsDeleted=1
where id=@id

if ((select IsMainAddress from CustomerAddress
where id=@id) =1)

begin
update CustomerAddress set ismainaddress=0
where id=@id

where id=(select top(1) id from CustomerAddress
where CustomerId= @customerId and isdeleted=0 and IsMainAddress=0)
end
