CREATE proc [dbo].[DepartmentItemGroupsQty]

 @DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime ,@GroupId int
 as
 BEGIN


declare @tempTable table (Id int identity,arname nvarchar(max) ,ItemId int,DepartmentId int,WarehouseId int,Qty float)

--begin

insert into @tempTable  (arname,ItemId,DepartmentId,Qty) 
select ArName,ItemId,DepartmentId,sum(Qty) from(

select (select ArName from Item where Id=ItemId)ArName,ItemId,DepartmentId,WarehouseOB.WarehouseId, ISNULL(SUM([Quantity]*UnitEquavalent),0)Qty from [WarehouseOBDetails] 
	inner join WarehouseOB on WarehouseOBDetails.WarehouseOBId=WarehouseOB.Id 
	where (Select ItemGroupId from Item where Id=ItemId)=@GroupId
			and (@DateFrom is null or @DateFrom >= [Date]) and (@DateTo is null or [Date]<=@DateTo) and WarehouseOB.IsDeleted=0 and WarehouseOB.IsActive=1 
			and DepartmentId !=28 --exclude factory quantity
	group by ItemId ,DepartmentId,WarehouseOB.WarehouseId
	--select * from @tempTable
	union all

	select (select ArName from Item where Id=ItemId)ArName,ItemId,DepartmentId,StockReceiptVoucher.WarehouseId, ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0)Qty from [StockReceiptVoucherDetails] 
	Inner join StockReceiptVoucher on StockReceiptVoucher.Id =StockReceiptVoucherDetails.MainDocId
	  	where (Select ItemGroupId from Item where Id=ItemId)=@GroupId
			and (@DateFrom is null or [VoucherDate] >= @DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo) and StockReceiptVoucher.IsDeleted=0 and StockReceiptVoucher.IsActive=1 
			and DepartmentId !=28
	group by ItemId ,DepartmentId,StockReceiptVoucher.WarehouseId


	union all

	select (select ArName from Item where Id=ItemId)ArName,ItemId,DepartmentId,StockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId, ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0)*-1 Qty from [StockIssueVoucherDetails] 
	inner join StockIssueVoucher on StockIssueVoucher.Id=StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId
		  	where (Select ItemGroupId from Item where Id=ItemId)=@GroupId
			and (@DateFrom is null or [VoucherDate] >= @DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo)and StockIssueVoucher.IsDeleted=0 and StockIssueVoucher.IsActive=1 
			and DepartmentId !=28
	group by ItemId ,DepartmentId,StockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId

) as x
group by ArName,ItemId,DepartmentId

declare @QtyTable table (arname nvarchar(max),ItemId int,dept1 float,dept2 float,dept3 float,dept4 float,dept5 float,dept6 float,dept7 float,dept8 float,dept9 float,dept10 float,dept11 float,dept12 float,allQty float,GroupName nvarchar(max))

declare @ItemId int,@arname nvarchar(MAX)
	declare itemCur cursor for SELECT distinct ItemId ,arname FROM @tempTable 
open itemCur
fetch next from itemCur into @ItemId,@arname
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin 

if @ItemId not in (select ItemId from @QtyTable)
begin

insert into @QtyTable values(
 @arname,@ItemId, 
 (select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=29 and ItemId=@ItemId)  
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=30 and ItemId=@ItemId ) 
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=31 and ItemId=@ItemId ) 
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=32 and ItemId=@ItemId ) 
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=33 and ItemId=@ItemId ) 
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=34 and ItemId=@ItemId ) 
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=35 and ItemId=@ItemId ) 
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=36 and ItemId=@ItemId )
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=37 and ItemId=@ItemId )
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=38 and ItemId=@ItemId )
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=39 and ItemId=@ItemId )
,(select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where DepartmentId=40 and ItemId=@ItemId )
, (select isnull(sum(Qty),0) from @tempTable where ItemId=@ItemId )
,(select arname 'GroupName' from ItemGroup where id=@GroupId))


end
    fetch next from itemCur into @ItemId,@arname
end
close itemCur
deallocate itemCur

select * from @QtyTable	


	








END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_Invoice_Get] --16,null,null,null

--@DocNum nvarchar(500),
--@DateFrom datetime,
--@DateTo datetime,
--@CustomerId int
@Id int


AS
--	declare @Id int 
--	if(@DocNum is not null)
--begin
--	set @Id =(select Id from SalesInvoice where DocumentNumber=@DocNum and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId  )
--end

BEGIN

select 
s.Id SalesInvoiceId,s.DocumentNumber,s.VoucherDate,s.DueDate,s.DeliveryDate
,s.Total,s.TotalItemsDiscount,s.SalesTaxes,(CAST(s.TotalAfterTaxes AS DECIMAL(18,1)))"TotalAfterTaxes" ,s.VoucherDiscountValue,s.VoucherDiscountPercentage,s.NetTotal,s.Paid
,c.Id CustomerId ,c.ArName,c.EnName ,c.BuildingNo,c.Address,c.PostOfficeBox,c.TaxNumber,c.Mobile,c.PhoneNo
,ci.ArName CustomerArCity ,Co.ArName CustomerArCountry ,ci.EnName CustomerEnCity ,Co.EnName CustomerEnCountry

,(select  top(1) ss.CommercialRegistrationNo from SystemSetting ss) CommercialRegistrationNo
,(select top(1)  ss.TaxCardNumber from SystemSetting ss) TaxCardNumber
,(select  top(1) ss.CompanyArName from SystemSetting ss) CompanyArName
,(select  top(1) ss.CompanyEnName from SystemSetting ss) CompanyEnName
,(select  top(1) ss.StreetArName from SystemSetting ss) StreetArName
,(select  top(1) ss.StreetEnName from SystemSetting ss) StreetEnName
,(select  c.ArName from Country c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CountryId from SystemSetting ss)) CountryArName
,(select  c.EnName from Country c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CountryId from SystemSetting ss)) CountryEnName
,(select  c.ArName from City c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CityId from SystemSetting ss)) CityArName
,(select  c.EnName from City c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CityId from SystemSetting ss)) CityEnName
,(select  ArName from Warehouse where Id= s.WarehouseId) WarehouseArName
,(select  ArName from Employee where Id= s.CustomerRepId) SalesRepArName
,s.Notes
,(select (iif(s.PaymentType=1,N'نقدي',iif(s.PaymentType=2,N'آجل',iif(s.PaymentType=3,N'متعدد',N''))))) PaymentType


from SalesInvoice s inner join Customer c on s.VendorOrCustomerId=c.Id
left join City ci on C.CityId=ci.Id
left join Country co on c.CountryId=co.Id
where s.IsActive=1 and s.IsDeleted=0
--and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
--  and (@DateTo is null or  s.VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
--  and (@DocNum is null or  s.DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
--  and (@CustomerId is null or  s.VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)
  and (@Id is null or  s.Id=@Id)

end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[EmployeeMonthlyAllocation_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@Month [int] ,
	@Year [int] ,
	@AllocationTypeId [int],
	@UserId [int],
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Details NTEXT
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @tran int;
    set @tran = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @tran = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction EmployeeMonthlyAllocation_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [EmployeeMonthlyAllocation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [EmployeeMonthlyAllocation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [EmployeeMonthlyAllocation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [EmployeeMonthlyAllocation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [EmployeeMonthlyAllocation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[EmployeePayrollIssue_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output
		  ,@Month int
		  ,@Year int
		  ,@DepartmentId int
		  ,@VoucherDate datetime
		  ,@UserId int
		  ,@EmployeeId int
		  ,@HrDepartmentId int
		  ,@AdministrativeDepartmentId int
		  ,@Details NTEXT

		  
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction EmployeePayrollIssue_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
DECLARE @DetailsOut int
--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [EmployeePayrollIssue] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeePayrollIssue where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeePayrollIssue where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeePayrollIssue where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeePayrollIssue where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

/* ===============================
   Set Journal Entry DocumentsCoding (FIXED)
   =============================== */

DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum nvarchar(200) = NULL;

-- نفس إعدادات DocumentsCoding اللي حضرتك جبتها فوق (NoOfDigit, CodingTypeId, IsExistInDocumentsCoding, YearFormat, DepartmentCode, MonthFormat)
-- نتأكد إن @NoOfDigit و @CodingTypeId و @IsExistInDocumentsCoding متعّرفين قبل البلوك ده.

IF (@IsExistInDocumentsCoding = 1)
BEGIN
    DECLARE @YearPart nvarchar(10);

    IF (@YearFormat = 2)
        SET @YearPart = RIGHT(CONVERT(nvarchar(4), YEAR(@VoucherDate)), 2);
    ELSE
        SET @YearPart = CONVERT(nvarchar(4), YEAR(@VoucherDate));

    -- آخر رقم (كسيريال) حسب نوع التكويد
    SET @LastDocNo = NULL;

    IF (@CodingTypeId = 1) -- آلى
    BEGIN
        SELECT TOP (1) @LastDocNo = DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntry
        WHERE DepartmentId = @DepartmentId
          AND IsActive = 1 AND IsDeleted = 0
          AND DocumentNumber IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY Id DESC;
    END
    ELSE IF (@CodingTypeId = 2) -- متصل شهري
    BEGIN
        SELECT TOP (1) @LastDocNo = DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntry
        WHERE DepartmentId = @DepartmentId
          AND IsActive = 1 AND IsDeleted = 0
          AND DocumentNumber IS NOT NULL
          AND MONTH([Date]) = MONTH(@VoucherDate)
          AND YEAR([Date])  = YEAR(@VoucherDate)
        ORDER BY Id DESC;
    END
    ELSE IF (@CodingTypeId = 3) -- متصل سنوي
    BEGIN
        SELECT TOP (1) @LastDocNo = DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntry
        WHERE DepartmentId = @DepartmentId
          AND IsActive = 1 AND IsDeleted = 0
          AND DocumentNumber IS NOT NULL
          AND YEAR([Date]) = YEAR(@VoucherDate)
        ORDER BY Id DESC;
    END

    -- استخراج آخر جزء بعد آخر '-'
    DECLARE @LastSeq int = 0;

    IF (@LastDocNo IS NOT NULL AND CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) > 0)
    BEGIN
        DECLARE @pos int = LEN(@LastDocNo) - CHARINDEX('-', REVERSE(@LastDocNo)) + 1;
        DECLARE @tail nvarchar(50) = SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo, @pos + 1, 50);

        -- لو tail مش رقم صريح، نعتبره 0
        SET @LastSeq = TRY_CONVERT(int, @tail);
        IF (@LastSeq IS NULL) SET @LastSeq = 0;
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        -- في حالة DocumentNumber القديم بدون شرطات أو NULL
        SET @LastSeq = TRY_CONVERT(int, @LastDocNo);
        IF (@LastSeq IS NULL) SET @LastSeq = 0;
    END

    SET @DocNo = @LastSeq + 1;

    -- padding
    SET @NewDocNo = RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', @NoOfDigit) + CONVERT(nvarchar(50), @DocNo), @NoOfDigit);

    -- الصيغة النهائية
    SET @JournalEntryDocNum = @DepartmentCode + '-' + @YearPart + '-' + @MonthFormat + '-' + @NewDocNo;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    -- Old Documents Coding (مبسط)
    SELECT TOP (1) @LastDocNo = DocumentNumber
    FROM JournalEntry
    WHERE DepartmentId = @DepartmentId
      AND IsActive = 1 AND IsDeleted = 0
      AND DocumentNumber IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY Id DESC;

    SET @DocNo = ISNULL(TRY_CONVERT(int, @LastDocNo), 0) + 1;
    SET @JournalEntryDocNum = CONVERT(nvarchar(50), @DocNo);
END

CREATE procedure [dbo].[EmployeesAttendAndLeave_Insert]
    @Id int output,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@Date [datetime] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@Details NTEXT,
	@IsPosted [bit],
	@LatenessDetails NTEXT,
	@NewOvertimes NTEXT,
	@OldOvertimes NTEXT,
	@NewOvertimesDetails NTEXT,
	@OldOvertimesDetails NTEXT,
	@NewPenalties NTEXT,
	@OldPenalties NTEXT,
	@NewPenaltiesDetails NTEXT,
	@OldPenaltiesDetails NTEXT,
	--Absent Penaity
	@NewAbsentPenalties NTEXT,
	@NewAbsentPenaltiesDetails NTEXT
	
AS
begin
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction EmployeesAttendAndLeave_Insert;

-- Insert statements for procedure here
DECLARE
@DetailsOut int, @LatenessDetailsOut int, @NewOvertimesOut int, @OldOvertimesOut int, @NewPenaltiesOut int, @OldPenaltiesOut int,@NewOvertimesDetailsOut int, @OldOvertimesDetailsOut int, @NewPenaltiesDetailsOut int, @OldPenaltiesDetailsOut int

	--Absent Penaity
, @NewAbsentPenaltiesOut int, @NewAbsentPenaltiesDetailsOut int
--@DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from EmployeesAttendAndLeave where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@Date))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@Date))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeesAttendAndLeave where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeesAttendAndLeave where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeesAttendAndLeave where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeesAttendAndLeave where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

DECLARE @DocId int 
set @DocId = (select MAX([Id]) from EmployeesAttendAndLeave)

-- handle absence
DECLARE @AllDates Table
([Date] DATETIME)

INSERT INTO @AllDates (Date)

SELECT DISTINCT CAST(CAST(MONTH(Attend_LeaveDateTime) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(Attend_LeaveDateTime) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(Attend_LeaveDateTime) as varchar(4)) as datetime )
FROM dbo.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveDetail
Where dbo.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveDetail.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveId = @DocId

--select * from @AllDates

DECLARE @SelectedDate datetime

 
DECLARE DateCursor CURSOR FOR
SELECT [Date] FROM @AllDates
 
OPEN DateCursor
 
FETCH NEXT FROM DateCursor INTO @SelectedDate
 
WHILE(@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
BEGIN

--PRINT 'Selected Date = ' + CAST(@SelectedDate AS NVARCHAR(50)) 

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.OfficialVacation WHERE @SelectedDate BETWEEN CAST(CAST(MONTH(StartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(StartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(StartDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime ) AND CAST(CAST(MONTH(EndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(EndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(EndDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime )) 
BEGIN
    --If not exist in Offitioal vacation
	PRINT 'true' 
	Declare @MustAttendEmployees Table ([EmpId] int )

	insert into @MustAttendEmployees ([EmpId])
	select DISTINCT EmployeeId from dbo.ShiftEmployee as SE
	inner join dbo.ShiftDetail as SD  on SE.ShiftId = SD.ShiftId
	where SD.IsVacation != 1 AND Sd.EnDay = FORMAT(@SelectedDate, 'dddd') 
	AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT EmpId FROM @MustAttendEmployees)
	--select * from @MustAttendEmployees
	

	insert into @MustAttendEmployees ([EmpId])
	select DISTINCT VR.EmployeeId from dbo.VacationRequest as VR
	where @SelectedDate BETWEEN CAST(CAST(MONTH(VacationStartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(VacationStartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(VacationStartDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime )  AND CAST(CAST(MONTH(VacationEndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(VacationEndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(VacationEndDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime ) AND VR.IsAcceptedByManager != 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT EmpId FROM @MustAttendEmployees); 

	--select * from @MustAttendEmployees
	--delete from @MustAttendEmployees

 --   insert into @MustAttendEmployees ([EmpId])
	--select EmployeeId from dbo.VacationRequest
	--where @SelectedDate BETWEEN CAST(CAST(MONTH(VacationStartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(VacationStartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(VacationStartDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime )  AND CAST(CAST(MONTH(VacationEndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(VacationEndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(VacationEndDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT EmpId FROM @MustAttendEmployees) And IsAcceptedByManager != 1; 

	--select * from @MustAttendEmployees

	 

	insert into dbo.EmployeeAbsence ([EmployeeId] , [Date] )
	select MAE.EmpId , @SelectedDate
	from @MustAttendEmployees as MAE where MAE.EmpId  NOT IN (SELECT dbo.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveDetail.[EmployeeId] FROM dbo.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveDetail Where dbo.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveDetail.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveId = @DocId) AND  MAE.EmpId NOT IN (SELECT dbo.EmployeeAbsence.[EmployeeId] FROM EmployeeAbsence WHERE [Date] = @SelectedDate AND IsDeleted = 0)
 --   LEFT OUTER JOIN @AttendEmployees as AE
 --   ON MAE.EmpId = AE.EmpId
	--where MAE.EmpId NOT in (select EmpId from @AttendEmployees)  

	--select * from EmployeeAbsence 

	----***************************--------------------------------************************************--
	
END

FETCH NEXT FROM DateCursor INTO @SelectedDate
END
 
CLOSE DateCursor
DEALLOCATE DateCursor

CREATE proc [dbo].[EmployeesAttendAndLeave_Update]


@Id int,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@Date [datetime] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@Details NTEXT,
	@IsPosted [bit],
	@LatenessDetails NTEXT,
	@NewOvertimes NTEXT,
	@OldOvertimes NTEXT,
	@NewOvertimesDetails NTEXT,
	@OldOvertimesDetails NTEXT,
	@NewPenalties NTEXT,
	@OldPenalties NTEXT,
	@NewPenaltiesDetails NTEXT,
	@OldPenaltiesDetails NTEXT

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction EmployeesAttendAndLeave_Update;

-- Insert statements for procedure here
DECLARE
@DetailsOut int, @LatenessDetailsOut int, @NewOvertimesOut int, @OldOvertimesOut int, @NewPenaltiesOut int, @OldPenaltiesOut int,@NewOvertimesDetailsOut int, @OldOvertimesDetailsOut int, @NewPenaltiesDetailsOut int, @OldPenaltiesDetailsOut int

update [dbo].EmployeesAttendAndLeave
set
			[Notes] =@Notes
           ,[Image]=@Image
		   ,[UserId]=@UserId
		   ,[IsDeleted]=@IsDeleted
           ,[IsActive] =@IsActive
		   ,[Date]=@Date
           ,[DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId
		   ,[IsPosted]=@IsPosted

WHERE [Id]=@Id

declare  @EmployeeLtnssId int, @EmployeeAbsnceId int, @OvertimeIssueDetailsId int, @EmpAttendAndLeaveDate datetime, @PenaltyIssueId int, @EmpId int

DECLARE LatenessAbsenceOvertimeCursor CURSOR FOR
SELECT 
EmpLat.Id as EmployeeLatenessId
, EmpAb.Id AS EmployeeAbsenceId 
, OID.Id as OvertimeIssueDetialsId 
,Attend_LeaveDateTime

FROM dbo.EmployeesAttendAndLeaveDetail EmpALD

INNER JOIN EmployeeLateness EmpLat ON
EmpLat.EmployeeId = EmpALD.EmployeeId

INNER JOIN EmployeeAbsence EmpAb ON 
EmpAb.EmployeeId =EmpALD.EmployeeId

INNER JOIN OvertimeIssue OI ON 
OI.EmployeeId = EmpALD.EmployeeId

INNER JOIN OvertimeIssueDetials OID ON
OID.MainDocId = OI.Id

WHERE EmpALD.[EmployeesAttendAndLeaveId] = @Id AND  EmpALD.[IsDeleted] = 0 
group by
OID.Id
,EmpLat.Id
,EmpAb.Id
,Attend_LeaveDateTime

OPEN LatenessAbsenceOvertimeCursor
 
FETCH NEXT FROM LatenessAbsenceOvertimeCursor INTO  @EmployeeLtnssId, @EmployeeAbsnceId, @OvertimeIssueDetailsId,@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate

WHILE(@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
BEGIN

IF(@EmployeeLtnssId IS NOT NULL)
BEGIN
UPDATE EmployeeLateness
SET IsDeleted = 1
WHERE Id = @EmployeeLtnssId;

-- Delete Lateness penalty
set @EmpId = (select EmployeeId from EmployeeLateness where Id = @EmployeeLtnssId)
set @PenaltyIssueId = (select Id from PenaltyIssue where EmployeeId = @EmpId 
AND [Month] = CAST(MONTH(@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate) as int) AND [Year] = CAST(YEAR(@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate) as int) AND IsDeleted = 0)
DELETE PenaltyIssueDetails
WHERE MainDocId = @PenaltyIssueId AND Date = @EmpAttendAndLeaveDate AND Cause='حضور متأخر';
END

IF(@EmployeeAbsnceId IS NOT NULL)
BEGIN
UPDATE EmployeeAbsence
SET IsDeleted = 1
WHERE Id = @EmployeeAbsnceId;
END

IF(@OvertimeIssueDetailsId IS NOT NULL)
BEGIN
UPDATE OvertimeIssueDetials
SET  IsDeleted = 1
WHERE Id = @OvertimeIssueDetailsId;
END

FETCH NEXT FROM LatenessAbsenceOvertimeCursor INTO  @EmployeeLtnssId, @EmployeeAbsnceId, @OvertimeIssueDetailsId,@EmpAttendAndLeaveDate
END

CLOSE LatenessAbsenceOvertimeCursor
DEALLOCATE LatenessAbsenceOvertimeCursor

    --If not exist in Offitioal vacation

	where SD.IsVacation != 1 AND Sd.EnDay = FORMAT(@SelectedDate, 'dddd') 
	AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT EmpId FROM @MustAttendEmployees)
	--select * from @MustAttendEmployees
	

	insert into @MustAttendEmployees ([EmpId])
	select DISTINCT VR.EmployeeId from dbo.VacationRequest as VR
	where @SelectedDate BETWEEN CAST(CAST(MONTH(VacationStartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(VacationStartDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(VacationStartDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime )  AND CAST(CAST(MONTH(VacationEndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(DAY(VacationEndDate) as varchar(2)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(VacationEndDate) as varchar(4)) as datetime ) AND VR.IsAcceptedByManager != 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT EmpId FROM @MustAttendEmployees); 

	--select * from @MustAttendEmployees
	--delete from @MustAttendEmployees

 --   insert into @MustAttendEmployees ([EmpId])

	--select * from @MustAttendEmployees

CREATE Proc EmployeesContract_Get 
@Id int

As
Begin
select ec.Id ContractId,e.ArName EmployeeName,isnull(e.EnName,'')EmployeeEnName,isnull(e.NationalId,'')NationalId,isnull(n.ArName,'') Nationality,isnull(n.EnName,'') NationalityEnName,isnull(e.LivingAddress,'')LivingAddress
,isnull(j.ArName,'') JobName,isnull(j.EnName,'') JobEnName
,isnull((SELECT CONVERT(nvarchar, ec.ContractPeriodNum) +N' - '+IIF(ec.ContractPeriodTypeId=1,N'يوم',IIF(ec.ContractPeriodTypeId=2,N'اسبوع',IIF(ec.ContractPeriodTypeId=3,N'شهر',N'سنة')))),'') ContractPeriod
,isnull((SELECT CONVERT(nvarchar, ec.ContractPeriodNum) +N' - '+IIF(ec.ContractPeriodTypeId=1,N'Day',IIF(ec.ContractPeriodTypeId=2,N'Week',IIF(ec.ContractPeriodTypeId=3,N'Month',N'Year')))),'') ContractPeriodEn
,isnull(ec.ContractStartTime,'')ContractStartTime,isnull(ec.ContractEndTime,'')ContractEndTime,0 NoticePeriod
,(select isnull(CompanyArName,'')from SystemSetting)CompanyArName
,(select isnull(CompanyEnName,'')from SystemSetting)CompanyEnName
,(select isnull(CommercialRegistrationNo,'')from SystemSetting)CommercialRegistrationNo
,(select isnull(ItemValue,0)from EmployeeContractSalaryItem where SalaryItemId=1)BasicSalaryItem
,(select isnull(ItemValue,0)from EmployeeContractSalaryItem where SalaryItemId=2)HomeSalaryItem
,0 TransportationSalaryItem
,isnull((SELECT CONVERT(nvarchar, ec.VacationPeriodNum) +N' - '+IIF(ec.VacationPeriodTypeId =1,N'يوم',IIF(ec.VacationPeriodTypeId=2,N'اسبوع',IIF(ec.VacationPeriodTypeId=3,N'شهر',N'سنة')))),'') AnnualVacation
,isnull((SELECT CONVERT(nvarchar, ec.VacationPeriodNum) +N' - '+IIF(ec.VacationPeriodTypeId =1,N'Day',IIF(ec.VacationPeriodTypeId=2,N'Week',IIF(ec.VacationPeriodTypeId=3,N'Month',N'Year')))),'') AnnualVacationEn
from EmployeeContract ec inner join Employee e on e.Id=ec.EmployeeId
left join Nationality n on n.id=e.NationalityId
left join Job j on j.id=ec.ContractJobId
where ec.Id=@Id
and ec.IsActive=1 and ec.IsDeleted=0
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[EmployeeVacationDue_GetDetails]
@EmployeeId int
as
select ec.Id,ec.EmployeeContractId,ec.SalaryItemId,ec.EmployeeId,ec.ItemValue,ev.Id as MainId,ev.EmployeeContractId as EmployeeVacationContractId,ev.SalaryItemId as EmployeeVacationSalaryItemId ,ev.EmployeeId as EmployeeVacationEmployeeId , si.ArName as SalaryItemArName
from  EmployeeContractSalaryItem ec  inner join EmployeeContractVacation ev
on ec.SalaryItemId = ev.SalaryItemId inner join SalaryItem si 
on si.Id=ec.SalaryItemId
where (@EmployeeId is NULL or ec.EmployeeId = @EmployeeId )
and ec.EmployeeContractId=ev.EmployeeContractId

begin

end
else

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin

else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding

set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

else --AllDepartments
begin

set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin

end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeeVacationOpeningBalance where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end

			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeeVacationOpeningBalance where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeeVacationOpeningBalance where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else

 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length)

                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo

                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end

begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from EmployeeVacationOpeningBalance where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)

set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ExpenseAmortizationJE_Insert] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int ,@DetailId int

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction ExpenseAmortizationJE_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @VoucherDate datetime=(select VoucherDate from ExpenseAmortization where Id=@Id)
Declare @DepartmentId int=(select DepartmentId from PrepaidExpenseDetail where Id=@DetailId)
Declare @CostCenterId int=(select CostCenterId from PrepaidExpenseDetail where Id=@DetailId)
Declare @UserId int=(select UserId from ExpenseAmortization where Id=@Id)
declare @CurrencyId int =(select top(1)Id from Currency where IsDeleted=0 and IsActive=1)
declare @CurrencyEquivalent float=(select Equivalent from Currency where Id=@CurrencyId)

Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
declare @i int =0
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

--- Set Journal Entry DocumentsCoding -----------------
DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum nvarchar(max)
if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			
if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					set @i =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end
set @JournalEntryDocNum= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))

end
else
begin
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'ExpenseAmortization')

DECLARE @ExpenseAccountId int=(select ExpenseAccountId from PrepaidExpenseDetail where [Id]=@DetailId)
DECLARE @PrePaymentAccountId int=(select PrePaymentAccountId from PrepaidExpenseDetail where [Id]=@DetailId)
--Declare @Value money=(select value from PrepaidExpenseDetail where Id=@DetailId)
Declare @Value money=(select isnull(sum(value),0) from ExpenseAmortizationDistribution where PrepaidExpenseDetailId=@DetailId and ExpenseAmortizationId=@Id and IsSelectedAmortization=1)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO [dbo].[JournalEntry]
           (
		   [DocumentNumber]
           ,[BranchId]
           ,[Date]
           ,[SourcePageId]
           ,[SourceId]
           ,[IsActive]
           ,[IsPosted]
           ,[IsDeleted]
           ,[UserId]
           ,[DepartmentId]
           ,[CurrencyId]
           ,[Equivalent]
		   )
     VALUES
           (Cast( @JournalEntryDocNum as nvarchar(max))
           ,null--@BranchId
           ,@VoucherDate
           ,@SourcePageId
           ,@Id
           ,1
           ,0
           ,0
           ,@UserId
           ,@DepartmentId
           ,@CurrencyId
           ,@CurrencyEquivalent
		   )

declare @JournalEntryId int = (select MAX(Id) from [dbo].[JournalEntry])

DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail table(
	[JournalEntryId] [int] NULL,
	[Debit] [money] NULL,
	[Credit] [money] NULL,
	[CurrencyId] [int] NULL,
	[Equivalent] [float] NULL,
	[AccountId] [int] NULL,
	[SourcePageId] [int] NULL,
	[SourceId] [int] NULL,
	[IsPosted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsDeleted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsActive] [bit] NULL,
	CostCenterId int null)

Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId)
	 VALUES
	-- Debit " From "
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@Value,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@ExpenseAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,@CostCenterId),
    -- Credit " To "
   (@JournalEntryId, 0, ISNULL(@Value,0),@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@PrePaymentAccountId,@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,@CostCenterId)
   
 
Insert into [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId)
	select 
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId from @JournalEntryDetail where Debit>0 or Credit>0
---//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------//--
lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;

        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0

        raiserror ('ExpenseAmortizationJE_Insert: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;

CREATE proc [dbo].[FinancialPeriods_GetNextPeriod]
 @TargetId  int ,@MainId int
as
if(@TargetId is null)
begin
select Top(1)--*
 Id,ArName,EnName,PeriodStart,PeriodEnd,PostingStatus,LockStatus,Opened,Closed,Status
      from [dbo].[FinancialPeriodMaster]
       where Id in(--  "before"
              select min(Id)
               from [dbo].[FinancialPeriodMaster]
               where Id > @MainId
             )
end
else
begin
 select Top(1)--*
 Id,ArName,EnName,PeriodStart,PeriodEnd,PostingStatus,LockStatus,Opened,Closed,Status
      from [dbo].[FinancialPeriods]
       where Id in(--  "before"
              select min(Id)
               from [dbo].[FinancialPeriods]
               where Id > @TargetId
         and FinancialPeriodMasterId=@MainId
             )
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[FinancialPeriods_GetPreviousPeriod]
 @TargetId  int,@MainId int
as
if(@TargetId is null)
begin
select Top(1)--*
Id,ArName,EnName,PeriodStart,PeriodEnd,PostingStatus,LockStatus,Opened,Closed,Status
      from [dbo].[FinancialPeriodMaster]
       where Id in(--  "before"
              select Max(Id)
               from [dbo].[FinancialPeriodMaster]
               where Id <@MainId
             )
end
else
begin
 select Top(1)--*
 Id,ArName,EnName,PeriodStart,PeriodEnd,PostingStatus,LockStatus,Opened,Closed,Status
      from [dbo].[FinancialPeriods]
       where Id in(--  "before"
              select Max(Id)
               from [dbo].[FinancialPeriods]
               where Id <@TargetId
        and FinancialPeriodMasterId=@MainId
             )
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FixedAsset_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@DepId int,
	@DateFrom datetime,
    @DateTo datetime,
    @ActivityId int,
    @CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT FixedAsset.Id, [FixedAsset].[Code]
      ,[FixedAsset].[ArName]
      ,[FixedAsset].[EnName]
      ,Branch.ArName as [Branch]
	  ,Department.ArName as Department
      ,[PurchaseDate]
      ,[FixedAssetsGroup].ArName as[FixedAssetsGroup]
      ,Currency.ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Employee].ArName as [Employee]
      ,[ValueOfAsset]
      ,[HistoricalValueOfAsset]
      ,[NumberOfYears]
      ,[FixedAsset].[ChartOfAccountsIdTotalDepracition]
      ,[FixedAsset].[ChartOfAccountsIdOriginalAccounts]
      ,[FixedAsset].[ChartOfAccountsIdDepracition]
      ,[FixedAsset].[CapitalGainsAccounts]
      ,[FixedAsset].[CapitalLossesAccounts]
      ,[StartDepraciationDate]
      ,[TotalDepracaition]
      ,[FixedAsset].[DepreciationMethod]
      ,[ValueOfInstallment]
      ,[FixedAsset].[DepraciationRate]
      ,[dbo].[FixedAsset].[IsActive]
      ,[dbo].[FixedAsset].[IsDeleted]
  FROM [dbo].[FixedAsset] left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=FixedAsset.BranchId
  left join Currency
  on Currency.Id=FixedAsset.CurrencyId
  left join Employee
  on FixedAsset.EmployeeId=Employee.Id
  left join FixedAssetsGroup
  on FixedAsset.FixedAssetsGroupId=FixedAssetsGroup.Id
   left join Department
  on FixedAsset.DepartmentId=Department.Id
  where  (
  (@DepId is null or FixedAsset.DepartmentId= @DepId)
  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepId))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepId))
   and( @DateFrom is null or  FixedAsset.PurchaseDate>=@DateFrom)
    and( @DateTo is null or  FixedAsset.PurchaseDate<=@DateTo)
	and FixedAsset.IsActive=1
	and FixedAsset.IsDeleted=0)
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FixedAssetDepreciation_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
@DocumentNumber nvarchar(500),
@BranchId int,
@Total money,
@Date datetime,
@DepartmentId int,
@CurrencyId int,
@CurrencyEquivalent float,
@MethodOfInput int,
@IsDeleted bit,
@IsActive bit,
@IsPosted bit,
@IsLinked bit,
@AutoCreated bit,
@UserId int,
@Notes nvarchar(600),
@FixedAssetDepreciationDetails ntext

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction FixedAssetDepreciation_Insert;

declare @FixedAssetDepreciationDetailsOut int


----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
 ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@Date))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@Date))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FixedAssetDepreciation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FixedAssetDepreciation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FixedAssetDepreciation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FixedAssetDepreciation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

 ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@Date))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@Date))))

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department

set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end

begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))

            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى

			end

			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from FixedAssetScraping where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from FixedAssetScraping where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from FixedAssetScraping where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

      ,[CurrencyId] = @CurrencyId
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent] = @CurrencyEquivalent
      ,[IsDeleted] = @IsDeleted
      ,[IsActive] = @IsActive

 WHERE Id=@Id

delete from FixedAssetScrapingDetails where MainDocId=@Id

INSERT INTO [dbo].FixedAssetScrapingDetails
           ([FixedAssetId]
           ,[MainDocId]
           ,[FixedAssetValue]
           ,[CurrentFixedAssetValue]

           ,[Notes]

           ,[CurrentFixedAssetValue]
           ,HistoricalValueOfAsset
           ,[LastDepreciationDate]
           ,[Notes]
           ,[IsDeleted]
FROM OPENXML (@FixedAssetScrapingDetailsOut, '/DocumentElement/FixedAssetScrapingDetails', 2)
with([FixedAssetId] int
           ,[MainDocId] int
           ,[FixedAssetValue] money
           ,[CurrentFixedAssetValue] money
           ,HistoricalValueOfAsset money
           ,[LastDepreciationDate] datetime
           ,[Notes] nvarchar(600)
           ,[IsDeleted] bit)

DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'FixedAssetScraping')
declare @JournalEntryId int = (select top (1)[Id] from [dbo].[JournalEntry] WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@Id)
UPDATE [dbo].[JournalEntry]
   SET [BranchId] = @BranchId
      ,[Date] = @Date
      ,[Notes] = @Notes
      ,[IsActive] = @IsActive
      ,[IsPosted] = 0
      ,[IsDeleted] = 0
      ,[UserId] = @UserId
      ,[DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId
      ,[CurrencyId] = @CurrencyId
      ,[Equivalent] = @CurrencyEquivalent
 WHERE Id=@JournalEntryId

 DELETE FROM [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] WHERE [JournalEntryId]=@JournalEntryId

declare @FixedAssetId int, @FixedAssetValue money, @CurrentValue money, @CapitalLossesAccId int, @TotalDepracitionAccountId int, @OriginalAccId int
declare depreciationCur cursor for SELECT [FixedAssetId],[CurrentFixedAssetValue]
FROM OPENXML (@FixedAssetScrapingDetailsOut, '/DocumentElement/FixedAssetScrapingDetails', 2)
with([FixedAssetId] int ,[CurrentFixedAssetValue] money)
open depreciationCur
fetch next from depreciationCur into @FixedAssetId, @CurrentValue
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	select @OriginalAccId=ChartOfAccountsIdOriginalAccounts, @TotalDepracitionAccountId=ChartOfAccountsIdTotalDepracition, @CapitalLossesAccId=CapitalLossesAccounts, @FixedAssetValue=ValueOfAsset from FixedAsset where Id=@FixedAssetId
	Insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@TotalDepracitionAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1),
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@FixedAssetValue,0)-ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0),0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@CapitalLossesAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1),
	(@JournalEntryId,0, ISNULL(@FixedAssetValue,0),@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@OriginalAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1)
	update FixedAsset set FixedAssetStatusId=4 where Id=@FixedAssetId
	fetch next from depreciationCur into @FixedAssetId, @CurrentValue
end
close depreciationCur
deallocate depreciationCur

EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @FixedAssetScrapingDetailsOut

 lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction FixedAssetScraping_Update;

        raiserror ('FixedAssetScraping_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FixedAssetSelling_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
@DocumentNumber nvarchar(500),
@BranchId int,
@Total money,
@Date datetime,
@DepartmentId int,
@CurrencyId int,
@CurrencyEquivalent float,
@IsDeleted bit,
@IsActive bit,
@IsPosted bit,
@IsLinked bit,
@AutoCreated bit,
@UserId int,
@Notes nvarchar(600),
@CashboxId int,
@FixedAssetSellingDetails ntext

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction FixedAssetSelling_Insert;

declare @FixedAssetSellingDetailsOut int

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
 ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@Date))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@Date))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from FixedAssetSelling where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from FixedAssetSelling where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from FixedAssetSelling where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from FixedAssetSelling where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

			end
			
if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)

set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))

 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)

	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

set @JournalEntryDocNum= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo

DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'FixedAssetSelling')

INSERT INTO [dbo].[JournalEntry]
           ([DocumentNumber]
           ,[BranchId]
           ,[Date]
           ,[SourcePageId]
           ,[SourceId]
           ,[IsActive]
           ,[IsPosted]
           ,[IsDeleted]
           ,[UserId]
           ,[DepartmentId]
           ,[CurrencyId]
           ,[Equivalent])
     VALUES
           (Cast( @JournalEntryDocNum as nvarchar(max))
           ,@BranchId
           ,@Date
           ,@SourcePageId
           ,@Id
           ,1
           ,0
           ,0
           ,@UserId
           ,@DepartmentId
           ,@CurrencyId
           ,@CurrencyEquivalent)

declare @JournalEntryId int = (select MAX(Id) from [dbo].[JournalEntry])
declare @cashboxAccId int=(select AccountId from CashBox where Id=@CashboxId)
declare @FixedAssetId int, @FixedAssetValue money, @CurrentValue money, @SellingPrice money, @TotalDepreciationValue money, @CapitalLossesAccId int, @TotalDepracitionAccountId int, @OriginalAccId int, @CapitalGainsAccount int
declare depreciationCur cursor for SELECT [FixedAssetId],[CurrentFixedAssetValue],TotalDepreciationValue,SellingPrice
FROM OPENXML (@FixedAssetSellingDetailsOut, '/DocumentElement/FixedAssetSellingDetails', 2)
with([FixedAssetId] int ,[CurrentFixedAssetValue] money,TotalDepreciationValue money, SellingPrice money)
open depreciationCur
fetch next from depreciationCur into @FixedAssetId, @CurrentValue, @TotalDepreciationValue, @SellingPrice
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	select @OriginalAccId=ChartOfAccountsIdOriginalAccounts, @TotalDepracitionAccountId=ChartOfAccountsIdTotalDepracition, @CapitalLossesAccId=CapitalLossesAccounts, @CapitalGainsAccount=CapitalGainsAccounts, @FixedAssetValue=ValueOfAsset from FixedAsset where Id=@FixedAssetId
	Insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@TotalDepreciationValue,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@TotalDepracitionAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1),
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@cashboxAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1),
	(@JournalEntryId,0, ISNULL(@FixedAssetValue,0),@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@OriginalAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1)

	if ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0)>ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0)
	Insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId,0, ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0)-ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0),@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@CapitalGainsAccount,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1)

	if ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0)<ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0)
	Insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0)-ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0),0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@CapitalLossesAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1)

	update FixedAsset set FixedAssetStatusId=3 where Id=@FixedAssetId
	fetch next from depreciationCur into @FixedAssetId, @CurrentValue, @TotalDepreciationValue, @SellingPrice
end
close depreciationCur
deallocate depreciationCur

        if @xstate = -1

        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction FixedAssetSelling_Insert;

        raiserror ('FixedAssetSelling_Insert: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch

while @@FETCH_STATUS=0

	select @OriginalAccId=ChartOfAccountsIdOriginalAccounts, @TotalDepracitionAccountId=ChartOfAccountsIdTotalDepracition, @CapitalLossesAccId=CapitalLossesAccounts, @CapitalGainsAccount=CapitalGainsAccounts, @FixedAssetValue=ValueOfAsset from FixedAsset where Id=@FixedAssetId
	Insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@TotalDepreciationValue,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@TotalDepracitionAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1),
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@cashboxAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1),
	(@JournalEntryId,0, ISNULL(@FixedAssetValue,0),@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@OriginalAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1)

	if ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0)>ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0)
	Insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId,0, ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0)-ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0),@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@CapitalGainsAccount,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1)

	if ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0)<ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0)
	Insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId,ISNULL(@CurrentValue,0)-ISNULL(@SellingPrice,0),0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@CapitalLossesAccId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1)

	update FixedAsset set FixedAssetStatusId=3 where Id=@FixedAssetId
	fetch next from depreciationCur into @FixedAssetId, @CurrentValue, @TotalDepreciationValue, @SellingPrice
end
close depreciationCur
deallocate depreciationCur

EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @FixedAssetSellingDetailsOut

        if @trancount = 0
