        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction FixedAssetSelling_Update;

        raiserror ('FixedAssetSelling_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE FragmentationVoucher_Delete
	@Id int,
	@userId int
AS
BEGIN
	-------- Remove From FragmentationVoucher ---------
	update FragmentationVoucher set IsDeleted=1, UserId=@userId where Id=@Id
	update FragmentationVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@Id
	DECLARE @SystemPageId int=(select Id from SystemPage where ControllerName='FragmentationVoucher')
	-------- Remove From StockReceiptVoucher ---------
	DECLARE @StockReceiptVoucherId int =(select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where SystemPageId=@SystemPageId and SelectedId=@Id)
	update StockReceiptVoucher set IsDeleted=1 where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId
	update StockReceiptVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId = @StockReceiptVoucherId
	-------- Remove StockReceiptVoucher From JournalEntry ---------
	DECLARE @StockReceiptSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockReceiptVoucher')
	update JournalEntry set IsDeleted=1 where SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId and SourceId in (select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId)
	update JournalEntryDetail set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@StockReceiptVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId 
	-------- Remove From StockIssueVoucher ---------
	DECLARE @StockIssueVoucherId int =(select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SystemPageId and SelectedId=@Id)
	update StockIssueVoucher set IsDeleted=1 where Id=@StockIssueVoucherId
	update StockIssueVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@StockIssueVoucherId
	-------- Remove StockIssueVoucher From JournalEntry ---------
	DECLARE @StockIssueSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockIssueVoucher')
	update JournalEntry set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@StockIssueVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId
	update JournalEntryDetail set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@StockIssueVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId
END

,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int

declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)

set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else

set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)

set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department

set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding

set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments

set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding

if(@YearFormat=2)

end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))

            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى

            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FragmentationVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FragmentationVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FragmentationVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [FragmentationVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetAccountBalance]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@departmentId int, @accountId int,@fromDate datetime, @toDate datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

DECLARE @ResultVar money, @obDebit money, @obCredit money, @debit money, @credit money, @totalDebit money, @totalCredit money, @balanceDebit money, @balanceCredit money, @classificationId int

	-- Add the T-SQL statements to compute the return value here
	set @classificationId=(select ClassificationId from ChartOfAccount where [Id]=@accountId)

	if @classificationId=2
	begin
		exec [dbo].[BalanceStatement_Insert] @fromDate, @toDate, @departmentId
		set @obDebit=(select SUM(ObDebit) from [dbo].[BalanceStatement] where ParentId=@accountId)
		set @obCredit=(select SUM(ObCredit) from [dbo].[BalanceStatement] where ParentId=@accountId)
	end
	else
	begin
		set @obDebit=(select ObDebit from ChartOfAccount where [Id]=@accountId)
		set @obCredit=(select ObCredit from ChartOfAccount where [Id]=@accountId)
	end

	if @departmentId>0
	begin
		set @debit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Debit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JE.DepartmentId=@departmentId AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
		set @credit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Credit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JE.DepartmentId=@departmentId AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
	end
	else
	begin
		set @debit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Debit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
		set @credit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Credit]) from [JournalEntry] JE left join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (JE.[Date] between @fromDate AND @toDate) AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
	end
	
	if @debit>@credit
	begin
		set @debit=@debit-@credit
		set @credit=0
	end
	else
	begin
		set @credit=@credit-@debit
		set @debit=0
	end

	set @totalDebit=@obDebit+@debit
	set @totalCredit=@obCredit+@credit

	if	@totalDebit>@totalCredit
	begin
		set @balanceDebit=@totalDebit-@totalCredit
		set @balanceCredit=0
		set @ResultVar= @balanceDebit
	end
	else
	begin
		set @balanceCredit=@totalCredit-@totalDebit
		set @balanceDebit=0
		set @ResultVar= @balanceCredit
	end

	return isnull( @ResultVar,0)
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetAccountStatement]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@fromDate datetime, @toDate datetime, @accountId int ,@DepartmentId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @debit money, @credit money, @postponedDebit money, @postponedCredit money, @obDebit money , @obCredit money
declare @AccountStatement table(
	[Id] [int] NOT NULL,
	[Code] [nvarchar](450) NULL,
	[ArName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[ObDebit] [money] NULL,
	[ObCredit] [money] NULL,
	[Debit] [money] NULL,
	[Credit] [money] NULL,
	[PostponedDebit] [money] NULL,
	[PostponedCredit] [money] NULL)

insert into @AccountStatement ([Id],[Code],[ArName],[ObDebit],[ObCredit]) select [Id],[Code],[ArName],[ObDebit],[ObCredit] from [dbo].[ChartOfAccount]  where [Id]=@accountId AND [IsDeleted]=0 and IsActive=1
	
	
set @debit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Debit]) from [JournalEntry] JE inner join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where ( @fromDate is null or JE.[Date] >= @fromDate) AND (@toDate is null or JE.[Date] <= @toDate) AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId
and(@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId)) AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
set @credit=isnull((select sum(JD.[Credit]) from [JournalEntry] JE inner join [JournalEntryDetail] JD on JE.Id=JD.JournalEntryId where (@fromDate is null or JE.[Date] >= @fromDate) AND (@toDate is null or JE.[Date] <= @toDate) AND JD.[AccountId]=@accountId 
and(@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId)) AND JD.[IsDeleted]=0 AND JD.[IsActive]=1),0)
	
	
if (@debit + (select ObDebit from @AccountStatement))>(@credit +(select ObCredit from @AccountStatement))
	begin
		set @postponedDebit=(@debit + (select ObDebit from @AccountStatement))-(@credit +(select ObCredit from @AccountStatement))
		set @postponedCredit=0
	end
else
	begin
		set @postponedCredit=(@credit +(select ObCredit from @AccountStatement))-(@debit + (select ObDebit from @AccountStatement))
		set @postponedDebit=0
	end

update @AccountStatement
set [Debit]=@debit,
[Credit]=@credit,
[PostponedDebit]=@postponedDebit,
[PostponedCredit]=@postponedCredit
where [Id]=@accountId
select * from @AccountStatement
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetAccountStatementDetails]
    @fromDate     datetime = NULL,
    @toDate       datetime = NULL,
    @accountId    int = NULL,
    @DepartmentId int = NULL,
    @ActivityId   int = NULL,
    @CompanyId    int = NULL,
    @PartyType    INT = NULL,
    @PartyId      INT = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @toDateNextDay datetime = CASE WHEN @toDate IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEADD(DAY, 1, CONVERT(date, @toDate)) END;

    -- << NEW: Calculate Balance Forward >>
    DECLARE @OpeningBalance MONEY = 0;
    IF @fromDate IS NOT NULL
    BEGIN
        -- 1. Get the static opening balance from ChartOfAccount
        SELECT @OpeningBalance = ISNULL(ObDebit, 0) - ISNULL(ObCredit, 0)
        FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount
        WHERE Id = @accountId;

        -- 2. Add the sum of all transactions before the start date
        SELECT @OpeningBalance = @OpeningBalance + (ISNULL(SUM(JD.Debit), 0) - ISNULL(SUM(JD.Credit), 0))
        FROM JournalEntryDetail JD
        JOIN JournalEntry JE ON JE.Id = JD.JournalEntryId
        LEFT JOIN Department D ON D.Id = JE.DepartmentId
        WHERE JE.[Date] < @fromDate -- The key condition: all dates BEFORE the start date
          AND (@accountId IS NULL OR JD.AccountId = @accountId)
          AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR JE.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
          AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR D.ActivityId = @ActivityId)
          AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR D.CompanyId = @CompanyId)
          AND (@PartyType IS NULL OR JD.PartyType = @PartyType)
          AND (@PartyId IS NULL OR JD.PartyId = @PartyId);
    END

    ;WITH JE_Base AS (
        SELECT JE.Id, JE.[Date], JE.DocumentNumber AS JournalDocNum, JE.SourceId, JE.SourcePageId, JE.DepartmentId
        FROM JournalEntry JE
        WHERE JE.IsDeleted = 0
          AND (@fromDate IS NULL OR JE.[Date] >= @fromDate)
          AND (@toDateNextDay IS NULL OR JE.[Date] < @toDateNextDay)
    ),
    JE_Full AS (
        SELECT
            JD.Debit, JD.Credit, SP.ArName, B.JournalDocNum, B.[Date],
            dbo.[GetDocumentNumberBySystemPageId](B.SourcePageId, B.SourceId) AS DocumentNumber,
            B.SourceId, B.SourcePageId, JD.Notes, D.ActivityId, D.CompanyId, B.DepartmentId,
            COALESCE(renter.ArName, customer.ArName, vendor.ArName, employee.ArName, owner.ArName, shareholder.ArName) AS PartyName
        FROM JournalEntryDetail JD
        INNER JOIN JE_Base B ON B.Id = JD.JournalEntryId
        LEFT JOIN SystemPage SP ON SP.Id = B.SourcePageId
        LEFT JOIN Department D ON D.Id = B.DepartmentId
        LEFT JOIN dbo.PropertyRenter renter ON JD.PartyId = renter.Id AND JD.PartyType = 4
        LEFT JOIN dbo.Customer customer ON JD.PartyId = customer.Id AND JD.PartyType = 1
        LEFT JOIN dbo.Vendor vendor ON JD.PartyId = vendor.Id AND JD.PartyType = 2
        LEFT JOIN dbo.Employee employee ON JD.PartyId = employee.Id AND JD.PartyType = 3
        LEFT JOIN dbo.PropertyOwner owner ON JD.PartyId = owner.Id AND JD.PartyType = 6
        LEFT JOIN dbo.Shareholder shareholder ON JD.PartyId = shareholder.Id AND JD.PartyType = 5
        WHERE
            (@accountId IS NULL OR JD.AccountId = @accountId)
            AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR B.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
            AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR D.ActivityId = @ActivityId)
            AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR D.CompanyId = @CompanyId)
            AND (@PartyType IS NULL OR JD.PartyType = @PartyType)
            AND (@PartyId IS NULL OR JD.PartyId = @PartyId)
    ),
    AllRows AS (
        -- << UPDATED: Insert Balance Forward row >>
        SELECT
            CASE WHEN @OpeningBalance > 0 THEN @OpeningBalance ELSE 0 END AS Debit,
            CASE WHEN @OpeningBalance < 0 THEN -@OpeningBalance ELSE 0 END AS Credit,
            N'رصيد ما قبل الفترة' AS ArName,
            CAST(NULL AS nvarchar(100)) AS JournalDocNum,
            DATEADD(SECOND, -1, @fromDate) AS [Date], -- Ensures it's the very first row
            CAST(NULL AS nvarchar(100)) AS DocumentNumber, CAST(NULL AS int) AS SourceId,
            CAST(NULL AS int) AS SourcePageId, N'الرصيد حتى تاريخ ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR, @fromDate, 103) AS Notes,
            CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS PartyName, 0 AS SortKey
        WHERE @fromDate IS NOT NULL -- Only add this row if a start date is specified

        UNION ALL

        -- Journal Entries
        SELECT F.Debit, F.Credit, F.ArName, F.JournalDocNum, F.[Date], F.DocumentNumber, F.SourceId, F.SourcePageId, F.Notes, F.PartyName, 1 AS SortKey
        FROM JE_Full F
    ),
    WithSeq AS (
        SELECT
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [Date], SortKey, JournalDocNum, DocumentNumber, SourceId) AS Id,
            Debit, Credit, ArName, JournalDocNum, [Date], DocumentNumber, SourceId, SourcePageId, Notes, PartyName
        FROM AllRows
        WHERE (ISNULL(Debit,0) <> 0 OR ISNULL(Credit,0) <> 0)
    )
    SELECT
        Id, CAST(Debit AS money) AS Debit, CAST(Credit AS money) AS Credit, ArName, PartyName,
        JournalDocNum, [Date], DocumentNumber, SourceId, SourcePageId,
        CAST(SUM(Debit) OVER (ORDER BY Id) AS money) AS DebitAtferTransaction,
        CAST(SUM(Credit) OVER (ORDER BY Id) AS money) AS CreditAfterTransaction,
        Notes,
        (SELECT ArName FROM ChartOfAccount WHERE Id = @accountId) AS AccountName
    FROM WithSeq
    ORDER BY Id;
END

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetAllCustomersSales] --null , null

As
begin

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetBalanceReview] 
    @fromDate datetime,
    @toDate datetime,
    @departmentId int = NULL,
    @ActivityId int = NULL,
    @CompanyId int = NULL,
    @AccountId int = NULL, -- Specific account filter
    @ReportType NVARCHAR(50) = 'General' -- Type of report (e.g., 'General' or 'DetailsOnly')
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET ANSI_WARNINGS OFF;

    -- Temporary table to hold the balance review data
    DECLARE @BalanceReview TABLE (
        [Id] [int] NOT NULL,
        [Code] [nvarchar](450) NULL,
        [ArName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
        [ParentId] [int] NULL,
        [ObDebit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [ObCredit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [Debit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [Credit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [TotalDebit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [TotalCredit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [BalanceDebit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [BalanceCredit] DECIMAL(28,10) DEFAULT 0.0,
        [ClassificationId] [int] NULL,
        [HierarchyPath] NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL -- Used to sort the hierarchy
    );

    -- Insert basic accounts from `ChartOfAccount`
    ;WITH AccountHierarchy AS (
        -- Base level (root accounts with no parent)
        SELECT 
            [Id],
            [Code],
            [ArName],
            [ParentId],
            CAST(ISNULL([ObDebit], 0) AS DECIMAL(28,10)) AS [ObDebit],
            CAST(ISNULL([ObCredit], 0) AS DECIMAL(28,10)) AS [ObCredit],
            CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(28,10)) AS [Debit],
            CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(28,10)) AS [Credit],
            [ClassificationId],
            CAST(RIGHT('0000' + CAST([Code] AS NVARCHAR(10)), 10) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS [HierarchyPath]
        FROM 
            [dbo].[ChartOfAccount]
        WHERE 
            [ParentId] IS NULL -- Top-level accounts (no parent)

        UNION ALL

        -- Recursive step for child accounts
        SELECT 
            C.[Id],
            C.[Code],
            C.[ArName],
            C.[ParentId],
            CAST(ISNULL(C.[ObDebit], 0) AS DECIMAL(28,10)),
            CAST(ISNULL(C.[ObCredit], 0) AS DECIMAL(28,10)),
            CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(28,10)),
            CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(28,10)),
            C.[ClassificationId],
            CAST(H.[HierarchyPath] + '-' + RIGHT('0000' + CAST(C.[Code] AS NVARCHAR(10)), 10) AS NVARCHAR(MAX))
        FROM 
            [dbo].[ChartOfAccount] C
        INNER JOIN AccountHierarchy H
            ON C.[ParentId] = H.[Id]
        WHERE 
            C.[IsDeleted] = 0 AND C.[IsActive] = 1
    )
    INSERT INTO @BalanceReview ([Id], [Code], [ArName], [ParentId], [ObDebit], [ObCredit], [ClassificationId], [HierarchyPath])
    SELECT 
        [Id], 
        [Code], 
        [ArName], 
        [ParentId], 
        [ObDebit],  
        [ObCredit], 
        [ClassificationId],
        [HierarchyPath]
    FROM 
        AccountHierarchy;

    -- Update opening balances (`ObDebit` and `ObCredit`) to include previous transactions
    UPDATE @BalanceReview
    SET 
        [ObDebit] = ISNULL([ObDebit], 0) + ISNULL((
            SELECT SUM(ISNULL(JD.[Debit], 0))
            FROM [JournalEntry] JE
            JOIN [JournalEntryDetail] JD ON JE.Id = JD.JournalEntryId
            WHERE JD.[AccountId] = BR.[Id]
              AND JE.[Date] < @fromDate
              AND JE.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsActive] = 1
        ), 0),
        [ObCredit] = ISNULL([ObCredit], 0) + ISNULL((
            SELECT SUM(ISNULL(JD.[Credit], 0))
            FROM [JournalEntry] JE
            JOIN [JournalEntryDetail] JD ON JE.Id = JD.JournalEntryId
            WHERE JD.[AccountId] = BR.[Id]
              AND JE.[Date] < @fromDate
              AND JE.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsActive] = 1
        ), 0)
    FROM @BalanceReview BR;

    -- Update `Debit` and `Credit` for the specified period
    UPDATE @BalanceReview
    SET 
        [Debit] = ISNULL((
            SELECT SUM(ISNULL(JD.[Debit], 0))
            FROM [JournalEntry] JE
            JOIN [JournalEntryDetail] JD ON JE.Id = JD.JournalEntryId
            WHERE JD.[AccountId] = BR.[Id]
              AND JE.[Date] BETWEEN @fromDate AND @toDate
              AND JE.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsActive] = 1
        ), 0),
        [Credit] = ISNULL((
            SELECT SUM(ISNULL(JD.[Credit], 0))
            FROM [JournalEntry] JE
            JOIN [JournalEntryDetail] JD ON JE.Id = JD.JournalEntryId
            WHERE JD.[AccountId] = BR.[Id]
              AND JE.[Date] BETWEEN @fromDate AND @toDate
              AND JE.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsDeleted] = 0
              AND JD.[IsActive] = 1
        ), 0)
    FROM @BalanceReview BR;

    -- Calculate `TotalDebit` and `TotalCredit`
    UPDATE @BalanceReview
    SET 
        [TotalDebit] = ISNULL([ObDebit], 0) + ISNULL([Debit], 0),
        [TotalCredit] = ISNULL([ObCredit], 0) + ISNULL([Credit], 0);

    -- Calculate ending balances (`BalanceDebit` and `BalanceCredit`)
    UPDATE @BalanceReview
    SET 
        [BalanceDebit] = CASE 
                            WHEN [TotalDebit] - [TotalCredit] > 0 THEN [TotalDebit] - [TotalCredit]
                            ELSE 0
                         END,
        [BalanceCredit] = CASE 
                            WHEN [TotalCredit] - [TotalDebit] > 0 THEN [TotalCredit] - [TotalDebit]
                            ELSE 0
                          END;

    -- Add a summary row for accounts with ClassificationId = 3
    INSERT INTO @BalanceReview ([Id], [Code], [ArName], [ObDebit], [ObCredit], [Debit], [Credit], [TotalDebit], [TotalCredit], [BalanceDebit], [BalanceCredit], [ClassificationId],[HierarchyPath])
    SELECT 
        99999999 AS Id, -- Unique identifier for the summary row
        NULL AS Code,
        'Summary ' AS ArName, -- Summary row name
        SUM(ISNULL([ObDebit], 0)) AS ObDebit,
        SUM(ISNULL([ObCredit], 0)) AS ObCredit,
        SUM(ISNULL([Debit], 0)) AS Debit,
        SUM(ISNULL([Credit], 0)) AS Credit,
        SUM(ISNULL([TotalDebit], 0)) AS TotalDebit,
        SUM(ISNULL([TotalCredit], 0)) AS TotalCredit,
        SUM(ISNULL([BalanceDebit], 0)) AS BalanceDebit,
        SUM(ISNULL([BalanceCredit], 0)) AS BalanceCredit,
        3 AS ClassificationId -- ClassificationId for the summary row
		,'ZZZZZZZZZZ' AS HierarchyPath -- Ensure this row appears last
    FROM @BalanceReview
    WHERE ClassificationId = 3;

    -- Return the final report based on the ReportType parameter
    IF @ReportType = 'DetailsOnly'
    BEGIN
        -- Return only accounts where ClassificationId = 3
        SELECT * 
        FROM @BalanceReview
        WHERE ClassificationId = 3
        ORDER BY [HierarchyPath];
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        -- Return all accounts (General report)
        SELECT * 
        FROM @BalanceReview
        ORDER BY [HierarchyPath];
    END
END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetCashBoxesBalance]  
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@CashBoxId int
AS
BEGIN
--------------------------------الرصيد الإفتتاحى-------------------------------------------
Declare @CashBoxOpeningBalance money=
(
select isnull(OpeningBalance,0)
 from CashBox
  where (@CashBoxId is null or Id=@CashBoxId)
   and IsDeleted=0
    and IsActive=1
)
--------------------------------سندات القبض-------------------------------------------
Declare @SumOfCashReceipt money=
(
select isnull(sum(MoneyAmount),0)
 from CashReceiptVoucher 
 where (@CashBoxId is null or CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1)
 --------------------------------البيع النقدى-------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfCashSalesInvoices money=
(
select isnull(sum(sm.Amount),0)
 from SalesInvoice s
 inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods sm 
 on  sm.SalesInvoiceId=s.Id
 where (@CashBoxId is null or CashBoxId=@CashBoxId ) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1
 and sm.PaymentMethodId=1
 )

  --------------------------------أوامر البيع النقدى-------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfCashSalesOrders money=
(
select isnull(sum(sm.Amount),0)
 from SalesOrder s
 inner join SalesOrderPaymentMethod sm 
 on  sm.SalesOrderId=s.Id
 where (@CashBoxId is null or CashBoxId=@CashBoxId ) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1
 and sm.PaymentMethodId=1
 )
 --------------------------------مرتجع الشراء النقدى-------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfCashPurchaseReturn money=
(
select isnull(sum(pm.Amount),0)
 from PurchaseReturns p
 inner join PurchaseReturnPaymentMethod pm 
 on  pm.PurchaseReturnId=p.Id
 where (@CashBoxId is null or CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1
 and pm.PaymentMethodId=1
 )
 --------------------------------التحويل إليه-------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfCashTransferTo money=
(
select isnull(sum(c.TotalMoneyAmount),0)
 from CashTransfer c
 where (@CashBoxId is null or c.CashBoxIdTo=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1
 )
  -------------------------------- حجز غرفة -------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfRoomBooking money=
(
select isnull(sum(R.Paid),0)
 from RoomBooking R
 where (@CashBoxId is null or R.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 )
 -------------------------------- دخول سيارة -------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfHotelManagementCarEntry money=
(
select isnull(sum(H.Price),0)
 from HotelManagementCarEntry H
 where (@CashBoxId is null or H.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 )
 -------------------------------- حجز داى يوز  -------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfDayUseReservation money=
(
select isnull(sum(D.Paid),0)
 from DayUseReservation D
 where (@CashBoxId is null or D.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 )
 -------------------------------------------مجموع الواردات-------------------------------------------
 --رصيد افتتاحى +سندات القبض+البيع النقدى +اوامر البيع النقدى+مرتجع الشراء النقدى+التحويل إليه + حجز غرفة + دخول سيارة + حجز داى يوز  ----------------
 Declare @TotalInCome money=
 (
 isnull(@CashBoxOpeningBalance,0)
 +isnull(@SumOfCashReceipt,0)
 + isnull(@SumOfCashSalesInvoices,0)
 +isnull(@SumOfCashPurchaseReturn,0)
 +isnull(@SumOfCashTransferTo,0)
 +isnull(@SumOfCashSalesOrders,0)
 +isnull(@SumOfRoomBooking,0)
 +isnull(@SumOfHotelManagementCarEntry,0)
 +isnull(@SumOfDayUseReservation,0)
)
--------------------------------سندات الدفع-------------------------------------------
Declare @SumOfCashIssu money=
(
select isnull(sum(MoneyAmount),0)
 from CashIssueVoucher 
 where (@CashBoxId is null or CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1)
 --------------------------------الشراء النقدى-------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfCashPurchaseInvoices money=
(
select isnull(sum(sm.Amount),0)
 from PurchaseInvoice s
 inner join PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods sm 
 on  sm.PurchaseInvoiceId=s.Id
 where (@CashBoxId is null or CashBoxId=@CashBoxId ) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1
 and sm.PaymentMethodId=1
 )

 --------------------------------مرتجع البيع النقدى-------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfCashSalesReturn money=
(
select isnull(sum(pm.Amount),0)
 from SalesReturns p
 inner join SalesReturnPaymentMethod pm 
 on  pm.SalesReturnsId=p.Id
 where (@CashBoxId is null or CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1
 and pm.PaymentMethodId=1
 )
 --------------------------------التحويل منه-------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfCashTransferFrom money=
(
select isnull(sum(c.TotalMoneyAmount),0)
 from CashTransfer c
 where (@CashBoxId is null or c.CashBoxIdFrom=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 and IsActive=1
 )
 -------------------------------- إذن مغادرة الغرفة  -------------------------------------------
 Declare @SumOfRoomLeavePermission money=
(
select isnull(sum(R.Remain),0)
 from RoomLeavePermission R
 where (@CashBoxId is null or R.CashBoxId=@CashBoxId) 
 and IsDeleted=0 
 )

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetChartOfAccountOB]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @accountId int, @code nvarchar(max), @enName nvarchar(max), @arName nvarchar(max), @obDebit money, @obCredit money, @parentId int, @classificationId int
declare @ChartOfAccountOB table(
	[Id] [int] NOT NULL,
	[Code] [nvarchar](450) NULL,
	[ArName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[EnName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[ParentId] [int] null,
	[ObDebit] [money] NULL,
	[ObCredit] [money] NULL,
	[ClassificationId] [int] null)

Insert into @ChartOfAccountOB (
	[Id] ,
	[Code] ,
	[ArName] ,
	[EnName],
	[ParentId],
	[ObDebit],
	[ObCredit],
	[ClassificationId])
	 select [Id],[Code],[ArName],[EnName],[ParentId],[ObDebit],[ObCredit],[ClassificationId] from [dbo].[ChartOfAccount] where [IsDeleted]=0 AND [IsActive]=1 AND ([CategoryId]=1 OR [CategoryId]=2)
	

declare SubCur cursor for select distinct( [ParentId]) from @ChartOfAccountOB where [ClassificationId]=3
open SubCur
fetch next from SubCur into @accountId
while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
begin
	update @ChartOfAccountOB
	set [ObDebit] = (select sum([ObDebit]) from @ChartOfAccountOB where [ParentId]=@accountId ),
	[ObCredit] = (select sum([ObCredit]) from @ChartOfAccountOB where [ParentId]=@accountId)
	where [Id]=@accountId

	set @parentId=(select ParentId from @ChartOfAccountOB where Id=@accountId) 

	while @parentId is not null
	begin
	update @ChartOfAccountOB
	set [ObDebit] = [ObDebit]+(select ObDebit from @ChartOfAccountOB where Id=@accountId),
	[ObCredit] = ObCredit+(select ObCredit from @ChartOfAccountOB where Id=@accountId)
	where [Id]=@parentId

	set @parentId=(select ParentId from @ChartOfAccountOB where Id=@parentId)
	end

	fetch next from SubCur into @accountId
end
close SubCur
deallocate SubCur

--open GenCur
--fetch next from GenCur into @accountId

--	where [Id]=@accountId

--	fetch next from GenCur into @accountId
--end
--close GenCur
--deallocate GenCur

select * from @ChartOfAccountOB
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetChildrenAccountStatement]
@Year int,@Month int
as 
begin
select ch.Id ,ch.ArName,ch.MonthlySubscription,ch.SubscriptionStartDate
,c.Id CashReceiptVoucherId,c.DocumentNumber,c.Date,c.MoneyAmount,c.Month,c.Year
from Children ch left join CashReceiptVoucher c
on ch.Id=c.ChildrenId
where ch.IsActive=1 and ch.IsDeleted=0
and (@Month is null or (select Month(ch.SubscriptionStartDate))<=@Month and (c.Month is null or (select Month(ch.SubscriptionStartDate))<=c.Month))
and (@Year is null or(select Year(ch.SubscriptionStartDate))=@Year)
end

Create Proc [dbo].[GetChildrenArrears]
@Year int,@Month int
as
begin

select * from (

select * from (select top(1) ch.Id ,ch.ArName,ch.MonthlySubscription,ch.SubscriptionStartDate
,c.Id CashReceiptVoucherId,c.DocumentNumber,c.Date,c.MoneyAmount,c.Month,c.Year
from Children ch left join CashReceiptVoucher c
on ch.Id=c.ChildrenId
where ch.IsActive=1 and ch.IsDeleted=0
and (@Month is null or (select Month(ch.SubscriptionStartDate))<=@Month and (c.Month is null or (select Month(ch.SubscriptionStartDate))<=c.Month))
and (@Year is null or(select Year(ch.SubscriptionStartDate))=@Year)
and c.ChildrenId in (select id from Children where IsActive=1 and isdeleted=0)
order by c.Id desc) as lastPaidVoucher 

union 

select ch.Id ChildrenId ,ch.ArName,ch.MonthlySubscription,ch.SubscriptionStartDate
,c.Id CashReceiptVoucherId,c.DocumentNumber,c.Date,c.MoneyAmount,c.Month,c.Year
from Children ch left join CashReceiptVoucher c
on ch.Id=c.ChildrenId
where ch.IsActive=1 and ch.IsDeleted=0
and c.Id is null
) as NonPaidVouchers
end

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetChurchMeetingInPeriod] --N'10-01-2023',N'12-31-2023',null
@DateFrom Date,@DateTo Date,@FatherId int
as
begin

end

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetCompetitionResult] --1,2
@NoOfAnswers int,@NoOfCompetitors int
as
begin
if(@NoOfCompetitors is not null)
begin
select top(@NoOfCompetitors) * from 
(select c.UserName as Name,c.Id as CompetitorId,c.Password as Mobile , count(a.IsTrue) NoOfCorrectAnswers
from CompetitorAnswer a
left join Competitor c on c.Id=a.CompetitorId

where a.IsTrue=1 and a.IsActive=1 and a.IsDeleted=0
group by c.UserName,c.Password,c.Id
) as x
where x.NoOfCorrectAnswers>=@NoOfAnswers
order by newid(),  x.NoOfCorrectAnswers desc
end 
else
begin
select count(*), c.UserName as Name,c.Id as CompetitorId,c.Password as Mobile , count(a.IsTrue) NoOfCorrectAnswers
from CompetitorAnswer a
inner join Competitor c on c.Id=a.CompetitorId
group by c.Id,c.UserName,c.Password
having count(*)>=@NoOfAnswers
order by count(*)

--order by  x.NoOfCorrectAnswers desc
end 

end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetCurrentAssetsAccountBalanceStatement]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@departmentId int,@fromDate datetime, @toDate datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
exec BalanceStatement_Insert @fromDate, @toDate, @departmentId
declare @CurrentAssetsAccountId int, @accountId int,@accountName nvarchar(100)
declare @CurrentAssetsAccountBalanceStatement table(
	[TotalAmount] [money] NULL,
	[PartialAmount] [money] NULL,
	[Statement] [nvarchar](max) NULL)

	fetch next from cur into @accountId,@accountName
end
close cur
deallocate cur

INSERT INTO @CurrentAssetsAccountBalanceStatement ( [TotalAmount], [PartialAmount], [Statement]) VALUES
	((select SUM(PartialAmount)from @CurrentAssetsAccountBalanceStatement), 0, N'الاجمالي')

select * from @CurrentAssetsAccountBalanceStatement
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetCustomerProfit]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@DepId int,
@CustomerId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
select SUM(StockIssueVoucherDetails.CostPrice*Qty) [TotalCost], SUM(Price*Qty) [TotalPrice], sum((Price-CostPrice)*Qty) [TotalProfit], VendorOrCustomerId from StockIssueVoucherDetails
left join StockIssueVoucher on StockIssueVoucher.Id=StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId
where MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=58 and IsDeleted=0) and 
(@CustomerId is null or VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId) and 
(@DepId is null or StockIssueVoucher.DepartmentId=@DepId) and 
(@DateFrom is null or StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where VoucherDate>=@DateFrom and IsDeleted=0 and IsAccepted=1)) and 
(@DateTo is null or StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where VoucherDate <=@DateTo and IsDeleted=0 and IsAccepted=1)) group by VendorOrCustomerId
END

CREATE PROCEDURE  [dbo].[GetCustomerSalesItems] 
@ItemId int ,
@CustomerId int ,
@TypeId int
AS  
--sales invoice
if (@TypeId=1)
   begin 
         select
		
		 s.DocumentNumber,
		 s.Id,
         s.VoucherDate,
         s.TotalAfterTaxes
		 ,d.ArName
          from [dbo].SalesInvoice s
          inner join [dbo].[SalesInvoiceDetails] sd
          on s.Id=sd.MainDocId and sd.ItemId=@ItemId
		  inner join [dbo].[Department] d on s.DepartmentId=d.Id

CREATE PROC [dbo].[GetDayUseReservation] --'1/1/2022','1/26/2022'
@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime
as 
begin
select 
DU.DocumentNumber,(Select convert(varchar,DU.VoucherDate,103)) as VoucherDate
,(Select convert(varchar,DU.RegistrationDate,103)) as RegistrationDate
 ,DU.PeopleNumber,DU.Amount,DU.Discount,DU.Paid,DU.Remain,DU.Total,DU.TotalAfterDiscount
,C.Code+' - '+C.ArName as CustomerArName
,D.Code+' - '+D.ArName as DepartmentArName
,B.Code+' - '+B.ArName as CashBoxArName

from DayUseReservation DU
inner join Customer C on C.Id=DU.CustomerId
inner join Department D on D.Id=DU.DepartmentId
inner join CashBox B on B.Id=DU.CashBoxId

where DU.IsDeleted=0
and ( (Select convert(varchar,DU.VoucherDate,103))>=(Select convert(varchar,@DateFrom,103)) 
and ((Select convert(varchar,DU.VoucherDate,103))<=(Select convert(varchar,@DateTo,103))))
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetDepartmentEmployeeSalary] 
@DepartmentId int ,@Month int ,@Year int
as
begin
select e.Id,e.ArName ,isnull(d.NetSalary,0) ItemValue
from Employee e inner join EmployeePayrollIssueDetail d
on e.Id=d.EmployeeId
inner join EmployeePayrollIssue p on p.id=d.MainDocId
where e.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and e.IsActive=1 and e.IsDeleted=0
--and e.Id not in (select EmployeeId from CashIssueVoucherEmployeePayrollIssue where (@Month is null or [Month]=@Month) and (@Year is null or [year]=@Year))
and (@Month is null or p.Month=@Month) and (@Year is null or p.year=@Year)
and p.IsActive=1 and p.IsDeleted=0
and (d.IsIssued =0 or d.IsIssued is null)
group by e.Id,e.ArName,d.NetSalary
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetDoctorBalanceSheet]
	@DoctorId int ,@From datetime,@To datetime
AS
BEGIN
Declare @DoctorOb table(
DoctorName nvarchar(max), [Date] datetime , Debit money, Credit money, DocumentName nvarchar(max)
, DocumentNumber nvarchar(max)
,DebitBalance money , CreditBalance money
)
insert into @DoctorOb(
DoctorName,[Date]  , Debit , Credit , DocumentName 
 ,DocumentNumber 
,DebitBalance  , CreditBalance 
)
select * from
(
select d.ArName DoctorName, e.ExaminationDate [Date],0 Debit, e.Price Credit,  N'الكشوفات' DocumentName
,(SELECT REPLACE(e.DocumentNumber, '-', '')) as DocumentNumber
,null DebitBalance  , null CreditBalance 
from Examination e
inner join Doctor d on d.id=e.DoctorId
where e.IsDeleted=0
and(@DoctorId is null or e.DoctorId=@DoctorId)
and(@From is null or e.ExaminationDate >= @From) 
and (@To is null or e.ExaminationDate <=@To)
union
select d.ArName DoctorName,s.SurgeryDate [Date],0 Debit, s.DoctorPrice Credit,  N'العمليات الجراحية' DocumentName
,(SELECT REPLACE(s.DocumentNumber, '-', '')) as DocumentNumber
,null DebitBalance  , null CreditBalance 
from Surgery s
inner join Doctor d on d.id=s.DoctorId
where s.IsDeleted=0
and(@DoctorId is null or s.DoctorId=@DoctorId )
and(@From is null or s.SurgeryDate >= @From) 
and (@To is null or s.SurgeryDate <=@To)
union
select d.ArName DoctorName,s.SurgeryDate [Date],0 Debit, s.AssistantPrice Credit, N'العمليات الجراحية' DocumentName
,(SELECT REPLACE(s.DocumentNumber, '-', '')) as DocumentNumber
,null DebitBalance  , null CreditBalance 
from Surgery s
inner join Doctor d on d.id=s.DoctorId
where s.IsDeleted=0
and(@DoctorId is null  or s.AssistantDoctorId=@DoctorId)
and(@From is null or s.SurgeryDate >= @From) 
and (@To is null or s.SurgeryDate <=@To)
union
select d.ArName DoctorName,CashIssueVoucher.[Date], CashIssueVoucher.MoneyAmount Debit,0 Credit, N'سند الدفع'
,(SELECT REPLACE(CashIssueVoucher.DocumentNumber, '-', '')) as DocumentNumber
,null DebitBalance  , null CreditBalance 
 from  CashIssueVoucher 
inner join Doctor d on d.id=CashIssueVoucher.DoctorId
where 
CashIssueVoucher.IsDeleted=0 and CashIssueVoucher.IsActive=1 and CashIssueVoucher.SourceTypeId=11 and CashIssueVoucher.DoctorId=@DoctorId
and(@From is null or CashIssueVoucher.Date >= @From) 
and (@To is null or CashIssueVoucher.Date <=@To)
) as x 
where (Debit>0 or Credit>0) 
order by x.[Date]

declare @date datetime, @debitBalance money, @creditBalance money
declare OBCur cursor for select [date] from @DoctorOb
open OBCur
fetch next from OBCur into @date
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	set @debitBalance=(select SUM(Debit) from @DoctorOb where [Date]<=@date or [Date] is null)
	set @creditBalance=(select SUM(Credit) from @DoctorOb where [Date]<=@date or [Date] is null)

	if @debitBalance>@creditBalance
	begin
		set @debitBalance=ISNULL(@debitBalance,0)- ISNULL(@creditBalance,0)
		set @creditBalance=0
	end
	else
	begin
		set @creditBalance=ISNULL(@creditBalance,0)- ISNULL(@debitBalance,0)
		set @debitBalance=0
	end
	update @DoctorOb 
	set DebitBalance=@debitBalance, CreditBalance=@creditBalance
	where [Date]=@date
	fetch next from OBCur into @date
	end
	
	select * from @DoctorOb order by [Date]

END

CREATE procedure [dbo].[GetDriversWithInvoicesByDepId]
    @DepId int, @UserId int
AS
begin
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction GetDriversWithInvoicesByDepId;

-- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @x table(DriverId int,DriverName nvarchar(100),OrderCount int,TotalAfterTaxes money,areas nvarchar(max))
insert into @x(DriverId,DriverName,OrderCount,TotalAfterTaxes)
select driverId,Employee.ArName,count(*),sum(TotalAfterTaxes) from SalesInvoice 
Inner Join dbo.Employee ON
SalesInvoice.DriverId = Employee.Id

where SalesInvoice.IsCollectedByCashier=0 and SalesInvoice.DepartmentId = @DepId and driverid  is not null and SalesInvoice.AreaId is not null
group by driverid,Employee.ArName


DECLARE DriverCur CURSOR FOR     SELECT DriverId,OrderCount from @x   where OrderCount>0
 declare @driverid int,@invoicesCount int,@invoiceId int=0
  
OPEN DriverCur  
  
FETCH NEXT FROM DriverCur     INTO @driverid   ,@invoicesCount
  

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS=0  
BEGIN    
declare @areasTable table (id int identity,  area nvarchar(max))
delete from @areasTable
insert into @areasTable
select  distinct area.ArName from SalesInvoice inner join Area on SalesInvoice.AreaId=Area.Id
where IsCollectedByCashier=0 and DepartmentId = @DepId and DriverId=@driverid and AreaId is not null
--select * from @areasTable
 declare @minId int=(select min(id) from @areasTable)
 declare @maxId int=(select max(id) from @areasTable)
 while @minId<=@maxId
 begin

 update @x set areas=ISNULL(areas,'')+'-'+(select area from @areasTable where Id=@minId) where driverid=@driverid
 set @minId=@minId+1
 end
  
      
    FETCH NEXT FROM DriverCur     
INTO @driverid  ,@invoicesCount
   
END     
CLOSE DriverCur;    
DEALLOCATE DriverCur; 
select * from @x

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction GetDriversWithInvoicesByDepId;

        raiserror ('GetDriversWithInvoicesByDepId: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetEachItemQuantityInEachWarehouse] 
@DepartmentId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @ItemDetails table(ItemId int, ItemCode nvarchar(100), ItemName nvarchar(400), Quantity float, WarehouseId int, WarehouseArName nvarchar(500))--, UnitName nvarchar(400))
declare @WarehouseId int, @WarehouseArName nvarchar(500), @Qty float, @ItemId int, @ItemName nvarchar(400), @ItemCode nvarchar(100)--, @UnitName nvarchar(400)

declare itemCur cursor for 

select Item.Id,Item.ArName,Item.Code --,ITU.ArName UnitName
from Item 
--left join [dbo].[ItemPrice] ITP
--on ITP.[ItemId] = ITem.Id
--left join [dbo].[ItemUnit] ITU
--on ITU.Id = ITP.ItemUnitId

where Item.IsDeleted=0 and Item.Id in (select ItemId from DepartmentItem where DepartmentId= @DepartmentId)

open itemCur
fetch next from itemCur into @ItemId, @ItemName, @ItemCode --, @UnitName
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	declare cur cursor for select Id, ArName from Warehouse where DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0
	open cur
	fetch next from cur into @WarehouseId, @WarehouseArName
	while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
	begin
		set @Qty=(select dbo.CalculateItemQuantityInWarehouse(@WarehouseId,@ItemId,null,null,@DepartmentId))
	
		insert into @ItemDetails (ItemId, ItemCode ,ItemName, Quantity, WarehouseId, WarehouseArName)--,UnitName)
		values (@ItemId, @ItemCode, @ItemName , @Qty, @WarehouseId, @WarehouseArName)--,@UnitName)
		fetch next from cur into @WarehouseId, @WarehouseArName
	end
	close cur
	deallocate cur
fetch next from itemCur into @ItemId, @ItemName, @ItemCode
end
close itemCur
deallocate itemCur

select * from @ItemDetails where Quantity>0
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetElderAccountStatement]
@Year int,@Month int
as 
begin
select e.Id ,e.ArName,e.MonthlySubscription,e.SubscriptionStartDate
,c.Id CashReceiptVoucherId,c.DocumentNumber,c.Date,c.MoneyAmount,c.Month,c.Year
from Elder e left join CashReceiptVoucher c
on e.Id=c.ElderId
where e.IsActive=1 and e.IsDeleted=0
and (@Month is null or (select Month(e.SubscriptionStartDate))<=@Month and (c.Month is null or (select Month(e.SubscriptionStartDate))<=c.Month))
and (@Year is null or(select Year(e.SubscriptionStartDate))=@Year)
end

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetElderlyArrears]
@Year int,@Month int
as
begin

select * from (

select * from (select top(1) e.Id ,e.ArName,e.MonthlySubscription,e.SubscriptionStartDate
,c.Id CashReceiptVoucherId,c.DocumentNumber,c.Date,c.MoneyAmount,c.Month,c.Year
from Elder e left join CashReceiptVoucher c
on e.Id=c.ElderId
where e.IsActive=1 and e.IsDeleted=0
and (@Month is null or (select Month(e.SubscriptionStartDate))<=@Month and (c.Month is null or (select Month(e.SubscriptionStartDate))<=c.Month))
and (@Year is null or(select Year(e.SubscriptionStartDate))=@Year)
and c.ElderId in (select id from Elder where IsActive=1 and isdeleted=0)
order by c.Id desc) as lastPaidVoucher 

union 

select e.Id ElderId ,e.ArName,e.MonthlySubscription,e.SubscriptionStartDate
,c.Id CashReceiptVoucherId,c.DocumentNumber,c.Date,c.MoneyAmount,c.Month,c.Year
from Elder e left join CashReceiptVoucher c
on e.Id=c.ElderId
where e.IsActive=1 and e.IsDeleted=0
and c.Id is null
) as NonPaidVouchers
end

,SalaryItem12,SalaryItem13,SalaryItem14,SalaryItem15,SalaryItem16,SalaryItem17,SalaryItem18,SalaryItem19,SalaryItem20,SalaryItem21 ,SalaryItem22
,SalaryItem23,SalaryItem24,SalaryItem25,SalaryItem26,SalaryItem27,SalaryItem28,SalaryItem29,SalaryItem30,SalaryItem31	,SalaryItem32,SalaryItem33

CREATE  Proc [dbo].[GetEmployeeMonthlyAllocationReport]
 @DepartmentId int ,@AllocationType int,@Year int,@Month int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
 as
begin
select a.AllocationTypeId,a.Month,a.Year
,e.ArName EmployeeName,ad.Value,ad.Notes ,d.ArName DepartmentName
from EmployeeMonthlyAllocation a
inner join EmployeeMonthlyAllocationDetail ad on ad.MainDocId=a.Id
inner join Employee e on e.id=ad.EmployeeId
inner join Department d on d.Id=a.DepartmentId
where a.IsDeleted=0 
and (@DepartmentId is null or a.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@AllocationType is null or a.AllocationTypeId=@AllocationType)
and (@Year is null or a.Year=@Year)

and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
group by e.Id, a.AllocationTypeId,a.Month,a.Year
,e.ArName ,ad.Value,ad.Notes,d.ArName 
end

CREATE PROCEDURE  [dbo].[GetEmployeeOB]
  @DepartmentId int
AS

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetEmployeesStatement]
@DepartmentId int,@WorkStatusId int,@HrDepartmentId int,@JobId int,@ContractsTypeId int,@NationalityId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
as
begin

select e.Code,e.ArName,isnull(e.EnName,'')EnName,e.Birthdate,e.HireDate,isnull(e.EmployeeAddress,'')EmployeeAddress,isnull(e.Email,'')Email,isnull(e.MobileNumber,'')MobileNumber,isnull(e.PhoneNumber,'')PhoneNumber,isnull(e.NationalId,'')NationalId
,isnull(ms.ArName,'') MaritalStatus ,isnull(n.ArName,'') Nationality,isnull(g.ArName,'') Gender,isnull(r.ArName,'') Religion,isnull(j.ArName,'') Job,isnull(jg.ArName,'') JobGrade
,isnull(ws.ArName,'') WorkStatus ,isnull(CsT.ArName,'') ContractsType,isnull(d.ArName,'') Department,isnull(HrD.ArName,'') HrDepartment

from Employee e 
left join MaritalStatus ms on ms.Id=e.MaritalStatusId
left join Nationality n on n.Id=e.NationalityId
left join Gender g on g.Id=e.GenderId
left join Religion r on r.Id=e.ReligionId
left join Job j on j.Id=e.JobId
left join JobGrade jg on jg.Id=e.JobGradeId
left join WorkStatus ws on ws.Id=e.WorkStatusId
left join ContractsType CsT on CsT.Id=e.ContractsTypeId
left join Department d on d.Id=e.DepartmentId
left join HrDepartment HrD on HrD.Id=e.HrDepartmentId

where e.IsActive=1 and e.IsDeleted=0 and
(@DepartmentId is null or e.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
(@WorkStatusId is null or e.WorkStatusId=@WorkStatusId) and 
(@HrDepartmentId is null or e.HrDepartmentId=@HrDepartmentId) and 
(@JobId is null or e.JobId=@JobId ) and 
(@ContractsTypeId is null or e.ContractsTypeId=@ContractsTypeId ) and 
(@NationalityId is null or e.NationalityId=@NationalityId)  
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetExpensesInPeriod]
	 @From date,
	 @To date,
	 @DepId int,
	 @ExpensesId int,
	 @ActivityId int,
	 @CompanyId int

AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
 --------------------------------------ChequeIssue
SELECT CI.Date,CI.DocumentNumber,N'إصدار شيكات' As DocType,D.ArName,CI.ChequeValue,j.DocumentNumber as journalDocNo
  FROM [dbo].ChequeIssue CI
  left join ChequeSourceType CST
  on CST.Id=CI.IssueTypeId

  left join ChequeStatus CS
  on CS.Id=CI.ChequeStatusId
   left join DirectExpenses D
  on D.Id=CI.DirectExpensesId
   and D.IsDeleted=0
  left join JournalEntry J
  on J.SourceId=CI.Id
  and J.SourcePageId=23
   and J.IsDeleted=0
  where CI.IssueTypeId=6 
  and CS.Id!=4 
  and CI.IsDeleted=0 
  and CI.DepartmentId=@DepId
  and (@From is null or CI.Date >=@From)
  and (@To is null or CI.Date <=@To)
  and (@ExpensesId is null or CI.DirectExpensesId=@ExpensesId)
  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepId))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepId))
  union 
   --------------------------------------ChequeReceipt
SELECT CR.Date,CR.DocumentNumber,N'دفع شيكات',D.ArName,CR.ChequeValue,j.DocumentNumber as journalDocNo
  FROM [dbo].ChequeReceipt CR
    left join ChequeSourceType CST
  on CST.Id=CR.SourceTypeId
  left join [dbo].[ChequeReceiptStatus] CS
  on CS.Id=CR.ChequeStatusId
   left join JournalEntry J
  on J.SourceId=CR.Id
  and J.SourcePageId=24
    and J.IsDeleted=0
   left join DirectExpenses D
  on D.Id=CR.DirectExpensesId
    and D.IsDeleted=0
  where CR.SourceTypeId=6 
  and CS.Id!=3
  and CR.IsDeleted=0
  and CR.IsActive=1 
  and CR.DepartmentId=@DepId
  and (@From is null or CR.Date >=@From)
  and (@To is null or CR.Date <=@To)
  and ( @ExpensesId is null or CR.DirectExpensesId=@ExpensesId)
  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepId))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepId))
  union

  --------------------------------------CashIssueVoucher
  SELECT CashIssueVoucher.Date,CashIssueVoucher.DocumentNumber,N'سند دفع ',D.ArName,CashIssueVoucher.MoneyAmount,j.DocumentNumber as journalDocNo
  FROM [dbo].CashIssueVoucher
  left join JournalEntry J
  on J.SourceId=CashIssueVoucher.Id
  and J.SourcePageId=21
    and J.IsDeleted=0
  left join DirectExpenses D
  on D.Id=CashIssueVoucher.DirectExpensesId
    and D.IsDeleted=0
  where SourceTypeId=4 
   and CashIssueVoucher.IsDeleted=0
   and CashIssueVoucher.IsActive=1
   and CashIssueVoucher.DepartmentId=@DepId 
   and (@From is null or CashIssueVoucher.Date >=@From)
   and (@To is null or CashIssueVoucher.Date <=@To)
   and (@ExpensesId is null or CashIssueVoucher.DirectExpensesId=@ExpensesId)
   and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepId))
   and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepId))
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetExpiredPropertyContracts]
    
    
AS
BEGIN
    

    -- ✅ لو التاريخ مش متحدد، خليه تاريخ اليوم
    --IF @ContractEndDate IS NULL
	
        

    SELECT 
        r.ArName AS Renter,
        pc.PropertyId,pc.DocumentNumber,
        pd.Id AS DetailID,
        pd.PropertyUnitNo AS Unit,
        CASE WHEN pd.StatusId = 1 THEN N'مؤجر' ELSE N'متاح' END AS UnitStatus,
        pc.ContractEndDate,
        ISNULL(pc.RentValue, 0) AS RentValue,
        ISNULL(pc.CommissionValue, 0) AS CommissionValue,
        ISNULL(pc.ServicesValue, 0) AS ServicesValue,
        ISNULL(pc.InsuranceValue, 0) AS InsuranceValue,
        ISNULL(pc.WaterValue, 0) AS WaterValue,
        ISNULL(pc.ElectricityValue, 0) AS ElectricityValue,
        pd.Notes
    FROM 
        PropertyContract pc
    INNER JOIN 
        PropertyDetail pd ON pc.PropertyUnitId = pd.Id
    INNER JOIN 
        PropertyRenter r ON r.Id = pc.PropertyRenterId
    WHERE 
        pd.IsDeleted = 0
        --AND (@RenterId IS NULL OR pc.PropertyRenterId = @RenterId)
        AND CAST(pc.ContractEndDate AS DATE) < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetFinancialStatement]
    @departmentId INT,
    @fromDate DATETIME,
    @toDate DATETIME,
    @ActivityId INT,
    @CompanyId INT,
    @DetailLevel INT = 4  -- (0=ملخص شجري، 1=متوسط، 2=تفصيلي، 4=ملخص الأربعة الكبار)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- #################################################
    -- ## (حارس لمنع خطأ Overflow أثناء تحديث السكيما) ##
    -- #################################################
    IF @fromDate IS NULL OR @fromDate < CAST('1753-01-01' AS DATETIME)
    BEGIN
        -- (إرجاع هيكل فارغ ليتعرف عليه المصمم)
        SELECT
            CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS Code,
            CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS [Statement],
            CAST(NULL AS INT) AS [Level],
            CAST(0 AS MONEY) AS TotalAmount,
            CAST(0 AS MONEY) AS PartialAmount,
            CAST(0 AS MONEY) AS TotalDebit,
            CAST(0 AS MONEY) AS TotalCredit,
            CAST(0 AS MONEY) AS PartialDebit,
            CAST(0 AS MONEY) AS PartialCredit
        WHERE 1 = 0;
        RETURN;
    END;
    -- #################################################


    -- 1. تشغيل البروسيجر المساعد
    EXEC BalanceStatement_Insert @fromDate, @toDate, @departmentId;

    -- 2. جلب الحسابات الرئيسية
    DECLARE @FixedAssetsAccountId INT, @CurrentAssetsAccountId INT,
            @ShareHolderAccountId INT, @CurrentShareHolderAccountId INT;

    SELECT
        @FixedAssetsAccountId = FixedAssetsAccountId,
        @CurrentAssetsAccountId = CurrentAssetsAccountId,
        @ShareHolderAccountId = ShareHolderAccountId,
        @CurrentShareHolderAccountId = CurrentShareHolderAccountId
    FROM
        dbo.Department
    WHERE
        Id = @departmentId
        AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR ActivityId = @ActivityId)
        AND (@CompanyId IS NULL OR CompanyId = @CompanyId);


    -- #################################################
    -- ##          المنطق الجديد الذي طلبته            ##
    -- #################################################
    IF @DetailLevel = 4
    BEGIN
        -- (هذا هو وضع "ملخص الأربعة الكبار")
        -- 1. جلب الحسابات الأربعة
        ;WITH FourAccounts AS (
            SELECT 1 AS Sort, 'Assets' AS Tag, coa.Code, coa.ArName, bs.BalanceDebit, bs.BalanceCredit
            FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount coa LEFT JOIN dbo.BalanceStatement bs ON coa.Id = bs.Id
            WHERE coa.Id = @FixedAssetsAccountId
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 2 AS Sort, 'Assets' AS Tag, coa.Code, coa.ArName, bs.BalanceDebit, bs.BalanceCredit
            FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount coa LEFT JOIN dbo.BalanceStatement bs ON coa.Id = bs.Id
            WHERE coa.Id = @CurrentAssetsAccountId

            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 4 AS Sort, 'Liabilities' AS Tag, coa.Code, coa.ArName, bs.BalanceDebit, bs.BalanceCredit
            FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount coa LEFT JOIN dbo.BalanceStatement bs ON coa.Id = bs.Id
            WHERE coa.Id = @ShareHolderAccountId

            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT 5 AS Sort, 'Liabilities' AS Tag, coa.Code, coa.ArName, bs.BalanceDebit, bs.BalanceCredit
            FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount coa LEFT JOIN dbo.BalanceStatement bs ON coa.Id = bs.Id
            WHERE coa.Id = @CurrentShareHolderAccountId
        )
        -- 2. إخراجهم بالشكل النهائي
        SELECT
            Code,
            ArName AS [Statement],
            0 AS [Level],
            -- (الأعمدة الأصلية - صافي الرصيد)
            (CASE WHEN Tag = 'Assets' THEN ISNULL(BalanceDebit, 0) - ISNULL(BalanceCredit, 0)
                  ELSE ISNULL(BalanceCredit, 0) - ISNULL(BalanceDebit, 0) END) AS TotalAmount,
            0 AS PartialAmount,
            -- (الأعمدة المفصلة)
            (CASE WHEN Tag = 'Assets' THEN ISNULL(BalanceDebit, 0) - ISNULL(BalanceCredit, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TotalDebit,
            (CASE WHEN Tag = 'Liabilities' THEN ISNULL(BalanceCredit, 0) - ISNULL(BalanceDebit, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS TotalCredit,
            0 AS PartialDebit,
            0 AS PartialCredit
        FROM FourAccounts
        ORDER BY Sort;
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        -- #################################################
        -- ##     المنطق الشجري الحالي (0, 1, 2)       ##
        -- #################################################

        -- 3. تعريف جدول النتائج
        DECLARE @FinancialStatement TABLE (
            SortKey NVARCHAR(100),
            Code NVARCHAR(100) NULL,
            [TotalAmount] MONEY NULL,
            [PartialAmount] MONEY NULL,
            [Statement] NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL,
            [Level] INT,
            IsLeaf BIT,
            AccountId BIGINT NULL,
            RootTag NVARCHAR(50) NULL
        );

        -- 4. بناء الشجرة
        ;WITH COA AS (
            SELECT Id, ParentId, Code, ArName, IsActive, IsDeleted FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount
        ),
        TrueRoots AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ParentId, 'Assets' AS RootTag
            FROM COA
            WHERE Id IN (@FixedAssetsAccountId, @CurrentAssetsAccountId) AND ParentId IS NOT NULL
            UNION ALL
            SELECT DISTINCT ParentId, 'Liabilities' AS RootTag
            FROM COA
            WHERE Id IN (@ShareHolderAccountId, @CurrentShareHolderAccountId) AND ParentId IS NOT NULL
        ),
        AccountTree AS (
            SELECT C.Id, C.ParentId, C.Code, C.ArName, R.RootTag, 0 AS [Level],
                   CAST(RIGHT('000000' + CAST(C.Code AS NVARCHAR(10)), 10) AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS HierarchyPath
            FROM COA C JOIN TrueRoots R ON C.Id = R.ParentId
            WHERE C.IsDeleted = 0 AND C.IsActive = 1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT C.Id, C.ParentId, C.Code, C.ArName, H.RootTag, H.[Level] + 1,
                   CAST(H.HierarchyPath + '-' + RIGHT('000000' + CAST(C.Code AS NVARCHAR(10)), 10) AS NVARCHAR(100))
            FROM COA C JOIN AccountTree H ON C.ParentId = H.Id
            WHERE C.IsDeleted = 0 AND C.IsActive = 1
        )
        SELECT * INTO #AccountTree FROM AccountTree OPTION (MAXRECURSION 32767);

        -- 5. جلب الأرصدة والتجميع
        ;WITH Balances AS (
            SELECT
                t.Id, t.ParentId,
                CASE
                    WHEN t.RootTag = 'Assets' THEN ISNULL(bs.BalanceDebit, 0) - ISNULL(bs.BalanceCredit, 0)
                    ELSE ISNULL(bs.BalanceCredit, 0) - ISNULL(bs.BalanceDebit, 0)
                END AS NetBalance
            FROM #AccountTree t
            LEFT JOIN dbo.BalanceStatement bs ON t.Id = bs.Id
        ),
        RecursiveRollup AS (
            SELECT Id, ParentId, NetBalance FROM Balances
            UNION ALL
            SELECT p.Id, p.ParentId, c.NetBalance
            FROM Balances p
            JOIN RecursiveRollup c ON p.Id = c.ParentId
        ),
        AggregatedTotals AS (
            SELECT Id, SUM(NetBalance) AS FinalBalance
            FROM RecursiveRollup
            GROUP BY Id
        ),
        FinalData AS (
            SELECT
                agg.Id, t.ArName AS Statement, t.Code, t.RootTag, t.HierarchyPath, t.[Level],
                CASE WHEN p.ParentId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsLeaf,
                agg.FinalBalance
            FROM AggregatedTotals agg
            JOIN #AccountTree t ON agg.Id = t.Id
            LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT ParentId FROM #AccountTree WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL) p ON t.Id = p.ParentId
        )
        SELECT * INTO #FinalData FROM FinalData;

        -- 6. إدراج النتائج
        INSERT INTO @FinancialStatement (SortKey, AccountId, Code, TotalAmount, PartialAmount, [Statement], [Level], IsLeaf, RootTag)
        SELECT
            'A_' + HierarchyPath, Id, Code,
            CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN FinalBalance ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 1 THEN FinalBalance ELSE 0 END,
            Statement, [Level], IsLeaf, RootTag
        FROM #FinalData
        WHERE RootTag = 'Assets';

        INSERT INTO @FinancialStatement (SortKey, AccountId, Code, TotalAmount, PartialAmount, [Statement], [Level], IsLeaf, RootTag)
        SELECT
            'C_' + HierarchyPath, Id, Code,
            CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN FinalBalance ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 1 THEN FinalBalance ELSE 0 END,
            Statement, [Level], IsLeaf, RootTag
        FROM #FinalData
        WHERE RootTag = 'Liabilities';

        INSERT INTO @FinancialStatement (SortKey, AccountId, TotalAmount, [Statement], [Level], IsLeaf, RootTag)
        SELECT 'B_TotalAssets', -1, SUM(FinalBalance), N'اجمالي الأصول', -1, 0, 'Assets_Total'
        FROM #FinalData WHERE RootTag = 'Assets' AND [Level] = 0;

        INSERT INTO @FinancialStatement (SortKey, AccountId, TotalAmount, [Statement], [Level], IsLeaf, RootTag)
        SELECT 'D_TotalLiabilities', -2, SUM(FinalBalance), N'اجمالي الخصوم وحقوق الملكية', -1, 0, 'Liabilities_Total'
        FROM #FinalData WHERE RootTag = 'Liabilities' AND [Level] = 0;

        -- 7. الإخراج النهائي (الشجري)
        SELECT
            Code,
            [Statement],
            [Level],
            ISNULL(TotalAmount, 0) AS TotalAmount,
            ISNULL(PartialAmount, 0) AS PartialAmount,
            CASE WHEN RootTag LIKE 'Assets%' THEN TotalAmount ELSE 0 END AS TotalDebit,
            CASE WHEN RootTag LIKE 'Liabilities%' THEN TotalAmount ELSE 0 END AS TotalCredit,
            CASE WHEN RootTag LIKE 'Assets%' THEN PartialAmount ELSE 0 END AS PartialDebit,
            CASE WHEN RootTag LIKE 'Liabilities%' THEN PartialAmount ELSE 0 END AS PartialCredit
        FROM @FinancialStatement
        WHERE
            (
                (@DetailLevel = 0 AND (IsLeaf = 0 AND ([Level] <= 0)))
            )
            OR
            (
                (@DetailLevel = 1 AND (IsLeaf = 0 OR [Level] <= 1)) 
            )
            OR
            (
                (@DetailLevel = 2 AND (IsLeaf = 0 OR PartialAmount <> 0 OR TotalAmount <> 0))
            )
        ORDER BY SortKey;

        -- تنظيف
        DROP TABLE #AccountTree;
        DROP TABLE #FinalData;
    END
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetIncomeList]
    @DepartmentId INT,
    @FromDate     DATETIME,
    @ToDate       DATETIME,
    @ActivityId   INT = NULL,
    @CompanyId    INT = NULL,
	    @DetailLevel INT = 2  -- 0=ملخص، 1=متوسط، 2=تفصيلي
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @RevenueRootId        INT,
            @ExpenseRootId        INT,
            @CostOfSalesAccountId INT,
            @DepName NVARCHAR(MAX),
			 @FilterDepartmentId   INT;   
    -- اختيار القسم
	SET @FilterDepartmentId = CASE 
                              WHEN @DepartmentId IS NULL OR @DepartmentId <= 0 
                              THEN NULL           -- لا نفلتر على فرع
                              ELSE @DepartmentId  -- نفلتر على الفرع المختار
                          END;
    IF @DepartmentId IS NULL OR @DepartmentId <= 0
    BEGIN
        SELECT TOP 1
            @DepartmentId = Id,
            @DepName = ArName,
            @RevenueRootId = RevenueAccountId,
            @ExpenseRootId = ExpensesAccountId,
            @CostOfSalesAccountId = CostOfSalesAccountId
        FROM dbo.Department
        WHERE (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = ActivityId)
          AND (@CompanyId  IS NULL OR @CompanyId  = CompanyId)
        ORDER BY Id;
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            @DepName = ArName,
            @RevenueRootId = RevenueAccountId,
            @ExpenseRootId = ExpensesAccountId,
            @CostOfSalesAccountId = CostOfSalesAccountId
        FROM dbo.Department
        WHERE Id = @DepartmentId
          AND (@ActivityId IS NULL OR @ActivityId = ActivityId)
          AND (@CompanyId  IS NULL OR @CompanyId  = CompanyId);
    END;

    IF @RevenueRootId IS NULL OR @ExpenseRootId IS NULL
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(N'فضلاً تأكد من تعيين حسابي الإيرادات والمصروفات في بيانات القسم.',16,1);
        RETURN;
    END;

    DECLARE @ToDatePlus1 DATETIME = DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(@ToDate AS DATE));

    DECLARE @IncomeList TABLE (
        Code          NVARCHAR(100) NULL,
        TotalAmount   MONEY NULL,
        PartialAmount MONEY NULL,
        [Statement]   NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL,
        SortKey       NVARCHAR(200) NULL,
        IsBold        BIT DEFAULT 0
    );

    ;WITH COA AS (
        SELECT Id, ParentId, Code, ArName, IsActive, IsDeleted
        FROM dbo.ChartOfAccount
    ),
    Roots AS (
        SELECT Id, ParentId, Code, ArName, 'REV' AS RootTag
        FROM COA WHERE Id = @RevenueRootId
        UNION
        SELECT Id, ParentId, Code, ArName, 'EXP' AS RootTag
        FROM COA WHERE Id = @ExpenseRootId
        UNION
        SELECT Id, ParentId, Code, ArName, 'COGS' AS RootTag
        FROM COA WHERE @CostOfSalesAccountId IS NOT NULL AND Id = @CostOfSalesAccountId
    ),
    H AS (
        SELECT C.Id, C.ParentId, C.Code, C.ArName, Roots.RootTag,
               CAST(RIGHT('000000' + CAST(C.Code AS NVARCHAR(10)), 10) AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS HierarchyPath
        FROM COA C
        JOIN Roots ON C.Id = Roots.Id

        UNION ALL

        SELECT C.Id, C.ParentId, C.Code, C.ArName, H.RootTag,
               CAST(H.HierarchyPath + '-' + RIGHT('000000' + CAST(C.Code AS NVARCHAR(10)), 10) AS NVARCHAR(100))
        FROM COA C
        JOIN H ON C.ParentId = H.Id
    )
    SELECT *
    INTO #Hierarchy
    FROM H
    OPTION (MAXRECURSION 32767);

    -- إزالة التكرار لو حساب COGS كان موجود تحت المصروفات
    IF @CostOfSalesAccountId IS NOT NULL
    BEGIN
        DELETE H2
        FROM #Hierarchy H2
        WHERE H2.Id = @CostOfSalesAccountId
          AND H2.RootTag <> 'COGS';
    END

    DECLARE @COGS_Path NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;
    IF @CostOfSalesAccountId IS NOT NULL
    BEGIN
        SELECT TOP (1) @COGS_Path = HierarchyPath
        FROM #Hierarchy
        WHERE Id = @CostOfSalesAccountId
          AND RootTag = 'COGS';
    END

    ;WITH Lines AS (
        SELECT 
            JD.AccountId,
            ISNULL(JD.Debit, 0) AS Debit,
            ISNULL(JD.Credit, 0) AS Credit
        FROM dbo.JournalEntry JE
        JOIN dbo.JournalEntryDetail JD ON JE.Id = JD.JournalEntryId
        WHERE JE.IsDeleted = 0
          AND JD.IsDeleted = 0
          AND JD.IsActive = 1
          AND JE.[Date] >= @FromDate
          AND JE.[Date] < @ToDatePlus1
          AND (@FilterDepartmentId IS NULL OR JE.DepartmentId = @FilterDepartmentId)
    ),
    L2 AS (
        SELECT
            H.RootTag, H.Id AS AccountId, H.ParentId, H.ArName, H.Code, H.HierarchyPath,
            SUM(L.Debit)  AS SumDebit,
            SUM(L.Credit) AS SumCredit
        FROM #Hierarchy H
        LEFT JOIN Lines L ON H.Id = L.AccountId
        GROUP BY H.RootTag, H.Id, H.ParentId, H.ArName, H.Code, H.HierarchyPath
    ),
    Items AS (
        SELECT
            RootTag,
            AccountId,
            ParentId,
            ArName,
            Code,
            HierarchyPath,
            Net = CASE
                      WHEN RootTag = 'REV' THEN (SumCredit - SumDebit)
                      ELSE (SumDebit - SumCredit)
                  END
        FROM L2
    )
    SELECT *
    INTO #Items
    FROM Items;

    ;WITH RecursiveRollup AS (
        SELECT AccountId, ParentId, Net
        FROM #Items
        UNION ALL
        SELECT i.AccountId, i.ParentId, r.Net
        FROM #Items AS i
        JOIN RecursiveRollup AS r ON i.AccountId = r.ParentId
    ),
    AggregatedTotals AS (
        SELECT AccountId, SUM(Net) AS FinalNet
        FROM RecursiveRollup
        WHERE AccountId IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY AccountId
    )
    UPDATE i
        SET i.Net = agg.FinalNet
    FROM #Items i
    JOIN AggregatedTotals agg ON i.AccountId = agg.AccountId;

    WITH ParentAccounts AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT ParentId
        FROM #Items
        WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL
    )
    SELECT
        i.*,
        CASE WHEN p.ParentId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IsLeaf
    INTO #FinalItems
    FROM #Items i
    LEFT JOIN ParentAccounts p ON i.AccountId = p.ParentId;

    DECLARE @TotalRevenue  MONEY = ISNULL((
        SELECT TOP (1) CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END
        FROM #FinalItems
        WHERE AccountId = @RevenueRootId AND RootTag = 'REV'
    ), 0);

    DECLARE @TotalCOGS     MONEY = ISNULL((
        SELECT TOP (1) CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END
        FROM #FinalItems
        WHERE @CostOfSalesAccountId IS NOT NULL
          AND AccountId = @CostOfSalesAccountId
          AND RootTag = 'COGS'
    ), 0);

    DECLARE @TotalExpenses MONEY = ISNULL((
        SELECT TOP (1) CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END
        FROM #FinalItems
        WHERE AccountId = @ExpenseRootId AND RootTag = 'EXP'
    ), 0);

    DECLARE @GrossProfit MONEY = @TotalRevenue - @TotalCOGS;
    DECLARE @TotalOpEx   MONEY = @TotalExpenses - @TotalCOGS;
    DECLARE @NetProfit   MONEY = @GrossProfit - @TotalOpEx;

    -- 1) الإيرادات
    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, PartialAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    SELECT
        Code,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN CAST(CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END AS MONEY) ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 1 THEN CAST(CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END AS MONEY) ELSE NULL END,
        ArName,
        'A-' + HierarchyPath,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    FROM #FinalItems
    WHERE RootTag = 'REV';

    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    VALUES (NULL, @TotalRevenue, N'إجمالي الإيرادات', 'B_TotalRevenue', 1);

    -- 2) تكلفة المبيعات
    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    VALUES (NULL, NULL, N'تكلفة المبيعات (COGS)', 'C_COGS_Header', 0);

    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, PartialAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    SELECT
        Code,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN CAST(CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END AS MONEY) ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 1 THEN CAST(CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END AS MONEY) ELSE NULL END,
        ArName,
        'D-' + HierarchyPath,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    FROM #FinalItems
    WHERE RootTag = 'COGS';

    -- 3) مجمل الربح
    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    VALUES (NULL, @GrossProfit, N'مجمل الربح', 'E_GrossProfit', 1);

    -- 4) المصروفات التشغيلية
    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    VALUES (NULL, NULL, N'المصروفات التشغيلية', 'F_OpEx_Header', 0);

    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, PartialAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    SELECT
        Code,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN CAST(CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END AS MONEY) ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 1 THEN CAST(CASE WHEN Net < 0 THEN 0 ELSE Net END AS MONEY) ELSE NULL END,
        ArName,
        'G-' + HierarchyPath,
        CASE WHEN IsLeaf = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    FROM #FinalItems
    WHERE RootTag = 'EXP'
      AND AccountId <> @CostOfSalesAccountId
      AND (
            @COGS_Path IS NULL
            OR HierarchyPath NOT LIKE @COGS_Path + '-%'
          );

    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    VALUES (NULL, @TotalOpEx, N'إجمالي المصروفات التشغيلية', 'H_TotalOpEx', 1);

    -- 5) صافي الربح
    INSERT INTO @IncomeList (Code, TotalAmount, [Statement], SortKey, IsBold)
    VALUES (NULL, @NetProfit, N'صافي الربح', 'Z_NetProfit', 1);

       /* 9. إخراج مرتّب */
    SELECT
        Code,
        ISNULL(TotalAmount, 0) AS TotalAmount,
        ISNULL(PartialAmount, 0) AS PartialAmount,
        [Statement],
        IsBold,
        @DepName AS Department
    FROM @IncomeList
    WHERE
        (
            -- الحالة 0: الآباء فقط
            (@DetailLevel = 0 AND IsBold = 1)
        )
        OR
        (
            -- الحالة 1: الآباء وأولادهم المباشرين
            (@DetailLevel = 1 AND (
                IsBold = 1 OR
                LEN(SortKey) - LEN(REPLACE(SortKey, '-', '')) <= 2  -- أول مستويين فقط
            ))
        )
        OR
        (
            -- الحالة 2: الآباء + كل البنود ذات الرصيد (الوضع الافتراضي)
            (@DetailLevel = 2 AND (IsBold = 1 OR TotalAmount <> 0 OR PartialAmount <> 0))
        )
    ORDER BY SortKey;


    

    DROP TABLE #Hierarchy;
    DROP TABLE #Items;
    DROP TABLE #FinalItems;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetInventoryEvaluation]

	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from

 declare @DepartmentIdVariable int =@DepartmentId,
 @WarehouseVariable int=@WarehouseId2

 select Item.Id ItemId,Item.Code ItemCode,Item.ArName ItemName,  cast(sum(qty) as decimal(10,2))  Quantity , Price SellingPrice1, UnitName 
 ,ISNULL((select top 1 Price/UnitEquivalent from PurchaseInvoiceDetails where IsDeleted=0 and ItemId=Item.Id order by Id desc),0)LastPrice,
 isnull((select top 1 CostAfter from ItemCostPrice where IsDeleted=0 and ItemId=Item.Id order by Id desc),0)AvgCost
  ,ISNULL((select top 1 Price/UnitEquivalent from PurchaseInvoiceDetails where IsDeleted=0 and ItemId=Item.Id order by Id desc),0)*cast(sum(qty) as decimal(10,2)) LastPriceWithQty

 from(

 select WarehouseOBDetails.ItemId,quantity*UnitEquavalent qty,WarehouseId,ItemPrice.Price,IU.[ArName] UnitName from WarehouseOBDetails inner join WarehouseOB on WarehouseOB.Id=WarehouseObDetails.WarehouseOBId
 left join ItemPrice

  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
 union all
 select stockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemId,qty*unitEquivalent*-1 qty,stockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId,ItemPrice.Price,IU.[ArName] UnitName from stockIssueVoucherDetails inner join stockIssueVoucher on stockIssueVoucher.Id=stockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId
  left join ItemPrice 
on ItemPrice.ItemId=stockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemId

   where (@WarehouseVariable is null or stockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId=@WarehouseVariable) and (@DepartmentIdVariable is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentIdVariable)

 )as x inner join item on item.Id=x.ItemId 


 where (@ItemGroupId is null or @ItemGroupId=0 or ItemGroupId =@ItemGroupId)
--left join ItemPrice

--left join [ItemUnit] IU
--on IU.Id=ItemPrice.ItemUnitId  
--where ItemPrice.IsDefault=1
 group by Item.Id,item.ArName,Item.Code ,price,UnitName
 order by Item.Id

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetItemPatchPerDoc] 
@SystemPageId int,
@SelectedId int

as

declare @ItemDetails table(ItemId int, Quantity float, PatchId int)
if(@SystemPageId=54)
insert into @ItemDetails 
select ItemId, ISNULL(SUM([Quantity]*UnitEquavalent),0),PatchId from [WarehouseOBDetails] 
	where [IsDeleted]=0 and [IsActive]=1 and WarehouseOBId=@SelectedId
	group by ItemId,PatchId


	else if (@SystemPageId=55)
	insert into @ItemDetails 
	select ItemId ,ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0),patchId from [StockReceiptVoucherDetails] 
	where MainDocId=@SelectedId and [IsDeleted]=0
	group by ItemId,PatchId

		else if (@SystemPageId=57)
		insert into @ItemDetails 
	select ItemId, ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0),patchId from [PurchaseInvoiceDetails] 
	where MainDocId =@SelectedId  and [IsDeleted]=0 
	group by ItemId,PatchId


	select ItemId,Itm.ArName as ItemArName,sum(Quantity)Qty,PatchId,(select Code from Patch where Id=PatchId)PatchCode,(select ExpireDate from Patch where Id=PatchId)ExpiryDate
	, (select Barcode from ItemPrice where ItemId= ItmDetails.ItemId and IsDefault=1 and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0)ItemBarcode from @ItemDetails ItmDetails 
	Inner Join Item Itm ON
	ItmDetails.ItemId = Itm.Id
	group by ItemId,PatchId,ArName
	having sum(Quantity)>0

 @SystemPageId int,

as
