CREATE proc [dbo].[GetItemPatchQuantity]
 @WarehouseId int,
@ItemId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@DepartmentId int,
@GetZeroQunatity bit


as
declare @ItemDetails table(ItemId int, Quantity float, PatchId int)

insert into @ItemDetails 
select ItemId, ISNULL(SUM([Quantity]*UnitEquavalent),0),PatchId from [WarehouseOBDetails] 
	where [ItemId]=@ItemId and WarehouseOBId in (select Id from WarehouseOB 
	where (@WarehouseId is null or WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and (@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
	(@DateFrom is null or @DateFrom >= [Date]) and (@DateTo is null or [Date]<=@DateTo) and [IsDeleted]=0 and [IsActive]=1)
	group by ItemId,PatchId
	union all
	select ItemId ,ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0),patchId from [StockReceiptVoucherDetails] 
	where [ItemId]=@ItemId and MainDocId in (select Id from StockReceiptVoucher 
	where (@WarehouseId is null or WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and (@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
	(@DateFrom is null or [VoucherDate] >= @DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo) and [IsDeleted]=0) 
	group by ItemId,PatchId
	union all
	select ItemId, ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0)*-1,patchId from [StockIssueVoucherDetails] 
	where [ItemId]=@ItemId and MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher 
	where (@WarehouseId is null or WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and (@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
	(@DateFrom is null or [VoucherDate] >= @DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo) and  [IsDeleted]=0 and IsAccepted=1)
	group by ItemId,PatchId


	select sum(Quantity)Qty,PatchId,(select Code from Patch where Id=PatchId)PatchCode,(select ExpireDate from Patch where Id=PatchId)ExpiryDate
	, (select Barcode from ItemPrice where ItemId=@ItemId and IsDefault=1 and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0)ItemBarcode from @ItemDetails
	group by PatchId
	having (@GetZeroQunatity =1 or sum(Quantity)>0)

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetItemPrice]

    @DepartmentId int,
	@ItemGroupId int,
	@ItemCategoryId int,
	@CustomerGroupId int,
	@ActivityId int,
	@CompanyId int
	as
	begin
select "Item"."Code", "Item"."ArName" as "Item", "ItemPrice"."Price",
       "CustomersGroup"."ArName" as "CustomersGroup_ArName",
       "Department"."ArName" as "Department","ItemUnit"."ArName" as "Unit"
  from ((((("dbo"."ItemPrice" "ItemPrice"
  inner join "dbo"."Item" "Item"
       on ("Item"."Id" = "ItemPrice"."ItemId"))
  left join "dbo"."CustomersGroup" "CustomersGroup"
       on ("CustomersGroup"."Id" = "ItemPrice"."CustomerGroupId"))
  left join "dbo"."DepartmentItem" "DepartmentItem"
       on ("DepartmentItem"."ItemId" = "Item"."Id"))
  left join "dbo"."Department" "Department"
       on ("Department"."Id" = "DepartmentItem"."DepartmentId"))
  left join "dbo"."ItemUnit" "ItemUnit"
       on ("ItemUnit"."Id" = "ItemPrice"."ItemUnitId"))
 where (("Item"."IsActive" = 1) and ("Item"."IsDeleted" = 0)
       --and (@CustomerGroupId is null or "CustomersGroup"."Id" = @CustomerGroupId)
       and (@CustomerGroupId is null or "ItemPrice"."CustomerGroupId" = @CustomerGroupId)       
and (@DepartmentId is null or "DepartmentItem"."DepartmentId" = @DepartmentId))
       and (@ItemGroupId is null or "Item"."ItemGroupId" = @ItemGroupId )
       and (@ItemCategoryId is null or "Item"."ItemCategoryId" = @ItemCategoryId )
	   and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
       and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
end

create proc [dbo].[GetItemPriceByCustomerIdAndDepartmentId] 
@CustomerId int,@ItemId int,@DepartmentId int
as
 Declare @CustomerGroupId int=(select [CustomersGroupId] from [dbo].[Customer] where Id=@CustomerId)


 declare @price money=(SELECT  isnull([Price],0) as Price from  [dbo].[ItemPrice]  where CustomerGroupId=@CustomerGroupId and ItemId=@ItemId and IsDeleted=0 )
 declare @avgCost money=(select top 1 ISNULL(CostAfter,0) from ItemCostPrice where ItemId=@ItemId and  DepartmentId =@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by Id desc)

 if @price>0
 begin
 select @price [Price], @avgCost AvgCost
 end
 else
 begin
 set @price =(select ISNULL( Price,0) from ItemPrice where ItemId=@ItemId and IsDefault=1)
 select @price [Price], @avgCost AvgCost
 end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetItemProfit]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@ItemId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@DepId int
,@ItemGroupId int
,@ItemCategoryId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
--select Code, Item.ArName, VoucherDate, Qty, StockIssueVoucherDetails.CostPrice, Price, Price-CostPrice [Profit], (Price-CostPrice)*Qty [TotalProfit], (Price-CostPrice)/Price [Percentage] from Item right join StockIssueVoucherDetails
--on StockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemId=Item.Id 
--left join StockIssueVoucher on StockIssueVoucher.Id=StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId
--where StockIssueVoucherDetails.SystemPageId=58 and (@ItemId is null or Item.Id=@ItemId) and (@DepId is null or Item.DepartmentId=@DepId) and (@DateFrom is null or StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where VoucherDate>=@DateFrom)) and (@DateTo is null or StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where VoucherDate <=@DateTo))

declare @ItemProfit table([SalesInvoiceDetailsId] int, Code nvarchar(100) null, ArName nvarchar(max) null, VoucherDate datetime null, Qty float null, CostPrice money null, Price money null, [Profit] money null, [TotalProfit] money null, [Percentage] float null)

insert into @ItemProfit (SalesInvoiceDetailsId, Code, ArName, VoucherDate, Qty, Price)
select SalesInvoiceDetails.Id, Code, Item.ArName, VoucherDate,SalesInvoiceDetails.Qty, SalesInvoiceDetails.Price-SalesInvoiceDetails.DiscountValue
from Item right join SalesInvoiceDetails
on SalesInvoiceDetails.ItemId=Item.Id 
left join SalesInvoice on SalesInvoice.Id=SalesInvoiceDetails.MainDocId
where (@ItemId is null or Item.Id=@ItemId) and (@DepId is null or Item.Id in (select ItemId from DepartmentItem where DepartmentId=@DepId)) and (@DateFrom is null or SalesInvoiceDetails.MainDocId in (select Id from SalesInvoice where VoucherDate>=@DateFrom)) and (@DateTo is null or SalesInvoiceDetails.MainDocId in (select Id from SalesInvoice where VoucherDate <=@DateTo)) and SalesInvoice.IsDeleted=0
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)



declare @SalesInvoiceDetailsId int
declare cur cursor for Select SalesInvoiceDetailsId from @ItemProfit
open cur
fetch next from cur into @SalesInvoiceDetailsId
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	declare @CostPrice money=(select ISNULL(SUM(CostPrice),0) from StockIssueVoucherDetails where [SalesInvoiceDetailsId]=@SalesInvoiceDetailsId and IsDeleted=0)
	
	if( (select price from @ItemProfit where SalesInvoiceDetailsId=@SalesInvoiceDetailsId) =0)--to avoid divide by zero
	begin
	update @ItemProfit set CostPrice=@CostPrice,
	Profit=Price- @CostPrice,
	TotalProfit=(Price- @CostPrice)*Qty,
	Percentage=(Price- @CostPrice)
	where SalesInvoiceDetailsId=@SalesInvoiceDetailsId
	end
	else
	begin
	update @ItemProfit set CostPrice=@CostPrice,
	Profit=Price- @CostPrice,
	TotalProfit=(Price- @CostPrice)*Qty,
	Percentage=(Price- @CostPrice)/Price
	where SalesInvoiceDetailsId=@SalesInvoiceDetailsId
	end

	fetch next from cur into @SalesInvoiceDetailsId
end
close cur
deallocate cur

select Code, ArName, VoucherDate, Qty, CostPrice, Price, Profit, TotalProfit, Percentage from @ItemProfit
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetItemQuantities] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DepartmentId int,
@WarehouseId int
,@ItemGroupId int
,@ItemCategoryId int
,@CustomerGroupId int
,@ActivityId int
,@CompanyId int

AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
 
 declare @DepartmentIdVariable int =@DepartmentId,
 @WarehouseVariable int=@WarehouseId

 select Item.Id ItemId,Item.Code ItemCode,Item.ArName ItemName,cast(sum(qty) as decimal(10,2)) Quantity , Price, UnitName ,(select ArName from Warehouse where Id=@WarehouseId ) WarehouseName
 from(

 select WarehouseOBDetails.ItemId,quantity*UnitEquavalent qty,WarehouseId,ItemPrice.Price,IU.[ArName] UnitName from WarehouseOBDetails inner join WarehouseOB on WarehouseOB.Id=WarehouseObDetails.WarehouseOBId
 left join ItemPrice 
on ItemPrice.ItemId=WarehouseOBDetails.ItemId
left join [ItemUnit] IU
on IU.Id=ItemPrice.ItemUnitId  
 where (@WarehouseVariable is null or WarehouseId=@WarehouseVariable) and (@DepartmentIdVariable is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentIdVariable)
 -- and (@DateFrom is null or @DateFrom >= [Date]) and (@DateTo is null or [Date]<=@DateTo) 
 and WarehouseOB.[IsDeleted]=0  --and ItemPrice.IsDefault=1
    and (@CustomerGroupId is null or ItemPrice.CustomerGroupId=@CustomerGroupId)
	  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
 union all
 select StockReceiptVoucherDetails.ItemId,qty*unitEquivalent qty ,StockReceiptVoucher.WarehouseId,ItemPrice.Price ,IU.[ArName] UnitName from StockReceiptVoucherDetails inner join StockReceiptVoucher on StockReceiptVoucher.Id=StockReceiptVoucherDetails.MainDocId
  left join ItemPrice 
on ItemPrice.ItemId=StockReceiptVoucherDetails.ItemId
left join [ItemUnit] IU
on IU.Id=ItemPrice.ItemUnitId 
  where (@WarehouseVariable is null or StockReceiptVoucher.WarehouseId=@WarehouseVariable) and (@DepartmentIdVariable is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentIdVariable) 
  --and (@DateFrom is null or @DateFrom >= [VoucherDate])  and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo) 
  and StockReceiptVoucher.[IsDeleted]=0 --and ItemPrice.IsDefault=1
     and (@CustomerGroupId is null or ItemPrice.CustomerGroupId=@CustomerGroupId)
	 	  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
 union all
 select stockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemId,qty*unitEquivalent*-1 qty,stockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId,ItemPrice.Price,IU.[ArName] UnitName from stockIssueVoucherDetails inner join stockIssueVoucher on stockIssueVoucher.Id=stockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId
  left join ItemPrice 
on ItemPrice.ItemId=stockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemId
left join [ItemUnit] IU
on IU.Id=ItemPrice.ItemUnitId 
   where (@WarehouseVariable is null or stockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId=@WarehouseVariable) and (@DepartmentIdVariable is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentIdVariable)
   and (@CustomerGroupId is null or ItemPrice.CustomerGroupId=@CustomerGroupId)
  	  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))
   --and (@DateFrom is null or @DateFrom >= [VoucherDate]) and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo) 
   and stockIssueVoucher.[IsDeleted]=0 and IsAccepted=1 --and ItemPrice.IsDefault=1
 )as x inner join item on item.Id=x.ItemId 
 where   (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
   and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
--left join ItemPrice 
--on ItemPrice.ItemId=Item.ID -- and CustomerGroupId=1

--left join [ItemUnit] IU
--on IU.Id=ItemPrice.ItemUnitId  
--where ItemPrice.IsDefault=1
 group by Item.Id,item.ArName,Item.Code ,price,UnitName
 order by Item.Id



END

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetItemsQuantitiesByIds]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@Details ntext
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
DECLARE @DetailsOut int, @ItemId int,@IdOnWebsite nvarchar(max), @Qty float
declare @Items table (Id int, IdOnWebsite int, Qty float null )
EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @DetailsOut OUT, @Details
INSERT INTO @Items (Id)
SELECT [Id]
FROM OPENXML (@DetailsOut, '/DocumentElement/Details', 2)
with([Id] [int])
EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @DetailsOut

declare qtyCur cursor for select Id,IdOnWebSite from Item where Id in (select Id from @Items)
open qtyCur
fetch next from qtyCur into @ItemId, @IdOnWebsite
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	update @Items set IdOnWebsite=@IdOnWebsite, Qty=[dbo].[CalculateItemQuantityInWarehouse](null,@ItemId,null,null,null)
	where Id=@ItemId
	fetch next from qtyCur into @ItemId, @IdOnWebsite
end
close qtyCur
deallocate qtyCur

select * from @Items
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetItemTransactions]

@DateTo datetime,
@DepId int,
@DocType nvarchar(100),
@WarehouseId int
,@ItemGroupId int
,@ItemCategoryId int
--,@CustomerGroupId int
,@ActivityId int
,@CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
declare @ItemTrans table( [Date] datetime, [DocType] nvarchar(50),[DocNum] nvarchar(100),[Qty] float,[UnitEquivalent] float,  Price money, Warehouse nvarchar(100), VendorOrCustomer nvarchar(100) null, UnitName nvarchar(100)
 ,QtyAfterTransaction float,QtyHidden float,SourceVoucherDocumentNumber nvarchar(max))
 declare @ItemQtyBeforePeriod float=(select [dbo].[CalculateItemQuantityInWarehouse](@WarehouseId,@ItemId,null,@DateFrom,@DepId))--get item qty before required period
 insert into @ItemTrans
 values (null,N'رصيد ما قبل الفترة',null,@ItemQtyBeforePeriod ,1,null,null,null,null,@ItemQtyBeforePeriod,@ItemQtyBeforePeriod,'')

insert into @ItemTrans
select VoucherDate,N'سند بيع',(select DocumentNumber from SalesInvoice where Id=StockIssueVoucher.SelectedId) DocumentNumber,StockIssueVoucherDetails.qty,StockIssueVoucherDetails.UnitEquivalent, StockIssueVoucherDetails.Price, Warehouse.ArName, Customer.ArName VendorOrCustomer,ITU.ArName UnitName,StockIssueVoucherDetails.qty*-1,StockIssueVoucherDetails.qty*-1,'' from StockIssueVoucherDetails left join StockIssueVoucher
on StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId=StockIssueVoucher.Id
left join Item on Item.Id=ItemId 
left join [ItemUnit] ITU on ITU.Id = StockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemUnitId
left join Warehouse on StockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId=Warehouse.Id
left join Customer on Customer.Id=StockIssueVoucher.VendorOrCustomerId

and (@DepId is null or StockIssueVoucher.DepartmentId=@DepId)

and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepId))
and StockIssueVoucher.IsDeleted=0
and(@WarehouseId Is NULL or StockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and StockIssueVoucher.SystemPageId=58
    --and (@CustomerGroupId is null or ItemPrice.CustomerGroupId=@CustomerGroupId)
	and (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
   and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)

--purchase invoice may be had creadted two StockReceiptVoucher
select VoucherDate,N'سند شراء', (select DocumentNumber from purchaseInvoice where Id=StockReceiptVoucher.SelectedId)DocumentNumber,qty,UnitEquivalent, CostPrice, Warehouse.ArName, Vendor.ArName VendorOrCustomer,ITU.ArName UnitName,qty,qty ,'' from StockReceiptVoucherDetails left join StockReceiptVoucher

left join Item on Item.Id=ItemId 
left join [ItemUnit] ITU on ITU.Id = StockReceiptVoucherDetails.ItemUnitId
left join Warehouse on StockReceiptVoucher.WarehouseId=Warehouse.Id
left join Vendor on Vendor.Id=StockReceiptVoucher.VendorOrCustomerId

and StockReceiptVoucher.IsDeleted=0
and(@WarehouseId Is NULL or StockReceiptVoucher.WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and StockReceiptVoucher.SystemPageId=57
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
   and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)

declare @ItemTrans2 table( [Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,[Date] datetime, [DocType] nvarchar(50),[DocNum] nvarchar(100),[Qty] float,[UnitEquivalent] float,  Price money, Warehouse nvarchar(100), VendorOrCustomer nvarchar(100) null, UnitName nvarchar(100) ,QtyAfterTransaction float,QtyHidden float,SourceVoucherDocumentNumber nvarchar(max))
insert into @ItemTrans2 select * from @ItemTrans order by [Date] asc 


declare @date datetime,@Id int, @QtyAfter float
declare OBCur cursor for select [Id] from @ItemTrans2
open OBCur
fetch next from OBCur into @Id
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	set @QtyAfter=(select SUM(QtyHidden*UnitEquivalent) from @ItemTrans2 where [Id]<=@Id )

	update @ItemTrans2 
	set QtyAfterTransaction=@QtyAfter
	where [Id]=@Id
	fetch next from OBCur into @Id
end

select * from @ItemTrans2 where (@DocType is null or DocType like '%'+@DocType+'%') order by [Id] asc
END

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetJobFollowUp]
@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime

as
begin
select j.ArName JobArName, e.ArName EmployeeArName
,c.ArName CompanyArName,s.ArName JobStatusArName , r.JobRequestDate
,r.Id CompanyJobRequestId,e.Id EmployeeId
from  JobCandidate jc 
inner join CompanyJobRequest r  on r.Id=jc.CompanyJobRequestId
left join Company c on c.Id=r.CompanyId
left join JobStatus s on s.Id=r.JobStatusId
left join Job j on j.Id=jc.JobId
inner join Employee e on e.Id=jc.EmployeeId
where r.IsDeleted=0 and r.IsActive=1
 and( @DateFrom is null or  r.JobRequestDate>=@DateFrom)
    and( @DateTo is null or  r.JobRequestDate<=@DateTo)
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetNearlyExpiredPatches]
@DaysNo int,
@WarehouseId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@DepartmentId int,
@ActivityId int,
@CompanyId int
as
declare @ItemDetails table(ItemId int, Quantity float, PatchId int)

insert into @ItemDetails 
    select ItemId, ISNULL(SUM([Quantity]*UnitEquavalent),0),PatchId  from [WarehouseOBDetails] 
	where WarehouseOBId in (select Id from WarehouseOB 
	where (@WarehouseId is null or WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and (@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
	(@DateFrom is null or @DateFrom >= [Date]) and (@DateTo is null or [Date]<=@DateTo) and [IsDeleted]=0 and [IsActive]=1) and PatchId Is Not NULL 
	and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
    and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
	group by ItemId,PatchId
	union all
	select ItemId ,ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0),patchId from [StockReceiptVoucherDetails] 
	where MainDocId in (select Id from StockReceiptVoucher 
	where (@WarehouseId is null or WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and (@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
	(@DateFrom is null or [VoucherDate] >= @DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo) and [IsDeleted]=0)  and PatchId Is Not NULL
	and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
    and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
	group by ItemId,PatchId
	union all
	select ItemId, ISNULL(SUM([Qty]*UnitEquivalent),0)*-1,patchId from [StockIssueVoucherDetails] 
	where MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher 
	where (@WarehouseId is null or WarehouseId=@WarehouseId) and (@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
	(@DateFrom is null or [VoucherDate] >= @DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or [VoucherDate]<=@DateTo) and  [IsDeleted]=0 and IsAccepted=1)and PatchId Is Not NULL
	and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
    and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
	group by ItemId,PatchId
	

	select ItemId,(select Code from Item Where Id=ItemId)ItemCode,(select ArName from Item Where Id=ItemId)ArName, sum(Quantity)Qty,PatchId,(select Code from Patch where Id=PatchId)PatchCode,(select ExpireDate from Patch where Id=PatchId)as ExpiryDate,(select ArName from Warehouse where Id=@WarehouseId)WarehouseName
	  from @ItemDetails 
	  WHERE (select ExpireDate from Patch where Id=PatchId) <= DATEADD(DAY, @DaysNo, GETDATE()) and (select ExpireDate from Patch where Id=PatchId) >= GETDATE() 
	group by PatchId,ItemId
	having ( sum(Quantity)>0)
	Order By ItemId

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetNotActiveOrders]
@custId int
as

SELECT [Order].[Id] ,[Order].[ServiceCategoryId]
      ,ServicesCategory.ArName'ServicesCategory ArName'
      ,[Order].[CustomerId]
	  ,Customer.ArName'Customer ArName'
      ,[Order].[Date]
      ,[Order].[ChoosenTechanicianId]
      ,[Order].[OrderNumber]
      ,[Order].[Longitude]
      ,[Order].[Latitude]
	  ,[Order].[StatusId]
	  ,OrderStatus.ArName'OrderStatus ArName'
	  ,OrderStatus.EnName'OrderStatus EnName'
      ,[Order].[SparePartsPrice]
      ,[Order].[ServiceCost]
      ,[Order].[TechnicianRating]
      ,[Order].[TechnicianEvaluation]
      ,[Order].[TotalMoneyAmount]
      ,[Order].[WithdrawalCause]
      ,[Order].[IsActive]
      ,[Order].[IsDeleted]
      ,[Order].[Notes]
       ,[Order].[Image]
	   ,ServicesCategory.image'ServicesCategory image'
      ,[Order].[UserId]
      ,[Order].[CashReceiptVoucherId]
      ,[Order].[WarrantyTypeId]
	  ,WarrantyType.ArName WarrantyTypeArName
	  ,WarrantyType.EnName WarrantyTypeEnName
      ,[Order].[Discount]
      ,[Order].[TotalAfterDiscount]
      ,[Order].[Problems]
  FROM [dbo].[Order] join ServicesCategory on ServicesCategory.Id=[Order].ServiceCategoryId
  join Customer on Customer.Id=[Order].CustomerId
  join OrderStatus on OrderStatus.Id=[Order].StatusId
  left join WarrantyType on WarrantyType.Id=WarrantyTypeId
     where [Order].IsDeleted=0 and [Order].IsActive=1
  and  [Order].StatusId> 7
  and CustomerId=@custId
  order By [Order].Id desc

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetPaymentMethodAmountInDay]
as 
begin

from SalesInvoice s 
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m on m.SalesInvoiceId=s.Id
inner join PaymentMethod p on p.Id=m.PaymentMethodId

CREATE PROC [dbo].[GetPropertyUnits] 
    @RenterId        INT,
    @ContractEndDate DATE,
    @PropertyId      INT = NULL,
    @DepartmentId    INT = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    /* 1) الوحدات المؤجرة (عليها عقد فعّال) */
    SELECT
        r.ArName                             AS Renter,
        d.ArName                             AS DepartmentName,
        d.EnName                             AS DepartmentEnName,
        pr.ArName                            AS PropertyName,
        pr.EnName                            AS EnProperty,
        pc.PropertyId,
		pd.RoomsNo,pd.HallsNo,
        pc.DepartmentId,
        pd.Id                                 AS DetailID,
        pd.PropertyUnitNo                     AS Unit,
        N'مؤجر'                               AS UnitStatus,
        pc.ContractEndDate,
		pc.DocumentNumber as ContrancNo,pc.Id as pcID,
        ISNULL(pc.RentValue, 0)              AS RentValue,
        ISNULL(pc.CommissionValue, 0)        AS CommissionValue,
        ISNULL(pc.ServicesValue, 0)          AS ServicesValue,
        ISNULL(pc.InsuranceValue, 0)         AS InsuranceValue,
        ISNULL(pc.WaterValue, 0)             AS WaterValue,
        ISNULL(pc.ElectricityValue, 0)       AS ElectricityValue,
        pd.Notes
    FROM PropertyContract pc
    INNER JOIN PropertyDetail   pd ON pc.PropertyUnitId = pd.Id
    INNER JOIN PropertyRenter   r  ON r.Id             = pc.PropertyRenterId
    INNER JOIN Property         pr ON pr.Id            = pc.PropertyId
    INNER JOIN Department       d  ON d.Id             = pc.DepartmentId
    WHERE pd.IsDeleted = 0
	 and IsNull(pc.IsRenewed,0) = 0
      AND ISNULL(pr.IsActive,0) = 1
      AND pc.Id NOT IN (SELECT PropertyContractId FROM PropertyContractTermination)
      AND (ISNULL(@RenterId,0) = 0 OR pc.PropertyRenterId = @RenterId)
      AND (@ContractEndDate IS NULL OR CAST(pc.ContractEndDate AS DATE) = @ContractEndDate)
      AND (ISNULL(@PropertyId,0)  = 0 OR pc.PropertyId     = @PropertyId)
      AND (ISNULL(@DepartmentId,0)= 0 OR pc.DepartmentId   = @DepartmentId)
	  and pd.PropertyUnitNo <> 'وحدة افتراضية'
    UNION ALL

    /* 2) الوحدات غير المؤجرة (لا يوجد لها عقد فعّال) */
    SELECT
        NULL                                  AS Renter,
        d2.ArName                             AS DepartmentName,
        d2.EnName                             AS DepartmentEnName,
        pr2.ArName                            AS PropertyName,
        pr2.EnName                            AS EnProperty,
        pr2.Id                                AS PropertyId,
		pd2.RoomsNo,pd2.HallsNo,
        pr2.DepartmentId                      AS DepartmentId,
        pd2.Id                                AS DetailID,
        pd2.PropertyUnitNo                    AS Unit,
        N'متاح'                               AS UnitStatus,
        NULL                                  AS ContractEndDate,
		'' as ContrancNo,0 as pcID,
		
        0                                     AS RentValue,
        0                                     AS CommissionValue,
        0                                     AS ServicesValue,
        0                                     AS InsuranceValue,
        0                                     AS WaterValue,
        0                                     AS ElectricityValue,
        pd2.Notes
    FROM PropertyDetail pd2
    INNER JOIN Property   pr2 ON pr2.Id = pd2.MainDocId       -- عدّل MainDocId لو اسم العمود مختلف
    INNER JOIN Department d2  ON d2.Id  = pr2.DepartmentId
    WHERE pd2.IsDeleted = 0
      AND ISNULL(pr2.IsActive,0) = 1
      -- لا يوجد عقد فعّال لهذه الوحدة
      AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM PropertyContract pcx
            WHERE pcx.PropertyUnitId = pd2.Id
              AND pcx.Id NOT IN (SELECT PropertyContractId FROM PropertyContractTermination)
      )
      -- فلاتر على مستوى العقار/الإدارة تعمل حتى بدون عقد
      AND (ISNULL(@PropertyId,0)   = 0 OR pr2.Id          = @PropertyId)
      AND (ISNULL(@DepartmentId,0) = 0 OR pr2.DepartmentId= @DepartmentId)
      -- لو حدّدْت مستأجر أو تاريخ نهاية عقد، عادةً ما نرجّعش المتاحين
      AND (ISNULL(@RenterId,0) = 0)
      AND (@ContractEndDate IS NULL)
and pd2.PropertyUnitNo <> 'وحدة افتراضية';
END

CREATE PROC [dbo].[GetPropertyUnitsByPropertyAndUnitTypeId]
    @PropertyId INT,
    @PropertyUnitTypeId INT,
    @ContractId AS INTEGER
AS
SELECT d.Id,
       d.PropertyUnitNo
FROM PropertyDetail d
WHERE 
    d.IsDeleted = 0
    AND d.StatusId <> 1
    AND d.PropertyUnitTypeId = @PropertyUnitTypeId
    AND d.MainDocId = @PropertyId
    AND (
        d.Id NOT IN (
            SELECT pc.PropertyUnitId
            FROM PropertyContract pc
            WHERE pc.PropertyId = @PropertyId
              AND pc.IsDeleted = 0
              AND NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 FROM PropertyContractTermination t
                  WHERE t.PropertyContractId = pc.Id
              )
        )
        OR d.Id IN (
            SELECT pc.PropertyUnitId
            FROM PropertyContract pc
            WHERE pc.PropertyId = @PropertyId
              AND pc.IsDeleted = 0
              AND pc.Id = @ContractId
        )
    )

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetPurchaseRequestsInPeriod]
   @DepId int, 
@DateFrom Datetime ,@DateTo datetime
as
BEGIN

select Pr.DocumentNumber, Pr.Id, Pr.DepartmentId, Pr.WarehouseId, Pr.SystemPageId, Pr.SelectedId, Pr.ItemGroupId , Pr.Total, Pr.IsAccepted,Pr.StatusId, Pr.VendorOrCustomerId ,Pr.CurrencyId, Pr.VoucherDate, Pr.IsApproved, Pr.ApprovalDate, Pr.Notes, Pd.Qty, Pd.ItemPriceId, Pd.ItemUnitId,Pd.UnitEquivalent, ITM.Code ItemCode, ITM.ArName ItemArName, ITM.EnName ItemEnName, ITMUnit.ArName UnitArName, ITMUnit.EnName UnitEnName, ITMGroup.ArName ItemGroupArName, ITMGroup.EnName ItemGroupEnName,(SELECT ArName from Department where Id = @DepId) DepartementArName, (SELECT EnName from Department where Id = @DepId) DepartementEnName from PurchaseRequest Pr
INNER JOIN PurchaseRequestDetails Pd ON
Pd.MainDocId = Pr.Id INNER JOIN Item ITM ON
ITM.Id = Pd.ItemId INNER JOIN ItemUnit ITMUnit ON
Pd.ItemUnitId = ITMUnit.Id INNER JOIN ItemGroup ITMGroup ON
Pr.ItemGroupId = ITMGroup.Id
Where Pr.IsDeleted=0 AND Pr.DepartmentId = @DepId AND (@DateFrom is null or Pr.VoucherDate >= @DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or Pr.VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
ORDER BY Pr.ItemGroupId , ITM.Id
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetPurchasesOfVendor]
@vendorId int,@DateFrom datetime ,@DateTo datetime,@DepartmentId int
as
select item.arname ,qty,Price,DocumentNumber,VoucherDate ,ItemUnit.ArName UnitName,PurchaseInvoiceDetails.UnitEquivalent
,convert (varchar ,TotalAfterTaxes) TotalAfterTaxes ,qty*price/**UnitEquivalent*/ Total

,(select arname 'VendorName' from Vendor where id=@vendorId)VendorName ,N'مشتريات' as DocType
,(select dbo.GetVendorPurchaseValueInPeriodFn(@vendorId,@DateFrom,@DateTo)) as PurchaseValue ,(select dbo.GetVendorReturnsValueInPeriodFn(@vendorId,@DateFrom,@DateTo)) as ReturnValue
from PurchaseInvoice inner join PurchaseInvoiceDetails on PurchaseInvoice.id=PurchaseInvoiceDetails.MainDocId
inner join item on item.id=PurchaseInvoiceDetails.ItemId
inner join ItemUnit on PurchaseInvoiceDetails.ItemUnitId=ItemUnit.Id
where (@vendorId is null or VendorOrCustomerId=@vendorId )
and (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR PurchaseInvoice.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) 
and (@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and PurchaseInvoice.IsDeleted=0 and PurchaseInvoice.IsActive=1

--////// Return Part -------
union all

select item.arname ,qty,Price,DocumentNumber,VoucherDate ,ItemUnit.ArName UnitName,PurchaseReturnsDetails.UnitEquivalent
,convert (varchar ,TotalAfterTaxes) TotalAfterTaxes ,qty*price/**UnitEquivalent*/ Total
,(select arname 'VendorName' from Vendor where id=@vendorId)VendorName ,N'مرتجعات' as DocType
,(select dbo.GetVendorPurchaseValueInPeriodFn(@vendorId,@DateFrom,@DateTo)) as PurchaseValue ,(select dbo.GetVendorReturnsValueInPeriodFn(@vendorId,@DateFrom,@DateTo)) as ReturnValue
from PurchaseReturns inner join PurchaseReturnsDetails on PurchaseReturns.id=PurchaseReturnsDetails.MainDocId
inner join item on item.id=PurchaseReturnsDetails.ItemId
inner join ItemUnit on PurchaseReturnsDetails.ItemUnitId=ItemUnit.Id
where (@vendorId is null or VendorOrCustomerId=@vendorId )
and (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR PurchaseReturns.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) 
and (@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and PurchaseReturns.IsDeleted=0 and PurchaseReturns.IsActive=1
--////////---
order by VoucherDate

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetRepSalesAndCollectingCommission] --null
@DepartmentId int
as 
begin
select s.Id SalesInvoiceId,s.DocumentNumber SalesInvoiceDocNo,isnull(s.Total,0)Total,isnull(s.Paid,0)Paid,(isnull(s.Total,0)-isnull(s.Paid,0))Remain 
,s.VoucherDate,s.DueDate , m.PaidDate ,isnull(s.SalesCommissionPercentage,0) SalesCommissionPercentage,
isnull(s.SalesCommissionValue,0) SalesCommissionValue,isnull(s.CollectingCommissionPercentage,0) CollectingCommissionPercentage
,isnull(s.CollectingCommissionValue,0)CollectingCommissionValue,
DATEDIFF(DAY,s.DueDate,m.PaidDate) NoOfDays
,(select ArName from Customer where Id=s.VendorOrCustomerId )CustomerName
,(select ArName from Employee where Id=s.CustomerRepId )RepName
,sum(isnull(s.CollectingCommissionValue,0)) SumCommissionValue,sum(isnull(s.CollectingCommissionPercentage,0)) SumCommissionPercentage


from SalesInvoice s
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m on s.Id=m.SalesInvoiceId
where s.IsActive=1 and s.IsDeleted=0 and s.CustomerRepId is not null
  and (@DepartmentId is null or (s.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId))
group by s.Id,s.DocumentNumber,s.Total ,s.DueDate , m.PaidDate,s.SalesCommissionPercentage
,s.SalesCommissionValue,s.CollectingCommissionPercentage,s.CollectingCommissionValue
,s.Paid,s.VoucherDate,s.VendorOrCustomerId,s.CustomerRepId
end

CREATE PROC [dbo].[GetReservedChaletsByTypeId] 
@RoomTypeId int, @BookingStartDate datetime,@BookingEndDate datetime
 as
 begin

select *
from RoomBooking RB
where RB.IsDeleted=0 
and (@RoomTypeId is null or( RB.RoomTypeId=@RoomTypeId))
and (
-- first Caseحجز فى نفس تاريخ البداية و النهاية  
((Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingStartDate,103)) = (Select convert(varchar,@BookingStartDate,103))and (Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingEndDate,103))= (Select convert(varchar,@BookingEndDate,103)))
-- Second Case احد التواريخ محجوز فى نفس اليوم 
or (((Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingStartDate,103)) = (Select convert(varchar,@BookingStartDate,103))) or((Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingEndDate,103))= (Select convert(varchar,@BookingEndDate,103))))
-- Third Case التاريخ بين التواريخ المحجوزة 
or(
(@BookingStartDate between rb.BookingStartDate and rb.BookingEndDate)
and (@BookingEndDate between rb.BookingStartDate and rb.BookingEndDate)
)
)

--or(((Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingStartDate,103)) < (Select convert(varchar,@BookingStartDate,103)))and((Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingEndDate,103)) > (Select convert(varchar,@BookingStartDate,103))))
--or(((Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingStartDate,103)) < (Select convert(varchar,@BookingEndDate,103)))and((Select convert(varchar,rb.BookingEndDate,103)) > (Select convert(varchar,@BookingEndDate,103))))
--)
order by RB.Id
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetReservedMeals] --'9/4/2022','9/10/2022'
@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime
as 
begin
declare @t table(
MealId int  , MealName nvarchar(max)
,ItemId int , ItemName nvarchar(max)
,Number int, Notes nvarchar(max)
,VoucherDate datetime
)

insert into @t(MealId,MealName,ItemId,ItemName,Number,Notes,VoucherDate)
select
--(select sum(MRD.Number) from MealReservationDetail MRD where MRD.ItemId=MD.ItemId and MRD.MealId=MD.MealId) as ItemNumber ,
MD.MealId ,iif(MD.MealId=1,N'فطار',iif(MD.MealId=2,N'غداء',N'عشاء')) as MealName
,MD.ItemId ,i.Code + ' - '+i.ArName as ItemName
,MD.Number,Md.Notes
,--m.VoucherDate
(Select convert(varchar,M.VoucherDate,103)) as VoucherDate
from MealReservationDetail MD 
inner join MealReservation M on MD.MainDocId=M.Id
inner join Item i on i.Id=MD.ItemId
where m.IsActive=1 and m.IsDeleted=0
and ( (Select convert(varchar,M.VoucherDate,103))>=(Select convert(varchar,@DateFrom,103)) 
and ((Select convert(varchar,M.VoucherDate,103))<=(Select convert(varchar,@DateTo,103))))
group by ItemId  
,MealId,i.Code,i.ArName
,Number,MD.Notes
,VoucherDate
order By MealId,ItemId

select MealId,MealName,ItemId,ItemName,sum(Number) as Number,Notes,VoucherDate

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetReservedRooms] --null,null,null,null--'8/24/2022','9/12/2022'
@BuildingId int,@RoomId int,@BookingStartDate datetime,@BookingEndDate datetime
as
begin

declare @t table(
RoomBookingId int,
BookingStartDate nvarchar(max)  , BookingEndDate nvarchar(max),ReservationNo nvarchar(max)
,Paid money,Discount money,Insurance money,NightsNumber int,Remain money,RequiredAmount money,Total money,TotalAfterDiscount money,TotalAfterTaxes money,Tax money,TaxPercentage float

,BuildingId int , BuildingArName nvarchar(max)
,RoomId int , RoomNumber nvarchar(max)
,IsReserved bit ,RoomStatusId int, RoomStatus nvarchar(max)
,CustomerId int , CustomerArName nvarchar(max),CustomerMobile nvarchar(max)
--,NightsNumber int 
,RoomNumbers int
)

insert into @t(RoomBookingId,BookingStartDate, BookingEndDate,ReservationNo
,Paid,Discount,Insurance,NightsNumber,Remain,RequiredAmount,Total,TotalAfterDiscount,TotalAfterTaxes,Tax,TaxPercentage
,BuildingId , BuildingArName 
,RoomId , RoomNumber
,IsReserved  ,RoomStatusId , RoomStatus 
,CustomerId  , CustomerArName,CustomerMobile
--,NightsNumber 
,RoomNumbers )

select  
--Rb.BookingStartDate , Rb.BookingEndDate
rb.Id as RoomBookingId,
(Select convert(varchar,Rb.BookingStartDate,103)) as BookingStartDate ,(Select convert(varchar, Rb.BookingEndDate,103)) as BookingEndDate,replace(rb.DocumentNumber,'-','') as ReservationNo
,isnull(rb.Paid,0)Paid,isnull(rb.Discount,0)Discount,isnull(rb.Insurance,0)Insurance,isnull(rb.NightsNumber,0)NightsNumber,isnull(rb.Remain,0)Remain,isnull(rb.RequiredAmount,0)RequiredAmount,isnull(rb.Total,0)Total,isnull(rb.TotalAfterDiscount,0)TotalAfterDiscount,isnull(rb.TotalAfterTaxes,0)TotalAfterTaxes,isnull(rb.Tax,0)Tax,isnull(rb.TaxPercentage,0)TaxPercentage
,B.Id as BuildingId ,B.Code+' - '+B.ArName as BuildingArName
,R.Id as RoomId,R.Code+' - '+R.RoomNumber as RoomNumber , R.IsReserved ,R.RoomStatusId ,iif(R.RoomStatusId=2,N'مشغولة',N'أوشك على المغادرة') as RoomStatus
,C.Id as CustomerId,C.Code+' - '+C.ArName as CustomerArName,C.Mobile as CustomerMobile
--,(select DATEDIFF(DAY, @BookingStartDate, @BookingEndDate)) as NightsNumber
,0 as RoomNumbers
from RoomBooking RB
left join Building B on Rb.BuildingId = B.Id
left join Room R on RB.RoomId=R.Id
left join Customer C on C.Id=RB.CustomerId

where RB.IsDeleted=0 
and R.IsReserved =1 and (R.RoomStatusId=2 or R.RoomStatusId=3)
and (@BookingStartDate is null or (RB.BookingStartDate>=(SELECT CAST(@BookingStartDate AS date)) and RB.BookingEndDate>=(SELECT CAST(@BookingStartDate AS date))))
and(@BookingEndDate is null or( RB.BookingEndDate<=(SELECT CAST(@BookingEndDate AS date))))
and (@BuildingId is null or( RB.BuildingId=@BuildingId))
and (@RoomId is null or( RB.RoomId=@RoomId))

--group by Rb.BookingStartDate , Rb.BookingEndDate
--,B.Id ,B.Code,B.ArName 
--,R.Id ,R.Code,R.RoomNumber , R.IsReserved ,R.RoomStatusId
--,C.Id,C.Code,C.ArName

order by RoomBookingId,RoomId

if((select count(*)  from
(
SELECT  ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY roomid DESC) AS Row  
FROM @t  
GROUP BY RoomId HAVING COUNT(RoomId) > 1
) as RoomNumbers) >0)
begin
update @t Set RoomNumbers =(select count(*)  from
(
SELECT  ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY roomid DESC) AS Row  
FROM @t  
GROUP BY RoomId HAVING COUNT(RoomId) > 1
) as RoomNumbers) +((select count(*)  from
(
SELECT  ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY roomid DESC) AS Row  
FROM @t  
GROUP BY RoomId HAVING COUNT(RoomId) = 1
) as RoomNumbers))
end
else
begin
update @t Set RoomNumbers =(select count(RoomId)  FROM @t )
end

--select count(*) as RoomNumbers from
--(
--SELECT  ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY roomid DESC) AS Row  
--FROM @t  
--GROUP BY RoomId HAVING COUNT(RoomId) > 1
--)  as  RoomNumbers
--******************************************--
--update @t Set RoomNumbers =(select count(*)  from
--(
--SELECT  ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY roomid DESC) AS Row  
--FROM @t  
--GROUP BY RoomId HAVING COUNT(RoomId) > 1
--) as RoomNumbers)

select * from @t
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetRolePriviledges_AllPages]
@PageId int,
@RoleId int 
as

select ActionId,PageAction.PageId, PageAction.ArName [Action], SystemPage.ArName [Page], Privileged
from RolePrivilege right join PageAction
on PageAction.Id=RolePrivilege.ActionId 
left join SystemPage
on SystemPage.Id=PageAction.PageId
where RoleId=@RoleId and (@PageId is null or RolePrivilege.PageId
in(select Id from SystemPage where (ParentId=@PageId or ParentId 
in (select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@PageId or ParentId
in(select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@PageId)))))
union

select ActionId,PageAction.PageId, PageAction.ArName [Action], SystemPage.ArName [Page], Privileged
from RolePrivilege right join PageAction 
on PageAction.Id=RolePrivilege.ActionId
left join SystemPage
on SystemPage.Id=PageAction.PageId
where RoleId=(select RoleId from ERPUser where Id=@RoleId) 
and ActionId not in (select ActionId from RolePrivilege 
where RoleId=@RoleId and ActionId is not null) 
and (@PageId is null or RolePrivilege.PageId in(select Id from SystemPage 
where (ParentId=@PageId or ParentId in
(select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@PageId or ParentId 
in(select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@PageId)))))

union

select PageAction.Id as ActionId,PageAction.PageId, PageAction.ArName [Action], SystemPage.ArName [Page], 0 as Privileged
from PageAction
left join SystemPage
on SystemPage.Id=PageAction.PageId
where PageAction.Id not in (select ActionId from RolePrivilege where ActionId is not null 
and RoleId=(select RoleId from ERPUser where Id=@RoleId))
and PageAction.Id not in (select ActionId from RolePrivilege where ActionId is not null
and RoleId=@RoleId) and (@PageId is null or PageAction.PageId 
in(select Id from SystemPage where (ParentId=@PageId or ParentId 
in (select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@PageId or ParentId 
in(select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@PageId)))))

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetSalariesStatement]
@DepartmentId int ,@Month int,@Year int ,@HrDepartmentId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
as
begin
select ep.DocumentNumber,ep.VoucherDate,
isnull(d.ArName,'') Department,isnull(HrD.ArName,'') HrDepartment
,isnull(e.ArName,'') Employee
,isnull(epd.NoOfWorkingDays,0)NoOfWorkingDays,isnull(epd.AbsenceDays,0)AbsenceDays,isnull(epd.RemainingDays,0)RemainingDays,isnull(epd.NetSalary,0)NetSalary,isnull(epd.TotalOvertime,0)TotalOvertime,isnull(epd.TotalPenalty,0)TotalPenalty,isnull(epd.TotalReward,0)TotalReward,isnull(epd.TotalDueItems,0)TotalDueItems,isnull(epd.TotalDeductionItems,0)TotalDeductionItems,isnull(epd.BorrowValue,0)BorrowValue
,isnull(epd.AdvancedExpenses,0)AdvancedExpenses

from EmployeePayrollIssue ep
inner join EmployeePayrollIssueDetail epd on ep.Id=epd.MainDocId
left join Department d on d.Id=ep.DepartmentId
left join HrDepartment HrD on HrD.Id=ep.HrDepartmentId
left join Employee e on e.Id=epd.EmployeeId
where ep.IsActive=1 and ep.IsDeleted=0 and
(@Month is null or ep.Month=@Month) and 
(@Year is null or ep.Year=@Year)and
(@DepartmentId is null or ep.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) and 
(@HrDepartmentId is null or ep.HrDepartmentId=@HrDepartmentId)  
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetSalesInPeriodWithPurchasePrices]

@DepartmentId int,@WarehouseId int,
@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime,
@ItemGroupId int,@ItemCategoryId int

as 
begin
select *,SalesQuantity-ReturnQuantity  NetSales from(

select SUM(d.Qty) SalesQuantity,0 ReturnQuantity,i.Id ItemId,i.ArName ItemName ,u.ArName UnitName,dbo.Item_AvgCost(i.Id,@DepartmentId) as Price ,N'بيع'VoucherType--,p.MainDocId
from  SalesInvoiceDetails d

inner join ItemUnit u on u.Id=d.ItemUnitId
--inner join ItemCostPrice p on d.ItemId=p.ItemId --inner join ItemPrice p on d.ItemPriceId=p.Id
inner join SalesInvoice s on s.Id=d.MainDocId
where s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1
and i .IsActive=1 and i.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@WarehouseId is null or s.WarehouseId=@WarehouseId)
and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or s.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or i.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
and (@ItemGroupId is null or i.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
group by  i.ArName,u.ArName,i.Id--,p.Price

union all

select 0 SalesQuantity,SUM(d.Qty) ReturnQuantity,i.Id ItemId,i.ArName ItemName ,u.ArName UnitName,dbo.Item_AvgCost(i.Id,@DepartmentId) as Price,N'مرتجع'VoucherType --,p.MainDocId
from SalesReturnsDetails d
inner join  Item i on i.id=d.ItemId
inner join ItemUnit u on u.Id=d.ItemUnitId
--inner join PurchaseInvoiceDetails p on d.ItemId=p.ItemId --inner join ItemPrice p on d.ItemPriceId=p.Id
inner join SalesReturns r on r.Id=d.MainDocId
where r.IsActive=1 and r.IsDeleted=0
and i .IsActive=1 and i.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or r.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@WarehouseId is null or r.WarehouseId=@WarehouseId)
and (@DateFrom is null or r.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or r.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or i.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
and (@ItemGroupId is null or i.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
group by  i.ArName,u.ArName,i.Id--,p.Price

) as result
group by ItemName ,SalesQuantity,ReturnQuantity,UnitName,Price, ItemId,VoucherType
order by ItemId
end

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.GetSalesInvoiceActualPayment
    @VendorOrCustomerId int,
    @CashReceiptVoucherId int,
    @DepartmentId int
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    SELECT
        s.Id,
        s.DocumentNumber,
        s.VoucherDate,
        s.DueDate,
        s.DepartmentId,
        d.ArName AS DepartmentArName,
        s.TotalAfterTaxes,
        m.Amount,
        ISNULL(m.Amount, 0) AS PaidAmount,
        ISNULL(ISNULL(s.TotalAfterTaxes, 0) - (ISNULL(m.NetAmountRemain, 0) + ISNULL(m.Amount, 0)), 0) AS Paid,
        ISNULL(m.Amount, 0) AS PaidInTransaction,
        ISNULL(m.NetAmountRemain, 0) AS RemainAmount,
        CAST(N'SalesInvoice' AS nvarchar(50)) AS InvoiceSourceType,
        CAST(N'Sales Invoice' AS nvarchar(100)) AS InvoiceSourceName,
        s.Id AS SalesInvoiceId,
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS ServiceInvoiceId
    FROM dbo.SalesInvoice s
    INNER JOIN dbo.Department d ON s.DepartmentId = d.Id
    INNER JOIN dbo.SalesInvoiceActualPayment m ON s.Id = m.SalesInvoiceId
    WHERE s.Id IN (SELECT SalesInvoiceId FROM dbo.SalesInvoiceActualPayment WHERE CashReceiptVoucherId = @CashReceiptVoucherId)
      AND s.VendorOrCustomerId = @VendorOrCustomerId
      AND s.IsActive = 1
      AND s.IsDeleted = 0
      AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR s.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        s.Id,
        s.DocumentNumber,
        s.VoucherDate,
        s.DueDate,
        s.DepartmentId,
        d.ArName AS DepartmentArName,
        s.TotalAfterTaxes,
        m.Amount,
        ISNULL(m.PaidAmount, 0) AS PaidAmount,
        ISNULL(((s.TotalAfterTaxes - m.Amount) + ISNULL(m.PaidAmount, 0)), 0) AS Paid,
        0 AS PaidInTransaction,
        ISNULL(m.Amount - ISNULL(m.PaidAmount, 0), 0) AS RemainAmount,
        CAST(N'SalesInvoice' AS nvarchar(50)) AS InvoiceSourceType,
        CAST(N'Sales Invoice' AS nvarchar(100)) AS InvoiceSourceName,
        s.Id AS SalesInvoiceId,
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS ServiceInvoiceId
    FROM dbo.SalesInvoice s
    INNER JOIN dbo.Department d ON s.DepartmentId = d.Id
    INNER JOIN dbo.SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m ON s.Id = m.SalesInvoiceId
    WHERE s.Id IN (
            SELECT SalesInvoiceId
            FROM dbo.SalesInvoicePaymentMethods
            WHERE PaymentMethodId = 2
              AND Amount > 0
              AND Amount > ISNULL(PaidAmount, 0)
        )
      AND s.Id NOT IN (
            SELECT SalesInvoiceId
            FROM dbo.SalesInvoiceActualPayment
            WHERE CashReceiptVoucherId = @CashReceiptVoucherId
              AND SalesInvoiceId IS NOT NULL
        )
      AND s.VendorOrCustomerId = @VendorOrCustomerId
      AND s.IsActive = 1
      AND s.IsDeleted = 0
      AND m.PaymentMethodId = 2
      AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR s.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        s.Id,
        s.DocumentNumber,
        s.VoucherDate,
        s.DueDate,
        s.DepartmentId,
        d.ArName AS DepartmentArName,
        s.TotalAfterTaxes,
        m.Amount,
        ISNULL(m.Amount, 0) AS PaidAmount,
        ISNULL(ISNULL(s.TotalAfterTaxes, 0) - (ISNULL(m.NetAmountRemain, 0) + ISNULL(m.Amount, 0)), 0) AS Paid,
        ISNULL(m.Amount, 0) AS PaidInTransaction,
        ISNULL(m.NetAmountRemain, 0) AS RemainAmount,
        CAST(N'ServiceInvoice' AS nvarchar(50)) AS InvoiceSourceType,
        CAST(N'Service Invoice' AS nvarchar(100)) AS InvoiceSourceName,
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS SalesInvoiceId,
        s.Id AS ServiceInvoiceId
    FROM dbo.ServiceInvoice s
    INNER JOIN dbo.Department d ON s.DepartmentId = d.Id
    INNER JOIN dbo.ServiceInvoiceActualPayment m ON s.Id = m.ServiceInvoiceId
    WHERE s.Id IN (SELECT ServiceInvoiceId FROM dbo.ServiceInvoiceActualPayment WHERE CashReceiptVoucherId = @CashReceiptVoucherId)
      AND s.CustomerId = @VendorOrCustomerId
      AND s.IsActive = 1
      AND s.IsDeleted = 0
      AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR s.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        s.Id,
        s.DocumentNumber,
        s.VoucherDate,
        s.DueDate,
        s.DepartmentId,
        d.ArName AS DepartmentArName,
        s.TotalAfterTaxes,
        m.Amount,
        ISNULL(m.PaidAmount, 0) AS PaidAmount,
        ISNULL(((s.TotalAfterTaxes - m.Amount) + ISNULL(m.PaidAmount, 0)), 0) AS Paid,
        0 AS PaidInTransaction,
        ISNULL(m.Amount - ISNULL(m.PaidAmount, 0), 0) AS RemainAmount,
        CAST(N'ServiceInvoice' AS nvarchar(50)) AS InvoiceSourceType,
        CAST(N'Service Invoice' AS nvarchar(100)) AS InvoiceSourceName,
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS SalesInvoiceId,
        s.Id AS ServiceInvoiceId
    FROM dbo.ServiceInvoice s
    INNER JOIN dbo.Department d ON s.DepartmentId = d.Id
    INNER JOIN dbo.ServiceInvoicePaymentMethod m ON s.Id = m.ServiceInvoiceId
    WHERE s.Id IN (
            SELECT ServiceInvoiceId
            FROM dbo.ServiceInvoicePaymentMethod
            WHERE PaymentMethodId = 2
              AND Amount > 0
              AND Amount > ISNULL(PaidAmount, 0)
        )
      AND s.Id NOT IN (
            SELECT ServiceInvoiceId
            FROM dbo.ServiceInvoiceActualPayment
            WHERE CashReceiptVoucherId = @CashReceiptVoucherId
              AND ServiceInvoiceId IS NOT NULL
        )
      AND s.CustomerId = @VendorOrCustomerId
      AND s.IsActive = 1
      AND s.IsDeleted = 0
      AND m.PaymentMethodId = 2
      AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR s.DepartmentId = @DepartmentId)
    ORDER BY DueDate;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetSalesInvoiceDetails]
	@SalesInvoiceId int,
	@AccessoryReturn bit

AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here

Select Detail.ItemId,Item.ArName,Detail.ItemUnitId,Detail.Price,ItemPrice.Barcode,Detail.ItemPriceId,itmQty.Qty,ItemUnit.ArName ItemUnitArName,Detail.UnitEquivalent,Detail.AccessoryPrice,Detail.ExtraTypeId
from SalesInvoiceDetails Detail
INNER JOIN (select itemid,sum(qty)Qty from(
select itemid,qty from SalesInvoiceDetails where MainDocId=@SalesInvoiceId AND (@AccessoryReturn = 0 OR ItemId in (select Id from Item where Id = ItemId and IsAccessory = 1 and IsDeleted = 0 and IsActive = 1))
union all
select itemid,qty*-1 from SalesReturnsDetails where  MainDocId IN (select id from salesreturns where SalesInvoiceId = @SalesInvoiceId)
)as x
group by itemid) itmQty ON
Detail.ItemId = itmQty.itemid
INNER JOIN Item ON
itmQty.ItemId = Item.Id	
INNER JOIN ItemUnit ON
Detail.ItemUnitId = ItemUnit.Id
INNER JOIN ItemPrice ON 
ItemPrice.Id = Detail.ItemPriceId
where MainDocId=@SalesInvoiceId AND (@AccessoryReturn = 0 OR Detail.ItemId in (select Id from Item where Id = Detail.ItemId and IsAccessory = 1 and IsDeleted = 0 and IsActive = 1))
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetSalesQuotation] --7,null,null,null,null,null
@DocNum nvarchar(500),
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@CustomerId int,
@Id int
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT [SalesQuotation].[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Warehouse].ArName as [Warehouse]
	  ,[Department].Id as [DepartmentId]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,[Department].PhoneNo as [DepartmentPhoneNo]
	  ,Department.EnName DepartmentEnName
	  ,Department.Address DepartmentAddress
      ,[VoucherDate]
      ,[VendorOrCustomerId]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Total]
      ,[TotalItemsDiscount]
      ,isnull([SalesTaxes],0) SalesTaxes
       ,isnull((CAST( [TotalAfterTaxes] AS DECIMAL(18,1))),0)"TotalAfterTaxes" 
      ,[VoucherDiscountValue]
      ,[VoucherDiscountPercentage]
      ,[NetTotal]
      ,[Paid]
      ,[ValidityPeriod]
      ,[DeliveryPeriod]
      ,[CurrentQuantity]
      ,[DestinationWarehouseId]
      ,Customer.Mobile as Mobile
	  ,Customer.[Address] as Address
	  ,Customer.ArName as CustomerArName
	  ,Customer.EnName as CustomerEnName
	  ,Customer.BuildingNo,Customer.PostOfficeBox,Customer.TaxNumber,Customer.Mobile,Customer.PhoneNo
,ci.ArName CustomerArCity ,Co.ArName CustomerArCountry ,ci.EnName CustomerEnCity ,Co.EnName CustomerEnCountry

,(select  top(1) ss.CommercialRegistrationNo from SystemSetting ss) CommercialRegistrationNo
,(select top(1)  ss.TaxCardNumber from SystemSetting ss) TaxCardNumber
,(select  top(1) ss.CompanyArName from SystemSetting ss) CompanyArName
,(select  top(1) ss.CompanyEnName from SystemSetting ss) CompanyEnName
,(select  top(1) ss.StreetArName from SystemSetting ss) StreetArName
,(select  top(1) ss.StreetEnName from SystemSetting ss) StreetEnName
,(select  c.ArName from Country c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CountryId from SystemSetting ss)) CountryArName
,(select  c.EnName from Country c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CountryId from SystemSetting ss)) CountryEnName
,(select  c.ArName from City c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CityId from SystemSetting ss)) CityArName
,(select  c.EnName from City c where c.Id=(select  top(1) ss.CityId from SystemSetting ss)) CityEnName
  FROM [dbo].[SalesQuotation] 
  left join Warehouse on Warehouse.Id=[SalesQuotation].WarehouseId
  left join Department on Department.Id=[SalesQuotation].DepartmentId
  left join Currency on Currency.Id=[SalesQuotation].CurrencyId
  left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=[SalesQuotation].SystemPageId
  left join Customer on Customer.Id=[SalesQuotation].VendorOrCustomerId
  left join City ci on Customer.CityId=ci.Id
  left join Country co on Customer.CountryId=co.Id
  where ((@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
  and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
  and (@DepartmentId is null or [SalesQuotation].DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
  and (@DocNum is null or [SalesQuotation].DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
  and (@CustomerId is null or [SalesQuotation].VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)
  and (@Id is null or SalesQuotation.Id=@Id)
  and SalesQuotation.IsActive=1
  and SalesQuotation.IsDeleted=0)
END

Create Proc [GetSalesSituation]
as 
begin
select s.DocumentNumber ,s.VoucherDate,s.TotalAfterTaxes,ISNULL(s.Paid,0)Paid,(ISNULL(s.TotalAfterTaxes,0)-ISNULL(s.Paid,0)) Remain
from SalesInvoice s 
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m on m.SalesInvoiceId=s.Id
where m.PaymentMethodId!=2
and s.IsDeleted=0
union 
select s.DocumentNumber ,s.VoucherDate,s.TotalAfterTaxes,ISNULL(m.Amount,0) Paid,ISNULL(m.Amount,0)-ISNULL(m.PaidAmount,0) Remain
from SalesInvoice s 
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m on m.SalesInvoiceId=s.Id
where m.PaymentMethodId=2
and s.IsDeleted=0
group by s.DocumentNumber ,s.VoucherDate,s.TotalAfterTaxes,s.Paid,m.Amount,m.PaidAmount
order by s.DocumentNumber 
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetServicePrice]
@ServiceId int,
@AllowDiscount bit
as
Declare @ServiceCompanyPercentage money=(select isnull(CompanyPercentage,0) from [dbo].[Service] where Id=@ServiceId)

Declare @PointValue money=(select isnull(PointValue,0) from [dbo].[ServiceSettings])
Declare @Price money=(select isnull(Points,0) from [dbo].[Service]where Id=@ServiceId and IsActive=1and IsDeleted=0 )
if (@AllowDiscount=1 and @ServiceCompanyPercentage!=0 and @ServiceCompanyPercentage!=100)
begin
set @Price=@Price/2
end

Declare @ServicePrice money=@PointValue*@Price

select isnull(@ServicePrice,0) as ServicePrice

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetShareHolderAccountBalanceStatement]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@departmentId int,@fromDate datetime, @toDate datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
exec BalanceStatement_Insert @fromDate, @toDate, @departmentId
declare @ShareHolderAccountId int, @accountId int,@accountName nvarchar(100)
declare @ShareHolderAccountBalanceStatement table(
	[TotalAmount] [money] NULL,
	[PartialAmount] [money] NULL,
	[Statement] [nvarchar](max) NULL)

set @ShareHolderAccountId=(select ShareHolderAccountId from Department where Id=@departmentId)

declare cur cursor for select Id,ArName from ChartOfAccount where ParentId=@ShareHolderAccountId
open cur
fetch next from cur into @accountId,@accountName
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	INSERT INTO @ShareHolderAccountBalanceStatement ( [TotalAmount], [PartialAmount], [Statement]) VALUES
	(0, (select ISNULL(ABS(SUM([BalanceDebit]-[BalanceDebit])),0) from BalanceStatement where [Id]=@accountId), @accountName)
	
	fetch next from cur into @accountId,@accountName
end
close cur
deallocate cur

INSERT INTO @ShareHolderAccountBalanceStatement ( [TotalAmount], [PartialAmount], [Statement]) VALUES
	((select SUM(PartialAmount)from @ShareHolderAccountBalanceStatement), 0, N'الاجمالي')

select * from @ShareHolderAccountBalanceStatement
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetSlackItems] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DepartmentId int,
@dateFrom datetime,
@dateTo datetime
,@ItemGroupId int
,@ItemCategoryId int
,@ActivityId int
,@CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @ItemDetails table(ItemId int, ItemCode nvarchar(100), ItemName nvarchar(400), Quantity float, UnitName nvarchar(100))
declare @Qty float, @ItemId int, @ItemName nvarchar(400), @ItemCode nvarchar(100), @UnitName nvarchar(100)

declare cur cursor for select Id, ArName, Code from Item where Id in (select ItemId from DepartmentItem where DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and IsDeleted=0 and IsActive=1
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
   and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)

	open cur
	fetch next from cur into @ItemId, @ItemName, @ItemCode
	while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
	begin
		set @Qty=(
		select ISNULL(SUM([Quantity] * UnitEquavalent),0) 
		from [WarehouseOBDetails] OB
		inner join [dbo].[ItemUnit] IU
		on OB.ItemUnitId = IU.Id

		where	[ItemId]=@ItemId and 
				OB.[IsDeleted]=0 and 
				OB.[IsActive]=1 and 
				WarehouseOBId in (select Id from WarehouseOB where IsDeleted=0)) 
		+
		(select ISNULL(SUM([Qty] * UnitEquivalent),0) 
		from [StockReceiptVoucherDetails] RV
		inner join [dbo].[ItemUnit] IU
		on RV.ItemUnitId = IU.Id

		where	[ItemId]=@ItemId and
				RV.[IsDeleted]=0 and 
				MainDocId in (select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where IsDeleted=0))
		- 
		(select ISNULL(SUM([Qty] * UnitEquivalent),0) 
		from [StockIssueVoucherDetails] IV
		inner join [dbo].[ItemUnit] IU
		on IV.ItemUnitId = IU.Id

		where	[ItemId]=@ItemId and  
				IV.[IsDeleted]=0 and 
				MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where IsDeleted=0 and IsAccepted=1)
		)
	
		set @UnitName = (select [ArName] from [dbo].[ItemUnit] where [Id] = (select [ItemUnitId] from ItemPrice where id = @ItemId and [IsDefault] = 1))
		insert into @ItemDetails (ItemId, ItemCode ,ItemName, Quantity,UnitName)
		values (@ItemId, @ItemCode, @ItemName , @Qty , @UnitName)
		fetch next from cur into @ItemId, @ItemName, @ItemCode
	end
	close cur
	deallocate cur
--select Id,ArName,Code from Item where Id in (select ItemId from @ItemDetails where Quantity>0)
select Id,ArName,Code, Quantity,UnitName from Item inner join @ItemDetails
on ItemId=Item.Id
where Id 
in (select ItemId from @ItemDetails where Quantity>0) 
and Id not in (select ItemId from StockIssueVoucherDetails where item.Id in (select ItemId from DepartmentItem where DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) 
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where (@dateFrom is null or VoucherDate>=@dateFrom ) and (@dateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@dateTo)
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
   and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)

))

and IsDeleted=0
and IsActive=1
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetSurgeriesInPeriod]
@DoctorId int  ,@AssistantDoctorId int ,@AssistantNurseId int ,@From datetime,@To datetime
as 
begin
select s.DocumentNumber as SurgeryNo , s.SurgeryDate ,s.TotalPrice ,s.DoctorPrice,s.AssistantPrice,s.NursePrice
,p.ArName as Patient
,d.Id as DoctorId ,d.ArName as Doctor
,ad.Id as AssistantDoctorId,ad.ArName as AssistantDoctor
,e.Id as NurseId ,e.ArName as Nurse
from Surgery s 
inner join Patient p on p.id=s.PatientId
inner join Doctor d on d.id=s.DoctorId
inner join Doctor ad on ad.id=s.AssistantDoctorId
inner join Employee e on e.id=s.AssistantNurseId
where s.IsDeleted=0 
and(@DoctorId is null or s.DoctorId=@DoctorId)
and(@AssistantDoctorId is null or s.AssistantDoctorId=@AssistantDoctorId)
and(@AssistantNurseId is null or s.AssistantNurseId=@AssistantNurseId)
and(@From is null or s.SurgeryDate >= @From) 
and (@To is null or s.SurgeryDate <=@To)
end

commit tran
end try
begin catch
rollback tran
end catch

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetTotalSalesAndProfitInWeek]
as 
begin
declare @DateNow date=(SELECT GETDATE() )--N'03/24/2023'--
declare @DateFrom date =(SELECT DATEADD(DAY, -7, @DateNow))
declare @t Table (VoucherDate Date,Sales decimal,TotalCostPrice decimal,Profit decimal)
WHILE (@DateFrom<@DateNow)
BEGIN
set @DateFrom=(SELECT DATEADD(DAY, +1, @DateFrom))
--if(@DateFrom !=@DateNow)
--begin
insert into @t
select (SELECT CAST(@DateFrom AS Date))VoucherDate , isnull(SUM(isnull(s.TotalAfterTaxes,0)),0)Sales ,isnull(SUM(isnull(si.TotalCostPrice,0)),0) TotalCostPrice ,isnull( (SUM(isnull(s.TotalAfterTaxes,0))-SUM(isnull(si.TotalCostPrice,0))),0) Profit
from SalesInvoice s 
inner join StockIssueVoucher si on s.Id =si.SelectedId
where s.IsActive=1 and s.IsDeleted=0
and (@DateFrom is null or (SELECT CAST(s.VoucherDate AS Date))=@DateFrom)
and si.SystemPageId=58
--end
end
--***************************************************************************************************************************************************************--
select * from @t

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetTotalsForEachInvoiceType] --28,'01-01-2019','09-09-2021',null,null
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@ShiftId int,
@CashierUserId int
as
begin
select isnull(sum(s.TotalAfterTaxes),0) as TotalAfterTaxes,/*s.CustomerType*/1 as CustomerTypeId ,N'تيك اواى' as CustomerTypeName from SalesInvoice s 
where s.CustomerType=1  
and s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1
and s.IsCollected=0 and s.IsClosed=1

and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom )
and (@DateTo is null or s.VoucherDate <=@DateTo) 
and(@ShiftId is null or s.ShiftId=@ShiftId) 
and(@CashierUserId is null or s.CashierUserId=@CashierUserId) 
--group by s.CustomerType
union 
select isnull(sum(s.TotalAfterTaxes),0) as TotalAfterTaxes,/*s.CustomerType*/2 as CustomerTypeId,N'طاولات'  as CustomerTypeName from SalesInvoice s 
where s.CustomerType=2  
and s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1
and s.IsCollected=0 and s.IsClosed=1
and(@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) 
and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom )

and(@ShiftId is null or s.ShiftId=@ShiftId) 
and(@CashierUserId is null or s.CashierUserId=@CashierUserId) 
--group by s.CustomerType
union 
select isnull(sum(s.TotalAfterTaxes),0) as TotalAfterTaxes,/*s.CustomerType*/3 as CustomerTypeId,N'دليفرى'  as CustomerTypeName from SalesInvoice s
where s.CustomerType=3
and s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1
and s.IsCollected=0 and s.IsClosed=1
and(@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId) 
and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom )
and (@DateTo is null or s.VoucherDate <=@DateTo) 
and(@ShiftId is null or s.ShiftId=@ShiftId) 
and(@CashierUserId is null or s.CashierUserId=@CashierUserId) 
--group by s.CustomerType
union 
select isnull(sum(s.TotalAfterTaxes),0) as TotalAfterTaxes,/*s.CustomerType*/4 as CustomerTypeId,N'الفرع'  as CustomerTypeName from SalesInvoice s
where s.CustomerType=4
and s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1

and(@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetUnSelectedExpenseAmortization] --null,null,null
@Month int, @Year int, @DepartmentId int
As
Begin
select p.Id,p.MainDocId,p.ArName,p.IsSelectedAmortization,p.ExpenseAmortizationId,p.IsSelectedProof,p.ExpenseProofId,p.FromDate,p.ToDate
,p.DepartmentId,d.ArName Department,isnull(p.Value,0) 'Value'
,IIF(p.ExpenseTypeId=1,N'موظف',IIF(p.ExpenseTypeId=2,N'حساب',''))ExpenseType,p.ExpenseTypeId
,(select ArName from ChartOfAccount where Id=p.ExpenseAccountId)ExpenseAccount ,p.ExpenseAccountId
,(select ArName from ChartOfAccount where Id=p.PrePaymentAccountId)PrePaymentAccount ,p.PrePaymentAccountId
,c.Id CostCenterId,isnull(c.Code,'') CostCenterCode,isnull(c.ArName,'') CostCenterName
,pj.Id ProjectId,isnull(pj.Code,'') ProjectCode,isnull(pj.ArName,'') ProjectName

from PrepaidExpenseDetail p 
inner join Department d on d.Id=p.DepartmentId
left join CostCenter c on c.Id=p.CostCenterId
left join Project pj on pj.Id=p.ProjectId

where p.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or @DepartmentId=p.DepartmentId)
and (@Month is null or @Month=(SELECT MONTH((select VoucherDate from ExpenseProof where Id=p.MainDocId))))
and (@Year is null or @Year=(SELECT Year((select VoucherDate from ExpenseProof where Id=p.MainDocId))))
and p.IsSelectedProof=1
and( p.Id not in (select Id from PrepaidExpenseDetail where IsSelectedAmortization=1)
or p.Id  in (select PrepaidExpenseDetailId from ExpenseAmortizationDistribution where IsSelectedAmortization !=1))
End

CREATE Proc [dbo].[GetUnSelectedExpenseProof]
@DepartmentId int
as
begin
select p.Id,p.MainDocId,p.ArName,p.IsSelectedAmortization,p.ExpenseAmortizationId,p.IsSelectedProof,p.ExpenseProofId
,p.DepartmentId,d.ArName Department
,p.EmployeeId,e.ArName Employee
,IIF(p.ExpenseTypeId=1,N'موظف',IIF(p.ExpenseTypeId=2,N'حساب',''))ExpenseType,p.ExpenseTypeId
,(select ArName from ChartOfAccount where Id=p.ExpenseAccountId)ExpenseAccount ,p.ExpenseAccountId
,(select ArName from ChartOfAccount where Id=p.PrePaymentAccountId)PrePaymentAccount ,p.PrePaymentAccountId

from PrepaidExpenseDetail p 
inner join Department d on d.Id=p.DepartmentId
inner join Employee e on e.Id=p.EmployeeId
--inner join ChartOfAccount c on c.Id=p.ExpenseAccountId
--inner join ChartOfAccount ch on ch.Id=p.PrePaymentAccountId

where p.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or @DepartmentId=p.DepartmentId)
and p.Id not in (select id from PrepaidExpenseDetail where IsSelectedProof=1)
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[GetUserPriviledges_AllPages] 
@ModuleId int,
@UserId int 
as

select ActionId,PageAction.PageId, PageAction.ArName [Action], SystemPage.ArName [Page], Privileged from UserPrivilege right join PageAction
on PageAction.Id=UserPrivilege.ActionId 
left join SystemPage
on SystemPage.Id=PageAction.PageId
where UserId=@UserId and (@ModuleId is null or UserPrivilege.PageId in(select Id from SystemPage where (ParentId=@ModuleId or ParentId in (select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@ModuleId or ParentId in(select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@ModuleId)))))
union
select ActionId,PageAction.PageId, PageAction.ArName [Action], SystemPage.ArName [Page], Privileged from RolePrivilege right join PageAction 
on PageAction.Id=RolePrivilege.ActionId
left join SystemPage
on SystemPage.Id=PageAction.PageId
where RoleId=(select RoleId from ERPUser where Id=@UserId) and ActionId not in (select ActionId from UserPrivilege where UserId=@UserId and ActionId is not null) and (@ModuleId is null or RolePrivilege.PageId in(select Id from SystemPage where (ParentId=@ModuleId or ParentId in (select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@ModuleId or ParentId in(select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@ModuleId)))))
union
select PageAction.Id as ActionId,PageAction.PageId, PageAction.ArName [Action], SystemPage.ArName [Page], 0 as Privileged from PageAction
left join SystemPage
on SystemPage.Id=PageAction.PageId
where PageAction.Id not in (select ActionId from RolePrivilege where ActionId is not null and RoleId=(select RoleId from ERPUser where Id=@UserId)) and PageAction.Id not in (select ActionId from UserPrivilege where ActionId is not null and UserId=@UserId) and (@ModuleId is null or PageAction.PageId in(select Id from SystemPage where (ParentId=@ModuleId or ParentId in (select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@ModuleId or ParentId in(select Id from SystemPage where ParentId=@ModuleId)))))

CREATE PROC GetVendorBalanceInEachDept 
 @VendorId int 

 as
begin

declare @VendorBalance table(DepartmentId int, DepartmentArName nvarchar(500),Debit money,Credit money)
declare @departmentId int, @departmentArName nvarchar(500), @debit money,@credit money
declare curs cursor for select Id, ArName from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0
open curs
fetch next from curs into @departmentId, @departmentArName
while @@FETCH_STATUS =0
begin

	

	insert into @VendorBalance (DepartmentId,DepartmentArName,Debit,Credit)
	values 
	(@departmentId, @departmentArName ,
	 [dbo].[VendorDebit](@VendorId,@departmentId,NULL,null), [dbo].[VendorCredit](@VendorId,@departmentId,NULL,null))
	--(@departmentArName,dbo.VendorOBDebit(@VendorId,@departmentId) +[dbo].[VendorDebit](@VendorId,@departmentId),
	--dbo.VendorOBCredit(@VendorId,@departmentId) +[dbo].[VendorCredit](@VendorId,@departmentId))
	fetch next from curs into @departmentId, @departmentArName
end
close curs
deallocate curs

insert into @VendorBalance (DepartmentArName,Debit,Credit)
	values ( N'الإجمالى',(select sum(Debit) from @VendorBalance),(select sum(Credit) from @VendorBalance))

select DepartmentId, DepartmentArName ,iif(Debit>Credit,Debit-Credit,0) Debit,iif(Credit>Debit,Credit-Debit,0) Credit
from @VendorBalance 
END

,''SourceVoucherDocumentNumber

inner join ItemUnit on ItemUnit.Id=StockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemUnitId

set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)

set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin

set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding

            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى

			end

			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end

 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [HotelManagementCarEntry] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

lbexit:

        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat

begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))

else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding

set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى

            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)OrderNumber from [Order] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)OrderNumber from [Order] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)OrderNumber from [Order] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @LastOrderNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)OrderNumber from [Order] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @LastOrderNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @LastOrderNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[InsertOrUpdateOnlineUsers]
@UserId int
           ,@UserName nvarchar(50)
           ,@LastLoginDate datetime
		   ,@timeNow datetime
as
if exists (select * from OnlineUsers where UserId = @UserId)
 BEGIN
UPDATE [dbo].[OnlineUsers]
   SET[LastLoginDate] = @LastLoginDate
 WHERE [UserId] = @UserId;

 with TempOnlineUsers as 
 (select UserId, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by userid order by [LastLoginDate] desc) as rn from OnlineUsers )

 delete from TempOnlineUsers
 where rn>1
end
else
begin
INSERT INTO [dbo].[OnlineUsers]
           ([UserId]
           ,[UserName]
           ,[LastLoginDate])
     VALUES
           (@UserId,@UserName,@LastLoginDate)
end
SELECT [OnlineUsers].[UserName],[OnlineUsers].[LastLoginDate]  ,Employee.Image 'userimage',Employee.ArName 'EmployeeName'
  FROM [dbo].[OnlineUsers] 
  left join ERPUser on ERPUser.Id=OnlineUsers.UserId
  left join Employee on Employee.Id=ERPUser.EmployeeId
where  DATEDIFF(MINUTE,LastLoginDate,@timeNow)<=2 and OnlineUsers.UserId!=@UserId

CREATE PROCEDURE  [dbo].[InventoryVoucher_Delete]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int,
	@userId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	declare @AlLChars nvarchar(100) = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'
	declare @SystemPageId int=(select Id from SystemPage where ControllerName='InventoryVoucher')
	DECLARE @StockReceiptSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockReceiptVoucher')
	DECLARE @StockIssueSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockIssueVoucher')
	declare @StockIssueVoucherId int =(select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SystemPageId and SelectedId=@Id)


	update InventoryVoucher set IsDeleted=1, UserId=@userId
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where Id=@Id
	update InventoryVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@Id

	update StockReceiptVoucher set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId
	update StockReceiptVoucherDetails set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId = (select id from StockReceiptVoucher where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId)

	update JournalEntry set IsDeleted=1 
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId and SourceId in (select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId)
	update JournalEntryDetail
	set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId in (select Id from JournalEntry where SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId and SourceId in (select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where SelectedId=@Id and SystemPageId=@SystemPageId)) and SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId

	update StockIssueVoucher
	set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where Id=@StockIssueVoucherId
	update StockIssueVoucherDetails
	set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@StockIssueVoucherId

	update JournalEntry
	set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SourceId=@StockIssueVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId
	update JournalEntryDetail
	set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@StockIssueVoucherId and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId

END
