set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))

else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))

            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى

			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from InventoryVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin

set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[InventoryVoucher_Item_AllByDepIdAndName_PriceAndQuantity] --null,N'',null,null,null,null
@depId int ,
@ItemArName nvarchar(max),
@IsDefault bit,
@CalculateQty bit,
@warehouseId int,
@groupId int
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT Item.Id,ItemPrice.Id as ItemPriceId, Item.HasExpiry as ItemHasExpiry,Barcode,IsNull(Barcode,'')+' - '+ Item.ArName +' - '+ItemUnit.ArName ArName, Price ,Item.TaxPercentage as ItemTaxPercentage
	,(select isnull( dbo.Item_AvgCost(Item.Id,@depId),0))  AvgCost,Item.HasWarranty,Item.WarrantyDays,Item.WarrantyMonths,Item.WarrantyYears,Item.Code,
	ItemUnit.ArName ItemUnitArName,ItemPrice.ItemUnitId as ItemUnitId , ItemPrice.Equivalent as Equivalent,ItemPrice.FactoryPrice,Item.ItemGroupId,
	(case @CalculateQty when 1 then dbo.CalculateItemQuantityInWarehouse(null,Item.Id,null,null,@depId) else 0 end) Quantity
	,(select isnull(dbo.CalculateItemQuantityInWarehouse(@WarehouseId,Item.Id,null,null,null),0)) as ItemQuantityOnSystem
	from Item
	left join ItemPrice on ItemPrice.ItemId=Item.Id 
	inner join ItemUnit on ItemUnit.Id=ItemPrice.ItemUnitId
	where Item.IsDeleted=0 and Item.IsActive=1 and (@IsDefault is null or IsDefault=1) and (@depId is null or Item.Id in(Select ItemId from DepartmentItem where DepartmentId=@depId))
	and (Item.ArName like N'%'+@ItemArName +'%'or Barcode like '%'+@ItemArName+'%' or Item.Code like '%'+@ItemArName+'%')
	and(@groupId is null or item.ItemGroupId=@groupId )
END

begin
set nocount on;

    begin try
        if @trancount = 0

        else

Declare @EnterItemCodeManually bit=(select EnterItemCodeManually from SystemSetting)
if(@EnterItemCodeManually !=1)
begin
------------------------------------------------------------ SET Item Code --------------------------------------------------------------------
 if(@FieldsCodingId>0)
begin
Declare @fixedPart nvarchar(max) = (select FixedPart from FieldsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@FieldsCodingId);
Declare @NoOfDigits int = (select DigitsNo from FieldsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@FieldsCodingId);
Declare @IsAutomaticSequence bit= (select IsAutomaticSequence from FieldsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@FieldsCodingId);
Declare @IsZerosFills bit = (select IsZerosFills from FieldsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@FieldsCodingId);
Declare @LastCode nvarchar(max)=(select top(1) Code from Item where FieldsCodingId=@FieldsCodingId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by Id desc)

Declare @Result int ,@length int
Declare @NewDocNo nvarchar(max)

if(@fixedPart is null)
begin
if(@LastCode is null)
begin
set @Result=0+1;
end
else
begin
 set @Result = @LastCode + 1;
 end

 -- Zero Fill
 if(@IsZerosFills =1)
 begin
 
 if(len(convert(nvarchar(max),@Result))<@NoOfDigits)
 begin
 Declare @DocNo nvarchar(max)=convert(nvarchar(max),@Result)
set @length=@NoOfDigits-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @Code= @NewDocNo
 end
 else
 begin
 set @Code= @Result;
 end
 end
 else -- if not zero fill
 begin
   set @Code= @Result;
 end
end
else -- fixed part is not null
begin 
set @LastCode=(select top(1) Code from Item where Code like '%'+@fixedPart+'%' and FieldsCodingId=@FieldsCodingId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by Id desc)

if(@LastCode is null)
begin
set @Result=0+1;
end
else
begin
set @Result=CHARINDEX(@fixedPart,@lastCode,len(@fixedPart))+1
 declare @CodeWithoutFixedPart nvarchar(max)= (SELECT  SUBSTRING(@lastCode,LEN(LEFT(@lastCode,CHARINDEX(@fixedPart, @lastCode)+len(@fixedPart))),LEN(@lastCode) - LEN(LEFT(@lastCode,CHARINDEX(@fixedPart, @lastCode)))))
 set @Result=(select isnull(convert (int,@CodeWithoutFixedPart),0)+1)
 end

 -- Zero Fill
 if(@IsZerosFills =1)
 begin
 set @DocNo =convert(nvarchar(max),@Result)

 if(len(convert(nvarchar(max),@Result))<@NoOfDigits)
 begin
set @length=@NoOfDigits-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					set @i =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

   set @Code=@fixedPart+CONVERT(nvarchar(max), @NewDocNo);

 end
 else
 begin
   set @Code=@fixedPart+CONVERT(nvarchar(max), @NewDocNo);
 end
 end
 else -- if not zero fill
 begin
   set @Code=@fixedPart+CONVERT(nvarchar(max), @NewDocNo);
 end
end
end -- end of "if(@FieldsCodingId>0)"

---------------
else
begin

set @LastCode=(select top(1) Code from Item where (FieldsCodingId is null) and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by Id desc)

if(@LastCode is null)
begin
set @Result=0+1;
end
else
begin
set @Code=@lastCode+1
 end
end

 ----------------------------------------------------------------- End Of SET Item Code --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 end

close itemCur
deallocate itemCur
*/

lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0

        raiserror ('Item_Insert: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Item_MostSales]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@DepartmentId int,
	@Count int,
	@MinPrice money
	,@ItemGroupId int
,@ItemCategoryId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	select top (@Count) ItemId, Qty, Item.Code, Item.ArName, Item.IdOnWebSite from (select sum(Qty) Qty, ItemId from SalesInvoiceDetails
	where MainDocId in (select Id from SalesInvoice where IsDeleted=0 and (@DepartmentId is null or DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)) and 
	(@MinPrice is null or Price >= @MinPrice) and IsDeleted=0
	group by ItemId) MostSales
	inner join Item on MostSales.ItemId=Item.Id where Item.IsDeleted=0 and Item.IsActive=1
	and (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
    and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
	order by Qty desc
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Item_TotalItemsProfit]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@ItemId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@DepId int
,@ItemGroupId int
,@ItemCategoryId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @totalReturnPrice money=(select IsNULL(SUM(ISNULL(Price,0)*ISNULL(Qty,0)),0) from SalesReturnsDetails where IsDeleted=0 and  (@ItemId is null or ItemId=@ItemId) and (MainDocId in (select Id from SalesReturns where IsDeleted=0 and (@DepId is null or DepartmentId=@DepId) and (@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate>=@DateFrom)
				and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo))))
declare @totalReturnCost money=(select ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(Price,0)*ISNULL(Qty,0)),0) from SalesReturnsDetails where IsDeleted=0 and (@ItemId is null or ItemId=@ItemId) and (MainDocId in (select Id from SalesReturns where IsDeleted=0 and (@DepId is null or DepartmentId=@DepId) and (@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate>=@DateFrom)
				and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo))))

select Item.Code, Item.ArName, TotalQty, TotalCost, TotalPrice, TotalProfit, Percentage from (select ItemId, 
SUM(Qty) TotalQty, 
SUM(ISNULL(CostPrice,0)*ISNULL(Qty,0)) -@totalReturnCost TotalCost, 
SUM((ISNULL(Price,0)-ISNULL(DiscountValue,0))*ISNULL(Qty,0)) - @totalReturnPrice TotalPrice, 
SUM((ISNULL(Price,0)-ISNULL(DiscountValue,0))*ISNULL(Qty,0)) - @totalReturnPrice - SUM(ISNULL(CostPrice,0)*ISNULL(Qty,0)) + @totalReturnCost TotalProfit,
(SUM((ISNULL(Price,0)-ISNULL(DiscountValue,0))*ISNULL(Qty,0)) - @totalReturnPrice - SUM(ISNULL(CostPrice,0)*ISNULL(Qty,0)) + @totalReturnCost)/(SUM((ISNULL(Price,0)-ISNULL(DiscountValue,0))*ISNULL(Qty,0))) Percentage
from StockIssueVoucherDetails
where (@ItemId is null or ItemId=@ItemId) and
(MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where IsDeleted=0 and IsAccepted=1 and SystemPageId=58 and (@DepId is null or DepartmentId=@DepId)
				and (@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate>=@DateFrom)
				and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo))) 
group by ItemId) TotalItemsProfit
inner join Item
on Item.Id=ItemId
where Item.IsDeleted=0 and Item.IsActive=1
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
    and (@ItemGroupId is null or Item.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)

END

	EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @AlternativeItemsOut
--//----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------//--
if @ItemTypeId =3 or @ItemTypeId=2
begin
	EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @ItemComponentsOutPut out, @ItemComponents
INSERT INTO [dbo].[ItemComponent]
           ([ParentItemId]
           ,[ChildItemId]
           ,[Quantity]
           ,[ItemUnitId]
           ,[IsActive]
           ,[IsDeleted]
           ,[UserId]
           ,[UnitEquivalent]
		   ,[ToleranceQty])
	SELECT @ItemId
           ,[ChildItemId]
           ,[Quantity]
           ,[ItemUnitId]
           ,[IsActive]
           ,[IsDeleted]
           ,[UserId]
           ,[UnitEquivalent]
		   ,[ToleranceQty]
	FROM OPENXML (@ItemComponentsOutPut, '/DocumentElement/ItemComponents', 2)
	WITH ([ParentItemId] [int] ,
	[ChildItemId] [int] ,
	[ChildArName] [nvarchar](max) ,
	[Quantity] [float] ,
	[ItemUnitId] [int] ,
	[IsActive] [bit] ,
	[IsDeleted] [bit] ,
	[UserId] [bit] ,
	[UnitEquivalent] float,
	[ToleranceQty] float )

	EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @ItemComponentsOutPut
end

lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction Item_Update;

        raiserror ('Item_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ItemGroup_AdjustPrice]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@id int,
@value decimal,
@perc decimal

AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	if @value <>0
	begin
	update ItemPrice 
	set Price=Price+@value
	where ItemId in (select Id from Item where ItemGroupId=@id)
	end
	else
	begin
	if @perc <>0
	begin
		update ItemPrice 
		set Price=Price+ Price* (@perc/100)
		where ItemId in (select Id from Item where ItemGroupId=@id)
	end
	end
END

AS

END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Items_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@DepId int,
	@GroupId int,
	@ItemCategoryId int,
    @ActivityId int,
    @CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT i.Code,
	i.ArName,
	i.EnName,
	dpt.[ArName] Department,
	ig.ArName as ItemGroup,
	it.ArName as Itemtype,
	ItemPrice.Price
  FROM [dbo].[Item] i 
  inner join [dbo].[ItemPrice]
  on i.id=ItemPrice.ItemId


  left join ItemGroup ig
  on ig.Id=i.ItemGroupId
  left join ItemType it
  on it.Id=i.ItemTypeId


  
  left join DepartmentItem dpi
  on i.Id = dpi.[ItemId]

  left join [Department] dpt
  on dpi.[DepartmentId] = dpt.Id

    where  (
  ( @GroupId is null or  i.ItemGroupId=@GroupId)
 and i.IsDeleted=0 and i.IsActive=1
	)
	and 
	( @DepId is null or  dpt.Id = @DepId)
	and ItemPrice.IsDefault=1
	and 
	( @ItemCategoryId is null or  i.ItemCategoryId = @ItemCategoryId)
  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepId))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepId))
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[ItemsDailySales]
@DepartmentId int,@WarehouseId int,@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime
,@ItemGroupId int
,@ItemCategoryId int
as 
begin
select *,SalesQuantity-ReturnQuantity  NetSales from(

select SUM(d.Qty) SalesQuantity,0 ReturnQuantity,i.Id ItemId,i.ArName ItemName ,u.ArName UnitName,p.Price ,N'بيع'VoucherType
from  SalesInvoiceDetails d
inner join  Item i on i.id=d.ItemId
inner join ItemUnit u on u.Id=d.ItemUnitId
inner join ItemPrice p on d.ItemPriceId=p.Id
inner join SalesInvoice s on s.Id=d.MainDocId
where s.IsDeleted=0 and s.IsActive=1
and i .IsActive=1 and i.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@WarehouseId is null or s.WarehouseId=@WarehouseId)
and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or s.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or i.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
    and (@ItemGroupId is null or i.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
group by  i.ArName,p.Price,u.ArName,i.Id

union all

select 0 SalesQuantity,SUM(d.Qty) ReturnQuantity,i.Id ItemId,i.ArName ItemName ,u.ArName UnitName,p.Price,N'مرتجع'VoucherType 
from SalesReturnsDetails d
inner join  Item i on i.id=d.ItemId
inner join ItemUnit u on u.Id=d.ItemUnitId
inner join ItemPrice p on d.ItemPriceId=p.Id
inner join SalesReturns r on r.Id=d.MainDocId
where r.IsActive=1 and r.IsDeleted=0
and i .IsActive=1 and i.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or r.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@WarehouseId is null or r.WarehouseId=@WarehouseId)
and (@DateFrom is null or r.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or r.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@ItemCategoryId is null or i.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
    and (@ItemGroupId is null or i.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
group by  i.ArName,p.Price,u.ArName,i.Id

) as result
group by ItemName ,SalesQuantity,ReturnQuantity,UnitName,Price, ItemId,VoucherType
order by ItemId
end

 @DepartmentId int,

BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from

 declare @DepartmentIdVariable int =@DepartmentId,
 @WarehouseVariable int=@WarehouseId

 select Item.Id ItemId,Item.Code ItemCode,Item.ArName ItemName,cast(sum(qty) as decimal(10,2)) Quantity , Price, UnitName,Item.OrderLimit ,ItemType.ArName ItemType

 and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentIdVariable))

 select stockIssueVoucherDetails.ItemId,qty*unitEquivalent*-1 qty,stockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId,ItemPrice.Price,IU.[ArName] UnitName from stockIssueVoucherDetails inner join stockIssueVoucher on stockIssueVoucher.Id=stockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId

 )as x inner join item on item.Id=x.ItemId

--left join ItemPrice

--left join [ItemUnit] IU

--where ItemPrice.IsDefault=1
where 
  (@ItemCategoryId is null or Item.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)

 group by Item.Id,item.ArName,Item.Code ,price,UnitName,OrderLimit,ItemType.ArName
 having cast(sum(qty) as decimal(10,2)) <=Item.OrderLimit

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[JournalEntry_Get]
@DepId int,
	@DateFrom datetime,
    @DateTo datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT JournalEntry.[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Company].ArName as [Company]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Date]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
	   --/////
	  ,JournalEntryDetail.Credit as Credit
	  ,JournalEntryDetail.Debit as Debit
	  ,JournalEntryDetail.AccountId as AccountId
	  ,(select ChartOfAccount.ArName as ChartOfAccountArName from ChartOfAccount where ChartOfAccount.Id = JournalEntryDetail.AccountId) as AccountName
	  ,JournalEntryDetail.Notes as Notes
	  ,(select dbo.GetDocumentNumberBySystemPageId(JournalEntry.SourcePageId ,JournalEntry.SourceId)+'-'+ (select ArName from SystemPage where SystemPage.Id =JournalEntry.SourcePageId)) as BasicVoucher
	  --////
  FROM [dbo].[JournalEntry]
  --////
  inner join JournalEntryDetail on JournalEntryDetail.JournalEntryId=JournalEntry.Id
  --////
  left join Company
  on Company.Id=JournalEntry.CompanyId
  left join Branch
  on JournalEntry.BranchId=Branch.Id
  left join SystemPage
  on SystemPage.Id=JournalEntry.SourcePageId
  left join Department
  on Department.Id=JournalEntry.DepartmentId
  left join Currency
  on Currency.Id=JournalEntry.CurrencyId
  left join ERPUser
  on ERPUser.Id=JournalEntry.UserId
    where  (
  (@DepId is null or JournalEntry.DepartmentId= @DepId)
   and( @DateFrom is null or  JournalEntry.Date>=@DateFrom)
    and( @DateTo is null or JournalEntry.Date<=@DateTo)
	and JournalEntry.IsDeleted=0
	and JournalEntry.IsActive=1)
		order by DocumentNumber
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MealReservation_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@CustomerId int,
	@VoucherDate datetime,
	@Notes nvarchar(max),
    @Image nvarchar(max),
	@UserId int,
    @IsDeleted bit,
    @Total money,
	@Discount money,
	@TotalAfterDiscount money,
	@CurrencyId int,
	@CurrencyEquivalent float,
	@DepartmentId int,
	@CashBoxId int,
	@Paid money,
	@Remain money,
	@Details NTEXT
	
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction MealReservation_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [MealReservation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [MealReservation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [MealReservation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin

CREATE Proc [dbo].[ModifyingItemPrices]
@ItemGroupId int , @ItemCategoryId int , @ItemTypeId int , @DepartmentId int,@IsValue bit,@ValueOrPercentage money
as
begin

Declare @NewValue money

if(@IsValue=1) -- Value
begin 
update ItemPrice set Price =isnull(Price,0)+@ValueOrPercentage
where Id in 

(
select p.Id from  Item i inner join ItemPrice p
on i.Id=p.ItemId
inner join DepartmentItem d on i.Id = d.ItemId

where i.IsDeleted=0 
and(@ItemGroupId is null or i.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
and(@ItemCategoryId is null or i.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
and(@ItemTypeId is null or i.ItemTypeId=@ItemTypeId)
and(@DepartmentId is null or d.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
)
end
else -- Percentage
begin
update ItemPrice set Price =isnull(Price,0)+((isnull(Price,0)*@ValueOrPercentage)/100)
where Id in 

(
select p.Id from  Item i inner join ItemPrice p
on i.Id=p.ItemId
inner join DepartmentItem d on i.Id = d.ItemId

where i.IsDeleted=0 
and(@ItemGroupId is null or i.ItemGroupId=@ItemGroupId)
and(@ItemCategoryId is null or i.ItemCategoryId=@ItemCategoryId)
and(@ItemTypeId is null or i.ItemTypeId=@ItemTypeId)
and(@DepartmentId is null or d.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
)
end

end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Order_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@customerId int,
@techId int,
@serviceCategoryId int,
@statusId int,
@date datetime,
@orderNumber nvarchar(max),
@warranty int,
@refund bit
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [Order].[Id]
,ServicesCategory.ArName as ServiceCategory
      ,[Customer].ArName as [Customer]
      ,[Date]
      ,[ChoosenTechanicianId] as [Technician]
      ,[OrderNumber]
      ,[Order].[Longitude]
      ,[Order].[Latitude]
      ,[SparePartsPrice]
      ,[ServiceCost]
      ,OrderStatus.ArName as OrderStatus
      ,[TechnicianRating]
      ,[TechnicianEvaluation]
      ,[TotalMoneyAmount]
      ,[WithdrawalCause]
      ,[Order].[IsActive]
      ,[Order].[IsDeleted]
      ,[Order].[Notes]
      ,[Order].[Image]
      ,[Order].[UserId]
      ,[CashReceiptVoucherId]
      ,[WarrantyTypeId]
      ,[Discount]
      ,[TotalAfterDiscount]
      ,[Problems]
  FROM [dbo].[Order] left join ServicesCategory on [Order].ServiceCategoryId=ServicesCategory.Id
  left join Customer on [Order].CustomerId=Customer.Id
  left join Techanician on [Techanician].Id=[Order].ChoosenTechanicianId
  left join OrderStatus on [Order].StatusId=[OrderStatus].Id
  where (@customerId is null or [Order].CustomerId=@customerId)  and
  (@techId is null or [Order].ChoosenTechanicianId=@techId) and
  (@serviceCategoryId is null or [Order].ServiceCategoryId=@serviceCategoryId) and
  (@statusId is null or [Order].StatusId=@statusId)  and
  (@date is null or [Order].[Date]=@date) and
  (@orderNumber is null or [Order].OrderNumber like '%'+@orderNumber+'%') and
  (@warranty is null or [Order].WarrantyTypeId=@warranty) and
  (@refund is null or @refund=0 or ([Order].Discount=0 and [Order].TotalMoneyAmount=0)) and
  [Order].IsDeleted=0
END

CREATE proc  [dbo].[Pos_GetTotalSalesAndReturn]
 @PosId int,@CashierUserId  int,@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime,@IsClosed bit,@IsCollected bit,@DepartmentId int,@ShiftId int

as

select  PaymentMethod.Id,ArName,Commission,ERPUser.Id CashierUserId , 
dbo.GetposTotalSales(@PosId,ERPUser.Id,PaymentMethod.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo,@IsClosed,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId)  TotalSales,
dbo.GetposTotalReturn(@PosId,ERPUser.Id,PaymentMethod.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo,@IsClosed,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId)  TotalReturn 
--total cash issue voucher
, (SELECT IIF(PaymentMethod.Id=1, dbo.GetPosTotalCashIssues(@PosId,ERpUser.Id,@IsClosed,@IsCollected,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId,@DateFrom,@DateTo),0)) as TotalCashIssueVoucher
,
(dbo.GetposTotalSales(@PosId,ERPUser.Id,PaymentMethod.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo,@IsClosed,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId)  
 -dbo.GetposTotalReturn(@PosId,ERPUser.Id,PaymentMethod.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo,@IsClosed,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId)-(SELECT IIF(PaymentMethod.Id=1, dbo.GetPosTotalCashIssues(@PosId,ERPUser.Id,@IsClosed,@IsCollected,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId,@DateFrom,@DateTo),0)))NetSales
 ,dbo.GetPosTotalReservations(@PosId,ERPUser.Id,PaymentMethod.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo,@IsClosed,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId) TotalReservations 
 ,( select IIF( PaymentMethod.Id=1,
 (select top(1)CashBoxId from UserCashBox where UserCashBox.UserId=ERPUser.Id and Privilege=1) ,NULL)) CashBoxId
 ,ERPUser.UserName Cashier
 from PaymentMethod ,ERPUser
where ForPos=1 and PaymentMethod.IsDeleted=0 and PaymentMethod.IsActive=1 
and dbo.GetposTotalSales(@PosId,ERPUser.Id,PaymentMethod.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo,@IsClosed,@DepartmentId,@ShiftId) >0
and (@CashierUserId is NULL or ERPUser.Id=@CashierUserId) and ERPUser.IsCashier=1
order by PaymentMethod.Id

CREATE  PROCEDURE [dbo].[PosReceiptVoucher_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@BranchId [int],
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@Date [datetime] ,
	@ShiftId [int],
	@CashierUserId [int],
	@DateFrom datetime,
	@DateTo datetime,
	@AccountantCashBoxId int,
	@IsLinked [bit] ,
	@IsPosted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Details NTEXT,
	@CustomerTypes NTEXT

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction PosReceiptVoucher_Insert;
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int ,@CustomerTypesOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from PosReceiptVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'PosReceiptVoucher')

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@Date))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@Date))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PosReceiptVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PosReceiptVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PosReceiptVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PosReceiptVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

set @JournalEntryDocNum= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))

end
else
begin
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

Create PROCEDURE [dbo].[PropertBillRegisteration_Update]
	@Id int,
    @BillRegDate datetime,
	@TransactionNumber INT,
	@ContractId INT,
	@RenterId INT,
	@PropertyDetailId INT,
    @ElectricityBillValue MONEY,
    @GasBillValue MONEY,
    @ViolationBillValue MONEY,
    @RentersAccount MONEY,
    @UserId INT,
	@DepartmentId INT -- expected 11 for contract
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction PropertyBillRegisteration_Update;
    -- Declare variables
    DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum NVARCHAR(MAX);
    DECLARE @JournalEntryId INT;

	UPDATE [dbo].[PropertyBillRegisteration]
	   SET [TransactionNumber] = @TransactionNumber
		  ,[BillRegDate] = @BillRegDate
		  ,[ContractId] = @ContractId
		  ,[RenterId] = @RenterId
		  ,[PropertyDetailId] = @PropertyDetailId
		  ,[GasBillValue] = @GasBillValue
		  ,[ElectricityBillValue] = @ElectricityBillValue
		  ,[ViolationBillValue] = @ViolationBillValue
	 WHERE [Id]=@Id
	

    -- Update the Journal Entry Header
	
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'PropertyBillRegisteration')
	DECLARE @SourceId int = @Id
UPDATE [dbo].[JournalEntry]
   SET 
      [Date] = @BillRegDate
      ,[IsActive] = 1
      ,[IsPosted] = 0
      ,[IsDeleted] = 0
      ,[UserId] = @UserId
      ,[DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId
 WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@Id

 
 SET @JournalEntryId = (select top (1)[Id] from [dbo].[JournalEntry] WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@Id)
 DELETE FROM [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail]
      WHERE [JournalEntryId]=@JournalEntryId

	 -- إيراد مستحق الكهرباء
	declare @ElectricityDueRevenueId int =(select ElectricityDueRevenueId from [dbo].Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId) 
	-- إيراد مستحق الغاز
	declare @GasDueRevenueId int =(select GasDueRevenueId from [dbo].Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId) 
	-- إيراد مستحق المخالفات
	declare @ViolationsDueRevenueId int =(select ViolationsDueRevenueId from [dbo].Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId)
	-- إيراد الإيجارات
	declare @RenterAndBuyerAccountId int =(select RenterAndBuyerAccountId from [dbo].Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId) 
			
    -- Insert the Journal Entry Details
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail]
        ([JournalEntryId], [Debit], [Credit], [AccountId],[SourcePageId], [SourceId], [IsActive], [IsPosted], [IsDeleted])
    VALUES
		-- Renters Debit
        (@JournalEntryId, @RentersAccount, 0, @RenterAndBuyerAccountId,@SourcePageId,@SourceId, 1, 0, 0),
        -- Electricity Credit
        (@JournalEntryId, 0, @ElectricityBillValue, @ElectricityDueRevenueId,@SourcePageId,@SourceId, 1, 0, 0),
        -- Gas Credit
        (@JournalEntryId, 0, @GasBillValue, @GasDueRevenueId,@SourcePageId,@SourceId, 1, 0, 0),
        -- Violations Credit
        (@JournalEntryId, 0, @ViolationBillValue, @ViolationsDueRevenueId,@SourcePageId,@SourceId, 1, 0, 0);
        

lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch

        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();

            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction CashReceiptVoucher_Update;

        raiserror ('PropertyBillRegisteration_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

--//--------------- Journal Entry -------------------------------//--
DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'PropertyContract')
-- عشان مش بيعمل قيد اتوماتيك فبشوف الاول لو له قيد ولا لأ عشان مايحصلشerror 
Declare @PreviousJE_Id int =(select top (1)[Id] from JournalEntry where SourcePageId=@SourcePageId and SourceId=@Id)

if(@PreviousJE_Id is not null)
begin
    DELETE FROM [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] WHERE [JournalEntryId]=@PreviousJE_Id;

    declare @CurrencyId int =(select top(1)Id from Currency where IsDeleted=0 and IsActive=1);
    declare @CurrencyEquivalent float=(select Equivalent from Currency where Id=@CurrencyId);
    
    -- تعريف الحسابات
    DECLARE @RenterAndBuyerAccountId int=(select RenterAndBuyerAccountId from Department where [Id]=@DepartmentId);
    DECLARE @DueRentId int=(select DueRentId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId);
    DECLARE @FirstBatchValue money=(select Top(1) BatchTotal from PropertyContractBatch where [MainDocId]=@Id);
    DECLARE @ElectricityDueRevenueId int=(select ElectricityDueRevenueId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId);
    DECLARE @WaterDueRevenueId int=(select WaterDueRevenueId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId);
    DECLARE @ServicesDueRevenueId int=(select ServicesDueRevenueId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId);
    DECLARE @GasDueRevenueId int=(select GasDueRevenueId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId);
    DECLARE @CompanyDueCommissionId int=(select CompanyDueCommissionId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId);
    DECLARE @PropertyRefundInsuranceId int=(select PropertyRefundInsuranceId from [Department] where [Id]=@DepartmentId);

    Declare @SumValues money = isnull(@WaterValue,0)+isnull(@ServicesValue,0)+isnull(@CommissionValue,0)+isnull(@ElectricityValue,0)+isnull(@GasValue,0);
    Declare @NetFirstBatchValue money = isnull(@FirstBatchValue,0) - isnull(@SumValues,0) - isnull(@InsuranceValue,0);

    UPDATE [dbo].[JournalEntry]
    SET [Date] = @VoucherDate, [Notes] = @Notes, [IsActive] = 1, [IsPosted] = 0, [IsDeleted] = @IsDeleted,
        [Image] = @Image, [UserId] = @UserId, [DepartmentId] = @DepartmentId, [CurrencyId] = @CurrencyId, [Equivalent] = @CurrencyEquivalent
    WHERE [Id] = @PreviousJE_Id;

    -- إعادة استخدام متغير @JournalEntryId بنفس القيمة للتوافق
    set @JournalEntryId = @PreviousJE_Id;

    DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail table(
        [JournalEntryId] [int] NULL, [Debit] [money] NULL, [Credit] [money] NULL, [CurrencyId] [int] NULL, [Equivalent] [float] NULL,
        [AccountId] [int] NULL, [SourcePageId] [int] NULL, [SourceId] [int] NULL, [IsPosted] [bit] NULL, [IsDeleted] [bit] NULL,
        [IsActive] [bit] NULL, CostCenterId int null,
        PartyType INT NULL, PartyId INT NULL -- << إضافة الحقلين
    );

    Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, CurrencyId, Equivalent, AccountId, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive, CostCenterId, PartyType, PartyId)
    VALUES
    -- Debit " From " - السطر الخاص بالمستأجر
    (@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@NetFirstBatchValue,0), 0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @RenterAndBuyerAccountId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, 4, @PropertyRenterId),
    -- Credit " To "
    (@JournalEntryId, 0, ISNULL(@NetFirstBatchValue,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @DueRentId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, null, null);

    Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, CurrencyId, Equivalent, AccountId, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive, CostCenterId, PartyType, PartyId)
    VALUES
    -- Debit " From " - السطر الخاص بالمستأجر
    (@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@SumValues,0), 0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @RenterAndBuyerAccountId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, 4, @PropertyRenterId),
    -- Credit " To "
    (@JournalEntryId, 0 , ISNULL(@ServicesValue,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @ServicesDueRevenueId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, null, null),
    (@JournalEntryId, 0, ISNULL(@ElectricityValue,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @ElectricityDueRevenueId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, null, null),
    (@JournalEntryId, 0, ISNULL(@WaterValue,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @WaterDueRevenueId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, null, null),
    (@JournalEntryId, 0, ISNULL(@CommissionValue,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @CompanyDueCommissionId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, null, null),
    (@JournalEntryId, 0, ISNULL(@GasValue,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @GasDueRevenueId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, null, null);

    Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, CurrencyId, Equivalent, AccountId, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive, CostCenterId, PartyType, PartyId)
    VALUES
    -- Debit " From "
    (@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@InsuranceValue,0), 0, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @PropertyRefundInsuranceId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, null, null),
    -- Credit " To " - السطر الخاص بالمستأجر
    (@JournalEntryId, 0, ISNULL(@InsuranceValue,0), @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @RenterAndBuyerAccountId, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1, null, 4, @PropertyRenterId);

    Insert into [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, CurrencyId, Equivalent, AccountId, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive, CostCenterId, PartyType, PartyId)
    select
        JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, CurrencyId, Equivalent, AccountId, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive, CostCenterId, PartyType, PartyId
    from @JournalEntryDetail where Debit>0 or Credit>0;
end
--//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------//--

lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction PropertyContract_Update;

        raiserror ('PropertyContract_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

begin
set nocount on;

    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction PropertyDueBatch_Update;

DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'PropertyDueBatch')

   SET [DocumentNumber] = @DocumentNumber

 WHERE [Id]=@Id

DECLARE @MainDocId int=@Id

--- // ---------------------- Details ------------------------- // ---

--//--- BEGIN ZATCA SERIAL GENERATION (Added Logic for Update) ---//--
-- هذا الكود يضمن عدم تكرار السيريال ويستخدم تاريخ الدفعة الفعلي
;WITH LastSerial AS (
    SELECT
        pc.DepartmentId AS branch_id,
        -- === نستخدم تاريخ الدفعة هنا ===
        RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2) AS y,
        RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2) AS m,
        
        MAX(CAST(RIGHT(ISNULL(p.NoteSerial1H, '0'), 4) AS int)) AS LastNo
    FROM 
        PropertyDueBatchDetail p WITH (TABLOCKX, HOLDLOCK) 
    INNER JOIN PropertyContractBatch pcb ON pcb.Id = p.PropertyContractBatchId
    INNER JOIN PropertyContract pc ON pc.Id = pcb.MainDocId
    WHERE 
        ISNULL(p.NoteSerial1H,'') <> ''
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail d_new
            JOIN PropertyContractBatch pcb_new ON d_new.PropertyContractBatchId = pcb_new.Id
            JOIN PropertyContract pc_new ON pcb_new.MainDocId = pc_new.Id
            WHERE d_new.MainDocId = @Id -- <-- الدفعات الخاصة بهذا التحديث
              AND pc_new.DepartmentId = pc.DepartmentId
              AND YEAR(pcb_new.BatchDate) = YEAR(pcb.BatchDate)
              AND MONTH(pcb_new.BatchDate) = MONTH(pcb.BatchDate)
        )
    GROUP BY 
        pc.DepartmentId, 
        RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2), 
        RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2)
),
SerialBase AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        pc.DepartmentId AS branch_id,
        
        -- === ونستخدم تاريخ الدفعة هنا أيضاً ===
        RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2) AS y,
        RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2) AS m,
        CAST(pc.DepartmentId AS varchar(10)) +
        RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2) +
        RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2) AS SerialKey,
        
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY pc.DepartmentId, YEAR(pcb.BatchDate), MONTH(pcb.BatchDate)
            ORDER BY pcb.BatchDate, p.ID
        ) AS RowNo
    FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail p
    INNER JOIN PropertyContractBatch pcb ON pcb.Id = p.PropertyContractBatchId
    INNER JOIN PropertyContract pc ON pc.Id = pcb.MainDocId
    WHERE 
        p.MainDocId = @Id -- <-- الدفعات الخاصة بهذا التحديث
        AND ISNULL(p.IsSelected,0)=1 
        AND ISNULL(p.NoteSerial1H,'') = '' -- التي ليس لها سيريال فقط
)
-- التحديث النهائي
UPDATE p
SET 
    NoteSerial1H = s.SerialKey + RIGHT('0000' + CAST(ISNULL(l.LastNo, 0) + s.RowNo AS varchar), 4)
FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail p
JOIN SerialBase s ON p.ID = s.ID
LEFT JOIN LastSerial l ON s.branch_id = l.branch_id AND s.y = l.y AND s.m = l.m;

--//--- END ZATCA SERIAL GENERATION ---//--

-- 1) تجميع القيم لكل عقد ومستأجر على حدة
SELECT
    pc.Id AS ContractId,
    pc.PropertyRenterId,
    ISNULL(SUM(pcb.BatchTotal), 0) AS Sum_BatchTotal, -- << تم تصحيح الخطأ هنا
    ISNULL(SUM(pc.ElectricityValue), 0) AS Sum_ElectricityValue,
    ISNULL(SUM(pc.WaterValue), 0) AS Sum_WaterValue,
    ISNULL(SUM(pc.ServicesValue), 0) AS Sum_ServicesValue,
    ISNULL(SUM(pc.CommissionValue), 0) AS Sum_CommissionValue,

INTO #AggregatedTotals_Upd
FROM (
    SELECT d.PropertyContractId, d.PropertyContractBatchId
    FROM dbo.PropertyDueBatchDetail d
    WHERE d.MainDocId = @Id AND ISNULL(d.IsSelected,1) = 1
) AS SelectedDetails
JOIN dbo.PropertyContractBatch pcb ON pcb.Id = SelectedDetails.PropertyContractBatchId
JOIN dbo.PropertyContract pc ON pc.Id = pcb.MainDocId
GROUP BY pc.Id, pc.PropertyRenterId;

-- 2) جلب حسابات القسم والعملة
DECLARE @CustomerAccountId INT, @DueRentId INT, @ElectricityDueRevenueId INT, @WaterDueRevenueId INT,
        @ServicesDueRevenueId INT, @CompanyDueCommissionId INT, @PropertyRefundInsuranceId INT;
DECLARE @CurrencyId INT, @CurrencyEquivalent FLOAT;

SELECT
    @CustomerAccountId = RenterAndBuyerAccountId, @DueRentId = DueRentId, @ElectricityDueRevenueId = ElectricityDueRevenueId,
    @WaterDueRevenueId = WaterDueRevenueId, @ServicesDueRevenueId = ServicesDueRevenueId,
    @CompanyDueCommissionId = CompanyDueCommissionId, @PropertyRefundInsuranceId = PropertyRefundInsuranceId
FROM dbo.Department WHERE Id = @DepartmentId;

SELECT TOP(1) @CurrencyId = Id, @CurrencyEquivalent = Equivalent FROM dbo.Currency WHERE IsDeleted = 0 AND IsActive = 1;

-- التأكد من أن جميع الحسابات والعملات معرفة
IF @CustomerAccountId IS NULL OR @DueRentId IS NULL OR @CurrencyId IS NULL BEGIN RAISERROR('PropertyDueBatch_Update: Critical account mappings or currency are missing.',16,1); RETURN; END

-- 3) تحديث أو إنشاء هيدر قيد اليومية (UPSERT)
DECLARE @JournalEntryId INT;
SELECT @JournalEntryId = je.Id FROM dbo.JournalEntry je WHERE je.SourcePageId = @SourcePageId AND je.SourceId = @Id;

IF @JournalEntryId IS NULL
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dbo.JournalEntry (DocumentNumber, [Date], SourcePageId, SourceId, Notes, IsActive, IsPosted, IsDeleted, [Image], UserId, DepartmentId, CurrencyId, Equivalent)
    VALUES (@DocumentNumber, @VoucherDate, @SourcePageId, @Id, @Notes, 1, 0, @IsDeleted, @Image, @UserId, @DepartmentId, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent);
    SET @JournalEntryId = SCOPE_IDENTITY();
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    UPDATE dbo.JournalEntry
    SET [Date] = @VoucherDate, Notes = @Notes, IsDeleted = @IsDeleted, [Image] = @Image, UserId = @UserId, DepartmentId = @DepartmentId
    WHERE Id = @JournalEntryId;
END

-- 4) إعادة بناء تفاصيل القيد بالكامل
DELETE FROM dbo.JournalEntryDetail WHERE JournalEntryId = @JournalEntryId;

-- إذا لم تكن هناك دفعات مختارة لإنشاء قيد جديد، نتوقف هنا بعد الحذف
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM #AggregatedTotals_Upd WHERE Sum_BatchTotal > 0 OR Sum_ElectricityValue > 0 OR Sum_WaterValue > 0 OR Sum_ServicesValue > 0 OR Sum_CommissionValue > 0 OR Sum_InsuranceValue > 0)
BEGIN
    DROP TABLE #AggregatedTotals_Upd;
    GOTO lbexit;
END

DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail TABLE(
    JournalEntryId INT, Debit MONEY, Credit MONEY, CurrencyId INT, Equivalent FLOAT, AccountId INT,
    SourcePageId INT, SourceId INT, IsPosted BIT, IsDeleted BIT, IsActive BIT, CostCenterId INT NULL,
    PartyType INT NULL, PartyId INT NULL
);

-- استخدام CURSOR للمرور على كل عقد/مستأجر تم تجميعه
DECLARE @Loop_RenterId INT, @Loop_BatchTotal MONEY, @Loop_Electricity MONEY, @Loop_Water MONEY,
        @Loop_Services MONEY, @Loop_Commission MONEY, @Loop_Insurance MONEY;

DECLARE totals_cursor_upd CURSOR FOR
SELECT PropertyRenterId, Sum_BatchTotal, Sum_ElectricityValue, Sum_WaterValue, Sum_ServicesValue, Sum_CommissionValue, Sum_InsuranceValue
FROM #AggregatedTotals_Upd;

OPEN totals_cursor_upd;
FETCH NEXT FROM totals_cursor_upd INTO @Loop_RenterId, @Loop_BatchTotal, @Loop_Electricity, @Loop_Water, @Loop_Services, @Loop_Commission, @Loop_Insurance;

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
    DECLARE @Loop_SumServices MONEY = ISNULL(@Loop_Services,0) + ISNULL(@Loop_Electricity,0) + ISNULL(@Loop_Water,0) + ISNULL(@Loop_Commission,0);

    -- (أ) قيمة الدُفعات
    INSERT INTO @JournalEntryDetail (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, AccountId, PartyType, PartyId, CurrencyId, Equivalent, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive)
    VALUES
        (@JournalEntryId, @Loop_BatchTotal, 0, @CustomerAccountId, 4, @Loop_RenterId, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1),
        (@JournalEntryId, 0, @Loop_BatchTotal, @DueRentId, null, null, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1);

    -- (ب) خدمات/كهرباء/مياه/سعي
    IF @Loop_SumServices > 0
    BEGIN
        INSERT INTO @JournalEntryDetail (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, AccountId, PartyType, PartyId, CurrencyId, Equivalent, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive)
        VALUES
            (@JournalEntryId, @Loop_SumServices, 0, @CustomerAccountId, 4, @Loop_RenterId, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1),
            (@JournalEntryId, 0, @Loop_Services, @ServicesDueRevenueId, null, null, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1),
            (@JournalEntryId, 0, @Loop_Electricity, @ElectricityDueRevenueId, null, null, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1),
            (@JournalEntryId, 0, @Loop_Water, @WaterDueRevenueId, null, null, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1),
            (@JournalEntryId, 0, @Loop_Commission, @CompanyDueCommissionId, null, null, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1);
    END

    -- (ج) التأمين المسترد
    IF @Loop_Insurance > 0
    BEGIN
        INSERT INTO @JournalEntryDetail (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, AccountId, PartyType, PartyId, CurrencyId, Equivalent, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive)
        VALUES
            (@JournalEntryId, @Loop_Insurance, 0, @PropertyRefundInsuranceId, null, null, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1),
            (@JournalEntryId, 0, @Loop_Insurance, @CustomerAccountId, 4, @Loop_RenterId, @CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent, @SourcePageId, @Id, 0, 0, 1);
    END

    FETCH NEXT FROM totals_cursor_upd INTO @Loop_RenterId, @Loop_BatchTotal, @Loop_Electricity, @Loop_Water, @Loop_Services, @Loop_Commission, @Loop_Insurance;
END
CLOSE totals_cursor_upd;
DEALLOCATE totals_cursor_upd;
DROP TABLE #AggregatedTotals_Upd;

-- تحقق توازن القيد
DECLARE @d MONEY, @c MONEY;
SELECT @d = SUM(ISNULL(Debit,0)), @c = SUM(ISNULL(Credit,0)) FROM @JournalEntryDetail;
IF ABS(ISNULL(@d,0) - ISNULL(@c,0)) > 0.01
BEGIN
    RAISERROR('PropertyDueBatch_Update: Journal not balanced (Debit <> Credit).',16,1);
    RETURN;
END

-- الإدراج الفعلي للتفاصيل
INSERT INTO dbo.JournalEntryDetail
    (JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, CurrencyId, Equivalent, AccountId, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive, CostCenterId, PartyType, PartyId)
SELECT
    JournalEntryId, Debit, Credit, CurrencyId, Equivalent, AccountId, SourcePageId, SourceId, IsPosted, IsDeleted, IsActive, CostCenterId, PartyType, PartyId
FROM @JournalEntryDetail
WHERE ISNULL(Debit,0) <> 0 OR ISNULL(Credit,0) <> 0;

/* ===================[ End Journal Entry - REWRITE ]=================== */
--//----------------- End Of Journal Entry -----------------//--
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction PropertyDueBatch_Update;

        raiserror ('PropertyDueBatch_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PropertyRevenueProof_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@DepartmentId int ,
	@VoucherDate datetime ,
	@FromDate date,
	@ToDate date,
	@IsDeleted bit ,
	@UserId int ,
	@Notes nvarchar(max) ,
	@Image nvarchar(max) ,
	@Details NTEXT

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction PropertyRevenueProof_Insert;

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PropertyRevenueProof where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PropertyRevenueProof where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PropertyRevenueProof where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PropertyRevenueProof where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

    -- Insert statements for procedure here

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PurchaseInvoice_Delete]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int,
	@UserId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'PurchaseInvoice')
	declare @AlLChars varchar(100) = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'

	update PurchaseInvoice
	set IsDeleted=1 
	,UserId=@UserId
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where Id=@Id

	update PurchaseInvoiceDetails
	set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@Id

	if (select SystemPageId from PurchaseInvoice where Id=@Id)=58
begin
	update SalesInvoice set IsLinked=0 where Id=(select SelectedId from PurchaseInvoice where Id=@Id)
end

	update JournalEntry
	set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SourceId=@Id and SourcePageId=@SourcePageId

	update JournalEntryDetail
	set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@Id and SourcePageId=@SourcePageId

	declare @StockReceiptVoucherIds table (Id int)

	insert into @StockReceiptVoucherIds (Id) select Id from StockReceiptVoucher where SystemPageId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id
	DECLARE @StockReceiptSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockReceiptVoucher')
	
	update StockReceiptVoucher
	set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where Id in (select Id from @StockReceiptVoucherIds)

	update StockReceiptVoucherDetails
	set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId in (select Id from @StockReceiptVoucherIds)

	----------------------------update quantities-------------------------------------------------------
-- invoice may have more than one receipt 
	declare @voucherId int
	declare Cur cursor for select [Id] from @StockReceiptVoucherIds
open Cur
fetch next from Cur into @voucherId
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	declare @WarehouseId int = (select WarehouseId from StockReceiptVoucher where Id=@voucherId)
	declare @DepartmentId int = (select DepartmentId from StockReceiptVoucher where Id=@voucherId)
	insert into ItemsToBeUpdatedQty (ItemId,WarehouseId,DepartmentId) select ItemId,@WarehouseId,@DepartmentId from StockReceiptVoucherDetails where MainDocId=@voucherId 
--exec dbo.UpdateItemQuantities @WarehouseId,@DepartmentId
	fetch next from Cur into @voucherId
end
close Cur
deallocate Cur


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	update JournalEntry
	set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SourceId in (select Id from @StockReceiptVoucherIds) and SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId
	update JournalEntryDetail
	set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId in (select Id from @StockReceiptVoucherIds) and SourcePageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId

	update ItemCostPrice
	set IsDeleted=1 where SystemPageId=@StockReceiptSourcePageId and SelectedId in (select Id from @StockReceiptVoucherIds)

	update PurchaseSaleSerialNumber
	set IsDeleted=1 where PageSourceId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PurchaseInvoice_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DocNum nvarchar(500),
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@VendorId int,
@Id int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [PurchaseInvoice].[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Warehouse].ArName as [Warehouse]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,[VoucherDate]
	  ,Vendor.ArName as Vendor
      ,[VendorOrCustomerId]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Total]
      ,[TotalItemsDiscount]
      ,[SalesTaxes]
       ,convert(nvarchar,[TotalAfterTaxes])"TotalAfterTaxes"
      ,[VoucherDiscountValue]
      ,[VoucherDiscountPercentage]
      ,[NetTotal]
      ,[Paid]
      ,[ValidityPeriod]
      ,[DeliveryPeriod]
      ,[CostCenterId]
      ,[CurrentQuantity]
      ,[DestinationWarehouseId]
      ,[SystemPage].ArName as [SystemPage]
      ,[SelectedId]
      ,[TotalCostPrice]
      ,[TotalItemDirectExpenses]
      ,[IsDelivered]
      ,[IsAccepted]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[IsLinked]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[IsCompleted]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[IsPosted]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[UserId]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[IsActive]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[IsDeleted]
      ,[AutoCreated]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[Notes]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[Image]
      ,[PurchaseInvoice].[UpdatedId]
  FROM [dbo].[PurchaseInvoice] left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=[PurchaseInvoice].BranchId
  left join Warehouse on Warehouse.Id=[PurchaseInvoice].WarehouseId
  left join Department on Department.Id=[PurchaseInvoice].DepartmentId
  left join Currency on Currency.Id=[PurchaseInvoice].CurrencyId
  left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=[PurchaseInvoice].SystemPageId
  left join Vendor on Vendor.Id=[PurchaseInvoice].VendorOrCustomerId
  where ((@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
  and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
  and (@DepartmentId is null or [PurchaseInvoice].DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
  and (@DocNum is null or [PurchaseInvoice].DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
  and (@VendorId is null or [PurchaseInvoice].VendorOrCustomerId=@VendorId)
  and (@Id is null or PurchaseInvoice.Id=@Id)
  and PurchaseInvoice.IsDeleted=0
  and PurchaseInvoice.IsActive=1)
END

declare PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethodsCur cursor for select PaymentMethodId,Amount,CashBoxId from PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods where PurchaseInvoiceId=@Id
declare @VendorName nvarchar(max)
open PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethodsCur
fetch next from PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethodsCur into @PaymentMethodId,@Amount,@CashBoxId
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
    if(@PaymentMethodId=1)
    begin
	set @accountId=(select AccountId from CashBox where Id=@CashBoxId)

	end
	else if (@PaymentMethodId=2)

	fetch next from PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethodsCur into @PaymentMethodId,@Amount,@CashBoxId

	DECLARE @AlteredPricesOut int
	DECLARE @AlteredPricesTable table(
	[ItemId] int,
	[Price1] money,
	[Price2] money,
	[Price3] money)
	EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @AlteredPricesOut OUT, @AlteredPrices
	INSERT INTO @AlteredPricesTable(
	[ItemId], [Price1] ,[Price2], [Price3])
	SELECT [ItemId], [Price1] ,[Price2], [Price3] FROM OPENXML (@AlteredPricesOut, '/DocumentElement/AlteredPrices', 2)
	WITH(
	[ItemId] int,
	[Price1] money,
	[Price2] money,
	[Price3] money)
	EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @AlteredPricesOut
	declare cur2 cursor for select distinct [ItemId] from @AlteredPricesTable 
	open cur2
	fetch next from cur2 into @ItemId
	while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
	begin
	update ItemPrice
	set Price=(select top 1 [Price1] from @AlteredPricesTable where [ItemId]=@ItemId) 
	where Id=(select Id from ItemPrice where ItemId= @ItemId and CustomerGroupId=1 )
	update ItemPrice
	set Price=(select top 1 [Price2] from @AlteredPricesTable where [ItemId]=@ItemId) 
	where Id=(select Id from ItemPrice where ItemId= @ItemId and CustomerGroupId=2 )
	update ItemPrice
	set Price=(select top 1 [Price3] from @AlteredPricesTable where [ItemId]=@ItemId) 
	where Id=(select Id from ItemPrice where ItemId= @ItemId and CustomerGroupId=3 )
	fetch next from cur2 into @ItemId
	end
	close cur2
	deallocate cur2
end

lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction PurchaseInvoice_Update;

        raiserror ('PurchaseInvoice_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

	@WarehouseId [int] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@VendorOrCustomerId [int] ,
	@CurrencyId [int] ,
	@CurrencyEquivalent [float] ,
	@Total [money] ,
	@TotalItemsDiscount [money] ,
	@SalesTaxes [money] ,
	@TotalAfterTaxes [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountValue [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountPercentage [float] ,
	@NetTotal [money] ,
	@Paid [money] ,
	@ValidityPeriod [float] ,
	@DeliveryPeriod [float] ,
	@CostPriceId [int] ,
	@CurrentQuantity [float] ,
	@DestinationWarehouseId [int] ,
	@SystemPageId [int] ,
	@SelectedId [int] ,
	@TotalCostPrice [money] ,
	@TotalItemDirectExpenses [money] ,
	@IsDelivered [bit] ,
	@IsAccepted [bit] ,
	@IsLinked [bit] ,
	@IsCompleted [bit] ,
	@IsPosted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@AutoCreated [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@UpdatedId [int],
	@CommercialRevenueTax money,
	@Details NTEXT
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction PurchaseOrder_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from PurchaseOrder where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

	----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
