CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PurchaseRequest_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DocNum nvarchar(500),
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@CustomerId int,
@Id int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [PurchaseRequest].[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Warehouse].ArName as [Warehouse]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,[VoucherDate]
	  ,Customer.ArName as Customer
      ,[VendorOrCustomerId]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Total]
      ,[ValidityPeriod]
      ,[DeliveryPeriod]
      ,[SystemPage].ArName as [SystemPage]
      ,[SelectedId]
      ,[TotalCostPrice]
      ,[IsDelivered]
      ,[IsAccepted]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[IsLinked]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[IsCompleted]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[IsPosted]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[UserId]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[IsActive]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[IsDeleted]
      ,[AutoCreated]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[Notes]
      ,[PurchaseRequest].[Image]
  FROM [dbo].[PurchaseRequest] left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=[PurchaseRequest].BranchId
  left join Warehouse on Warehouse.Id=[PurchaseRequest].WarehouseId
  left join Department on Department.Id=[PurchaseRequest].DepartmentId
  left join Currency on Currency.Id=[PurchaseRequest].CurrencyId
  left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=[PurchaseRequest].SystemPageId
  left join Customer on Customer.Id=[PurchaseRequest].VendorOrCustomerId
  where ((@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
  and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
  and (@DepartmentId is null or [PurchaseRequest].DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
  and (@DocNum is null or [PurchaseRequest].DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
  and (@CustomerId is null or [PurchaseRequest].VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)
  and (@Id is null or PurchaseRequest.Id=@Id)
  and PurchaseRequest.IsActive=1
  and PurchaseRequest.IsDeleted=0)
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PurchaseRequest_GetItems]--'<DocumentElement><PRIds><Id>5015</Id></PRIds></DocumentElement>',28
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@PRIds ntext,
@DepartmentId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @PRIdsOut int
declare @PRIdsTable table (Id int)

EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @PRIdsOut OUT, @PRIds
insert into @PRIdsTable (Id)
select Id from openxml (@PRIdsOut, '/DocumentElement/PRIds', 2)
with (Id int)
EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @PRIdsOut

;with PRItemsCte as(
select ItemId, ItemUnitId, Item.ArName ItemArName, Item.Code, Qty, ItemUnit.ArName ItemUnitArName, 0 Component,PurchaseRequestDetails.Width,PurchaseRequestDetails.Height,PurchaseRequestDetails.Area from PurchaseRequestDetails
inner join Item on Item.Id=PurchaseRequestDetails.ItemId
inner join ItemUnit on ItemUnit.Id=PurchaseRequestDetails.ItemUnitId
where MainDocId in (select Id from @PRIdsTable)
union all
select ChildItemId, ItemComponent.ItemUnitId, Item.ArName ItemArName, Item.Code, Quantity*Qty Qty, ItemUnit.ArName ItemUnitArName, 1 Component ,PurchaseRequestDetails.Width,PurchaseRequestDetails.Height,PurchaseRequestDetails.Area from ItemComponent
inner join ItemUnit on ItemUnit.Id=ItemComponent.ItemUnitId
inner join Item on Item.Id=ItemComponent.ChildItemId
inner join PurchaseRequestDetails on PurchaseRequestDetails.ItemId=ItemComponent.ParentItemId
where MainDocId in (select Id from @PRIdsTable)
)

select ItemId, ItemUnitId,  ItemArName, Code, SUM(Qty) Qty, ItemUnitArName, Component, dbo.Item_AvgCost(ItemId,@DepartmentId) AvgCost,Width,Height,Area from PRItemsCte
group by ItemId, ItemUnitId,  ItemArName, Code, ItemUnitArName, Component,Width,Height,Area
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PurchaseRequest_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@BranchId [int],
	@WarehouseId [int] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@VendorOrCustomerId [int] ,
	@CurrencyId [int] ,
	@CurrencyEquivalent [float] ,
	@Total [money] ,
	@ValidityPeriod [float] ,
	@DeliveryPeriod [float] ,
	@SystemPageId [int] ,
	@SelectedId [int] ,
	@IsDelivered [bit] ,
	@IsAccepted [bit] ,
	@IsLinked [bit] ,
	@IsCompleted [bit] ,
	@IsPosted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@AutoCreated [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@StatusId int,
	@IsApproved bit,
	@ApprovalDate datetime,
	@ApprovalUserId int,
	@ItemGroupId int,
	@Details NTEXT
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction PurchaseRequest_Insert;
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int, @SerialNumbersOut int, @PaymentMethodsOut int, @InstallmentDetailsOut int 
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from PurchaseRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
	
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PurchaseRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PurchaseRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PurchaseRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from PurchaseRequest where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[PurchaseRequestDepartmentQty] --'1-1-2019','9-5-2021',1

 @DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime ,@GroupId int
 as

  declare @x table (itemId int,arname nvarchar(max) ,Qty float,DepartmentId int)
 declare @y table (itemId int,arname nvarchar(max) ,dept1 float,dept2 float,dept3 float,dept4 float,dept5 float,dept6 float,dept7 float,dept8 float,dept9 float,dept10 float,dept11 float,dept12 float,allQty float)
 insert into @x 
 select itemId,item.arname, isnull(sum(Qty),0)Qty , DepartmentId from PurchaseRequestDetails 
 inner join PurchaseRequest on PurchaseRequest.Id=PurchaseRequestDetails.maindocId
 inner join item on PurchaseRequestDetails.itemId=item.id 
 where item.itemgroupid =@GroupId and PurchaseRequest.voucherDate between @dateFrom and @dateTo and PurchaseRequest.IsDeleted=0 and PurchaseRequest.IsActive=1 and PurchaseRequest.IsApproved=1and PurchaseRequest.DepartmentId!=28 
 group by item.arname,itemId, DepartmentId
 order by itemId
  declare itemcur cursor for select distinct(ItemId) from @x
  declare @itemid int
 OPEN itemcur  
FETCH NEXT FROM itemcur INTO @itemid  

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
     insert into @y 
	  select itemId,arname ,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=29 ),0)dept1 
 ,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=30 ),0)dept2,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=31),0)dept3
 ,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=32 ),0)dept4,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=33),0)dept5
 ,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=34 ),0)dept6,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=35),0)dept7
 ,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=36 ),0)dept8,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=37),0)dept9
 ,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=38),0)dept10,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=39),0)dept11
 ,isnull((select isnull(Qty,0) where DepartmentId=40),0)dept12
 ,isnull((select sum(qty)from @x where itemid=@itemid),0)

  from @x where itemid=@itemid order by itemId
      FETCH NEXT FROM itemcur INTO @itemid 
END 

CLOSE itemcur  
DEALLOCATE itemcur 
--select * from @y
select arname,itemId ,sum(dept1)dept1,sum(dept2)dept2,sum(dept3)dept3,sum(dept4)dept4,sum(dept5)dept5,sum(dept6)dept6,sum(dept7)dept7,sum(dept8)dept8,sum(dept9)dept9,sum(dept10)dept10,sum(dept11)dept11,sum(dept12)dept12
,max(allQty)allQty-- we use max to prevent sum of allQty becuse it is repeated in @y
,(select arname 'GroupName' from ItemGroup where id=@GroupId)Column11
 from @y
group by arname ,itemId
order by itemId


--select item.arname, dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(29,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo) dept1 , dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(30,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo) dept2, dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(31,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo) dept3
--, dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(32,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo)dept4 , dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(33,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo)dept5 , dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(34,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo) dept6
--, dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(35,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo)dept7, dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(36,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo)dept8, dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(37,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo)dept9 , dbo.GetPurchaseRequestItemQty(NULL,item.Id,@DateFrom,@DateTo)allQty,(select arname 'GroupName' from ItemGroup where id=@GroupId)

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PurchaseReturns_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@BranchId [int],
	@WarehouseId [int] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@VendorOrCustomerId [int] ,
	@CurrencyId [int] ,
	@CurrencyEquivalent [float] ,
	@Total [money] ,
	@TotalItemsDiscount [money] ,
	@SalesTaxes [money] ,
	@TotalAfterTaxes [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountValue [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountPercentage [float] ,
	@NetTotal [money] ,
	@Paid [money] ,
	@ValidityPeriod [float] ,
	@DeliveryPeriod [float] ,
	@CostCenterId [int] ,
	@CurrentQuantity [float] ,
	@DestinationWarehouseId [int] ,
	@SystemPageId [int] ,
	@SelectedId [int] ,
	@TotalCostPrice [money] ,
	@TotalItemDirectExpenses [money] ,
	@IsDelivered [bit] ,
	@IsAccepted [bit] ,
	@IsLinked [bit] ,
	@IsCompleted [bit] ,
	@IsPosted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@AutoCreated [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@UpdatedId [int],
	@Details NTEXT,
	@PaymentMethods NTEXT,
	@SerialNumbers NTEXT
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction PurchaseReturns_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int, @SerialNumbersOut int, @PaymentMethodsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [PurchaseReturns] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseReturns] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseReturns] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseReturns] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [PurchaseReturns] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

--DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [JournalEntry] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

--- Set Journal Entry DocumentsCoding -----------------
DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum nvarchar(max)
if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			
if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					set @i =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end
set @JournalEntryDocNum= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))

end
else
begin
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@RegistrationDate datetime,
	@RoomId int,
	@CustomerId int,
	@BookingStartDate datetime,
	@BookingEndDate datetime,
	@UserId int,
    @IsDeleted bit,

	@TaxPercentage float,
	@BookingEmployeeId int
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction RoomBooking_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@RegistrationDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@RegistrationDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@RegistrationDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomBooking] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomBooking] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(RegistrationDate))=(select MONTH(@RegistrationDate))and ((select YEAR(RegistrationDate))=(select YEAR(@RegistrationDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomBooking] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(RegistrationDate))=(select YEAR(@RegistrationDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomBooking] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomLeavePermission] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomLeavePermission] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomLeavePermission] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [RoomLeavePermission] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

	[Equivalent] ,

	[SourcePageId] ,

lbexit:
        if @trancount = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @trancount > 0
            rollback transaction RoomLeavePermission_Update;

        raiserror ('RoomLeavePermission_Update: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesInvoice_Delete]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int,
	@UserId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'SalesInvoice')
	declare @AlLChars nvarchar(100) = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'

	update SalesInvoice
	set IsDeleted=1 
	,UserId=@UserId
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where Id=@Id

	update SalesInvoiceDetails
	set IsDeleted=1 
	where MainDocId=@Id

	update SalesInvoiceItemDistribution
	set IsDeleted=1
	where SalesInvoiceId=@Id

	update JournalEntry
	set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SourceId=@Id and SourcePageId=@SourcePageId

	update JournalEntryDetail
	set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@Id and SourcePageId=@SourcePageId

	--declare @StockIssueVoucherId int =(select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id)
	DECLARE @StockIssueSourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockIssueVoucher')
	

	--EXEC StockIssueVoucher_Delete @StockIssueVoucherId,@UserId
	update StockIssueVoucher
	set IsDeleted=1 
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where Id in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id)

	update StockIssueVoucherDetails
	set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id)

	update JournalEntry
	set IsDeleted=1
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SourceId in(select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id) and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId
	
	update JournalEntryDetail
	set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId in (select Id from StockIssueVoucher where SystemPageId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id) and SourcePageId=@StockIssueSourcePageId

	update PurchaseSaleSerialNumber
	set IsDeleted=1 where PageSourceId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id

END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesInvoice_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DocNum nvarchar(500),
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@CustomerId int,
@Id int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [SalesInvoice].[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Warehouse].ArName as [Warehouse]
	  ,[Department].Id as [DepartmentId]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,[Department].PhoneNo as [DepartmentPhoneNo]
	  ,Department.EnName DepartmentEnName
	  ,Department.Address DepartmentAddress
      ,[VoucherDate]
	  --,Customer.ArName as Customer
	   , (iif((select PosId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id) is null, Customer.ArName ,(select ArName from PosCustomer where Id=(select PosCustomerId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id))))as Customer
      ,[VendorOrCustomerId]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Total]
      ,[TotalItemsDiscount]
      ,[SalesTaxes]
       ,(CAST( [TotalAfterTaxes] AS DECIMAL(18,1)))"TotalAfterTaxes" 
      ,[VoucherDiscountValue]
      ,[VoucherDiscountPercentage]
      ,[NetTotal]
      ,[Paid]
      ,[ValidityPeriod]
      ,[DeliveryPeriod]
      ,[CostCenterId]
      ,[CurrentQuantity]
      ,[DestinationWarehouseId]
      ,[SystemPage].ArName as [SystemPage]
      ,[SelectedId]
      ,[TotalCostPrice]
      ,[TotalItemDirectExpenses]
      ,[IsDelivered]
      ,[IsAccepted]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[IsLinked]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[IsCompleted]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[IsPosted]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[UserId]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[IsActive]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[IsDeleted]
      ,[AutoCreated]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[Notes]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[Image]
      ,[SalesInvoice].[UpdatedId]
	  ,[SalesInvoice].[DeliveryCost]
	  ,TotalAfterTotalInstallment
	  ,IsInstallmentPlan
	  ,[CustomerType]
	 -- ,Customer.[Mobile]
      , (iif((select PosId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id) is null, Customer.Mobile ,(select Mobile1 from PosCustomer where Id=(select PosCustomerId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id))))as Mobile
	  , (iif((select PosId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id) is null, Customer.[Address] ,(select [Address] from PosCustomer where Id=(select PosCustomerId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id))))as Address
	  --,Customer.[ArName] AS CustomerName
	  , (iif((select PosId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id) is null, Customer.ArName ,(select ArName from PosCustomer where Id=(select PosCustomerId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id))))as CustomerName

	  ,(select PaymentMethod.ArName from PaymentMethod where Id= (select top(1) PaymentMethodId From SalesInvoicePaymentMethods where SalesInvoiceId=@Id and Amount>0))as paymentMethod
	  ,(select top(1) TaxCardNumber from SystemSetting)TaxCardNumber
	  ,isnull(SmokingTax,0) SmokingTax
	  ,(select name from ERPUser where Id=(select UserId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id)) SalesManName
	  ,(select name from ERPUser where Id=(select UserId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id)) CashierName
	  ,(select ArName from [Table] where Id=(select TableId from SalesInvoice where Id=@Id)) TableName

  FROM [dbo].[SalesInvoice] left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=[SalesInvoice].BranchId
  left join Warehouse on Warehouse.Id=[SalesInvoice].WarehouseId
  left join Department on Department.Id=[SalesInvoice].DepartmentId
  left join Currency on Currency.Id=[SalesInvoice].CurrencyId
  left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=[SalesInvoice].SystemPageId
  left join Customer on Customer.Id=[SalesInvoice].VendorOrCustomerId
  where ((@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
  and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
  and (@DepartmentId is null or [SalesInvoice].DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
  and (@DocNum is null or [SalesInvoice].DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
  and (@CustomerId is null or [SalesInvoice].VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)
  and (@Id is null or SalesInvoice.Id=@Id)
  and SalesInvoice.IsActive=1
  and SalesInvoice.IsDeleted=0)
END

IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.VehicleStock','U') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
	IF EXISTS
	(
		SELECT 1
		FROM dbo.SalesInvoiceDetails d
		WHERE d.MainDocId = @Id
		  AND d.IsDeleted = 0
		  AND d.VehicleStockId IS NOT NULL
		  AND NOT EXISTS
		  (
			  SELECT 1
			  FROM dbo.VehicleStock vs
			  WHERE vs.Id = d.VehicleStockId
				AND vs.IsDeleted = 0
				AND vs.VehicleStatusId = 1
		  )
	)
	BEGIN
		ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
		RAISERROR('Invalid or unavailable VehicleStockId in SalesInvoice details.',16,1);
		RETURN;
	END;

	UPDATE vs
	   SET vs.VehicleStatusId = 3,
		   vs.SalesInvoiceId = @Id,
		   vs.SalesInvoiceDetailId = sid.Id,
		   vs.SalesDate = @VoucherDate,
		   vs.SalePrice = sid.Price,
		   vs.ItemId = sid.ItemId,
		   vs.EngineNo = sid.EngineNo,
		   vs.CarTypeId = sid.CarTypeId,
		   vs.CarModelId = sid.CarModelId,
		   vs.CarColorId = sid.CarColorId,
		   vs.ManufacturingYear = sid.ManufacturingYear,
		   vs.PlateNo = sid.PlateNo,
		   vs.VehicleNotes = sid.VehicleNotes,
		   vs.UpdatedDate = GETDATE()
	FROM dbo.VehicleStock vs
	INNER JOIN dbo.SalesInvoiceDetails sid
		ON sid.VehicleStockId = vs.Id
	   AND sid.MainDocId = @Id
	   AND sid.IsDeleted = 0
	WHERE vs.IsDeleted = 0;
END

-- Update salesInvoice With Sales And Collecting Commission 
if(@CustomerRepId is not null)
begin
declare @NoOfDays int =  DATEDIFF(DAY, @DueDate, (select PaidDate from SalesInvoicePaymentMethods where SalesInvoiceId=@Id and PaymentMethodId=2))
		,@SalesCommissionPercentage float= (select isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0) from CommissionSetting c where @Total>=c.MoneyAmountFrom and @Total<c.MoneyAmountTo)
		,@SalesCommissionValue money=(select isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where @Total>=c.MoneyAmountFrom and @Total<c.MoneyAmountTo)
		if(@NoOfDays<15)
		begin
		declare @CommissionSettingId int=(select c.Id from CommissionSetting c where @Total>=c.MoneyAmountFrom and @Total<c.MoneyAmountTo)
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionFifteenDays,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionFifteenDays,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else if(@NoOfDays>=15 or @NoOfDays<30)
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionMonth,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionMonth,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else if(@NoOfDays>=30 or @NoOfDays<60)
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionTwoMonths,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionTwoMonths,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else if(@NoOfDays>=60 or @NoOfDays<90)
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionThreeMonths,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionThreeMonths,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionMoreThanThreeMonths,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionMoreThanThreeMonths,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
end

if(@PosId is NULL)--do not create journal entry if the invoice is from pos
begin
--DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum int = isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [JournalEntry] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

--- Set Journal Entry DocumentsCoding -----------------
DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum nvarchar(max)
if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			
if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					set @i =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end
set @JournalEntryDocNum= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))

end
else
begin
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

declare @PaymentMethodId int, @Amount money,@CommissionAmount money, @CashBoxId int,@accountId int,@commissionAccountId int,@CommissionPercentage float
declare SalesInvoicePaymentMethodsCur cursor for select PaymentMethodId,Amount,CashBoxId from SalesInvoicePaymentMethods where SalesInvoiceId=@Id
declare @CustomerName nvarchar(max)
open SalesInvoicePaymentMethodsCur
fetch next from SalesInvoicePaymentMethodsCur into @PaymentMethodId,@Amount,@CashBoxId
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
    if(@PaymentMethodId=1)
    begin
	set @accountId=(select AccountId from CashBox where Id=@CashBoxId)
	set @CustomerName=null
	end
	else if (@PaymentMethodId=2)
	begin
	set @accountId=@CustomerAccountId
	set @CustomerName=(select ArName from Customer where Id=@VendorOrCustomerId)
	end
	else 
	begin
	set @accountId=(select AccountId from PaymentMethod where Id=@PaymentMethodId )	
	set @CustomerName=null
	end
	set @commissionAccountId=IsNULL((select CommissionAccountId from PaymentMethod where Id=@PaymentMethodId ),0)	
	set @CommissionPercentage=(select Commission from PaymentMethod where Id=@PaymentMethodId )	

	set @CommissionAmount=@Amount*(@CommissionPercentage/100)
	set @Amount=@Amount-@CommissionAmount

	Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId,Notes)
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@Amount,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@accountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,null,@CustomerName),
	(@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@CommissionAmount,0), 0,@CurrencyId,@CurrencyEquivalent,@commissionAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @Id, 0,0,1,null,null)

	fetch next from SalesInvoicePaymentMethodsCur into @PaymentMethodId,@Amount,@CashBoxId
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesInvoice_InstallmentToBePaid]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@CustomerId int,
@DateFrom date
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here

select DocumentNumber, VoucherDate, TotalAfterTotalInstallment, DueDate, SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails.Paid, Remaining, InstallmentAmount, ArName from SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails 
inner join SalesInvoice on SalesInvoice.Id=SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails.SalesInvoiceId
inner join Customer on Customer.Id=SalesInvoice.VendorOrCustomerId
where Remaining>0 and DueDate<=@DateFrom and SalesInvoice.IsDeleted=0 and IsInstallmentPlan=1 and (@CustomerId is null or SalesInvoice.VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)

END

IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.VehicleStock','U') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
	IF EXISTS
	(
		SELECT 1
		FROM dbo.SalesInvoiceDetails d
		WHERE d.MainDocId = @Id
		  AND d.IsDeleted = 0
		  AND d.VehicleStockId IS NOT NULL
		  AND NOT EXISTS
		  (
			  SELECT 1
			  FROM dbo.VehicleStock vs
			  WHERE vs.Id = d.VehicleStockId
				AND vs.IsDeleted = 0
				AND vs.VehicleStatusId = 1
		  )
	)
	BEGIN
		ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
		RAISERROR('Invalid or unavailable VehicleStockId in SalesInvoice details.',16,1);
		RETURN;
	END;

	UPDATE vs
	   SET vs.VehicleStatusId = 3,
		   vs.SalesInvoiceId = @Id,
		   vs.SalesInvoiceDetailId = sid.Id,
		   vs.SalesDate = @VoucherDate,
		   vs.SalePrice = sid.Price,
		   vs.ItemId = sid.ItemId,
		   vs.EngineNo = sid.EngineNo,
		   vs.CarTypeId = sid.CarTypeId,
		   vs.CarModelId = sid.CarModelId,
		   vs.CarColorId = sid.CarColorId,
		   vs.ManufacturingYear = sid.ManufacturingYear,
		   vs.PlateNo = sid.PlateNo,
		   vs.VehicleNotes = sid.VehicleNotes,
		   vs.UpdatedDate = GETDATE()
	FROM dbo.VehicleStock vs
	INNER JOIN dbo.SalesInvoiceDetails sid
		ON sid.VehicleStockId = vs.Id
	   AND sid.MainDocId = @Id
	   AND sid.IsDeleted = 0
	WHERE vs.IsDeleted = 0;
END

update SalesInvoicePaymentMethods

-- Update salesInvoice With Sales And Collecting Commission 
if(@CustomerRepId is not null)
begin
declare @NoOfDays int =  DATEDIFF(DAY, @DueDate, (select PaidDate from SalesInvoicePaymentMethods where SalesInvoiceId=@Id and PaymentMethodId=2))
		,@SalesCommissionPercentage float= (select isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0) from CommissionSetting c where @Total>=c.MoneyAmountFrom and @Total<c.MoneyAmountTo)
		,@SalesCommissionValue money=(select isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where @Total>=c.MoneyAmountFrom and @Total<c.MoneyAmountTo)
		if(@NoOfDays<15)
		begin
		declare @CommissionSettingId int=(select c.Id from CommissionSetting c where @Total>=c.MoneyAmountFrom and @Total<c.MoneyAmountTo)
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionFifteenDays,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionFifteenDays,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else if(@NoOfDays>=15 or @NoOfDays<30)
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionMonth,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionMonth,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else if(@NoOfDays>=30 or @NoOfDays<60)
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionTwoMonths,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionTwoMonths,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else if(@NoOfDays>=60 or @NoOfDays<90)
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionThreeMonths,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionThreeMonths,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
		else
		begin
		update SalesInvoice 
		set SalesCommissionPercentage=@SalesCommissionPercentage
		,SalesCommissionValue=@SalesCommissionValue
		,CollectingCommissionPercentage=(select isnull(c.CommissionMoreThanThreeMonths,0)/100 from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		,CollectingCommissionValue=(select isnull(c.CommissionMoreThanThreeMonths,0)/100 *isnull(c.CommissionPercentage,0)/100*@Total from CommissionSetting c where c.Id=@CommissionSettingId)
		where Id=@Id 
        end
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[SalesInvoiceDepartmentQty] 

 @DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime ,@GroupId int ,@View int
 as

 if(@View=1)
	begin
  declare @Details table(ArName nvarchar(max),ItemId int,Qty float,DepartmentId int,VoucherDate datetime)
insert into @Details
select Item.ArName, SalesInvoiceDetails.ItemId,Qty,SalesInvoice.DepartmentId,SalesInvoice.VoucherDate from SalesInvoiceDetails  inner join SalesInvoice on SalesInvoice.Id=SalesInvoiceDetails.maindocId 
inner join Item on SalesInvoiceDetails.ItemId=Item.Id 

	where Item.ItemGroupId=@GroupId and SalesInvoiceDetails.IsDeleted=0 
	and SalesInvoice.voucherDate between @dateFrom and @dateTo 
	and SalesInvoice.IsDeleted=0 and SalesInvoice.IsActive=1  and SalesInvoice.DepartmentId!=28 
	
	select arname ,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=29)dept1,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=30)dept2
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=31)dept3,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=32)dept4
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=33)dept5,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=34)dept6
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=35)dept7,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=36)dept8
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=37)dept9,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=38)dept10
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=39)dept11,( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=40)dept12,
	( select IsNULL(Sum(Qty),0)from @Details where dd.ItemId=ItemId )allQty,(select arname  from ItemGroup where id=@GroupId)GroupName
	,ItemId
	
	from @Details dd
Group by arname ,ItemId
end
else
begin
declare @Details0 table(ArName nvarchar(max),ItemId int,ValueOfItem float,DepartmentId int,VoucherDate datetime)
insert into @Details0
select Item.ArName, SalesInvoiceDetails.ItemId,(Qty*Price) as ValueOfItem,SalesInvoice.DepartmentId,SalesInvoice.VoucherDate 
from SalesInvoiceDetails  inner join SalesInvoice on SalesInvoice.Id=SalesInvoiceDetails.maindocId 
inner join Item on SalesInvoiceDetails.ItemId=Item.Id 

	where Item.ItemGroupId=@GroupId and SalesInvoiceDetails.IsDeleted=0 
	and SalesInvoice.voucherDate between @dateFrom and @dateTo 
	and SalesInvoice.IsDeleted=0 and SalesInvoice.IsActive=1  and SalesInvoice.DepartmentId!=28 
	
	select arname ,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=29)dept1,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=30)dept2
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=31)dept3,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=32)dept4
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=33)dept5,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=34)dept6
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=35)dept7,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=36)dept8
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=37)dept9,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=38)dept10
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=39)dept11,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId and  DepartmentId=40)dept12
	,( select IsNULL(Sum(ValueOfItem),0)from @Details0 where dd.ItemId=ItemId )allQty,(select arname  from ItemGroup where id=@GroupId)GroupName
	,ItemId
	
	from @Details0 dd
Group by arname ,ItemId
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesInvoiceInstallmentActualPayment_Delete]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@Id int
AS
BEGIN try
begin tran
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @tempTable table(
	[Id] [int] ,
	[SalesInvoiceId] [int] NOT NULL,
	[DueDate] [date] NOT NULL,
	[InstallmentAmount] [money] NOT NULL,
	[Paid] [money] NOT NULL,
	[Remaining] [money] NOT NULL,
	[Notes] [nvarchar](300) NULL)
declare @amount money = (select Amount from SalesInvoiceInstallmentActualPayment where Id=@Id)
declare @salesInvoiceId int=(select SalesInvoiceId from SalesInvoiceInstallmentActualPayment where Id=@Id)
declare @CashboxId int =(select CashboxId from SalesInvoiceInstallmentActualPayment where Id=@Id)
DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'SalesInvoice')
declare @JournalEntryId int = (select top (1)[Id] from [dbo].[JournalEntry] WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@salesInvoiceId)
DECLARE @CustomerAccountId int=(select CustomersAccountId from Department where [Id]=(select DepartmentId from SalesInvoice where Id=@salesInvoiceId))
declare @CashboxAccountId int =(select AccountId from CashBox where Id=@CashboxId)

update JournalEntryDetail
set Debit=Debit-@amount
where JournalEntryId=@JournalEntryId and AccountId=@CashboxAccountId

update JournalEntryDetail
set Debit=Debit+@amount
where JournalEntryId=@JournalEntryId and AccountId=@CustomerAccountId

while @amount!=0
begin
delete from @tempTable
insert into @tempTable select top 1 Id, SalesInvoiceId,DueDate,InstallmentAmount,Paid,Remaining,Notes from SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails where Paid>0 and SalesInvoiceId=@salesInvoiceId order by [DueDate] desc

if @amount > (select Paid from @tempTable)
begin
update SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails set Paid=0, Remaining=InstallmentAmount where Id=(select Id from @tempTable)
set @amount=@amount-(select Paid from @tempTable)
end
else
begin
update SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails set Paid=Paid- @amount, Remaining=InstallmentAmount-Paid+@amount where Id=(select Id from @tempTable)
set @amount=0
end
end

delete from SalesInvoiceInstallmentActualPayment where Id=@Id

commit tran
end try
begin catch
rollback tran
end catch

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesInvoiceInstallmentActualPayment_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@SalesInvoiceId int,
@Date date,
@Amount money,
@CashboxId int
AS
BEGIN try
begin tran
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
INSERT INTO [dbo].[SalesInvoiceInstallmentActualPayment]
           ([SalesInvoiceId]
           ,[Date]
           ,[Amount]
           ,[CashboxId])
     VALUES
           (@SalesInvoiceId ,
@Date ,
@Amount ,
@CashboxId)

declare @paid money=@Amount
declare @tempTable table(
	[Id] [int] ,
	[SalesInvoiceId] [int] NOT NULL,
	[DueDate] [date] NOT NULL,
	[InstallmentAmount] [money] NOT NULL,
	[Paid] [money] NOT NULL,
	[Remaining] [money] NOT NULL,
	[Notes] [nvarchar](300) NULL)
while @paid!=0
begin
delete from @tempTable
insert into @tempTable select top 1 Id, SalesInvoiceId,DueDate,InstallmentAmount,Paid,Remaining,Notes from SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails where Paid<InstallmentAmount and SalesInvoiceId=@SalesInvoiceId order by [DueDate]

set @paid=@paid+ (select Paid from @tempTable)

if @paid > (select InstallmentAmount from @tempTable)
begin
update SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails set Paid=InstallmentAmount, Remaining=0 where Id=(select Id from @tempTable)
set @paid=@paid-(select InstallmentAmount from @tempTable)
end
else
begin
update SalesInvoiceInstallmentDetails set Paid=@paid, Remaining=InstallmentAmount-@paid where Id=(select Id from @tempTable)
set @paid=0
end
end

DECLARE @CustomerAccountId int=(select CustomersAccountId from Department where [Id]=(select DepartmentId from SalesInvoice where Id=@SalesInvoiceId))
DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'SalesInvoice')
declare @JournalEntryId int = (select top (1)[Id] from [dbo].[JournalEntry] WHERE [SourcePageId]=@SourcePageId AND [SourceId]=@SalesInvoiceId)
declare @CashboxAccountId int =(select AccountId from CashBox where Id=@CashboxId)
update JournalEntryDetail
set Debit=Debit-@Amount
where JournalEntryId=@JournalEntryId and AccountId=@CustomerAccountId

if exists (select * from JournalEntryDetail where JournalEntryId=@JournalEntryId and AccountId=@CashboxAccountId)
begin
update JournalEntryDetail
set Debit=Debit+@Amount
where JournalEntryId=@JournalEntryId and AccountId=@CashboxAccountId
end
else
begin
insert into JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	values (@JournalEntryId, ISNULL(@Amount,0), 0,null,null,@CashboxAccountId,	@SourcePageId, @SalesInvoiceId, 0,0,1)
end

commit tran
end try
begin catch
rollback tran
end catch

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesOrder_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DocNum nvarchar(500),
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@CustomerId int,
@Id int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [SalesOrder].[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Warehouse].ArName as [Warehouse]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
	  ,Department.EnName DepartmentEnName
      ,[VoucherDate]
	  ,Customer.ArName as Customer
      ,[VendorOrCustomerId]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Total]
      ,[TotalItemsDiscount]
      ,[SalesTaxes]
       ,convert(nvarchar,[TotalAfterTaxes])"TotalAfterTaxes"
      ,[VoucherDiscountValue]
      ,[VoucherDiscountPercentage]
      ,[NetTotal]
      ,[Paid]
      ,[DestinationWarehouseId]
      ,[SystemPage].ArName as [SystemPage]
      ,[SelectedId]
      ,[TotalCostPrice]
      ,[TotalItemDirectExpenses]
      ,[IsDelivered]
      ,[IsAccepted]
      ,[SalesOrder].[IsLinked]
      ,[SalesOrder].[IsCompleted]
      ,[SalesOrder].[IsPosted]
      ,[SalesOrder].[UserId]
      ,[SalesOrder].[IsActive]
      ,[SalesOrder].[IsDeleted]
      ,[AutoCreated]
      ,[SalesOrder].[Notes]
      ,[SalesOrder].[Image]
      ,[SalesOrder].[UpdatedId]
	  ,[CustomerType]
	  ,Customer.[Mobile]
	  ,Customer.[Address]
	  ,ERPUser.Name EmpName
  FROM [dbo].[SalesOrder] left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=[SalesOrder].BranchId
  left join Warehouse on Warehouse.Id=[SalesOrder].WarehouseId
  left join Department on Department.Id=[SalesOrder].DepartmentId
  left join Currency on Currency.Id=[SalesOrder].CurrencyId
  left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=[SalesOrder].SystemPageId
  left join Customer on Customer.Id=[SalesOrder].VendorOrCustomerId
  left join ERPUser on ERPUser.Id=[SalesOrder].UserId
  where ((@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
  and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
  and (@DepartmentId is null or [SalesOrder].DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
  and (@DocNum is null or [SalesOrder].DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
  and (@CustomerId is null or [SalesOrder].VendorOrCustomerId=@CustomerId)
  and (@Id is null or SalesOrder.Id=@Id)
  and SalesOrder.IsActive=1
  and SalesOrder.IsDeleted=0)
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesOrder_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@BranchId [int],
	@WarehouseId [int] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@VendorOrCustomerId [int] ,
	@CurrencyId [int] ,
	@CurrencyEquivalent [float] ,
	@Total [money] ,
	@TotalItemsDiscount [money] ,
	@SalesTaxes [money] ,
	@TotalAfterTaxes [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountValue [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountPercentage [float] ,
	@NetTotal [money] ,
	@Paid [money] ,
	@DestinationWarehouseId [int] ,
	@SystemPageId [int] ,
	@SelectedId [int] ,
	@TotalCostPrice [money] ,
	@TotalItemDirectExpenses [money] ,
	@CommercialRevenueTax [money],
	@IsDelivered [bit] ,
	@IsAccepted [bit] ,
	@IsLinked [bit] ,
	@IsCompleted [bit] ,
	@IsPosted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@AutoCreated [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@UpdatedId [int],
	@DeliveredTo [nvarchar](500),
	@Details NTEXT,
	@PaymentMethods NTEXT,
	@ServiceFees money,
	@CustomerType int,
	@DeliverDate datetime,
	@PosId int,
	@CashierUserId int,
	@ShiftId int,
	@IsCollected bit,
	@IsClosed bit,
	@ReservationMethodId int,
	@AdministrativeDepartmentId int,
	@SatusId int,
    @CartId int,
	@CustomerAddressId int,
	@CustomerRepId [int] ,
	@DeliveryCost money,
    @RefundableInsurance money,
	@PosCustomerId int
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction SalesOrder_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int, @PaymentMethodsOut int
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select top(1) [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'SalesOrder')
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [SalesOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

	----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesOrder] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end
