CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesQuotation_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@BranchId [int],
	@WarehouseId [int] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@VendorOrCustomerId [int] ,
	@CurrencyId [int] ,
	@CurrencyEquivalent [float] ,
	@Total [money] ,
	@TotalItemsDiscount [money] ,
	@SalesTaxes [money] ,
	@TotalAfterTaxes [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountValue [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountPercentage [float] ,
	@NetTotal [money] ,
	@Paid [money] ,
	@ValidityPeriod [float] ,
	@DeliveryPeriod [float] ,
	@CostPriceId [int] ,
	@CurrentQuantity [float] ,
	@DestinationWarehouseId [int] ,
	@SystemPageId [int] ,
	@SelectedId [int] ,
	@TotalCostPrice [money] ,
	@TotalItemDirectExpenses [money] ,
	@IsDelivered [bit] ,
	@IsAccepted [bit] ,
	@IsLinked [bit] ,
	@IsCompleted [bit] ,
	@IsPosted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@AutoCreated [bit] ,
	@CostPriceChecked [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@UpdatedId [int],
	@Details NTEXT,
	@CustomerRepId [int] 
AS
BEGIN TRAN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [SalesQuotation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesQuotation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesQuotation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesQuotation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [SalesQuotation] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesReturn_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DocNum nvarchar(500),
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@Id int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT SalesReturns.[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Warehouse].ArName as [Warehouse]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,[VoucherDate]
	  ,Customer.ArName as Customer
      ,[VendorOrCustomerId]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,convert(nvarchar,TotalAfterTaxes)"TotalAfterTaxes"
	  ,ERPUser.UserName
	  ,Employee.ArName as EmployeeName
	 
      
  FROM [dbo].SalesReturns left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=SalesReturns.BranchId and Branch.IsDeleted=0 and Branch.IsActive=1
  left join Warehouse on Warehouse.Id=SalesReturns.WarehouseId and Warehouse.IsDeleted=0 and Warehouse.IsActive=1
  left join Department on Department.Id=SalesReturns.DepartmentId and Department.IsDeleted=0 and Department.IsActive=1
  left join Currency on Currency.Id=SalesReturns.CurrencyId
  left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=SalesReturns.SystemPageId
  left join Customer on Customer.Id=SalesReturns.VendorOrCustomerId and Customer.IsDeleted=0 and Customer.IsActive=1
  left join ERPUser  on ERPUser.Id=SalesReturns.UserId and ERPUser.IsDeleted=0 and ERPUser.IsActive=1
  left join Employee  on ERPUser.EmployeeId=Employee.Id and SalesReturns.UserId=ERPUser.Id and Employee.IsDeleted=0 and Employee.IsActive=1
  where 
 
 ((@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
  and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
  and (@DepartmentId is null or SalesReturns.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
  and (@DocNum is null or SalesReturns.DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
  and (@Id is null or SalesReturns.Id=@Id) 
  and SalesReturns.IsDeleted=0 and SalesReturns.IsActive=1)
    order by [VoucherDate] 
END

AS
BEGIN

DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'SalesReturns')
declare @AlLChars nvarchar(100) = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'

set IsDeleted=1 where PageSourceId=@SourcePageId and SelectedId=@Id

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SalesReturns_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@BranchId [int],
	@WarehouseId [int] ,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@VendorOrCustomerId [int] ,
	@CurrencyId [int] ,
	@CurrencyEquivalent [float] ,
	@Total [money] ,
	@TotalItemsDiscount [money] ,
	@SalesTaxes [money] ,
	@TotalAfterTaxes [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountValue [money] ,
	@VoucherDiscountPercentage [float] ,
	@NetTotal [money] ,
	@Paid [money] ,
	@ValidityPeriod [float] ,
	@DeliveryPeriod [float] ,
	@CostCenterId [int] ,
	@CurrentQuantity [float] ,
	@DestinationWarehouseId [int] ,
	@SystemPageId [int] ,
	@SelectedId [int] ,
	@TotalCostPrice [money] ,
	@TotalItemDirectExpenses [money] ,
	@IsDelivered [bit] ,
	@IsAccepted [bit] ,
	@IsLinked [bit] ,
	@IsCompleted [bit] ,
	@IsPosted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int] ,
	@IsActive [bit] ,
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@AutoCreated [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@UpdatedId [int],
	@Details NTEXT,
	@PaymentMethods NTEXT,
	@SerialNumbers NTEXT,
	@PosId int,
	@CashierUserId int,
	@ShiftId int,
	@IsCollected bit,
	@IsClosed bit,
	@CustomerRepId [int],
	@SalesInvoiceId int,
	@ServiceFees money,
	@DeliveryCost money,
    @RefundableInsurance money,
	@PosCustomerId int,
	@CustomerType int
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @trancount int;
    set @trancount = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction SalesReturns_Insert;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @DetailsOut int,@SerialNumbersOut int, @PaymentMethodsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [SalesReturns] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'SalesReturns')

----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from SalesReturns where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from SalesReturns where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from SalesReturns where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from SalesReturns where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

@serviceCatId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

declare @ids table ([Id] int)

while @FirstChildId is not null
 begin

 end
select * from ServicesCategory where Id in (select Id from @ids) or [Id]=@serviceCatId and IsDeleted=0
order by ParentId

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ServiceCompanyFees]
@ServiceId int,
@AllowDiscount bit
as
Declare @ServiceCompanyPercentage money=(select isnull(CompanyPercentage,0) from [dbo].[Service] where Id=@ServiceId)
Declare @OrderFeesPercentage money=(select isnull(OrderFeesPercentage,0) from [dbo].[ServiceSettings])

if (@AllowDiscount=1 and @ServiceCompanyPercentage!=0 and @ServiceCompanyPercentage!=100)
begin
set @Price=@Price/2
end
Declare @ServicePrice money=@PointValue*@Price
Declare @ServiceOrderFees money
 
 
 if (@ServiceCompanyPercentage!=0 and @ServiceCompanyPercentage!=100)
 begin

 end
 else 
 begin
 set  @ServiceOrderFees =0
 end
Declare @ServiceCompanyFees money=(@ServiceCompanyPercentage/100)*@ServicePrice+@ServiceOrderFees

select 
 isnull(@ServiceCompanyFees,0) as ServiceCompanyFees

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ServiceInvoice_Get]
    @Id int
AS
BEGIN
    SELECT [ServiceInvoice].[Id],
          [DocumentNumber],
          [Department].Id as [DepartmentId],
          [Department].ArName as [Department],
          [Department].PhoneNo as [DepartmentPhoneNo],
          Department.EnName DepartmentEnName,
          Department.Address DepartmentAddress,
          [VoucherDate],
          [Currency].ArName as [Currency],
          [CurrencyEquivalent],
          [Total],
          [SalesTaxes],
          (CAST([TotalAfterTaxes] AS DECIMAL(18,1))) "TotalAfterTaxes",
          [VoucherDiscountValue],
          [VoucherDiscountPercentage],
          [NetTotal],
          [CostCenterId],
          [SystemPage].ArName as [SystemPage],
          [SelectedId],
          [TotalItemDirectExpenses],
          [IsDelivered],
          [IsAccepted],
          [ServiceInvoice].[IsLinked],
          [ServiceInvoice].[IsCompleted],
          [ServiceInvoice].[IsPosted],
          [ServiceInvoice].[UserId],
          [ServiceInvoice].[IsActive],
          [ServiceInvoice].[IsDeleted],
          [AutoCreated],
          [ServiceInvoice].[Notes],
          [ServiceInvoice].[Image],
          (select PaymentMethod.ArName from PaymentMethod where Id = (select top(1) PaymentMethodId From ServiceInvoicePaymentMethod where ServiceInvoiceId = @Id and Amount > 0)) as paymentMethod,
          (select name from ERPUser where Id = (select UserId from ServiceInvoice where Id = @Id)) SalesManName,
          (select name from ERPUser where Id = (select UserId from ServiceInvoice where Id = @Id)) CashierName,
          ci.ArName CustomerArCity,
          Co.ArName CustomerArCountry,
          ci.EnName CustomerEnCity,
          Co.EnName CustomerEnCountry,
          [CustomerId],
          Customer.ArName CustomerArName,
          Customer.EnName CustomerEnName,
          Customer.BuildingNo CustomerBuildingNo,
          Customer.Address CustomerAddress,
          Customer.PostOfficeBox CustomerPostOfficeBox,
          Customer.RegistrationNo CustomerRegistrationNo,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(Customer.VATNumber, ''), NULLIF(Customer.TaxNumber, '')) CustomerTaxNumber,
          Customer.Mobile CustomerMobile,
          Customer.PhoneNo CustomerPhoneNo,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(Company.InsuranceNumber, ''), SystemSetting.CommercialRegistrationNo) CommercialRegistrationNo,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(Company.TaxNumber, ''), SystemSetting.TaxCardNumber) TaxCardNumber,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(Company.ArName, ''), SystemSetting.CompanyArName) CompanyArName,
          COALESCE(NULLIF(Company.EnName, ''), SystemSetting.CompanyEnName) CompanyEnName,
          SystemSetting.StreetArName,
          SystemSetting.StreetEnName,
          (select c.ArName from Country c where c.Id = SystemSetting.CountryId) CountryArName,
          (select c.EnName from Country c where c.Id = SystemSetting.CountryId) CountryEnName,
          (select c.ArName from City c where c.Id = SystemSetting.CityId) CityArName,
          (select c.EnName from City c where c.Id = SystemSetting.CityId) CityEnName
    FROM [dbo].[ServiceInvoice]
    LEFT JOIN Department on Department.Id = [ServiceInvoice].DepartmentId
    LEFT JOIN Company on Company.Id = Department.CompanyId and Company.IsDeleted = 0
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP (1) * FROM SystemSetting) SystemSetting
    LEFT JOIN Currency on Currency.Id = [ServiceInvoice].CurrencyId
    LEFT JOIN SystemPage on SystemPage.Id = [ServiceInvoice].SystemPageId
    LEFT JOIN Customer on Customer.Id = [ServiceInvoice].CustomerId
    LEFT JOIN City ci on Customer.CityId = ci.Id
    LEFT JOIN Country co on Customer.CountryId = co.Id
    WHERE ((@Id is null or ServiceInvoice.Id = @Id)
      and ServiceInvoice.IsActive = 1
      and ServiceInvoice.IsDeleted = 0)
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ServiceInvoice_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int output,
	@DepartmentId [int] ,
	@VoucherDate [datetime] ,
	@CustomerId	int	,
	@CurrencyId	int	,
    @CurrencyEquivalent	float ,
	@Total money ,
	@SalesTaxes money,
	@TotalAfterTaxes money,
	@VoucherDiscountValue money,
	@VoucherDiscountPercentage float,
	@NetTotal money,
	@CostCenterId int ,
	@TotalItemDirectExpenses money,
	@CommercialRevenueTaxAmount money,
	@UserId [int],
	@IsDeleted [bit] ,
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max) ,
	@PaymentType	int,
    @CustomerRepId	int,
    @DueDate	datetime,
	@Details NTEXT,
	@PaymentMethods NTEXT

AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @tran int;
    set @tran = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @tran = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction ServiceInvoice_Insert;

			----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from ServiceInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from ServiceInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from ServiceInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from ServiceInvoice where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

INSERT INTO [dbo].[JournalEntry]
           ([DocumentNumber]
           ,[BranchId]

           ,[SourceId]

           (Cast( @JournalEntryDocNum as nvarchar(max))

           ,@SourcePageId
           ,@Id
           ,1
           ,0
           ,0
           ,@UserId
           ,@DepartmentId
           ,@CurrencyId
           ,@CurrencyEquivalent)

declare @JournalEntryId int = (select MAX(Id) from [dbo].[JournalEntry])

DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail table(
	[JournalEntryId] [int] NULL,
	[Debit] [money] NULL,
	[Credit] [money] NULL,
	[CurrencyId] [int] NULL,
	[Equivalent] [float] NULL,
	[AccountId] [int] NULL,
	[SourcePageId] [int] NULL,
	[SourceId] [int] NULL,
	[IsPosted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsDeleted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsActive] [bit] NULL,
	CostCenterId int,Notes nvarchar(max))

declare @PaymentMethodId int, @Amount money,@CommissionAmount money,@accountId int,@commissionAccountId int,@CommissionPercentage float
declare ServiceInvoicePaymentMethodsCur cursor for select PaymentMethodId,Amount,CashBoxId from ServiceInvoicePaymentMethod where ServiceInvoiceId=@Id
declare @CustomerName nvarchar(max)
open ServiceInvoicePaymentMethodsCur
fetch next from ServiceInvoicePaymentMethodsCur into @PaymentMethodId,@Amount,@CashBoxId
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
    if(@PaymentMethodId=1)
    begin
	set @accountId=(select AccountId from CashBox where Id=@CashBoxId)
	set @CustomerName=null
	end
	else if (@PaymentMethodId=2)
	begin
	set @accountId=@CustomerAccountId
	set @CustomerName=(select ArName from Customer where Id=@CustomerId)
	end
	else 
	begin
	set @accountId=(select AccountId from PaymentMethod where Id=@PaymentMethodId )	
	set @CustomerName=null
	end
	set @commissionAccountId=IsNULL((select CommissionAccountId from PaymentMethod where Id=@PaymentMethodId ),0)	
	set @CommissionPercentage=(select Commission from PaymentMethod where Id=@PaymentMethodId )	

	set @CommissionAmount=@Amount*(@CommissionPercentage/100)
	set @Amount=@Amount-@CommissionAmount

	Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive],
	CostCenterId,Notes)

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.ServiceInvoiceActualPayment_SaveForCashReceipt
    @CashReceiptVoucherId int,
    @Payments ntext,
    @UserId int
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET XACT_ABORT ON;

    DECLARE @TranCount int = @@TRANCOUNT;

    BEGIN TRY
        IF @TranCount = 0
            BEGIN TRANSACTION;
        ELSE
            SAVE TRANSACTION SvcInvPaySave;

        UPDATE pm
        SET pm.PaidAmount = CASE
                                WHEN ISNULL(pm.PaidAmount, 0) - ISNULL(p.Amount, 0) < 0 THEN 0
                                ELSE ISNULL(pm.PaidAmount, 0) - ISNULL(p.Amount, 0)
                            END
        FROM dbo.ServiceInvoicePaymentMethod pm
        INNER JOIN dbo.ServiceInvoiceActualPayment p
            ON p.ServiceInvoiceId = pm.ServiceInvoiceId
        WHERE p.CashReceiptVoucherId = @CashReceiptVoucherId
          AND pm.PaymentMethodId = 2;

        DELETE FROM dbo.ServiceInvoiceActualPayment
        WHERE CashReceiptVoucherId = @CashReceiptVoucherId;

        DECLARE @XmlHandle int;
        EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @XmlHandle OUTPUT, @Payments;

        DECLARE @Incoming TABLE
        (
            ServiceInvoiceId int NULL,
            ServiceInvoiceDate datetime NULL,
            ServiceInvoiceDocNumber nvarchar(500) NULL,
            Amount money NULL,
            PaymentDate datetime NULL,
            Notes nvarchar(max) NULL,
            NetAmountRemain money NULL
        );

        INSERT INTO @Incoming
        (
            ServiceInvoiceId,
            ServiceInvoiceDate,
            ServiceInvoiceDocNumber,
            Amount,
            PaymentDate,
            Notes,
            NetAmountRemain
        )
        SELECT
            ServiceInvoiceId,
            SalesInvoiceDate,
            SalesInvoiceDocNumber,
            Amount,
            PaymentDate,
            Notes,
            NetAmountRemain
        FROM OPENXML(@XmlHandle, '/DocumentElement/SalesInvoiceActualPayment', 2)
        WITH
        (
            ServiceInvoiceId int,
            SalesInvoiceDate datetime,
            SalesInvoiceDocNumber nvarchar(500),
            Amount money,
            PaymentDate datetime,
            Notes nvarchar(max),
            NetAmountRemain money
        )
        WHERE ISNULL(Amount, 0) > 0
          AND ServiceInvoiceId IS NOT NULL;

        EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @XmlHandle;

        IF EXISTS
        (
            SELECT 1
            FROM @Incoming i
            INNER JOIN dbo.ServiceInvoicePaymentMethod pm
                ON pm.ServiceInvoiceId = i.ServiceInvoiceId
               AND pm.PaymentMethodId = 2
            WHERE ISNULL(i.Amount, 0) > ISNULL(pm.Amount, 0) - ISNULL(pm.PaidAmount, 0) + 0.01
        )
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR(N'Service invoice payment cannot exceed remaining amount.', 16, 1);
            RETURN;
        END

        INSERT INTO dbo.ServiceInvoiceActualPayment
        (
            ServiceInvoiceId,
            ServiceInvoiceDate,
            ServiceInvoiceDocNumber,
            CashReceiptVoucherId,
            Amount,
            PaymentDate,
            UserId,
            IsActive,
            IsDeleted,
            Notes,
            NetAmountRemain
        )
        SELECT
            ServiceInvoiceId,
            ServiceInvoiceDate,
            ServiceInvoiceDocNumber,
            @CashReceiptVoucherId,
            Amount,
            PaymentDate,
            @UserId,
            1,
            0,
            Notes,
            NetAmountRemain
        FROM @Incoming;

        UPDATE pm
        SET pm.PaidAmount = ISNULL(pm.PaidAmount, 0) + ISNULL(i.Amount, 0),
            pm.PaidDate = i.PaymentDate
        FROM dbo.ServiceInvoicePaymentMethod pm
        INNER JOIN @Incoming i
            ON i.ServiceInvoiceId = pm.ServiceInvoiceId
        WHERE pm.PaymentMethodId = 2;

        IF @TranCount = 0
            COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        DECLARE @Error int, @Message nvarchar(4000), @XState int;
        SELECT @Error = ERROR_NUMBER(),
               @Message = ERROR_MESSAGE() + N' at ' + CAST(ERROR_LINE() AS nvarchar(50)),
               @XState = XACT_STATE();

        IF @XState = -1
            ROLLBACK;
        IF @XState = 1 AND @TranCount = 0
            ROLLBACK;
        IF @XState = 1 AND @TranCount > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION SvcInvPaySave;

        RAISERROR(N'ServiceInvoiceActualPayment_SaveForCashReceipt: %d: %s', 16, 1, @Error, @Message);
    END CATCH
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Shareholder_BalanceSheet] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@ShareholderId int,
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @ExpensesAccountId int=(select [ExpensesAccountId] from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
declare @RevenueAccountId int=(select [RevenueAccountId] from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)

truncate table [dbo].[BalanceStatement]
exec BalanceStatement_Insert @DateFrom, @DateTo, @DepartmentId

declare @Revenue money=(select ABS(BalanceDebit-BalanceCredit) from BalanceStatement where Id=@RevenueAccountId)
declare @Expenses money=(select ABS(BalanceDebit-BalanceCredit) from BalanceStatement where Id=@ExpensesAccountId)
declare @Profit money= isnull(@Revenue,0)-isnull(@Expenses,0)

declare @parameterPeriod int=(select DATEDIFF(DAY,@DateFrom,@DateTo))
declare @equityCapital money=(select [dbo].[GetEquityCapital](@DepartmentId,@DateFrom,@DateTo))

;with ShareholderEquityCTE
as(
select N'سند قبض' DocType, N'المدفوعات' [In], ShareHolder.Id, DocumentNumber, [Date], Code, ArName, MoneyAmount, DATEDIFF(DAY,[Date],@DateTo) Period, MoneyAmount/@equityCapital AdvancePercentage from ShareHolder 
inner join CashReceiptVoucher on CashReceiptVoucher.ShareholderId=ShareHolder.Id
where SourceTypeId=8 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and CashReceiptVoucher.IsDeleted=0 and CashReceiptVoucher.IsActive=1 and ShareHolder.IsDeleted=0 and [Date]>=@DateFrom and [Date]<=@DateTo and ShareholderId=@ShareholderId
union
select N'استلام الشيكات' DocType, N'المدفوعات' [In], ShareHolder.Id, DocumentNumber, [Date], Code, ArName, ChequeValue MoneyAmount, DATEDIFF(DAY,[Date],@DateTo) Period, ChequeValue/@equityCapital AdvancePercentage from ShareHolder
inner join ChequeReceipt on ShareHolder.Id=ChequeReceipt.ShareholderId
where DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and SourceTypeId=5 and ChequeStatusId!=3 and ChequeReceipt.IsDeleted=0 and ShareHolder.IsDeleted=0 and [Date]>=@DateFrom and [Date]<=@DateTo and ShareholderId=@ShareholderId
union
select N'سند الدفع' DocType, N'المسحوبات الشخصية' [In], ShareHolder.Id, DocumentNumber, [Date], Code, ArName, MoneyAmount, DATEDIFF(DAY,[Date],@DateTo) Period, 0 AdvancePercentage from ShareHolder 
inner join CashIssueVoucher on CashIssueVoucher.ShareholderId=ShareHolder.Id
where SourceTypeId=7 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and CashIssueVoucher.IsDeleted=0 and CashIssueVoucher.IsActive=1 and [Date]>=@DateFrom and [Date]<=@DateTo and ShareholderId=@ShareholderId
union
select N'اصدار أوراق الدفع' DocType, N'المسحوبات الشخصي' [In], ShareHolder.Id, DocumentNumber, [Date], Code, ArName, ChequeValue, DATEDIFF(DAY,[Date],@DateTo) Period, 0 AdvancePercentage from ShareHolder
inner join ChequeIssue on ChequeIssue.ShareholderId=ShareHolder.Id
where DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and ChequeIssue.IsDeleted=0 and IssueTypeId=5 and ChequeStatusId!=3 and [Date]>=@DateFrom and [Date]<=@DateTo and ShareholderId=@ShareholderId
)

select *, AdvancePercentage*@Profit ShareholderProfit, AdvancePercentage*@Profit*(Period/@parameterPeriod) ShareholderNetProfit, @Revenue Revenue, @Expenses Expenses, @Profit Profit, @equityCapital EquityCapital  from ShareholderEquityCTE
END

	SELECT [ShareHolderEquity].[Id],[ShareHolderId],[Code],[ArName],[Value],[dbo].[Shareholder_TotalPayment]([ShareHolderId],@DepartmentId) TotalPayment from [dbo].[ShareHolderEquity] 
	inner join [dbo].[ShareHolder] on [ShareHolder].Id=[ShareHolderId]
	where [ShareHolderEquity].[DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and [ShareHolder].[IsDeleted]=0 and [ShareHolder].[IsActive]=1
	union
	select 0 [Id], [Id] [ShareHolderId], [Code],[ArName], 0 [Value], 0 TotalPayment from [ShareHolder] where [IsDeleted]=0 and [IsActive]=1 and [Id] not in (select [ShareHolderId] from [ShareHolderEquity] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId)
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ShareholderEquity_GetByDeparment_Report] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare @ExpensesAccountId int=(select [ExpensesAccountId] from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
declare @RevenueAccountId int=(select [RevenueAccountId] from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)

truncate table [dbo].[BalanceStatement]
exec BalanceStatement_Insert @DateFrom, @DateTo, @DepartmentId

declare @Revenue money=(select ABS(BalanceDebit-BalanceCredit) from BalanceStatement where Id=@RevenueAccountId)
declare @Expenses money=(select ABS(BalanceDebit-BalanceCredit) from BalanceStatement where Id=@ExpensesAccountId)
declare @Profit money= isnull(@Revenue,0)-isnull(@Expenses,0)

--declare @TotalValue money=(select SUM(Value) from ShareHolderEquity inner join ShareHolder on ShareHolder.Id=ShareHolderId where ShareHolderEquity.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and IsDeleted=0)

--SELECT [ShareHolderEquity].[Id],[ShareHolderId],[Code],[ArName],[Value],[dbo].[Shareholder_TotalWithdrawal]([ShareHolderId],@DepartmentId) TotalWithdrawal, (@TotalValue/Value) Percentage, @Revenue Revenue, @Expenses Expenses, @Profit Profit from [dbo].[ShareHolderEquity] 
--	inner join [dbo].[ShareHolder] on [ShareHolder].Id=[ShareHolderId]
--	where [ShareHolderEquity].[DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and [ShareHolder].[IsDeleted]=0 and [ShareHolder].[IsActive]=1
--	union
--	select 0 [Id], [Id] [ShareHolderId], [Code],[ArName], 0 [Value], 0 TotalWithdrawal, 0.0 Percentage , @Revenue Revenue, @Expenses Expenses, @Profit Profit from [ShareHolder] where [IsDeleted]=0 and [IsActive]=1 and [Id] not in (select [ShareHolderId] from [ShareHolderEquity] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId)

declare @parameterPeriod int=(select DATEDIFF(DAY,@DateFrom,@DateTo))
declare @equityCapital money=(select [dbo].[GetEquityCapital](@DepartmentId,@DateFrom,@DateTo))
declare @CustomerTotalInstallmentPaid money=(select dbo.Customer_TotalInstallmentPaid(null,@DateFrom,@DateTo))
declare @CustomerTotalInstallmentToBePaid money=(select dbo.Customer_TotalInstallmentToBePaid(null,@DateFrom,@DateTo))
declare @ShareholderTotalWithdrawal money =(select dbo.[Shareholder_TotalWithdrawal](@DepartmentId,@DateFrom,@DateTo))
;with ShareholderEquityCTE
as(
select ShareHolder.Id, Code, ArName, MoneyAmount, DATEDIFF(DAY,[Date],@DateTo) Period, MoneyAmount/@equityCapital AdvancePercentage from ShareHolder 
inner join CashReceiptVoucher on CashReceiptVoucher.ShareholderId=ShareHolder.Id
where SourceTypeId=8 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and CashReceiptVoucher.IsDeleted=0 and CashReceiptVoucher.IsActive=1 and ShareHolder.IsDeleted=0 and [Date]>=@DateFrom and [Date]<=@DateTo
union
select ShareHolder.Id, Code, ArName, ChequeValue MoneyAmount, DATEDIFF(DAY,[Date],@DateTo) Period, ChequeValue/@equityCapital AdvancePercentage from ShareHolder
inner join ChequeReceipt on ShareHolder.Id=ChequeReceipt.ShareholderId
where DepartmentId=@DepartmentId and SourceTypeId=5 and ChequeStatusId!=3 and ChequeReceipt.IsDeleted=0 and ShareHolder.IsDeleted=0 and [Date]>=@DateFrom and [Date]<=@DateTo)

select *, AdvancePercentage*@Profit ShareholderProfit, AdvancePercentage*@Profit*(Period/@parameterPeriod) ShareholderNetProfit, @Revenue Revenue, @Expenses Expenses, @Profit Profit, @equityCapital EquityCapital, @CustomerTotalInstallmentPaid CustomerTotalInstallmentPaid, @CustomerTotalInstallmentToBePaid CustomerTotalInstallmentToBePaid, @ShareholderTotalWithdrawal ShareholderTotalWithdrawal from ShareholderEquityCTE
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[SocialInsuranceGetItemValueOfSalaryItem] 
@DepartmentId int
as
select emp.* ,
f.FollowUpDate,dbo.GetItemValueOfSalaryItem(emp.Id) TotalSocialInsuranceValue ,(select top(1)n.Id from Nationality n)  CitizenNationality ,(select na.ArName from Nationality na where na.Id=emp.NationalityId) NationalityName ,(select d.ArName from Department d where d.Id=emp.DepartmentId) DepartmentName
 ,(select top(1) ss.CitizinCompanyPercentage  from  SocialInsuranceSetting ss ) as CitizinCompanyPercentage
 ,(select top(1) ss.CitizinEmployeePercentage from  SocialInsuranceSetting ss ) as CitizinEmployeePercentage
 ,(select top(1) ss.ForeignCompanyPercentage from  SocialInsuranceSetting ss ) as ForeignCompanyPercentage
 ,(select top(1) ss.ForeignEmployeePercentage from  SocialInsuranceSetting ss ) as ForeignEmployeePercentage

from Employee emp 
left join EmployeeFollowUp f on f.EmployeeId=emp.id 
where emp.IsActive =1 and emp.IsDeleted=0 and emp.IsInsured=1
and dbo.GetItemValueOfSalaryItem(emp.Id) > 0 
and (@DepartmentId is NULL or emp.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and f.FollowUpTypeId=1

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_GetBatchInvoiceReportData]
    @PropertyContractBatchId INT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @PDBD_ID BIGINT;
    DECLARE @NoteSerial1H VARCHAR(50);

    SELECT
        @PDBD_ID = p.Id,
        @NoteSerial1H = p.NoteSerial1H
    FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail p
    WHERE p.PropertyContractBatchId = @PropertyContractBatchId;

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Result Set ثابت (واحد) للتقرير (DevExpress) + إضافة عنوان الفرع
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    DECLARE @T TABLE
    (
        ActivityTypeId                               int             NULL,
        TypeName                                     nvarchar(200)   NULL,

        branch_id                                    int             NULL,
        BranchName                                   nvarchar(200)   NULL,
        BranchAddress                                nvarchar(500)   NULL,  -- NEW

        PropertyName                                 nvarchar(200)   NULL,
        PropertyUnitNo                               nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        RoomsNo                                      int             NULL,
        UnitNotes                                    nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        ActivityName                                 nvarchar(200)   NULL,
        Invoicetype                                  int             NULL,
        ErrorMessageS                                nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        chkTaxExempt                                 bit             NULL,
        DateBaptizing                                date            NULL,
        order_no                                     nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        ReturnSerial                                 nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        SalesInvoiceDate                             date            NULL,
        Transaction_ID                               bigint          NULL,
        PayeeFinancialAccount                        nvarchar(200)   NULL,
        Expr1                                        bigint          NULL,
        Transaction_Type                             int             NULL,

        id                                           nvarchar(50)    NULL,

        IssueDate                                    date            NULL,
        IssueTim                                     nvarchar(8)     NULL,
        InvoiceTypeCodeID                            int             NULL,
        DocumentCurrencyCode                         nvarchar(10)    NULL,
        TaxCurrencyCode                              nvarchar(10)    NULL,
        InvoiceDocumentReferenceID                   nvarchar(100)   NULL,
        AdditionalDocumentReferenceICVUUID           nvarchar(100)   NULL,
        ActualDeliveryDate                           date            NULL,
        LatestDeliveryDate                           date            NULL,
        PaymentMeansCode                             float           NULL,
        InstructionNote                              nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        paymentnote                                  nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        Identificationid                             nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        schemeID                                     nvarchar(10)    NULL,
        StreetName                                   nvarchar(500)   NULL,
        AdditionalStreetName                         nvarchar(500)   NULL,
        BuildingNumber                               nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        PlotIdentification                           nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        CityName                                     nvarchar(100)   NULL,
        PostalZone                                   nvarchar(20)    NULL,
        CountrySubentity                             nvarchar(100)   NULL,
        CitySubdivisionName                          nvarchar(100)   NULL,
        IdentificationCode                           nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        RegistrationName                             nvarchar(200)   NULL,
        CompanyID                                    nvarchar(50)    NULL,
		VatNoCompany      nvarchar(50)    NULL,   -- NEW
		RegNoCompany      nvarchar(50)    NULL,   -- NEW
        Id700                                        nvarchar(50)    NULL,
        allowancechargeAmount                        float           NULL,
        AllowanceChargeReason                        nvarchar(200)   NULL,
        TaxCategoryID                                nvarchar(5)     NULL,
        TaxCategoryPercent                           float           NULL,
        last_changed                                 datetime        NULL,
        PayableAmount                                money           NULL,
        PaidAmount                                   money           NULL,
        RemainAmount                                 money           NULL,
        PrepaidAmount                                float           NULL,
        SingedXMLFileName                            nvarchar(260)   NULL,
        PIH                                          nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        QRCode                                       nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        UUID                                         nvarchar(100)   NULL,
        InvoiceHash                                  nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        EncodedInvoice                               nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        SingedXML                                    nvarchar(max)   NULL,
        QrCodeDataPath                               nvarchar(260)   NULL,
        DocType                                      int             NULL,
        VatValue                                     decimal(18,2)   NULL,
        Export                                       int             NULL,
        VatBreakdownNote                             nvarchar(max)   NULL
    );

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- السيناريو 1: لم يتم عمل استحقاق
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    IF @PDBD_ID IS NULL
    BEGIN
        ;WITH BatchPayments AS (
            SELECT
                PropertyContractBatchId,
                SUM(ISNULL(Paid, 0)) AS TotalPaid
            FROM CashReceiptVoucherPropertyContractBatch
            GROUP BY PropertyContractBatchId
        )
        INSERT INTO @T
        SELECT
            CAST(0 AS int)                                       AS ActivityTypeId,
            N'RS Contract'                                       AS TypeName,

            dep.Id                                               AS branch_id,
            dep.ArName                                           AS BranchName,
            CAST(ISNULL(dep.Address, N'') AS nvarchar(500))       AS BranchAddress, -- NEW

            ISNULL(prop.ArName, N'')                              AS PropertyName,
            ISNULL(pd.PropertyUnitNo, N'')                        AS PropertyUnitNo,
            ISNULL(pd.RoomsNo, 0)                                 AS RoomsNo,
            ISNULL(pd.Notes, N'')                                 AS UnitNotes,
            N''                                                   AS ActivityName,
            388                                                   AS Invoicetype,
            N'لم يتم عمل استحقاق لهذه الدفعة بعد'                 AS ErrorMessageS,
            CAST(0 AS bit)                                        AS chkTaxExempt,
            CAST(pcb.BatchDate AS date)                           AS DateBaptizing,
            N''                                                   AS order_no,
            N''                                                   AS ReturnSerial,
            CAST(pcb.BatchDate AS date)                           AS SalesInvoiceDate,
            NULL                                                  AS Transaction_ID,
            N''                                                   AS PayeeFinancialAccount,
            NULL                                                  AS Expr1,
            CAST(10 AS int)                                       AS Transaction_Type,

            CAST(pc.DocumentNumber + N'-' + RIGHT('00' + CAST(pcb.BatchNo AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) AS nvarchar(50)) AS id,

            CAST(pcb.BatchDate AS date)                           AS IssueDate,
            ISNULL(CONVERT(nvarchar(8), GETDATE(), 108), N'')     AS IssueTim,
            388                                                   AS InvoiceTypeCodeID,
            N'SAR'                                                AS DocumentCurrencyCode,
            N'SAR'                                                AS TaxCurrencyCode,
            N''                                                   AS InvoiceDocumentReferenceID,
            N''                                                   AS AdditionalDocumentReferenceICVUUID,
            CAST(GETDATE() AS date)                               AS ActualDeliveryDate,
            CAST(GETDATE() AS date)                               AS LatestDeliveryDate,
            30                                                    AS PaymentMeansCode,
            N''                                                   AS InstructionNote,
            N'Payment by Credit'                                  AS paymentnote,
            pr.RegistrationNo                                     AS Identificationid,
            N'CRN'                                                AS schemeID,
            pr.Address                                            AS StreetName,
            pr.Address                                            AS AdditionalStreetName,
            NULL                                                  AS BuildingNumber,
            NULL                                                  AS PlotIdentification,
            N'Riyadh'                                             AS CityName,
            N'12345'                                              AS PostalZone,
            NULL                                                  AS CountrySubentity,
            NULL                                                  AS CitySubdivisionName,
            NULL                                                  AS IdentificationCode,
            pr.ArName                                             AS RegistrationName,
            pr.VATNo                                              AS CompanyID,
			cmp.TaxNumber       AS VatNoCompany,
cmp.InsuranceNumber AS RegNoCompany,

            NULL                                                  AS Id700,
            CAST(0 AS float)                                      AS allowancechargeAmount,
            N'Discount'                                           AS AllowanceChargeReason,
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(pc.VATPercentage,0)=0 THEN 'O' ELSE 'S' END AS TaxCategoryID,
            ISNULL(pc.VATPercentage,0)*100                        AS TaxCategoryPercent,
            GETDATE()                                             AS last_changed,
            pcb.BatchTotal                                        AS PayableAmount,
            ISNULL(bp.TotalPaid, 0)                               AS PaidAmount,
            (ISNULL(pcb.BatchTotal, 0) - ISNULL(bp.TotalPaid, 0))  AS RemainAmount,
            CAST(0 AS float)                                      AS PrepaidAmount,
            N''                                                   AS SingedXMLFileName,
            N''                                                   AS PIH,
            N''                                                   AS QRCode,
            N''                                                   AS UUID,
            N''                                                   AS InvoiceHash,
            N''                                                   AS EncodedInvoice,
            N''                                                   AS SingedXML,
            N''                                                   AS QrCodeDataPath,
            CAST(6 AS int)                                        AS DocType,
            CAST(ROUND(
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchRentValueTaxes,0)+ISNULL(pcb.BatchWaterValueTaxes,0)+
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchElectricityValueTaxes,0)+ISNULL(pcb.BatchCommissionValueTaxes,0)+
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchGasValueTaxes,0)+ISNULL(pcb.BatchServicesValueTaxes,0)+
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchInsuranceValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2)) AS VatValue,
            0                                                     AS Export,
            N''                                                   AS VatBreakdownNote
        FROM PropertyContractBatch pcb
        JOIN PropertyContract pc        ON pc.Id  = pcb.MainDocId
        JOIN PropertyRenter pr          ON pc.PropertyRenterId = pr.Id
        LEFT JOIN Department dep        ON pc.DepartmentId = dep.Id
        LEFT JOIN BatchPayments bp      ON pcb.Id = bp.PropertyContractBatchId
        LEFT JOIN Property prop         ON pc.PropertyId = prop.Id
        LEFT JOIN PropertyDetail pd     ON pc.PropertyUnitId = pd.Id
		CROSS JOIN Company cmp

        WHERE pcb.Id = @PropertyContractBatchId;
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- السيناريو 2: تم عمل استحقاق (مع توليد السيريال كما هو)
        ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        IF ISNULL(@NoteSerial1H, '') = ''
        BEGIN
            ;WITH LastSerial AS (
                SELECT
                    pc.DepartmentId AS branch_id,
                    RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2) AS y,
                    RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2) AS m,
                    MAX(CAST(RIGHT(ISNULL(p.NoteSerial1H, '0'), 4) AS int)) AS LastNo
                FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail p
                INNER JOIN PropertyContractBatch pcb ON pcb.Id = p.PropertyContractBatchId
                INNER JOIN PropertyContract pc ON pc.Id = pcb.MainDocId
                WHERE ISNULL(p.NoteSerial1H,'') <> ''
                GROUP BY pc.DepartmentId, RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2), RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2)
            ),
            SerialBase AS (
                SELECT
                    p.ID,
                    pc.DepartmentId AS branch_id,
                    RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2) AS y,
                    RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2) AS m,
                    CAST(pc.DepartmentId AS varchar(10)) +
                    RIGHT(CAST(YEAR(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar(4)), 2) +
                    RIGHT('00' + CAST(MONTH(pcb.BatchDate) AS varchar), 2) AS SerialKey,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                        PARTITION BY pc.DepartmentId, YEAR(pcb.BatchDate), MONTH(pcb.BatchDate)
                        ORDER BY pcb.BatchDate, p.ID
                    ) AS RowNo
                FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail p
                INNER JOIN PropertyContractBatch pcb ON pcb.Id = p.PropertyContractBatchId
                INNER JOIN PropertyContract pc ON pc.Id = pcb.MainDocId
                WHERE ISNULL(p.IsSelected,0) = 1
                  AND ISNULL(p.zatcaStatus,0) <> 1
                  AND ISNULL(p.NoteSerial1H,'') = ''
            )
            UPDATE p
            SET NoteSerial1H = s.SerialKey + RIGHT('0000' + CAST(ISNULL(l.LastNo, 0) + s.RowNo AS varchar), 4)
            FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail p
            JOIN SerialBase s ON p.ID = s.ID
            LEFT JOIN LastSerial l ON s.branch_id = l.branch_id AND s.y = l.y AND s.m = l.m;
        END

        ;WITH BatchPayments AS (
            SELECT
                PropertyContractBatchId,
                SUM(ISNULL(Paid, 0)) AS TotalPaid
            FROM CashReceiptVoucherPropertyContractBatch
            GROUP BY PropertyContractBatchId
        )
        INSERT INTO @T
        SELECT
            CAST(0 AS int)                                       AS ActivityTypeId,
            N'RS Contract'                                       AS TypeName,

            dep.Id                                               AS branch_id,
            dep.ArName                                           AS BranchName,
            CAST(ISNULL(dep.Address, N'') AS nvarchar(500))       AS BranchAddress, -- NEW

            ISNULL(prop.ArName, N'')                              AS PropertyName,
            ISNULL(pd.PropertyUnitNo, N'')                        AS PropertyUnitNo,
            ISNULL(pd.RoomsNo, 0)                                 AS RoomsNo,
            ISNULL(pd.Notes, N'')                                 AS UnitNotes,
            N''                                                   AS ActivityName,
            ISNULL(CAST(388 AS int),388)                          AS Invoicetype,
            ISNULL(pdbd.ErrorMessageS,N'')                        AS ErrorMessageS,
            CAST(0 AS bit)                                        AS chkTaxExempt,
            CAST(pcb.BatchDate AS date)                           AS DateBaptizing,
            N''                                                   AS order_no,
            N''                                                   AS ReturnSerial,
            CAST(pcb.BatchDate AS date)                           AS SalesInvoiceDate,
            CAST(pdbd.Id AS bigint)                               AS Transaction_ID,
            N''                                                   AS PayeeFinancialAccount,
            CAST(pdbd.Id AS bigint)                               AS Expr1,
            CAST(10 AS int)                                       AS Transaction_Type,

            COALESCE(NULLIF(pdbd.NoteSerial1H, N''),
                     CAST(pc.DocumentNumber + N'-' + RIGHT('00' + CAST(pcb.BatchNo AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) AS nvarchar(50))) AS id,

            CAST(pcb.BatchDate AS date)                           AS IssueDate,
            ISNULL(CONVERT(nvarchar(8),GETDATE(),108),N'')        AS IssueTim,
            ISNULL(pdbd.InvoiceTypeCodeID,388)                    AS InvoiceTypeCodeID,
            ISNULL(pdbd.DocumentCurrencyCode,N'SAR')              AS DocumentCurrencyCode,
            ISNULL(pdbd.TaxCurrencyCode,N'SAR')                   AS TaxCurrencyCode,
            ISNULL(pdbd.InvoiceDocumentReferenceID,N'')           AS InvoiceDocumentReferenceID,
            ISNULL(pdbd.AdditionalDocumentReferenceICVUUID,N'')   AS AdditionalDocumentReferenceICVUUID,
            ISNULL(pdbd.ActualDeliveryDate,CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AS ActualDeliveryDate,
            ISNULL(pdbd.LatestDeliveryDate,CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AS LatestDeliveryDate,
            ISNULL(CAST(pdbd.PaymentMeansCode AS float),30)       AS PaymentMeansCode,
            ISNULL(pdbd.InstructionNote,N'')                      AS InstructionNote,
            ISNULL(pdbd.paymentnote,N'Payment by Credit')         AS paymentnote,
            pr.RegistrationNo                                     AS Identificationid,
            N'CRN'                                                AS schemeID,
            pr.Address                                            AS StreetName,
            pr.Address                                            AS AdditionalStreetName,
            NULL                                                  AS BuildingNumber,
            NULL                                                  AS PlotIdentification,
            N'Riyadh'                                             AS CityName,
            N'12345'                                              AS PostalZone,
            NULL                                                  AS CountrySubentity,
            NULL                                                  AS CitySubdivisionName,
            NULL                                                  AS IdentificationCode,
            pr.ArName                                             AS RegistrationName,
            pr.VATNo                                              AS CompanyID,
			cmp.TaxNumber       AS VatNoCompany,
cmp.InsuranceNumber AS RegNoCompany,

            NULL                                                  AS Id700,
            CAST(0 AS float)                                      AS allowancechargeAmount,
            N'Discount'                                           AS AllowanceChargeReason,
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(pc.VATPercentage,0)=0 THEN 'O' ELSE 'S' END AS TaxCategoryID,
            ISNULL(pc.VATPercentage,0)*100                        AS TaxCategoryPercent,
            pdbd.last_changed                                     AS last_changed,
            pcb.BatchTotal                                        AS PayableAmount,
            ISNULL(bp.TotalPaid, 0)                               AS PaidAmount,
            (ISNULL(pcb.BatchTotal, 0) - ISNULL(bp.TotalPaid, 0))  AS RemainAmount,
            CAST(0 AS float)                                      AS PrepaidAmount,
            ISNULL(tvd.SingedXMLFileName,N'')                     AS SingedXMLFileName,
            ISNULL(tvd.PIH,N'')                                   AS PIH,
            ISNULL(tvd.QRCode,N'')                                AS QRCode,
            ISNULL(tvd.UUID,N'')                                  AS UUID,
            ISNULL(tvd.InvoiceHash,N'')                           AS InvoiceHash,
            ISNULL(tvd.EncodedInvoice,N'')                        AS EncodedInvoice,
            ISNULL(tvd.SingedXML,N'')                             AS SingedXML,
            ISNULL(tvd.QrCodeDataPath,N'')                        AS QrCodeDataPath,
            CAST(6 AS int)                                        AS DocType,
            CAST(ROUND(
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchRentValueTaxes,0)+ISNULL(pcb.BatchWaterValueTaxes,0)+
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchElectricityValueTaxes,0)+ISNULL(pcb.BatchCommissionValueTaxes,0)+
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchGasValueTaxes,0)+ISNULL(pcb.BatchServicesValueTaxes,0)+
                 ISNULL(pcb.BatchInsuranceValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2)) AS VatValue,
            ISNULL(pdbd.Export,0)                                 AS Export,
            STUFF((
              (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pcb.BatchRentValueTaxes,0)>0 THEN N' | ضريبة الإيجار ' + CONVERT(nvarchar(30),CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(pcb.BatchRentValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2))) ELSE N'' END) +
              (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pcb.BatchWaterValueTaxes,0)>0 THEN N' | ضريبة المياه ' + CONVERT(nvarchar(30),CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(pcb.BatchWaterValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2))) ELSE N'' END) +
              (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pcb.BatchElectricityValueTaxes,0)>0 THEN N' | ضريبة الكهرباء ' + CONVERT(nvarchar(30),CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(pcb.BatchElectricityValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2))) ELSE N'' END) +
              (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pcb.BatchCommissionValueTaxes,0)>0 THEN N' | ضريبة السعي ' + CONVERT(nvarchar(30),CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(pcb.BatchCommissionValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2))) ELSE N'' END) +
              (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pcb.BatchGasValueTaxes,0)>0 THEN N' | ضريبة الغاز ' + CONVERT(nvarchar(30),CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(pcb.BatchGasValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2))) ELSE N'' END) +
              (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pcb.BatchServicesValueTaxes,0)>0 THEN N' | ضريبة الخدمات ' + CONVERT(nvarchar(30),CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(pcb.BatchServicesValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2))) ELSE N'' END) +
              (CASE WHEN ISNULL(pcb.BatchInsuranceValueTaxes,0)>0 THEN N' | ضريبة التأمين ' + CONVERT(nvarchar(30),CAST(ROUND(ISNULL(pcb.BatchInsuranceValueTaxes,0),2) AS decimal(18,2))) ELSE N'' END)
            ),1,3,N'') AS VatBreakdownNote
        FROM PropertyDueBatchDetail pdbd
        JOIN PropertyContractBatch pcb ON pcb.Id = pdbd.PropertyContractBatchId
        JOIN PropertyContract pc        ON pc.Id  = pcb.MainDocId
        JOIN PropertyRenter pr          ON pc.PropertyRenterId = pr.Id
        LEFT JOIN Department dep        ON pc.DepartmentId = dep.Id
        LEFT JOIN transactionsVatDetails tvd
               ON tvd.Transaction_ID = pdbd.Id
              AND tvd.TableName      = 'PropertyDueBatchDetail'
              AND ISNULL(tvd.IsDeleted,0)=0
        LEFT JOIN BatchPayments bp      ON pcb.Id = bp.PropertyContractBatchId
        LEFT JOIN Property prop         ON pc.PropertyId = prop.Id
        LEFT JOIN PropertyDetail pd     ON pc.PropertyUnitId = pd.Id
		CROSS JOIN Company cmp

        WHERE pcb.Id = @PropertyContractBatchId
          AND pc.id NOT IN (SELECT PropertyContractId FROM PropertyContractTermination);
    END

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- SELECT واحد نهائي (Result Set واحد ثابت)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT *
    FROM @T;
END

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_GetPropertyPaymentSummary]
    @PropertyId INT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    SELECT 
        PropertyId,
        PropertyCode,
        PropertyName,
        ContractValue,
        TotalBatches,
        TotalPaid,
        TotalRemaining,
        UnpaidBatches,
        PartiallyPaidBatches,
        FullyPaidBatches,
        PaymentPercentage,
        FirstBatchDate,
        LastBatchDate,
        LastPaymentDate
    FROM vw_PropertyPaymentSummary
    WHERE PropertyId = @PropertyId
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_GetPropertyReport]
    @RenterId INT = NULL,
    @OwnerId INT = NULL,
    @PropertyId INT = NULL,
    @StartDate DATE = NULL,
    @OnlyUnterminated BIT = 0
    
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
		Declare @Year INT 
    -- استخدم السنة الحالية لو @Year فاضي
    IF @Year IS NULL
        SET @Year = YEAR(GETDATE());

    WITH BatchDifferences AS (
        SELECT 
            pb.MainDocId,
            pb.BatchDate,
            (ISNULL(pb.AddValue, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchValueBeforeDiscountAddtionAndTax, 0)) +
            ((ISNULL(pb.AddValue, 0) + ISNULL(pb.BatchValueBeforeDiscountAddtionAndTax, 0)) * ISNULL(pr.TaxPercentage, 0)) -
            ISNULL(pb.Discount, 0) AS BatchValue
        FROM dbo.PropertyBatch pb
        INNER JOIN dbo.Property pr ON pr.Id = pb.MainDocId
    ),
    AllYearsIncome AS (
        SELECT
            MainDocId,
            YEAR(BatchDate) AS BatchYear,
            SUM(BatchValue) AS RegisteredIncome
        FROM BatchDifferences
        GROUP BY MainDocId, YEAR(BatchDate)
    ),
    RankedYears AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY MainDocId 
                ORDER BY 
                    CASE WHEN BatchYear = @Year THEN 0 ELSE ABS(BatchYear - @Year) END,
                    BatchYear DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM AllYearsIncome
    ),
    AnnualRent AS (
        SELECT MainDocId, BatchYear, RegisteredIncome
        FROM RankedYears
        WHERE rn = 1
    ),
    TotalRentCTE AS (
        SELECT 
            PC.PropertyId,
            SUM(PC.RentValue) AS TotalRent, 
            AVG(PC.RentValue) AS AvgAnnualRent
        FROM dbo.PropertyContract PC
        WHERE PC.IsDeleted = 0 
          AND (
              NOT EXISTS (
                  SELECT 1 
                  FROM dbo.PropertyContractTermination T 
                  WHERE T.PropertyContractId = PC.Id
              )
          )
        GROUP BY PC.PropertyId
    )

    SELECT 
        P.ArName AS Building,
        COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0) AS RegisteredIncome,
        COALESCE(TR.TotalRent, TR.AvgAnnualRent, 0) AS TotalRent,
        COALESCE(TR.TotalRent, TR.AvgAnnualRent, 0) - COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0) AS RentValue,
        P.PropertyStatusId,
        P.DepartmentId,
        Department.ArName,
        Department.EnName,
        -- تفاصيل العقار
        (SELECT MAX(RoomsNo) FROM dbo.PropertyDetail WHERE MainDocId = P.Id) AS RoomsNo,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.PropertyDetail WHERE MainDocId = P.Id) AS TotalApartments,
        (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN StatusId <> 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM dbo.PropertyDetail WHERE MainDocId = P.Id) AS FreeApartments,

        -- تجميعات مسبقة لكل فرع باستخدام PARTITION BY
        SUM((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.PropertyDetail WHERE MainDocId = P.Id)) OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId) AS GroupTotalApartments,
        SUM((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN StatusId <> 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM dbo.PropertyDetail WHERE MainDocId = P.Id)) OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId) AS GroupFreeApartments,
        SUM(COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId) AS GroupRegisteredIncome,
        SUM(COALESCE(TR.TotalRent, TR.AvgAnnualRent, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId) AS GroupTotalRent,
        SUM(COALESCE(TR.TotalRent, TR.AvgAnnualRent, 0) - COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId) AS GroupRentValue,

        -- نسبة الربح / الخسارة لكل فرع
        ROUND(
            CASE 
                WHEN COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE ((COALESCE(TR.TotalRent, TR.AvgAnnualRent, 0) - COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0)) 
                    / NULLIF(A.RegisteredIncome, 0)) * 100
            END, 2
        ) AS ProfitLossPercentage,

        -- نسبة الربح / الخسارة لكل فرع
        ROUND(
            CASE 
                WHEN SUM(COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId) = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE (
                    SUM(COALESCE(TR.TotalRent, TR.AvgAnnualRent, 0) - COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0)) 
                    OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId)
                ) / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(A.RegisteredIncome, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY P.DepartmentId), 0) * 100
            END, 2
        ) AS GroupProfitLossPercentage,

        -- السنة الفعلية للدخل اللي جابه (للمراجعة)
        A.BatchYear

    FROM dbo.Property P
    LEFT JOIN AnnualRent A ON A.MainDocId = P.Id
    LEFT JOIN TotalRentCTE TR ON TR.PropertyId = P.Id
    LEFT OUTER JOIN Department ON P.DepartmentId = Department.Id 
    WHERE P.IsDeleted = 0 
      AND (@PropertyId IS NULL OR P.Id = @PropertyId)
      AND (@OwnerId IS NULL OR P.DepartmentId = @OwnerId)
	  and  p.IsActive = 1

    ORDER BY P.ArName;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_helpdiagrams
	(
		@diagramname sysname = NULL,
		@owner_id int = NULL
	)
	WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo'
	AS
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @user sysname
		DECLARE @dboLogin bit
		EXECUTE AS CALLER;
			SET @user = USER_NAME();
			SET @dboLogin = CONVERT(bit,IS_MEMBER('db_owner'));
		REVERT;
		SELECT
			[Database] = DB_NAME(),
			[Name] = name,
			[ID] = diagram_id,
			[Owner] = USER_NAME(principal_id),
			[OwnerID] = principal_id
		FROM
			sysdiagrams
		WHERE
			(@dboLogin = 1 OR USER_NAME(principal_id) = @user) AND
			(@diagramname IS NULL OR name = @diagramname) AND
			(@owner_id IS NULL OR principal_id = @owner_id)
		ORDER BY
			4, 5, 1
	END
