CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SP_PropertyContractTotal_Report]
(
    @RenterId INT = NULL,                    -- معرف المستأجر (اختياري - null للكل)
    @OwnerId INT = NULL,                     -- معرف المالك (اختياري - null للكل)
    @PropertyId INT = NULL,                  -- معرف العقار (اختياري - null للكل)
	@DepartmentId INT = NULL   ,
    @IsLiquidated BIT = NULL,                -- حالة التصفية (null للكل, 0 غير مصفى, 1 مصفى)
    @IsActive BIT = NULL                     -- حالة العقد (null للكل, 1 نشط, 0 ملغي/منتهي)
	
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Main Query
    SELECT
        -- المعلومات الأساسية للعقد
        c.Id AS ContractId,
        c.DocumentNumber AS ContractNo,
        IIF(c.ContractTypeId = 1, N'جديد', N'افتتاحي') AS ContractType,
        c.ContractStartDate AS StartDate,
        c.ContractEndDate AS EndDate,

        -- معلومات المالك والعقار والمستأجر
        o.ArName AS Owner,
        p.ArName AS Property,
        t.ArName AS PropertyType,
       -- p.Code AS PropertyNo,
		pd.PropertyUnitNo  AS PropertyNo,
        r.ArName AS Renter,

        -- معلومات الفرع
        d.ArName AS Department,
        

        -- قيم العقد الأساسية
        ISNULL(c.RentValue, 0) AS RentValue,
        ISNULL(c.CommissionValue, 0) AS CommissionValue,
        ISNULL(c.WaterValue, 0) AS WaterValue,
        ISNULL(c.ServicesValue, 0) AS ServicesValue,
        ISNULL(c.ElectricityValue, 0) AS ElectricityValue,
        ISNULL(c.GasValue, 0) AS GasValue,
        ISNULL(c.InsuranceValue, 0) AS InsuranceValue,

        -- إجمالي قيمة العقد (لدفعة واحدة)
        (
            ISNULL(c.RentValue, 0) +
            ISNULL(c.CommissionValue, 0) +
            ISNULL(c.WaterValue, 0) +
            ISNULL(c.ServicesValue, 0) +
            ISNULL(c.ElectricityValue, 0) +
            ISNULL(c.GasValue, 0) +
            ISNULL(c.InsuranceValue, 0)
        ) AS TotalContractValue,

        -- إجمالي قيمة الإيجار الكلي للعقد (عدد الدفعات × قيمة الدفعة)
        (
            SELECT
                ISNULL(SUM(
                    ISNULL(pcb.BatchRentValue, 0) +
                    ISNULL(pcb.BatchCommissionValue, 0) +
                    ISNULL(pcb.BatchWaterValue, 0) +
                    ISNULL(pcb.BatchServicesValue, 0) +
                    ISNULL(pcb.BatchElectricityValue, 0) +
                    ISNULL(pcb.BatchGasValue, 0) +
                    ISNULL(pcb.BatchInsuranceValue, 0)
                ), 0)
            FROM PropertyContractBatch pcb
            WHERE pcb.MainDocId = c.Id
                AND pcb.IsDeleted = 0
        ) AS TotalContractValueWithBatches,

        -- إجمالي المبالغ المحصلة
        (
            SELECT ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(crvpcb.Paid, 0)), 0)
            FROM PropertyContractBatch pcb
            INNER JOIN CashReceiptVoucherPropertyContractBatch crvpcb
                ON crvpcb.PropertyContractBatchId = pcb.Id
            INNER JOIN CashReceiptVoucher crv
                ON crv.Id = crvpcb.CashReceiptVoucherId
            WHERE pcb.MainDocId = c.Id
                AND pcb.IsDeleted = 0
                AND crv.IsDeleted = 0
                AND crv.IsActive = 1
        ) AS TotalCollected,

        -- المبلغ المتبقي (غير المحصل)
        (
            -- إجمالي قيمة العقد من الدفعات
            (
                SELECT
                    ISNULL(SUM(
                        ISNULL(pcb.BatchRentValue, 0) +
                        ISNULL(pcb.BatchCommissionValue, 0) +
                        ISNULL(pcb.BatchWaterValue, 0) +
                        ISNULL(pcb.BatchServicesValue, 0) +
                        ISNULL(pcb.BatchElectricityValue, 0) +
                        ISNULL(pcb.BatchGasValue, 0) +
                        ISNULL(pcb.BatchInsuranceValue, 0)
                    ), 0)
                FROM PropertyContractBatch pcb
                WHERE pcb.MainDocId = c.Id
                    AND pcb.IsDeleted = 0
            )
            -
            -- إجمالي المحصل
            (
                SELECT ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(crvpcb.Paid, 0)), 0)
                FROM PropertyContractBatch pcb
                INNER JOIN CashReceiptVoucherPropertyContractBatch crvpcb
                    ON crvpcb.PropertyContractBatchId = pcb.Id
                INNER JOIN CashReceiptVoucher crv
                    ON crv.Id = crvpcb.CashReceiptVoucherId
                WHERE pcb.MainDocId = c.Id
                    AND pcb.IsDeleted = 0
                    AND crv.IsDeleted = 0
                    AND crv.IsActive = 1
            )
        ) AS TotalRemaining,

        -- حالة التصفية (هل العقد مصفى أم لا)
        CASE
            WHEN EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM PropertyContractTermination pct
                WHERE pct.PropertyContractId = c.Id
                    AND pct.IsDeleted = 0
            ) THEN CAST(1 AS BIT)
            ELSE CAST(0 AS BIT)
        END AS IsLiquidated,

        -- حالة العقد (نشط أم منتهي)
        CASE
            WHEN EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM PropertyContractTermination pct
                WHERE pct.PropertyContractId = c.Id
                    AND pct.IsDeleted = 0
            ) THEN CAST(0 AS BIT)
            WHEN c.ContractEndDate < GETDATE() THEN CAST(0 AS BIT)
            ELSE CAST(1 AS BIT)
        END AS IsActive,

        -- معلومات إضافية
        c.NumberOfBatches,
        c.VoucherDate AS ContractDate,
        c.Notes

    FROM PropertyContract c
    INNER JOIN PropertyOwner o ON c.PropertyOwnerId = o.Id
    INNER JOIN Property p ON p.Id = c.PropertyId
    INNER JOIN PropertyType t ON t.Id = p.PropertyTypeId
    INNER JOIN PropertyRenter r ON c.PropertyRenterId = r.Id
    INNER JOIN Department d ON d.Id = c.DepartmentId
    LEFT JOIN PropertyDetail pd ON pd.Id = c.PropertyUnitId

    WHERE c.IsDeleted = 0
        AND p.IsActive = 1
        -- فلتر المستأجر
        AND (@RenterId IS NULL OR c.PropertyRenterId = @RenterId)
        -- فلتر المالك
        AND (@OwnerId IS NULL OR c.PropertyOwnerId = @OwnerId)
        -- فلتر العقار
        AND (@PropertyId IS NULL OR c.PropertyId = @PropertyId)
		AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR c.DepartmentId= @DepartmentId)
        -- فلتر حالة التصفية
        AND (
            @IsLiquidated IS NULL
            OR (
                @IsLiquidated = 1
                AND EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM PropertyContractTermination pct
                    WHERE pct.PropertyContractId = c.Id
                        AND pct.IsDeleted = 0
                )
            )
            OR (
                @IsLiquidated = 0
                AND NOT EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM PropertyContractTermination pct
                    WHERE pct.PropertyContractId = c.Id
                        AND pct.IsDeleted = 0
                )
            )
        )
        -- فلتر حالة النشاط
        AND (
            @IsActive IS NULL
            OR (
                @IsActive = 1
                AND NOT EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM PropertyContractTermination pct
                    WHERE pct.PropertyContractId = c.Id
                        AND pct.IsDeleted = 0
                )
                AND (c.ContractEndDate IS NULL OR c.ContractEndDate >= GETDATE())
            )
            OR (
                @IsActive = 0
                AND (
                    EXISTS (
                        SELECT 1
                        FROM PropertyContractTermination pct
                        WHERE pct.PropertyContractId = c.Id
                            AND pct.IsDeleted = 0
                    )
                    OR c.ContractEndDate < GETDATE()
                )
            )
        )

    ORDER BY c.DepartmentId, c.Id;

END

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_SaveBatchPayment]
    @BatchId INT,
    @PaidAmount DECIMAL(18,2),
    @PaymentDate DATETIME2 = NULL,
    @PaymentMethod NVARCHAR(50) = NULL,
    @PaymentReference NVARCHAR(100) = NULL,
    @PaymentNotes NVARCHAR(500) = NULL,
    @UserId INT = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRANSACTION;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        DECLARE @MainDocId INT
        DECLARE @TotalBatchValue DECIMAL(18,2)
        DECLARE @CurrentPaid DECIMAL(18,2)
        
        -- الحصول على معلومات الدفعة
        SELECT 
            @MainDocId = MainDocId,
            @TotalBatchValue = ISNULL(BatchValueAfterDiscount, 0) + ISNULL(BatchTaxValue, 0),
            @CurrentPaid = ISNULL(Paid, 0)
        FROM PropertyBatch
        WHERE Id = @BatchId AND IsDeleted = 0
        
        IF @MainDocId IS NULL
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR('الدفعة غير موجودة أو محذوفة', 16, 1)
            RETURN
        END
        
        -- التحقق من صحة المبلغ
        IF @PaidAmount < 0
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR('المبلغ المسدد لا يمكن أن يكون سالباً', 16, 1)
            RETURN
        END
        
        IF @PaidAmount > @TotalBatchValue
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR('المبلغ المسدد لا يمكن أن يزيد عن إجمالي قيمة الدفعة', 16, 1)
            RETURN
        END
        
        -- تحديث الدفعة
        UPDATE PropertyBatch 
        SET 
            Paid = @PaidAmount,
            ModifiedDate = GETDATE(),
            PaymentDate = CASE WHEN @PaidAmount > 0 THEN ISNULL(@PaymentDate, GETDATE()) ELSE NULL END,
            IsDelivered = CASE WHEN @PaidAmount >= @TotalBatchValue THEN 1 ELSE IsDelivered END
        WHERE Id = @BatchId
        
        -- إضافة سجل في تاريخ المدفوعات إذا كان هناك تغيير في المبلغ
        IF @PaidAmount != @CurrentPaid AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PropertyPaymentHistory')
        BEGIN
            INSERT INTO PropertyPaymentHistory (
                PropertyBatchId, MainDocId, PaymentAmount, PaymentDate, 
                PaymentMethod, PaymentReference, PaymentNotes, UserId
            )
            VALUES (
                @BatchId, @MainDocId, @PaidAmount - @CurrentPaid, 
                ISNULL(@PaymentDate, GETDATE()), @PaymentMethod, 
                @PaymentReference, @PaymentNotes, @UserId
            )
        END
        
        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        
        -- إرجاع النتيجة
        SELECT 
            'تم حفظ السداد بنجاح' AS Message,
            @BatchId AS BatchId,
            @PaidAmount AS PaidAmount,
            @TotalBatchValue - @PaidAmount AS RemainingAmount
            
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE()
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY()
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE()
        
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState)
    END CATCH
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_upgraddiagrams
	AS
	BEGIN
		IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagrams') IS NOT NULL
			return 0;
	
		CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagrams
		(
			name sysname NOT NULL,
			principal_id int NOT NULL,	-- we may change it to varbinary(85)
			diagram_id int PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,
			version int,
	
			definition varbinary(max)
			CONSTRAINT UK_principal_name UNIQUE
			(
				principal_id,
				name
			)
		);


		/* Add this if we need to have some form of extended properties for diagrams */
		/*
		IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagram_properties') IS NULL
		BEGIN
			CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagram_properties
			(
				diagram_id int,
				name sysname,
				value varbinary(max) NOT NULL
			)
		END
		*/

		IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.dtproperties') IS NOT NULL
		begin
			insert into dbo.sysdiagrams
			(
				[name],
				[principal_id],
				[version],
				[definition]
			)
			select	 
				convert(sysname, dgnm.[uvalue]),
				DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID(N'dbo'),			-- will change to the sid of sa
				0,							-- zero for old format, dgdef.[version],
				dgdef.[lvalue]
			from dbo.[dtproperties] dgnm
				inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dggd on dggd.[property] = 'DtgSchemaGUID' and dggd.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid]	
				inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dgdef on dgdef.[property] = 'DtgSchemaDATA' and dgdef.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid]
				
			where dgnm.[property] = 'DtgSchemaNAME' and dggd.[uvalue] like N'_EA3E6268-D998-11CE-9454-00AA00A3F36E_' 
			return 2;
		end
		return 1;
	END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[StockIssueVoucher_Accept]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@Id int
AS
begin
set nocount on;
    declare @tran int;
    set @tran = @@trancount;
    begin try
        if @tran = 0
            begin transaction
        else
            save transaction StockIssueVoucher_Accept;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
declare	@BranchId [int], @DepartmentId [int] , @IsAccepted [bit] ,@SystemPageId [int], @VoucherDate [datetime] , @UserId int, @Type int
select @BranchId=BranchId, @DepartmentId=DepartmentId, @IsAccepted=IsAccepted, @SystemPageId=SystemPageId, @VoucherDate=VoucherDate, @UserId=UserId, @Type=TypeId from StockIssueVoucher where Id=@Id

if @IsAccepted!=1
begin

update StockIssueVoucher set IsAccepted=1 where Id=@Id

DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [JournalEntry] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1

declare @PageCode nvarchar(50)
if @Type=1
set @PageCode='StockIssueVoucher'
if @Type=2
set @PageCode='StockDamageVoucher'
if @Type=3
set @PageCode='StockLossVoucher'

DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where Code = @PageCode)
DECLARE @AccountIdFrom int, @AccountIdTo int

set @AccountIdTo=(select InventoryAccountId  from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
set @AccountIdFrom=(select CostOfSalesAccountId from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)

INSERT INTO [dbo].[JournalEntry]
           ([DocumentNumber]
           ,[BranchId]
           ,[Date]
           ,[SourcePageId]
           ,[SourceId]
           ,[IsActive]
           ,[IsPosted]
           ,[IsDeleted]
           ,[UserId]
           ,[DepartmentId])
     VALUES
           (Cast( @JournalEntryDocNum as nvarchar(max))
           ,@BranchId
           ,@VoucherDate
           ,@SourcePageId
           ,@Id
           ,1
           ,0
           ,0
           ,@UserId
           ,@DepartmentId)

declare @JournalEntryId int = (select MAX(Id) from [dbo].[JournalEntry])

DECLARE @JournalEntryDetail table(
	[JournalEntryId] [int] NULL,
	[Debit] [money] NULL,
	[Credit] [money] NULL,
	[CurrencyId] [int] NULL,
	[Equivalent] [float] NULL,
	[AccountId] [int] NULL,
	[SourcePageId] [int] NULL,
	[SourceId] [int] NULL,
	[IsPosted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsDeleted] [bit] NULL,
	[IsActive] [bit] NULL)

Insert into @JournalEntryDetail (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	 VALUES
	(@JournalEntryId,
	(select TotalCostPrice from StockIssueVoucher where Id=@Id),
	0,
	@AccountIdFrom,
	@SourcePageId,
	@Id,
	0,
	0,
	1),
	(@JournalEntryId,
	0,
	(select TotalCostPrice from StockIssueVoucher where Id=@Id),
	@AccountIdTo,
	@SourcePageId,
	@Id,
	0,
	0,
	1)

Insert into [dbo].[JournalEntryDetail] (
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive])
	select 
	[JournalEntryId] ,
	[Debit]  ,
	[Credit] ,
	[CurrencyId] ,
	[Equivalent] ,
	[AccountId] ,
	[SourcePageId] ,
	[SourceId],
	[IsPosted],
	[IsDeleted],
	[IsActive] from @JournalEntryDetail

end


lbexit:
        if @tran = 0
            commit;
    end try
    begin catch
        declare @error int, @message varchar(4000), @xstate int;
        select @error = ERROR_NUMBER(), @message = ERROR_MESSAGE()+ ' at ' + cast(ERROR_LINE() as VARCHAR(50)), @xstate = XACT_STATE();
        if @xstate = -1
            rollback;
        if @xstate = 1 and @tran = 0
            rollback
        if @xstate = 1 and @tran> 0
            rollback transaction StockIssueVoucher_Accept;

        raiserror ('StockIssueVoucher_Accept: %d: %s', 16, 1, @error, @message ) ;
    end catch
end

CREATE PROCEDURE  [dbo].[StockIssueVoucher_Delete]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@Id int,@userId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	declare @AlLChars nvarchar(100) = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789'
	DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockIssueVoucher')

	update [StockIssueVoucher]
	set [IsDeleted]=1
     , UserId=@userId
	 ,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	 where Id=@Id

	update StockIssueVoucherDetails
	set IsDeleted=1 where MainDocId=@Id

	update JournalEntry
	set IsDeleted=1 
	,DocumentNumber=(SELECT SUBSTRING(CONVERT(nvarchar(100), NEWID()),0,7))
	where SourceId=@Id and SourcePageId=@SourcePageId

	update JournalEntryDetail
	set IsDeleted=1 where SourceId=@Id and SourcePageId=@SourcePageId

			----------------------------update quantities-------------------------------------------------------

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[StockIssueVoucher_Get]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@DocNum nvarchar(500),
@DepartmentId int,
@DateFrom datetime,
@DateTo datetime,
@Id int,
@ActivityId int,
@CompanyId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
SELECT [StockIssueVoucher].[Id]
      ,[DocumentNumber]
      ,[Branch].ArName as [Branch]
      ,[Warehouse].ArName as [Warehouse]
      ,[Department].ArName as [Department]
      ,[VoucherDate]
	  ,Customer.ArName as Customer
      ,[VendorOrCustomerId]
      ,[Currency].ArName as [Currency]
      ,[CurrencyEquivalent]
      ,[Total]
      ,[TotalItemsDiscount]
      ,[SalesTaxes]
      ,[TotalAfterTaxes]
      ,[VoucherDiscountValue]
      ,[VoucherDiscountPercentage]
      ,[NetTotal]
      ,[Paid]
      ,[ValidityPeriod]
      ,[DeliveryPeriod]
      ,[CostPriceId]
      ,[CurrentQuantity]
      ,[DestinationWarehouseId]
      ,[SystemPage].ArName as [SystemPage]
      ,[SelectedId]
      ,[TotalCostPrice]
      ,[TotalItemDirectExpenses]
      ,[IsDelivered]
      ,[IsAccepted]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[IsLinked]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[IsCompleted]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[IsPosted]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[UserId]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[IsActive]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[IsDeleted]
      ,[AutoCreated]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[Notes]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[Image]
      ,[StockIssueVoucher].[UpdatedId]
  FROM [dbo].[StockIssueVoucher] left join Branch
  on Branch.Id=StockIssueVoucher.BranchId
  left join Warehouse on Warehouse.Id=StockIssueVoucher.WarehouseId
  left join Department on Department.Id=StockIssueVoucher.DepartmentId
  left join Currency on Currency.Id=StockIssueVoucher.CurrencyId
  left join SystemPage on SystemPage.Id=StockIssueVoucher.SystemPageId
  left join Customer on Customer.Id=StockIssueVoucher.VendorOrCustomerId
  where ((@DateFrom is null or VoucherDate >=@DateFrom) 
  and (@DateTo is null or VoucherDate <=@DateTo)
  and (@DepartmentId is null or StockIssueVoucher.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)  
  and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
  and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
  and (@DocNum is null or @DocNum='' or StockIssueVoucher.DocumentNumber=@DocNum)
  and (@Id is null or StockIssueVoucher.Id=@Id)
  and StockIssueVoucher.IsDeleted=0)
END

Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from StockIssueVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from StockIssueVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from StockIssueVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from StockIssueVoucher where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

DECLARE @SourcePageId int = (select [Id] from [SystemPage] where [TableName] = 'StockIssueVoucher')
DECLARE @AccountIdFrom int, @AccountIdTo int
declare @UseSeparatedAccountsForWarehouse bit = (select top(1) UseSeparatedAccountsForWarehouse from SystemSetting)
declare @AdjustmentonEmployeeReceivable bit =(select AdjustmentonEmployeeReceivable from InventoryVoucher where Id=@SelectedId)

if(@UseSeparatedAccountsForWarehouse =1) -- مخزن
begin
set @AccountIdTo=(select StockAccountId from Warehouse where Id=@WarehouseId)
if(@SystemPageId=(select Id from SystemPage where ControllerName='InventoryVoucher')) --تسوية
begin
if(@AdjustmentonEmployeeReceivable =1) -- تسوية على ذمة الموظف
begin 
set @AccountIdFrom=(select EmployeeReceivableAccountId from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
end
else 
begin
set @AccountIdFrom=(select InventoryVarianceAccountId from Warehouse where Id=@WarehouseId)
end
end
else -- مش تسوية
begin
if(@TypeId=3 or @TypeId=2) --سند فاقد3 || سند تالف 2
begin
set @AccountIdFrom=(select LostAndDamagedAccountId from Warehouse where Id=@WarehouseId)
end
else
begin
set @AccountIdFrom=(select SalesCostAccountId from Warehouse where Id=@WarehouseId)
end
end 
end
else -- فرع
begin 
set @AccountIdTo=(select InventoryAccountId  from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
if(@SystemPageId=(select Id from SystemPage where ControllerName='InventoryVoucher')) --تسوية
begin
if(@AdjustmentonEmployeeReceivable =1) -- تسوية على ذمة الموظف
begin 
set @AccountIdFrom=(select EmployeeReceivableAccountId from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
end
else 
begin 
set @AccountIdFrom=(select InventoryVarianceAccountId from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
 end
end
else -- مش تسوية
begin
if(@TypeId=3 or @TypeId=2) --سند فاقد3 || سند تالف 2
begin
set @AccountIdFrom=(select LostAndDamagedAccountId from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
end
else
begin
set @AccountIdFrom=(select CostOfSalesAccountId from Department where Id=@DepartmentId)
end
end
end

declare @ItemId1 int, @SalesInvoiceDetailsId1 int
declare cur cursor for select [ItemId], [SalesInvoiceDetailsId] from @TempDetails
open cur
fetch next from cur into @ItemId1, @SalesInvoiceDetailsId1
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	if (select ItemTypeId from Item where Id=@ItemId1) = 4
	begin
		
		delete from @TempDetails where ItemId=@ItemId1
	end
	
	fetch next from cur into @ItemId1, @SalesInvoiceDetailsId1

end
close cur
deallocate cur
-------------------------------item component issue--------------------------------------------------
if((select top(1) IssueComponentsOfItemInStockIssue from SystemSetting)=1)
begin
declare @ItemId int, @SalesInvoiceDetailsId int,@RequestedQty float
declare cur cursor for select [ItemId], [SalesInvoiceDetailsId],Qty from @TempDetails
open cur
fetch next from cur into @ItemId, @SalesInvoiceDetailsId,@RequestedQty
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	if (select ItemTypeId from Item where Id=@ItemId) in(2,3)
	begin
		insert into @TempDetails ([MainDocId],[ItemId],[ItemPriceId],[Qty],[Price],[ItemUnitId],[UnitEquivalent],[SystemPageId],[SelectedId],[CostPrice],[IsDeleted],[SalesInvoiceDetailsId])
		select @Id, ChildItemId,(select Id from ItemPrice where ItemId=ChildItemId and IsDefault=1)
		, Quantity*@RequestedQty,0, ItemUnitId,(select Equivalent from ItemPrice where ItemId=ChildItemId and IsDefault=1),@SystemPageId,@SelectedId,0,0,@SalesInvoiceDetailsId from ItemComponent where ParentItemId=@ItemId
		
		delete from @TempDetails where ItemId=@ItemId
	end
	
	fetch next from cur into @ItemId, @SalesInvoiceDetailsId,@RequestedQty

end
close cur
deallocate cur

declare cur cursor for select distinct [ItemId] from @TempDetails
open cur
fetch next from cur into @ItemId
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	update @TempDetails set [CostPrice] =(case @SystemPageId when 58 then dbo.Item_AvgCost([ItemId],@DepartmentId) else [CostPrice] end)
	where [ItemId]=@ItemId
	fetch next from cur into @ItemId
end
close cur
deallocate cur
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[StockIssueVoucherDetails_Get] 
@Id int,@DepartmentId int
AS
BEGIN
select "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."MainDocId",
       "Item"."Code" as "ItemCode",
       "Item"."ArName" as "Item",
       "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."Qty",
       "ItemPrice"."Price" as "ItemPrice",
       "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."CostPrice",
	 "ItemUnit"."ArName" as "UnitName"
	 , s.DocumentNumber as DocNo ,s.VoucherDate 
	 ,d.ArName as DepartmentName
	 ,w.ArName as WarehouseName
  from ((("dbo"."StockIssueVoucherDetails"
       "StockIssueVoucherDetails"
  left join "dbo"."Item" "Item"
       on ("Item"."Id" = "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."ItemId"))
  left join "dbo"."ItemPrice" "ItemPrice"
       on ("ItemPrice"."Id" = "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."ItemPriceId"))
  left join "dbo"."ItemUnit" "ItemUnit"
       on ("ItemUnit"."Id" = "ItemPrice"."ItemUnitId"))
	   left join StockIssueVoucher s on s.Id=StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId
	   left join Department d on s.DepartmentId=d.Id
	   left join Warehouse w on s.WarehouseId=w.Id
	   where (@Id is null or StockIssueVoucherDetails.MainDocId=@Id)
	   and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
	   group by "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."MainDocId",
       "Item"."Code",
       "Item"."ArName" ,
       "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."Qty",
       "ItemPrice"."Price",
       "StockIssueVoucherDetails"."CostPrice",
	 "ItemUnit"."ArName" 
	 , s.DocumentNumber  ,s.VoucherDate 
	 ,d.ArName 
	 ,w.ArName 
	 ,s.id
	   order by MainDocId , Item.Code
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[StockReceipt_StockIssueQuantitiesInPeriod] 

@DateFrom datetime ,@DateTo datetime,@WareHouseId int,@DocType nvarchar(100)  
as

-->>>> Table Declaration <<<<-------
DECLARE @StockReceipt_StockIssue table(
	 [ItemId] int  NULL
	,[ItemName] nvarchar(MAX) NULL
	,[DocType] nvarchar(100) NULL
	,[Quantity] float NULL
	,[SourceVoucherType] nvarchar(MAX) NULL
	)

	insert into @StockReceipt_StockIssue
------------------------------------------
select ids.ItemId as ItemId ,i.ArName + ' -' + i.Code as ItemName ,N'صرف' as DocType 
,cast(sum(ids.Qty*ids.UnitEquivalent) as decimal(10,2)) Quantity
,(select ArName  from SystemPage where Id=iv.SystemPageId )SourceVoucherType
from StockIssueVoucher iv
inner join StockIssueVoucherDetails ids
on ids.MainDocId=iv.Id
inner join Item i 
on ids.ItemId=i.Id
where iv.IsActive=1 and iv.IsDeleted=0
and (@DateFrom is null or iv.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or iv.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and(@WareHouseId is null or iv.WarehouseId=@WareHouseId)
group by ids.ItemId, i.ArName,i.Code,iv.SystemPageId

union all

select rds.ItemId as ItemId , i.ArName + ' -' +i.Code as ItemName,N'توريد' as DocType 
,cast(sum(rds.Qty*rds.UnitEquivalent) as decimal(10,2)) Quantity
,(select ArName  from SystemPage where Id=rv.SystemPageId )SourceVoucherType
from StockReceiptVoucher rv
inner join StockReceiptVoucherDetails rds
on rds.MainDocId=rv.Id
inner join Item i 
on rds.ItemId=i.Id
where rv.IsActive=1 and rv.IsDeleted=0
and (@DateFrom is null or rv.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or rv.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and(@WareHouseId is null or rv.WarehouseId=@WareHouseId)
group by rds.ItemId  , i.ArName,i.Code,rv.SystemPageId

select *,(select w.ArName from Warehouse w where w.Id=@WareHouseId) WareHouseName from @StockReceipt_StockIssue 
where (@DocType is null or DocType like N'%'+@DocType+'%')

@Id int
AS
begin

    begin try
        if @trancount = 0
            begin transaction
        else

select @DepartmentId=DepartmentId, @VoucherDate=VoucherDate, @BranchId=BranchId, @CurrencyId=CurrencyId, @CurrencyEquivalent=CurrencyEquivalent, @TotalCostPrice=TotalCostPrice, @VendorOrCustomerId=VendorOrCustomerId, @Total=Total, @SalesTaxes=SalesTaxes, @WarehouseId=WarehouseId, @TotalAfterTaxes=TotalAfterTaxes, @NetTotal=NetTotal, @TotalItemDirectExpenses=TotalItemDirectExpenses, @Notes=Notes, @IsDelivered=IsDelivered, @IsAccepted=IsAccepted, @IsLinked=IsLinked, @IsCompleted=IsCompleted, @IsPosted=IsPosted, @IsActive=IsActive, @IsDeleted=IsDeleted, @DestinationWarehouseId=DestinationWarehouseId from StockTransferVoucher where Id=@Id

-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--- Set Journal Entry DocumentsCoding -----------------
--DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [JournalEntry] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
DECLARE @JournalEntryDocNum nvarchar(max)
if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
set @DepartmentCode=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			
if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end
set @JournalEntryDocNum= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from JournalEntry where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))

end
else
begin
set @JournalEntryDocNum=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@VoucherDate))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@VoucherDate))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@VoucherDate))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [StockTransferVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [StockTransferVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(VoucherDate))=(select MONTH(@VoucherDate))and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [StockTransferVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(VoucherDate))=(select YEAR(@VoucherDate))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [StockTransferVoucher] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[SubmittedTechnicianNotChosen]
@orderid int
as
select distinct technicianid from SubmittedTechnician 
join [order] on OrderId=[order].id
where orderid=@orderid

CREATE PROC [dbo].[SurgeryMedicine_Get]
@Id int
as
begin
select
i.Id as ItemId , i.ArName as ItemName
,sm.[Description] 
,s.SurgeryDate,s.TotalPrice
,p.ArName as PatientName , d.ArName as DoctorName
from SurgeryMedicine sm
inner join Surgery s on s.Id=sm.MainDocId
inner join Item i on i.Id=sm.ItemId
inner join Patient p on p.Id=s.PatientId
inner join Doctor d on d.Id=s.DoctorId
where sm.IsDeleted=0 and sm.MainDocId=@Id
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[TotalDailySales]
@DepartmentId int,@DateFrom datetime,@DateTo datetime,@UserId int ,@RepId int
as 
begin
Declare @IsPosInAllowedModule int =(select Id from AllowedModule where SystemPageId=10263)
if(@IsPosInAllowedModule>0)
begin
select PaymentMethodId,PaymentMethodName,sum(Sales) Sales,Sum(Returns) Returns,SUM(Commission) Commission ,(sum(Sales)-Sum(Returns)) NetSales from 
(
select p.Id PaymentMethodId, p.ArName as PaymentMethodName,isnull(sum(m.Amount),0) as Sales,0 as Returns ,isnull(sum(p.Commission),0) as Commission  from SalesInvoice s 
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m
on s.Id=m.SalesInvoiceId
inner join PaymentMethod p
on m.PaymentMethodId= p.Id
where s.IsActive=1 and s.IsDeleted=0
and s.PosId is not null and s.IsClosed=1
and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or s.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@UserId is null or s.UserId=@UserId)
and (@RepId is null or s.CustomerRepId=@RepId)
group by p.ArName ,p.Commission,p.Id ,PaymentMethodId

union all

select p.Id PaymentMethodId, p.ArName as PaymentMethodName,0 as Sales,isnull(sum(m.Amount),0)  as Returns ,isnull(sum(p.Commission),0) as Commission  from SalesReturns r 
inner join SalesReturnPaymentMethod m
on r.Id=m.SalesReturnsId
inner join PaymentMethod p
on m.PaymentMethodId= p.Id
where r.IsActive=1 and r.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or r.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@DateFrom is null or r.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or r.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@UserId is null or r.UserId=@UserId)
and (@RepId is null or r.CustomerRepId=@RepId)
group by p.ArName ,p.Commission,p.Id ,PaymentMethodId

) as x
group By PaymentMethodId,PaymentMethodName

end
else
begin
select PaymentMethodId,PaymentMethodName,sum(Sales) Sales,Sum(Returns) Returns,SUM(Commission) Commission ,(sum(Sales)-Sum(Returns)) NetSales from 
(
select p.Id PaymentMethodId, p.ArName as PaymentMethodName,isnull(sum(m.Amount),0) as Sales,0 as Returns ,isnull(sum(p.Commission),0) as Commission  from SalesInvoice s 
inner join SalesInvoicePaymentMethods m
on s.Id=m.SalesInvoiceId
inner join PaymentMethod p
on m.PaymentMethodId= p.Id
where s.IsActive=1 and s.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or s.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@DateFrom is null or s.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or s.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@UserId is null or s.UserId=@UserId)
and (@RepId is null or s.CustomerRepId=@RepId)
group by p.ArName ,p.Commission,p.Id ,PaymentMethodId

union all

select p.Id PaymentMethodId, p.ArName as PaymentMethodName,0 as Sales,isnull(sum(m.Amount),0)  as Returns ,isnull(sum(p.Commission),0) as Commission  from SalesReturns r 
inner join SalesReturnPaymentMethod m
on r.Id=m.SalesReturnsId
inner join PaymentMethod p
on m.PaymentMethodId= p.Id
where r.IsActive=1 and r.IsDeleted=0
and (@DepartmentId is null or r.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@DateFrom is null or r.VoucherDate>=@DateFrom) and (@DateTo is null or r.VoucherDate<=@DateTo)
and (@UserId is null or r.UserId=@UserId)
and (@RepId is null or r.CustomerRepId=@RepId)
group by p.ArName ,p.Commission,p.Id ,PaymentMethodId

) as x
group By PaymentMethodId,PaymentMethodName

end

end

CREATE proc [dbo].[UpdateItemQuantities]
@Date datetime
as
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
DECLARE @itemIdsOut int, @id int,@WarehouseId int,@DepartmentId int, @qty float
declare itemCur cursor for select [ItemId],WarehouseId,DepartmentId from ItemsToBeUpdatedQty
--declare @EgyptTime datetime =(select dateadd(hour, 2, getutcdate()))
open itemCur
fetch next from itemCur into @id,@WarehouseId,@DepartmentId
while @@FETCH_STATUS=0
begin
	select @qty=dbo.CalculateItemQuantityInWarehouse(@WarehouseId,@id,null,null,@DepartmentId)
	if((select count(*) from ItemQuantity where ItemId=@id and WarehouseId=@WarehouseId)=0)
	begin

	insert into [dbo].[ItemQuantity]([ItemId],[Qty],[Date],[WarehouseId],[DepartmentId]) values (@id, ISNULL(@qty,0),@Date,@WarehouseId,@DepartmentId)

	end
	else 
	begin

	update [dbo].[ItemQuantity]  set Qty=@qty,[Date]=@Date where  ItemId=@id and WarehouseId=@WarehouseId

	end
	fetch next from itemCur into @id,@WarehouseId,@DepartmentId
end
close itemCur
deallocate itemCur
delete from ItemsToBeUpdatedQty

END

CREATE   PROC dbo.VehicleSalesDashboard
(
    @ReportMode int = 1,
    @DepartmentId int = null,
    @WarehouseId int = null,
    @BranchId int = null,
    @DateFrom datetime = null,
    @DateTo datetime = null,
    @CarTypeId int = null,
    @CarModelId int = null,
    @CarColorId int = null,
    @ManufacturingYear int = null,
    @VendorOrCustomerId int = null,
    @VehicleStatusId int = null,
    @ChassisNo nvarchar(100) = null
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#VehicleData') IS NOT NULL
        DROP TABLE #VehicleData;

    CREATE TABLE #VehicleData
    (
        VehicleStockId int,
        ItemId int,
        ItemName nvarchar(500),

        ChassisNo nvarchar(100),
        EngineNo nvarchar(100),

        CarTypeId int null,
        CarTypeName nvarchar(200) null,

        CarModelId int null,
        CarModelName nvarchar(200) null,

        CarColorId int null,
        CarColorName nvarchar(200) null,

        ManufacturingYear int null,
        PlateNo nvarchar(50) null,
        VehicleNotes nvarchar(500) null,

        PurchaseInvoiceId int null,
        PurchaseInvoiceDetailId int null,
        PurchaseDate datetime null,
        PurchaseCost money null,

        SalesInvoiceId int null,
        SalesInvoiceDetailId int null,
        SalesDate datetime null,
        SalePrice money null,

        WarehouseId int null,
        WarehouseName nvarchar(200) null,

        BranchId int null,
        BranchName nvarchar(200) null,

        VehicleStatusId int,
        VehicleStatusName nvarchar(100),

        CustomerId int null,
        CustomerName nvarchar(500) null,

        ProfitValue money null,
        DaysToSell int null,
        DaysInStock int null
    );

    INSERT INTO #VehicleData
    (
        VehicleStockId,
        ItemId, ItemName,
        ChassisNo, EngineNo,
        CarTypeId, CarTypeName,
        CarModelId, CarModelName,
        CarColorId, CarColorName,
        ManufacturingYear, PlateNo, VehicleNotes,
        PurchaseInvoiceId, PurchaseInvoiceDetailId, PurchaseDate, PurchaseCost,
        SalesInvoiceId, SalesInvoiceDetailId, SalesDate, SalePrice,
        WarehouseId, WarehouseName,
        BranchId, BranchName,
        VehicleStatusId, VehicleStatusName,
        CustomerId, CustomerName,
        ProfitValue, DaysToSell, DaysInStock
    )
    SELECT
        vs.Id,
        vs.ItemId,
        i.ArName,

        vs.ChassisNo,
        vs.EngineNo,

        vs.CarTypeId,
        ct.ArName,

        vs.CarModelId,
        cm.ArName,

        vs.CarColorId,
        cc.ArName,

        vs.ManufacturingYear,
        vs.PlateNo,
        vs.VehicleNotes,

        vs.PurchaseInvoiceId,
        vs.PurchaseInvoiceDetailId,
        vs.PurchaseDate,
        vs.PurchaseCost,

        vs.SalesInvoiceId,
        vs.SalesInvoiceDetailId,
        vs.SalesDate,
        vs.SalePrice,

        vs.WarehouseId,
        w.ArName,

        vs.BranchId,
        b.ArName,

        vs.VehicleStatusId,
        ISNULL(vst.ArName, vst.EnName),

        s.VendorOrCustomerId,
        c.ArName,

        ISNULL(vs.SalePrice, 0) - ISNULL(vs.PurchaseCost, 0),
        CASE 
            WHEN vs.PurchaseDate IS NOT NULL AND vs.SalesDate IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, vs.PurchaseDate, vs.SalesDate)
            ELSE NULL
        END,
        CASE
            WHEN vs.VehicleStatusId = 1 AND vs.PurchaseDate IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, vs.PurchaseDate, GETDATE())
            WHEN vs.VehicleStatusId <> 1 AND vs.PurchaseDate IS NOT NULL AND vs.SalesDate IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, vs.PurchaseDate, vs.SalesDate)
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM dbo.VehicleStock vs
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Item i
        ON i.Id = vs.ItemId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.CarType ct
        ON ct.Id = vs.CarTypeId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.CarModel cm
        ON cm.Id = vs.CarModelId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.CarColor cc
        ON cc.Id = vs.CarColorId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.VehicleStatus vst
        ON vst.Id = vs.VehicleStatusId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Warehouse w
        ON w.Id = vs.WarehouseId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Branch b
        ON b.Id = vs.BranchId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.SalesInvoice s
        ON s.Id = vs.SalesInvoiceId
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Customer c
        ON c.Id = s.VendorOrCustomerId
    WHERE vs.IsDeleted = 0
      AND (@WarehouseId IS NULL OR vs.WarehouseId = @WarehouseId)
      AND (@BranchId IS NULL OR vs.BranchId = @BranchId)
      AND (@CarTypeId IS NULL OR vs.CarTypeId = @CarTypeId)
      AND (@CarModelId IS NULL OR vs.CarModelId = @CarModelId)
      AND (@CarColorId IS NULL OR vs.CarColorId = @CarColorId)
      AND (@ManufacturingYear IS NULL OR vs.ManufacturingYear = @ManufacturingYear)
      AND (@VehicleStatusId IS NULL OR vs.VehicleStatusId = @VehicleStatusId)
      AND (@ChassisNo IS NULL OR vs.ChassisNo LIKE '%' + @ChassisNo + '%')
      AND (
            @DateFrom IS NULL
            OR (vs.PurchaseDate >= @DateFrom)
            OR (vs.SalesDate >= @DateFrom)
          )
      AND (
            @DateTo IS NULL
            OR (vs.PurchaseDate <= @DateTo)
            OR (vs.SalesDate <= @DateTo)
          )
      AND (@VendorOrCustomerId IS NULL OR s.VendorOrCustomerId = @VendorOrCustomerId);

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 1 تفصيلي لكل سيارة
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 1
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            VehicleStockId,
            ItemId,
            ItemName,
            ChassisNo,
            EngineNo,
            CarTypeId,
            CarTypeName,
            CarModelId,
            CarModelName,
            CarColorId,
            CarColorName,
            ManufacturingYear,
            PlateNo,
            VehicleNotes,
            PurchaseInvoiceId,
            PurchaseInvoiceDetailId,
            PurchaseDate,
            PurchaseCost,
            SalesInvoiceId,
            SalesInvoiceDetailId,
            SalesDate,
            SalePrice,
            WarehouseId,
            WarehouseName,
            BranchId,
            BranchName,
            VehicleStatusId,
            VehicleStatusName,
            CustomerId,
            CustomerName,
            ProfitValue,
            DaysToSell,
            DaysInStock
        FROM #VehicleData
        ORDER BY ISNULL(SalesDate, PurchaseDate) DESC, VehicleStockId DESC;
        RETURN;
    END

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 2 تجميع حسب النوع/الموديل/اللون/السنة
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 2
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            CarTypeId,
            CarTypeName,
            CarModelId,
            CarModelName,
            CarColorId,
            CarColorName,
            ManufacturingYear,
            COUNT(*) CarsCount,
            SUM(ISNULL(PurchaseCost,0)) TotalPurchaseCost,
            SUM(ISNULL(SalePrice,0)) TotalSales,
            SUM(ISNULL(ProfitValue,0)) TotalProfit
        FROM #VehicleData
        GROUP BY
            CarTypeId, CarTypeName,
            CarModelId, CarModelName,
            CarColorId, CarColorName,
            ManufacturingYear
        ORDER BY SUM(ISNULL(SalePrice,0)) DESC, COUNT(*) DESC;
        RETURN;
    END

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 3 Dashboard Summary
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 3
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) TotalVehicles,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) InStockCars,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ReservedCars,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) SoldCars,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ReturnedCars,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) CancelledCars,
            SUM(ISNULL(PurchaseCost,0)) TotalPurchaseCost,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 3 THEN ISNULL(SalePrice,0) ELSE 0 END) TotalSales,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 3 THEN ISNULL(ProfitValue,0) ELSE 0 END) TotalProfit,
            AVG(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 3 THEN NULLIF(SalePrice,0) END) AvgSalePrice,
            AVG(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 3 THEN DaysToSell END) AvgDaysToSell
        FROM #VehicleData;
        RETURN;
    END

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 4 أفضل الموديلات
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 4
    BEGIN
        SELECT TOP 10
            CarTypeName,
            CarModelName,
            CarColorName,
            COUNT(*) CarsCount,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 3 THEN ISNULL(SalePrice,0) ELSE 0 END) TotalSales,
            SUM(CASE WHEN VehicleStatusId = 3 THEN ISNULL(ProfitValue,0) ELSE 0 END) TotalProfit
        FROM #VehicleData
        GROUP BY CarTypeName, CarModelName, CarColorName
        ORDER BY TotalSales DESC, CarsCount DESC;
        RETURN;
    END

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 5 الربحية
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 5
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            CarTypeName,
            CarModelName,
            COUNT(*) CarsCount,
            SUM(ISNULL(PurchaseCost,0)) TotalCost,
            SUM(ISNULL(SalePrice,0)) TotalSales,
            SUM(ISNULL(ProfitValue,0)) TotalProfit,
            AVG(DaysToSell) AvgDaysToSell
        FROM #VehicleData
        WHERE VehicleStatusId = 3
        GROUP BY CarTypeName, CarModelName
        ORDER BY TotalProfit DESC;
        RETURN;
    END

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 6 المخزون الحالي
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 6
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            VehicleStockId,
            ItemName,
            ChassisNo,
            EngineNo,
            CarTypeName,
            CarModelName,
            CarColorName,
            ManufacturingYear,
            PlateNo,
            VehicleNotes,
            PurchaseDate,
            PurchaseCost,
            WarehouseName,
            BranchName,
            VehicleStatusName,
            DaysInStock
        FROM #VehicleData
        WHERE VehicleStatusId = 1
        ORDER BY DaysInStock DESC, PurchaseDate ASC;
        RETURN;
    END

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 7 زمن البيع
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 7
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            VehicleStockId,
            ItemName,
            ChassisNo,
            CarTypeName,
            CarModelName,
            CarColorName,
            ManufacturingYear,
            PurchaseDate,
            SalesDate,
            DaysToSell,
            PurchaseCost,
            SalePrice,
            ProfitValue,
            CustomerName
        FROM #VehicleData
        WHERE VehicleStatusId = 3
          AND SalesDate IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY DaysToSell DESC, SalesDate DESC;
        RETURN;
    END

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 8 توزيع الحالات
    ------------------------------------------------
    IF @ReportMode = 8
    BEGIN
        SELECT
            VehicleStatusId,
            VehicleStatusName,
            COUNT(*) CarsCount,
            SUM(ISNULL(PurchaseCost,0)) TotalPurchaseCost,
            SUM(ISNULL(SalePrice,0)) TotalSales
        FROM #VehicleData
        GROUP BY VehicleStatusId, VehicleStatusName
        ORDER BY VehicleStatusId;
        RETURN;
    END
END

CREATE proc [dbo].[Vendor_SaveOpeningBalanceBulk]
            @VBalXML nvarchar(max),
			@UserId int
as
begin tran 

declare @Vendor table(
	[Id] int,
    [ObDebit] money,
    [ObCredit] money
)
DECLARE @intDocHandle int
EXEC sp_xml_preparedocument @intDocHandle OUTPUT, @VBalXML
insert @Vendor([Id],[ObDebit],[ObCredit])
select * from OPENXML(@intDocHandle,'/DocumentElement/vBals', 2)
with(
	[Id] int,
    [ObDebit] money,
    [ObCredit] money
)
EXEC sp_xml_removedocument @intDocHandle

declare @CCId int,@ObDebit money,@ObCredit money
declare ACCBCursor cursor for select [Id],[ObDebit],[ObCredit] from @Vendor 
open ACCBCursor
fetch next from ACCBCursor into @CCId,@ObDebit,@ObCredit
while @@FETCH_STATUS = 0 
begin

declare @VendorAccId int, @OldObDebit money, @OldObCredit money

select @VendorAccId = [AccountId],
       @OldObDebit = [ObDebit],
	   @OldObCredit = [ObCredit]
from [dbo].[Vendor] where [Id] = @CCId

update [dbo].[Vendor]
set [ObDebit] = @ObDebit,
    [ObCredit] = @ObCredit,
	[UserId] = @UserId
where [Id] = @CCId

exec [dbo].[ChartOfAccount_UpdateAccountOpeningBalance] @VendorAccId,@OldObDebit,@OldObCredit,@ObDebit,@ObCredit,@UserId

fetch next from ACCBCursor into @CCId,@ObDebit,@ObCredit
end
close ACCBCursor
deallocate ACCBCursor


if @@error <>0
begin
rollback tran 
return
end
else
begin
commit tran
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[VendorDebitAgesDetails_Get] --null,null
@DepartmentId int ,@VendorId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
as 
begin
select  v.ArName as VendorName, p.DocumentNumber as PurchaseInvoiceNo
,p.VoucherDate,p.DueDate, p.TotalAfterTaxes 
,(isnull(m.Amount,0)-ISNULL( m.PaidAmount,0)) as Remain ,p.TotalAfterTaxes-(isnull(m.Amount,0)-ISNULL( m.PaidAmount,0)) as Paid,
isnull(DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate ),0) as NoOfDays ,isnull(v.CreditLimitAmount,0) as CreditLimitAmount ,isnull(v.CreditLimitPeriod,0) as CreditLimitPeriod
,(select ArName  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate ) ) as DebitType
,(select [From]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate ) )  as 'From'
,(select [To]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate ) ) as 'To'
from PurchaseInvoice p 
inner join Vendor v on p.VendorOrCustomerId=v.Id
inner join PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods m on p.Id=m.PurchaseInvoiceId
where p.IsActive=1 and p.IsDeleted=0 and m.PaymentMethodId=2
and (@DepartmentId is null or p.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@VendorId is null or p.VendorOrCustomerId=@VendorId)
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
group by  p.DocumentNumber,v.ArName,p.VoucherDate,p.DueDate ,p.TotalAfterTaxes,m.Amount,m.PaidAmount,v.CreditLimitAmount,v.CreditLimitPeriod
end

CREATE proc [dbo].[VendorDebitAgesTotal_Get] --null,null
@DepartmentId int , @VendorId int,@ActivityId int,@CompanyId int
as 
begin
select sum( m.Amount-m.PaidAmount) as Total,(DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate )) as NoOfDays 
,(select ArName  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate ) ) as DebitType
,(select [From]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate ) )  as 'From'
,(select [To]  from DebitAgesType where [from] <= (DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate )) and [to]>=DATEDIFF(DAY, p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate ) ) as 'To'
from PurchaseInvoice  p
inner join PurchaseInvoicePaymentMethods m on m.PurchaseInvoiceId=p.Id
where m.PaymentMethodId=2 and m.Amount > m.PaidAmount 
and (@DepartmentId is null or p.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
and (@VendorId is null or p.VendorOrCustomerId=@VendorId)
and(@ActivityId is null or @ActivityId=(select ActivityId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
and(@CompanyId is null or @CompanyId=(select CompanyId From Department where Id=@DepartmentId))
group by p.VoucherDate, p.DueDate
order by [From]
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[VendorOB_Get]
    @VendorId     int,
    @DepartmentId int,
    @DateFrom     datetime,
    @DateTo       datetime
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @VendorOB TABLE(
        VendorReceiptNumber nvarchar(max) null,
        Debit money null,
        Credit money null,
        ArName nvarchar(100) null,
        [JournalDocNum] nvarchar(100) null,
        [Date] datetime null,
        [DocumentNumber] nvarchar(100) null,
        [VendorArName] nvarchar(100) null,
        [DebitBalance] money null,
        [CreditBalance] money null
    );

    DECLARE @VendorArName nvarchar(100) = (SELECT ArName FROM Vendor WHERE Id = @VendorId);
    DECLARE @periodStart datetime = (SELECT TOP 1 PeriodStart FROM FinancialPeriods WHERE IsActive=1 AND Opened=1 AND [Status]='Active');

    INSERT INTO @VendorOB (VendorReceiptNumber, Debit, Credit, ArName, [JournalDocNum], [Date], [DocumentNumber], [VendorArName])
    SELECT *, @VendorArName AS [VendorArName]
    FROM (
        -- رصيد افتتاحي
        SELECT NULL AS VendorReceiptNumber,
               ISNULL(SUM([OBDebit]),0) AS Debit,
               ISNULL(SUM([OBCredit]),0) AS Credit,
               N'رصيد افتتاحي' AS ArName,
               '' AS [JournalDocNum],
               @periodStart AS [Date],
               '' AS [DocumentNumber]
        FROM [dbo].[VendorOpenningBalance]
        WHERE VendorId=@VendorId AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

        UNION
        -- فاتورة شراء
        SELECT PurchaseInvoice.VendorInvoiceNumber, d.Debit, d.Credit, sp.ArName,
               je.DocumentNumber, je.[Date], PurchaseInvoice.DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntryDetail d
        RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry je ON d.JournalEntryId = je.Id
        LEFT  JOIN SystemPage sp   ON sp.Id = je.SourcePageId
        RIGHT JOIN PurchaseInvoice ON PurchaseInvoice.Id = je.SourceId AND je.SourcePageId = 57
        WHERE je.SourceId IN (
                 SELECT Id FROM PurchaseInvoice
                 WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND VendorOrCustomerId=@VendorId
                   AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
              )
          AND d.AccountId = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = PurchaseInvoice.DepartmentId)
          AND (@DateFrom IS NULL OR je.[Date] >= @DateFrom)
          AND (@DateTo   IS NULL OR je.[Date] <= @DateTo)

        UNION
        -- مرتجع شراء
        SELECT NULL, d.Debit, d.Credit, sp.ArName,
               je.DocumentNumber, je.[Date], pr.DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntryDetail d
        RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry je ON d.JournalEntryId = je.Id
        LEFT  JOIN SystemPage sp   ON sp.Id = je.SourcePageId
        RIGHT JOIN PurchaseReturns pr ON pr.Id = je.SourceId AND je.SourcePageId = 3141
        WHERE je.SourceId IN (
                 SELECT Id FROM PurchaseReturns
                 WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND VendorOrCustomerId=@VendorId
                   AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
              )
          AND d.AccountId = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = pr.DepartmentId)
          AND (@DateFrom IS NULL OR je.[Date] >= @DateFrom)
          AND (@DateTo   IS NULL OR je.[Date] <= @DateTo)

        UNION
        -- سند صرف نقدي
        SELECT NULL, d.Debit, d.Credit, sp.ArName,
               je.DocumentNumber, je.[Date], civ.DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntryDetail d
        RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry je ON d.JournalEntryId = je.Id
        LEFT  JOIN SystemPage sp   ON sp.Id = je.SourcePageId
        RIGHT JOIN CashIssueVoucher civ ON civ.Id = je.SourceId AND je.SourcePageId = 21
        WHERE je.SourceId IN (
                 SELECT Id FROM CashIssueVoucher
                 WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND IsActive=1 AND VendorId=@VendorId
                   AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
              )
          AND d.AccountId = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = civ.DepartmentId)
          AND (@DateFrom IS NULL OR je.[Date] >= @DateFrom)
          AND (@DateTo   IS NULL OR je.[Date] <= @DateTo)

        UNION
        -- سند قبض نقدي
        SELECT crv.VendorReceiptNumber, d.Debit, d.Credit, sp.ArName,
               je.DocumentNumber, je.[Date], crv.DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntryDetail d
        RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry je ON d.JournalEntryId = je.Id
        LEFT  JOIN SystemPage sp   ON sp.Id = je.SourcePageId
        RIGHT JOIN CashReceiptVoucher crv ON crv.Id = je.SourceId AND je.SourcePageId = 22
        WHERE je.SourceId IN (
                 SELECT Id FROM CashReceiptVoucher
                 WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND IsActive=1 AND VendorId=@VendorId
                   AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
              )
          AND d.AccountId = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = crv.DepartmentId)
          AND (@DateFrom IS NULL OR je.[Date] >= @DateFrom)
          AND (@DateTo   IS NULL OR je.[Date] <= @DateTo)

        UNION
        -- شيك صرف
        SELECT NULL, d.Debit, d.Credit, sp.ArName,
               je.DocumentNumber, je.[Date], ci.DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntryDetail d
        RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry je ON d.JournalEntryId = je.Id
        LEFT  JOIN SystemPage sp   ON sp.Id = je.SourcePageId
        RIGHT JOIN ChequeIssue ci  ON ci.Id = je.SourceId AND je.SourcePageId = 23
        WHERE je.SourceId IN (
                 SELECT Id FROM ChequeIssue
                 WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND VendorId=@VendorId
                   AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
              )
          AND d.AccountId = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = ci.DepartmentId)
          AND (@DateFrom IS NULL OR je.[Date] >= @DateFrom)
          AND (@DateTo   IS NULL OR je.[Date] <= @DateTo)

        UNION
        -- شيك قبض
        SELECT NULL, d.Debit, d.Credit, sp.ArName,
               je.DocumentNumber, je.[Date], cr.DocumentNumber
        FROM JournalEntryDetail d
        RIGHT JOIN JournalEntry je ON d.JournalEntryId = je.Id
        LEFT  JOIN SystemPage sp   ON sp.Id = je.SourcePageId
        RIGHT JOIN ChequeReceipt cr ON cr.Id = je.SourceId AND je.SourcePageId = 24
        WHERE je.SourceId IN (
                 SELECT Id FROM ChequeReceipt
                 WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND VendorId=@VendorId
                   AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
              )
          AND d.AccountId = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = cr.DepartmentId)
          AND (@DateFrom IS NULL OR je.[Date] >= @DateFrom)
          AND (@DateTo   IS NULL OR je.[Date] <= @DateTo)

        UNION
        -- NEW: أي قيد يومية عادي مذكور فيه المورد في تفاصيل القيد (PartyType=1)
        SELECT NULL AS VendorReceiptNumber,
               d.Debit, d.Credit,
               COALESCE(sp.ArName, N'قيد يومية') AS ArName,
               je.DocumentNumber AS [JournalDocNum],
               je.[Date],
               '' AS [DocumentNumber]
        FROM JournalEntryDetail d
        INNER JOIN JournalEntry je ON d.JournalEntryId = je.Id
        LEFT  JOIN SystemPage  sp ON sp.Id = je.SourcePageId
        WHERE d.PartyType = 1
          AND d.PartyId   = @VendorId
          AND d.AccountId = (SELECT VendorsAccountId FROM Department WHERE Id = je.DepartmentId)
          AND (@DepartmentId IS NULL OR je.DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
          AND (@DateFrom IS NULL OR je.[Date] >= @DateFrom)
          AND (@DateTo   IS NULL OR je.[Date] <= @DateTo)
          -- استبعاد الصفحات التي تم احتسابها بالفعل في يونيات سابقة لتفادي التكرار
          AND (je.SourcePageId IS NULL OR je.SourcePageId NOT IN (21,22,23,24,57,3141))
    ) AS VendorOBInner
    WHERE Debit > 0 OR Credit > 0
    ORDER BY [Date];

    -- رصيد تراكمي (كما هو عندك)
    DECLARE @date datetime, @debitBalance money, @creditBalance money;
    DECLARE OBCur CURSOR FOR SELECT [Date] FROM @VendorOB;
    OPEN OBCur;
    FETCH NEXT FROM OBCur INTO @date;
    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        SET @debitBalance  = (SELECT SUM(Debit)  FROM @VendorOB WHERE [Date] <= @date OR [Date] IS NULL);
        SET @creditBalance = (SELECT SUM(Credit) FROM @VendorOB WHERE [Date] <= @date OR [Date] IS NULL);

        IF @debitBalance > @creditBalance
        BEGIN
            SET @debitBalance  = ISNULL(@debitBalance,0) - ISNULL(@creditBalance,0);
            SET @creditBalance = 0;
        END
        ELSE
        BEGIN
            SET @creditBalance = ISNULL(@creditBalance,0) - ISNULL(@debitBalance,0);
            SET @debitBalance  = 0;
        END

        UPDATE @VendorOB
        SET DebitBalance = @debitBalance,
            CreditBalance = @creditBalance
        WHERE [Date] = @date;

        FETCH NEXT FROM OBCur INTO @date;
    END
    CLOSE OBCur; DEALLOCATE OBCur;

    SELECT * FROM @VendorOB ORDER BY [Date];
END

-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WarehouseOB_Insert]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@BranchId [int] ,
	@WarehouseId [int],
	@DepartmentId [int],
	@Date [datetime],
	@CurrencyId [int],
	@CurrencyEquivalent [float],
	@MoneyTotal [money],
	@IsActive [bit],
	@IsDeleted [bit],
	@IsLinked [bit],
	@IsPosted [bit],
	@IsCompleted [bit] ,
	@IsAccepted [bit] ,
	@UserId [int],
	@Notes [nvarchar](max) ,
	@Image [nvarchar](max),
	@WarehouseOBDetails NTEXT,
	@SerialNumbers NTEXT,
	@PatchDetails NTEXT
AS
BEGIN TRAN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @WarehouseOBDetailsOut int, @SerialNumbersOut int , @PatchDetailsOut int
	--DECLARE @DocumentNumber int =  isnull((select top(1) convert (int,[DocumentNumber]) from [WarehouseOB] where [WarehouseId]=@WarehouseId order by [Id] desc),0)+1
----------- DocumentsCoding -----------
-- Variable Declaration
Declare @NoOfDigit int,@CodingTypeId int,@IsZerosFills bit,@YearFormat int, @DocumentCodingCode nvarchar(50)
,@DocumentNumber nvarchar(max) ,@LastDocNo nvarchar(50), @length int
, @Var nvarchar(50), @DocVar nvarchar(50), @DocNo nvarchar(50),@NewDocNo nvarchar(max)
declare @IsExistInDocumentsCoding bit =0
declare @MonthFormat nvarchar(20)= (select MONTH(@Date))
declare @yearFormatString nvarchar(20)=(select convert(nvarchar(20),(Year(@Date))))
declare @DepartmentCode nvarchar(max)=(select Code from Department where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and Id=@DepartmentId)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

if((select convert(int,@MonthFormat))<10)
begin
set @MonthFormat='0'+@MonthFormat
end
else
begin
set @MonthFormat=@MonthFormat
end

if((select convert(int,@DepartmentCode))<10)
begin
set @DepartmentCode= '0'+ (select convert(nvarchar(max),@DepartmentCode))
end
else
begin
set @DepartmentCode=@DepartmentCode
end
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)

if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --One Department
begin
set @DocumentCodingCode=(select top(1) Code from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
if(@DocumentCodingCode is null) --Old Documents Coding
begin
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=0
end
else
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and AllDepartments=1)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end
end
else --AllDepartments
begin
set @NoOfDigit=(select top(1) DigitsNo from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @CodingTypeId=(select top(1) CodingTypeId from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsZerosFills=(select top(1) IsZerosFills from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @YearFormat=(select top(1) YearFormat from DocumentsCoding where IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and DepartmentId=@DepartmentId)
set @IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1
end

if(@IsExistInDocumentsCoding=1) -- New Documents Coding
begin
if(@YearFormat=2)
begin
set @YearFormat=(select SUBSTRING(@yearFormatString,3,2))
end
else --fullYear
begin
set @YearFormat=(select convert(int,(select Year(@Date))))
end
            if(@CodingTypeId=1)--آلى
            begin
            set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [WarehouseOB] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=2)--متصل شهري
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [WarehouseOB] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select MONTH(Date))=(select MONTH(@Date))and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date)))) order by [Id] desc)
			end
			else if(@CodingTypeId=3)--متصل سنوي
			begin
			 set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [WarehouseOB] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 and ((select YEAR(Date))=(select YEAR(@Date))) order by [Id] desc)
			end

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)
end
else
begin
 set @DocNo=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
	set @length=@NoOfDigit-(select LEN(@DocNo))

					declare @i int =0
                        while (@i<@length) 
                       begin
                            set @NewDocNo = @DocNo
                            set @NewDocNo = (SELECT STUFF(@DocNo,1 ,0, '0'))
                            set @DocNo = @NewDocNo
							set @i=@i+1
                        end

set @DocumentNumber= @DepartmentCode+'-'+(select convert(nvarchar(max),@YearFormat))+'-'+@MonthFormat+'-'+@NewDocNo
end
else -- Old Documents Coding
begin
set @LastDocNo =  (select top(1)[DocumentNumber] from [WarehouseOB] where [DepartmentId]=@DepartmentId and IsActive=1 and IsDeleted=0 order by [Id] desc)

if (CHARINDEX('-',@LastDocNo) > 0)
begin
set @Var=(SELECT SUBSTRING(@LastDocNo,CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo, CHARINDEX('-', @LastDocNo) + 1)+1 ,(((LEN(@LastDocNo))))))
set @DocVar=(SELECT  SUBSTRING(@Var,LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)+1)),LEN(@Var) - LEN(LEFT(@Var,CHARINDEX('-', @Var)))))
set @DocumentNumber=(select convert(nvarchar(max),(select isnull(convert (int,@DocVar),0)+1)))
end
else
begin
set @DocumentNumber=(select isnull(convert (int,@LastDocNo),0)+1)
end
end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
